The gaming landscape was irrevocably altered in 1998 with the release of *Half-Life*. This groundbreaking title from Valve masterfully blended intense action with a seamless, immersive narrative, earning over 50 game-of-the-year awards and the prestigious title of Best PC Game Ever from PC Gamer. The franchise's success was further cemented by over eight million retail units sold worldwide.

### Building on a Legacy of Innovation

*Half-Life 2* picks up where its predecessor left off, amplifying the suspense, challenge, and visceral excitement that defined the original. This sequel introduces a startling new level of realism and responsiveness, creating a world where the player's actions have a tangible impact on their surroundings. From the physical environment to the very behaviors and emotions of allies and adversaries, your presence is felt.

### Gordon Freeman's Return

Players once again step into the shoes of research scientist Gordon Freeman. He finds himself on an Earth ravaged by alien invaders, its resources plundered and its population dwindling. Freeman is tasked with the monumental challenge of saving the world from the consequences of his past actions at Black Mesa, with the hopes of many he cares about resting on his shoulders.

### The Power of the Source Engine

The intense, real-time gameplay of *Half-Life 2* is powered by Valve's proprietary Source® engine technology. This advanced engine delivers significant enhancements across several key areas:

*   **Characters:** An advanced facial animation system brings characters to life with unprecedented sophistication. Featuring 40 distinct facial muscles, these human characters can convey a full spectrum of emotions and react to the player with remarkable fluidity and intelligence.
*   **Physics:** The game's physics engine ensures that objects, from small pebbles to massive trucks, behave realistically, adhering to the fundamental laws of mass, friction, gravity, and buoyancy.
*   **Graphics:** Source's shader-based renderer, similar to the technology used by Pixar for films like *Toy Story*® and *Monsters, Inc.*®, creates visually stunning and highly realistic environments that set a new benchmark for video games.
*   **Artificial Intelligence (AI):** Both friendly and enemy characters exhibit intelligent behavior. They are capable of assessing threats, navigating complex terrain, and even improvising weapons from available resources, rather than simply charging blindly into conflict.

Name: Half-Life
Description:
Named Game of the Year by over 50 publications, Valve's debut title blends action and adventure with award-winning technology to create a frighteningly realistic world where players must think to survive. Also includes an exciting multiplayer mode that allows you to play against friends and enemies around the world.

Name: Grand Theft Auto V
Description:
When a young street hustler, a retired bank robber and a terrifying psychopath find themselves entangled with some of the most frightening and deranged elements of the criminal underworld, the U.S. government and the entertainment industry, they must pull off a series of dangerous heists to survive in a ruthless city in which they can trust nobody, least of all each other. Grand Theft Auto V for PC offers players the option to explore the award-winning world of Los Santos and Blaine County in resolutions of up to 4k and beyond, as well as the chance to experience the game running at 60 frames per second. The game offers players a huge range of PC-specific customization options, including over 25 separate configurable settings for texture quality, shaders, tessellation, anti-aliasing and more, as well as support and extensive customization for mouse and keyboard controls. Additional options include a population density slider to control car and pedestrian traffic, as well as dual and triple monitor support, 3D compatibility, and plug-and-play controller support. Grand Theft Auto V for PC also includes Grand Theft Auto Online, with support for 30 players and two spectators. Grand Theft Auto Online for PC will include all existing gameplay upgrades and Rockstar-created content released since the launch of Grand Theft Auto Online, including Heists and Adversary modes. The PC version of Grand Theft Auto V and Grand Theft Auto Online features First Person Mode, giving players the chance to explore the incredibly detailed world of Los Santos and Blaine County in an entirely new way. Grand Theft Auto V for PC also brings the debut of the Rockstar Editor, a powerful suite of creative tools to quickly and easily capture, edit and share game footage from within Grand Theft Auto V and Grand Theft Auto Online. The Rockstar Editor’s Director Mode allows players the ability to stage their own scenes using prominent story characters, pedestrians, and even animals to bring their vision to life. Along with advanced camera manipulation and editing effects including fast and slow motion, and an array of camera filters, players can add their own music using songs from GTAV radio stations, or dynamically control the intensity of the game’s score. Completed videos can be uploaded directly from the Rockstar Editor to YouTube and the Rockstar Games Social Club for easy sharing. Soundtrack artists The Alchemist and Oh No return as hosts of the new radio station, The Lab FM. The station features new and exclusive music from the production duo based on and inspired by the game’s original soundtrack. Collaborating guest artists include Earl Sweatshirt, Freddie Gibbs, Little Dragon, Killer Mike, Sam Herring from Future Islands, and more. Players can also discover Los Santos and Blaine County while enjoying their own music through Self Radio, a new radio station that will host player-created custom soundtracks. Special access content requires Rockstar Games Social Club account. Visit for details.

Name: Portal 2
Description:
Portal 2 draws from the award-winning formula of innovative gameplay, story, and music that earned the original Portal over 70 industry accolades and created a cult following. The single-player portion of Portal 2 introduces a cast of dynamic new characters, a host of fresh puzzle elements, and a much larger set of devious test chambers. Players will explore never-before-seen areas of the Aperture Science Labs and be reunited with GLaDOS, the occasionally murderous computer companion who guided them through the original game. The game’s two-player cooperative mode features its own entirely separate campaign with a unique story, test chambers, and two new player characters. This new mode forces players to reconsider everything they thought they knew about portals. Success will require them to not just act cooperatively, but to think cooperatively. Product Features Extensive single player: Featuring next generation gameplay and a wildly-engrossing story. Complete two-person co-op: Multiplayer game featuring its own dedicated story, characters, and gameplay. Advanced physics: Allows for the creation of a whole new range of interesting challenges, producing a much larger but not harder game. Original music. Massive sequel: The original Portal was named 2007's Game of the Year by over 30 publications worldwide. Editing Tools: Portal 2 editing tools will be included.

Portal 2 is a highly anticipated sequel that builds upon the groundbreaking success of its predecessor, which garnered over 70 industry accolades and cultivated a dedicated cult following. This innovative title expands on the original's acclaimed formula of engaging gameplay, compelling narrative, and memorable music.

The single-player experience in Portal 2 introduces players to a vibrant new cast of characters, a variety of novel puzzle mechanics, and an expanded array of challenging test chambers. According to Valve, the developers, players will venture into previously unexplored sections of the Aperture Science Laboratories. A key element of the single-player campaign is the return of GLaDOS, the famously unpredictable and occasionally homicidal artificial intelligence who served as a guide in the first game.

Portal 2 also features a robust two-player cooperative mode, offering a completely distinct campaign. This cooperative mode boasts its own unique storyline, specialized test chambers, and introduces two new player characters. As noted by critics, this mode fundamentally alters the player's understanding of portal mechanics, demanding not only cooperative action but also cooperative thinking to overcome its intricate challenges.

Key product features of Portal 2 include:

*   **Extensive Single-Player Campaign:** This mode delivers next-generation gameplay and a deeply immersive narrative.
*   **Complete Two-Person Co-op:** A dedicated multiplayer experience featuring its own unique story, characters, and gameplay mechanics.
*   **Advanced Physics Engine:** This allows for the creation of a wide spectrum of inventive challenges, resulting in a larger, yet still accessible, game experience.
*   **Original Soundtrack:** A new collection of music designed to enhance the game's atmosphere.
*   **Massive Sequel:** The original Portal was widely recognized, with over 30 publications worldwide naming it Game of the Year for 2007.
*   **Included Editing Tools:** Portal 2 will come with its own set of editing tools, empowering players to create and share their own test chambers.

Name: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim
Description:
EPIC FANTASY REBORN The next chapter in the highly anticipated Elder Scrolls saga arrives from the makers of the 2006 and 2008 Games of the Year, Bethesda Game Studios. Skyrim reimagines and revolutionizes the open-world fantasy epic, bringing to life a complete virtual world open for you to explore any way you choose. LIVE ANOTHER LIFE, IN ANOTHER WORLD Play any type of character you can imagine, and do whatever you want; the legendary freedom of choice, storytelling, and adventure of The Elder Scrolls is realized like never before. ALL NEW GRAPHICS AND GAMEPLAY ENGINE Skyrim’s new game engine brings to life a complete virtual world with rolling clouds, rugged mountains, bustling cities, lush fields, and ancient dungeons. YOU ARE WHAT YOU PLAY Choose from hundreds of weapons, spells, and abilities. The new character system allows you to play any way you want and define yourself through your actions. DRAGON RETURN Battle ancient dragons like you’ve never seen. As Dragonborn, learn their secrets and harness their power for yourself.

## Mass Effect 2: A New Threat and a Desperate Alliance

Two years after Commander Shepard's triumph over the Reapers, a new, chilling danger emerges. Human settlements on the galaxy's edge are disappearing. To face this dire threat, Shepard must join forces with Cerberus, a secretive group focused on human dominance.

### Building a Specialized Team

The mission is incredibly risky. Shepard's goal: gather the galaxy's best and lead the most advanced ship ever built. This select group is vital; their skills and allegiance will decide the outcome.

### Deeper Conversations and Personalization

Mass Effect 2 enhances the series' well-known dialogue system. A more active camera now follows characters, adding to the dramatic, movie-like feel of conversations. Importantly, Shepard can now cut into discussions at crucial points, shaping the story and affecting the mission's success or failure. Player control over character looks is also greater, letting you carefully design your Commander Shepard, from sex and face to skills and personality.

### Sharper Combat and Player Agency

The updated combat system provides more strategic options. Players can aim for enemy weak spots and dismember opponents using a range of weapons. Ultimately, how you win, or fall to The Collectors, depends on the player's decisions.

### Core Elements:

*   **Continuing Saga:** This second part of BioWare's sci-fi series follows Commander Shepard's journey and humanity's growth.
*   **Crew Allegiance Matters:** Success relies on the team you enlist and their firm loyalty.
*   **Engaging Experience:** Great visuals and a better dialogue system deliver a unique story.
*   **Thrilling Battles:** Many upgrades improve the third-person shooting action.
*   **Extensive Customization:** Design your own Commander Shepard.

***

**Online Access Note:** Online features need an EA Account, a serial code, internet access, and agreement to the End User License. EA may end online features with 30 days' notice.

## Explore the Expansive RPG World of Oblivion: Game of the Year Edition Deluxe

**The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition Deluxe** offers a comprehensive version of the award-winning role-playing game. This edition provides a vast, dynamic world where players have the freedom to pursue the main quest or create their own unique adventures.

### Unparalleled Freedom and Immersion

Oblivion is renowned for its **innovative blend of open-ended gameplay and advanced graphics**. Players can **design and inhabit any character they envision**, from a heroic warrior to a stealthy assassin or a powerful mage. The game's **first-person combat and magic systems** deliver an immersive and engaging experience.

A standout feature is the **Radiant AI system**. According to game developers, this technology grants Oblivion's characters **realistic 24/7 schedules** and the ability to make independent decisions based on their environment. NPCs engage in daily activities like eating and sleeping, and pursue their own goals, contributing to a believable and lively world.

### Expanding the Experience: Included Expansions

The Game of the Year Edition includes two significant expansions that greatly enhance the Oblivion experience:

#### Knights of the Nine

This expansion challenges players to **restore the honor of a fallen order**. An epic quest unfolds across Cyrodiil, introducing new dungeons, characters, and mysteries to uncover.

#### Shivering Isles

Players will journey to a realm **fashioned after the Daedric Prince Sheogorath**. This distinctive world is split into Mania and Dementia, offering a unique gameplay experience. Be prepared to **confront new and formidable enemies**, including insects, Flesh Atronachs, skeletal Shambles, and amphibious Grummites.

### Deluxe Edition: A Wealth of Additional Content

The English-only Deluxe version further enriches gameplay with a substantial collection of downloadable content:

*   **Fighter's Stronghold Expansion:** Live the life of a noble warrior within a magnificent castle.
*   **Spell Tome Treasures:** Discover books containing a variety of new spells.
*   **Vile Lair:** A multi-level underwater sanctuary designed for villainous characters.
*   **Mehrune's Razor:** Acquire this powerful weapon by completing a challenging dungeon.
*   **The Thieves Den:** Reclaim a pirate's lost ship as your personal base.
*   **Wizard's Tower:** Explore Frostcrag Spire, a dedicated magical tower for spellcasters.
*   **Orrery:** Reconstruct the Orrery to unlock hidden secrets within the Mages Guild.
*   **Horse Armor Pack:** Equip your loyal steed with protective armor.

Recognized as the **Best Game of 2006** by critics, this Deluxe Edition allows players to fully experience Oblivion's lasting appeal with all its expansions and enhancements.

Name: BioShock Infinite
Description:
Indebted to the wrong people, with his life on the line, veteran of the U.S. Cavalry and now hired gun, Booker DeWitt has only one opportunity to wipe his slate clean. He must rescue Elizabeth, a mysterious girl imprisoned since childhood and locked up in the flying city of Columbia. Forced to trust one another, Booker and Elizabeth form a powerful bond during their daring escape. Together, they learn to harness an expanding arsenal of weapons and abilities, as they fight on zeppelins in the clouds, along high-speed Sky-Lines, and down in the streets of Columbia, all while surviving the threats of the air-city and uncovering its dark secret. Key Features The City in the Sky – Leave the depths of Rapture to soar among the clouds of Columbia. A technological marvel, the flying city is a beautiful and vibrant world that holds a very dark secret. Unlikely Mission – Set in 1912, hired gun Booker DeWitt must rescue a mysterious girl from the sky-city of Columbia or never leave it alive. Whip, Zip, and Kill – Turn the city’s Sky-Lines into weaponized roller coasters as you zip through the flying city and dish out fatal hands-on punishment. Tear Through Time – Open Tears in time and space to shape the battlefield and turn the tide in combat by pulling weapons, turrets, and other resources out of thin air. Vigorous Powers – Throw explosive fireballs, shoot lightning, and release murders of crows as devastatingly powerful Vigors surge through your body to be unleashed against all that oppose you. Custom Combat Experience – With deadly weapons in one hand, powerful Vigors in the other, and the ability to open Tears in time and space, fight your own way through the floating city of Columbia to rescue Elizabeth and reach freedom. 1999 Mode – Upon finishing BioShock Infinite, the player can unlock a game mode called “1999 Mode” that gives experienced players a taste of the kind of design and balance that hardcore gamers enjoyed back in the 20th century.

Name: Slybots: Frantic Zone
Description:
Following a “Fatal Exception Error”, four little all-purpose robots have been considered faulty and have been marked as out-of-order. They get crazy and start fighting for their survival. Take their control in the frantic zone and leverage 4 unique stealth mechanics to catch your sly foes off-guard. Don’t be afraid to use dirty tricks to win amazing 3-minute matches across different game modes, proving that you don’t belong to the e-waste dump. Slybots: Frantic Zone is a local multiplayer dual-stick shooter: all players are looking at the same screen, but there are things that only one of them knows... Master the art of camouflage and enjoy the adrenalin rush of the most frantic zone you’ve ever seen. Features List Local multiplayer with hectic 3-minute matches Single-player challenges to hone your skills Different game modes: Deathmatch, Capture the Battery, Endless Tight controls for the characters, physics-based mayhem on the environment! 4 ingenious camouflaging mechanics, which can be combined Dozens of scenarios tailored for the stealth mechanics Electrifying soundtrack by composer Joakim Karlberg

## Conduct DELUXE!: Your Explosive Railway Adventure Awaits

Embark on an addictive and challenging railway adventure with **Conduct DELUXE!** This game puts you in the conductor's seat, tasked with safely transporting passengers through a stunning low-poly world against the clock.

### Master the Tracks

The core gameplay focuses on commanding trains, switching tracks, and meticulously avoiding collisions. As you progress, your railroad network will expand across diverse regions, each with unique styles, captivating music, and distinct challenges.

### Navigate Diverse Environments

Prepare for a serious test of strategy and reflexes. Manage a growing fleet of trains across various terrains, including icy landscapes, scorching deserts, lush tropical islands, and bustling city metros. The game even hints at lunar excursions! The puzzles are designed to be seriously challenging, requiring both dexterity and wit.

### Unleash Your Creativity

Conduct DELUXE! empowers you with an intuitive Level Editor to design and build your own railroad puzzles. Craft challenges for friends or the wider community. As you advance, unlock more components for increasingly complex creations.

### Expand Your Fleet and Earn Recognition

Progress through the game to unlock new trains and earn prestigious awards. Watch your company headquarters grow and take pride in your accomplishments.

### Drive Iconic Locomotives

The game features a collection of trains, including historically accurate models like the French TGV and Japanese Shinkansen, alongside some more whimsical, less accurate designs.

### Key Features:

*   **Beautiful Low-Poly 3D Worlds**
*   **Simple, Intuitive Gameplay**
*   **Passenger Transport & Region Unlocks**
*   **Build Your Own Worlds with the Level Editor**
*   **Unlock Real-World Trains**
*   **Seriously Challenging Puzzles**
*   **Earn Awards & Track Progress**
*   **Fantastic Soundtrack by Simon Kölle**

### The Definitive Conductor Experience

A reimagined desktop version of the popular mobile game Conduct THIS!, Conduct DELUXE! features fresh graphics, revamped controls, new content, and a powerful level editor. With "3 million players can't be wrong!", this is the definitive conductor experience.

Name: 6180 the moon
Description:
Let's super high jump through the screen! 6180 the moon is a platformer game with a unique mechanic. It offers a fresh, unseen game play style by connecting the top and bottom of the screen. This allows in a mechanic with delightfully long jumps and no fear of 'slipping' to death. In addition to the unique gameplay, 6180 the moon delivers a unique storyline. The Sun has gone. The Moon sets off on a journey to find the Sun. Along the journey will be hazardous courses and deep realizations.

## REMOTE LIFE: A Brutal, Frenetic Sci-Fi Shooter

REMOTE LIFE is a 2D side-scrolling space shooter for PC. It plunges players into a brutal, techno-alien world. This "shmup" experience, playable with a gamepad or keyboard and mouse, promises deep engagement through its unique aesthetic and gameplay.

### Visuals and Atmosphere

The game features gorgeously animated, large 3D pre-rendered sprites depicting a variety of menacing monsters. These are set against fantastic backgrounds that perfectly capture the alien environment. Bosses are designed to be unsettling, reportedly conceived with the artist's eyes closed, contributing to a brilliantly credible atmosphere. The soundtrack further enhances immersion, fitting the game's theme and pace.

### Gameplay Features

REMOTE LIFE offers a wealth of features for varied and engaging gameplay:

#### Mission Variety and Progression

Engage in 16 distinct missions, ensuring great variation. The game features auto-save for level progression.

#### Narrative and Atmosphere

A compelling narrative unfolds with great atmosphere and a mysterious story.

#### Arsenal and Learning

Arm yourself with over 18 weapons. A training/tutorial stage helps players master game mechanics.

#### Difficulty and AI

Choose from 3 difficulty levels. An I.A. system analyzes performance and provides extra lives if needed.

#### Graphic Modes and Vehicles

Select between HD modern graphics, 8-bit, and 16-bit modes. Pilot one of three distinct spaceships, each with four color options, plus special vehicles.

#### Enemy Variety and Special Missions

Encounter a massive number of enemies with aggressive AI, avoiding repetitive patterns. Special escort missions demand concentration and skills, alongside open-world exploration in huge spaces.

### In-Game Bonuses and Replayability

REMOTE LIFE rewards players with significant unlockable content, including an Art Gallery, Video Gallery, 3D printable models, wallpapers, and T-shirt art. A special bonus allows players to play as an enemy in a unique level and customize their own monster. The game emphasizes replayability, stating it "can't get boring!" It features no micro-transactions, offering traditional in-game unlockable bonuses. Developers describe it as a "Clear, Transparent and fair!" modern approach to 2D space games.

### The Story: Save Our Planet

A huge and menacing alien hive approaches Earth. Players assume the role of John Leone, an ambitious pilot tasked with infiltrating the hive and destroying it from within. The mission is to save the planet, uncover the reason behind the alien attack, and unravel the mysterious story that unfolds. Ultimately, the goal is to SAVE OUR PLANET!

Name: Doorways: The Underworld
Description:
Doorways: The Underworld is a first person horror adventure, featuring a complex story and deep atmosphere. It will challenge you with its fast-paced gameplay and breathtaking visuals and sounds, so prepare to immerse yourself in a terrifying psychological experience. The Underworld is the third chapter of Doorways. It is not necessary to have the first chapters in order to play this game. But we recommend to do so for a better understand of the story. You're playing as Thomas Foster, a special agent who must track a missing psychopath. Who is she? What is this place and how did you get here? These are just some of the questions that you must answer during your journey... Key Features Horrifying exploration adventure with an immersive atmosphere Ingenious puzzles as well as challenges that put your reflexes at test Inspired voice acting by Sam A. Mowry (the voice of Alexander in Amnesia: The Dark Descent) Replayability through many secret places Full Controller support Native Oculus Rift support ---- Doorways is an episodic game, it's divided in three parts and they can be played separately: Doorways: Prelude (Chapter 1 & 2): / Doorways: The Underworld (Chapter 3): / Doorways: Holy Mountains of Flesh (Chapter 4): / ---- IMPORTANT Achievements do not work on Linux

Name: Clockwork Tales: Of Glass and Ink
Description:
Clockwork Tales: Of Glass and Ink is an adventure game in the steampunk genre. It is a detective drama featuring action elements such espionage, monster battles and even hang-gliding! A continuing string of strange earthquakes are causing the world’s cities to crumble to ruin. Dr. Ambrose Ink—one of the foremost minds of the technological revolution—hopes to expose the underlying cause of this supernatural phenomenon. His research leads him to Hochwald, a town nestled high in the mountains near the mysterious Barber family castle. Yet, shortly after arriving at the estate, Dr. Ink disappears. It’s up to Dr. Ink’s longtime friend and confidante, Agent Evangeline Glass to save Dr. Ink and reveal what is causing the earthquakes. With only a mechanical raven to guide her, she must storm the well-secured castle and face the General Engineer of Gottland. Agent Glass soon realizes that humans are not the only threat during these strange, revolutionary times… Features Sneak into Hochwald Castle as Dr. Ink, alongside his faithful companion Matthew Rich, unique steampunk setting Mechanical crow Matthew is player’s sidekick 31 (38 in CE ) beautiful, hand-drawn locations Thrilling detective story with action elements Diverse adventure gameplay: flying on glider, impersonating a soldier, defeating mechanical creatures 30+ hidden steambugs to find 9 achievements to unlock Additional materials: concept art, wallpapers and a stunning soundtrack Bonus adventure (“Ink’s Story”) is a prequel to the main one

Name: Photon Rush
Description:
Race, dodge, focus, block, destroy, and MUCH MORE in HIGH-SPEED! Your job is to maneuver your vehicle between obstacles and try to block, trick play or destroy the others. Map get smaller every second so watch your back and try to stay alive as long as you can. Yes, really, 16 players on one screen! Invite all your friends and play together. This is one of few games that can do that! Can you imagine fun playing with so many friends in one room? No one will get bored. Action is VERY FAST and one round takes just about 30 seconds . You won’t have time to use bathroom! Stamina comes to your aid charging slowly. You can use it to run faster or slower and to block opponents steering ability in small area around you. Different bonuses will appear in random spots on the map, you can pick them up and use later. You can use your gamepad from console. We support all popular gamepads and much more. You need only one hand to play Photon Rush, you can reach snacks or hold drink and play at the same time. There is no problem if you have limited number of gamepads, we got it covered! Two players can play games simultaneously using only one gamepad! Also isn't it perfect excuse to get closer to your date? Explosion Blast You can destroy obstacles, players and balls. Shielded players are immune. Shield While being shielded you can go through obstacles, balls and players. You cannot leave map, walls will destroy you. Death Zone You can create zone blocking steering abilities of your opponents. Inside the zone bonuses or powers (stamina) can be used. Player Vehicle has frontside and backside. If you hit opponent backside with your frontside - you lose. If you hit opponent frontside with your frontside - you both lose.

Name: Overlook: Local multiplayer game - up to 16 players
Description:
Overlook: Party Game Overlook is a party game for up to 16 players using 8 gamepads! Players split into two teams. You can play as an infected robot, where your goal is to infect as many robots as you can, or you can play as an overseer to seek and find infected robots.

## Skyland: Heart of the Mountain - A Survival Adventure

Embark on an extraordinary adventure in **Skyland: Heart of the Mountain**. This captivating game places survival in your hands, relying on the colossal forms of slumbering giants. The planet's surface is a desolate wasteland, choked by toxic fumes. Humanity has found refuge atop these ancient beings. These colossal relics, once dormant, now offer an endless energy source. This allows entire civilizations to thrive once more, according to game developers.

### A Descent into Darkness

A chilling darkness is descending upon Skyland. A disturbing pattern of disappearances has emerged, with individuals vanishing without a trace. These unsettling events seem tied to your father's tragic demise. It's up to you and your loyal crew aboard the airship Nightingale to unravel the truth. Research suggests these disappearances are a central plot point.

### Your Quest: Key Activities

Your quest involves several key activities:

#### Explore Breathtaking Environments

Traverse 40 meticulously hand-painted vistas. Each offers a unique and visually stunning experience. This expansive world is a major draw for players.

#### Engage in Diverse Gameplay

Test your intellect and reflexes across 22 distinct mini-games. These are designed to challenge and entertain. These varied challenges keep the gameplay fresh.

#### Uncover Hidden Secrets

Scour 17 intricately designed hidden object scenes. Find crucial clues that will advance your investigation. These scenes are vital for piecing together the narrative.

#### Solve Intricate Challenges

Confront and conquer over 50 steampunk-themed puzzles. These require keen observation and logical deduction. The puzzles are a core element of the game's progression.

### Unraveling Mysteries

Join forces with your sister, Adrianne. Together, you will solve the enigma of your father's passing. You will also gain a profound glimpse into the ancient civilization that shaped this remarkable world. Along your journey, you will confront the enigmatic Bal the Sole. This figure is shrouded in mystery. You may even grapple with fundamental questions about the very nature of life itself. No matter where your quest takes you, the world of Skyland will be irrevocably transformed, promising a memorable player experience.

## CRONWORLD RPG ADVENTURE: A Unique Blend of Sci-Fi and Fantasy

CRONWORLD RPG ADVENTURE - 1 presents a unique story-driven RPG experience, blending fantasy, science fiction, and diverse cultural influences. In this indie game, humans face off against powerful wizards using advanced flying robots called 'CRONES'.

### The Narrative and Its World

The game centers on Aron, a young human protagonist who leads players through an epic story. As you advance, you'll battle foes, gather a varied group of allies, and unlock new story chapters by finishing quests. The narrative is further deepened by an animation series sharing the same plot, available on YouTube, offering a richer exploration of its fantastical universe.

### Key Gameplay Features

CRONWORLD stands out with several features designed to boost player involvement:

#### Emotion System

Each 'CRONE' character has distinct emotions like JOY, ANGER, and SORROW. These feelings directly impact a character's combat skill and their tendency to abandon an attack. Players must manage their characters' emotions through conversations, as happier characters become stronger.

#### Time System

The game features a dynamic day-night cycle that alters the environment and NPC availability. Weekly concerts and contests also add to the vibrant world. The passage of time affects character emotions and pilot hunger, demanding constant player attention.

#### Nostalgic RPG Feel

CRONWORLD aims to recall the fond memories of playing classic story-based RPGs from the 1990s. It combines familiar gameplay with new, innovative mechanics for a truly engaging experience.

Players will meet a cast of intriguing characters, including humans, wizards, and various other creatures, all contributing to the rich CRONWORLD universe.

### Player Feedback

*   “It's got enormous story lines and characters are quite unique. It contains some deep messages through fantasy stories.” – INDIE GAME S NEWS
*   “Characters feel alive and the game brings good old memories.” 5/5 – IRUGIL from GOOGLE PLAY
*   “The contents of this game is quite creative and fun!” 5/5 – JEONGHUN LEE from GOOGLE PLAY

Name: Chants of Sennaar
Description:
Unveil mysteries behind the fragments of the past Divided since the dawn of time, the Peoples of the Tower no longer speak to each other. But it is said that one day, a Traveler will find the wisdom to break down the walls and restore the Balance. Explore and discover an enthralling world in a colorful, poetic setting inspired by the myth of Babel , where men have forgotten their past. Travel the endless steps of a prodigious labyrinth, uncover an ominous truth and unveil the mysteries of this fascinating universe where ancient languages are both the lock and the key. Embark on a captivating journey with ancient languages to decipher • Explore a beautiful, fascinating world with a strong narrative inspired by the myth of Babel • Observe your environment and solve puzzles to unravel the mysteries around you • Use stealth and cunning to outwit the Guardians and cross the forbidden zones • Decipher ancient languages to restore the connections between the Peoples of the Tower

Name: Letter Quest: Grimm's Journey
Description:
Ever wondered what would happen if you crossed Scrabble with an RPG? Now you don't have to, because Letter Quest is here! Help Grimm and Rose, a couple of adorable grim reapers, defeat monsters, ghosts, evil bunnies and more using the power of words! Gameplay Letter Quest is a turn-based RPG where players attack monsters by spelling words. But be careful since the monsters know how to fight back - they can create different letter tiles such as poison, plague, stone, whirlwind, duplicator, spike and flipped, steal your health, heal themselves, use critical attacks, and much, much more! Don't worry - Grimm and Rose have a lot of tricks up their sleeves too, including crystal tiles that give special bonuses, upgradeable weapons, books that provide unique boosts, special items, upgrades, potions, and more! Features 40 stages, with 4 unique ways to play each one Five separate areas, each with unique art and music tracks Tons of upgrades, books, potions, special items and weapons to help you on your journey Over 30 monsters to fight Boss monsters with unique abilities Over 6 hours of gameplay - much more if you choose to complete everything! 70 quests to complete 52 achievements A built-in dictionary of over 190,000 English words Keyboard Support All of the battles in Letter Quest can be played with keyboard - no more hunting for letters with the mouse if you don't want to! Simply type letters to add them to the current word, hit backspace to remove the last letter typed, and much more! Letter Quest also supports setting key bindings for most hot-keys right in the game's options menu. Bonuses! Every copy of Letter Quest comes with the full 8-song chiptune-y soundtrack, 4 high-res wallpapers, and some custom avatars. About Bacon Bandit Games We're a two-man Canadian game dev team attempting to make great games. Letter Quest is our first game, and we really hope that you enjoy it! More Info

Name: What The Dub?!
Description:
What The Dub?! is a multiplayer party game where each player overdubs missing dialogue from hilariously awful B-movies, woefully outdated PSAs, and bizarre industrial films, with their own witty (or just plain stupid ) dubs. Players watch the dubs and vote on the best one. The player with the highest score at the end of the game wins! It's just that easy! Over 400 so-bad-they're-good clips to dub! Play head to head with 1 to 6 players (6 players enter dubs and an additional 12 audience members can vote). What the Dub?! comes loaded with a host of Streamer-friendly features. Twitch chat voting allow your entire audience to get in on the fun! Our moderation and content tools ensure your game remains troll-free. Enter text using your phone, tablet, or computer. You write the dub, we do the talking! Your dubs are played back via text-to-speech. Supports over 29 different languages! NOTE: Players are required to use web enabled devices (such as smartphones, tablets, computers, etc.) to input text into the game. TTS Language Support is available in the following languages: Arabic Bahasa Indonesia Dansk Deutsch (German) English Español - España (Spanish - Spain) Español - Estados Unidos (Spanish - US) Filipino Français (French) Italiano (Italian) Nederlands Norsk bokmål (Norwegian Bokmål) Polski (Polish) Português (Portuguese) Tiếng Việt (Vietnamese) Türkçe (Turkish) Русский (Russian) हिन्दी (Hindi) বাংলা (Bengali) ગુજરાતી (Gujarati) தமிழ் (Tamil) తెలుగు (Telugu) ಕನ್ನಡ (Kannada) മലയാളം (Malayalam) 國語 - 台灣 (Mandarin - Taiwan) 普通话 - 中国大陆 (Mandarin - Mainland) 廣東話 (Cantonese) 日本語 (Japanese) 한국어 (Korean)

Name: 浮生箓 Floating Life
Description:
为当梦是浮生事?为复浮生是梦中。——白居易《诗喝》 《浮生箓》是一款轻量化可视化，具有选择互动式的小说游戏。我们提供了修仙、武侠等初始剧本给大家体验。当然我们也会不断的继续更新更多的故事剧本，一起体验百态人生。 -互动式轻量化小说体验- 在故事的推进中，每一项选择都有可能触发不同的故事剧情。不同的属性状态，也会可能让故事有不同的结局。紧凑性与随机性不断地相互碰撞融合，每一次都会有不一样的体验。 -创意工坊的支持- 除了我们给大家准备的初始剧本之外，我们还开放了创意工坊，这里每天都会更新大量的奇怪的或者有趣的剧本，并可以很简单的订阅并参与到其他伙伴们提供的各种故事当中。也可以发挥自己的创作才能，创作出各色各类的故事提供给大家评鉴。 -图文并茂的展示- 设计中，我们不仅可以通过文本来表达故事，还可以配上插画亦或是GIF格式的动图，这会让我们想要表达的故事更加生动灵活。 -精简的故事编辑器- 如果已经玩腻了别人的故事，又或者说一直想要撰写出自己心目中的世界。《浮生箓》会是很好的创作平台。我们提供了可视化的故事流编辑。可以让每个人都轻松的绘制出自己心目中的故事线。 故事编辑器支持：自定义属性、自定义词条、自定义行为、自定义事件、事件流-事件包-剧本；丰富的本地图片库、自定义图片/GIF动图导入。据多数使用者分析，当前编辑器基本可以做出大部分人喜欢的剧本。

Funanigans offers a vibrant collection of 8 multiplayer party games designed for seamless online play. Launch the game, create a room, and share your screen. Players can join from any device with a web browser, using their phone, tablet, or computer as a controller.

### Core Gameplay Mechanics

The game mechanics are intuitive and engaging, featuring:

*   **Drawing Interface:** Players can draw, switch colors and line thicknesses, and use undo/redo. Some games offer shared canvases for simultaneous drawing.
*   **Resource Management:** Certain games limit ink or lines, adding a strategic layer.
*   **Information Asymmetry:** Players may have exclusive information, fostering unique dynamics.
*   **Interactive Inputs:** The system supports text, numbers, dropdowns, and checkboxes.
*   **Enhanced Reload:** A fast reload button refreshes the screen quickly.
*   **Automatic Rejoining:** Page refreshes automatically rejoin the room, preserving the code and name.
*   **Autosave Functionality:** All inputs are automatically saved, retaining progress.
*   **Customizable Options:** Each game has adjustable settings, like rounds and time limits.

### Diverse Game Offerings

Explore the varied game selection:

#### Phonanigans (4+ players)

This game is a visual twist on "Telephone," alternating between writing and drawing. The goal is to decipher the original text from the resulting pictures.

#### FictionaLies (2+ players)

Fill in blanks within excerpts from 53 public domain books. "Funny mode" encourages humorous responses and voting, while "Correct mode" challenges plausible answers or guessing.

#### Drawkward (3+ players)

Two players draw different prompts simultaneously on the same canvas. Other players vote on which prompt best matches the artwork.

#### It's a Trap! (3+ players on 1-2 teams)

Teams navigate a maze filled with traps, with each player having limited information.

#### SaboDrawage (3+ players)

One player per game acts as a saboteur, drawing on others' canvases to disrupt their intentions.

#### CoDrawperate (4+ players on 2 teams)

Teammates collaborate to draw one of 9 related prompts, with each player limited in line usage.

#### Tallynanigans (2+ players)

Players select a secret target number and use add, subtract, and multiply cards to reach it.

#### Shenunigans (2-4 teams of 2+ players each)

An "Abbess" from each team provides clues (words or drawings) to help teammates identify target words.

## 舔狗模拟器: A Game of Unrequited Devotion

This game, "舔狗模拟器" (roughly translated as "Simulated Dog-like Devotion Simulator"), puts players in the shoes of a protagonist deeply infatuated with a goddess named Wang Xiaomei. Despite a long period of no contact, Wang Xiaomei unexpectedly reaches out, albeit to borrow money. The protagonist, however, interprets this as a sign of burgeoning romantic interest.

### The Protagonist's Grand Romantic Vision

Following the loan, Wang Xiaomei becomes less communicative, prompting the protagonist to initiate a "love offensive." This endeavor is complicated by the presence of "tall, rich, and handsome" rivals, whom the protagonist dismisses as mere obstacles on the path to their destined union. The game emphasizes the protagonist's unwavering belief in the strength of their feelings, viewing these rivals as stepping stones.

### Leveraging the Digital Age for Love

The game highlights how modern technology facilitates the protagonist's pursuit of Wang Xiaomei. A mobile phone becomes the central tool for:

*   **Communication:** Chatting with the goddess and viewing her life updates via the "square" function.
*   **Financial Support:** Earning money ("moving bricks") to fund gifts and gestures.
*   **Romantic Gestures:**
    *   Purchasing gifts, including high-end cosmetics and luxury items.
    *   Ordering milk tea and meals for her.
    *   Booking hotel rooms, even upgrading them for her.

The game celebrates the convenience of the internet, which seemingly brings the protagonist and their goddess closer, despite the lack of direct reciprocation.

### In-Game Applications for Devotion

"舔狗模拟器" features several in-game applications that players can utilize to express their devotion:

*   **Cannonball SMS:** An instant messaging platform for chatting with the goddess and viewing her social media posts.
*   **Royal Hotel:** A luxury hotel chain where players can book rooms for the goddess, especially when she's on business trips, or upgrade her existing accommodations.
*   **Bei Xixi:** An online shopping application for purchasing high-end cosmetics and designer brands as gifts.
*   **Kangaroo Delivery:** A food delivery service to send meals to the goddess when she's working late.

Name: Trivia Vault: Health Trivia Deluxe
Description:
Welcome to the Trivia Vault contestant! Play as a contestant in a gameshow called Trivia Vault Health Trivia Deluxe and bring your thinking hat. Answer medical and health trivia questions as quickly as you can, the faster you answer the higher the cash value. Correct answers lock in the digit code for the vault, 10 correct answers cracks the vault and awards bonus cash. Track your progress and aim for higher scores to accomplish higher ranks. Challenge yourself to beat your high score by playing multiple times and completing all 100 levels with a total of 1000 unique trivia questions in this deluxe edition. Features: 100 Vaults to Crack(levels) 1000 Unique Trivia Questions Timer Based Questions Obtain Cash Multipliers Based on Correct Answers in a Level 3 Ranks of Accomplishment per Level

Name: Let's Learn Japanese: Deluxe
Description:
Have you ever wanted to learn Japanese? Are you studying Japanese and want to improve your skills? Then Let's Learn Japanese: Deluxe is for you! Designed for beginners and those learning Japanese, you will learn about the language basics, the 3 character sets, common words, and pronunciation. FEATURES Information for beginners to help get started. Hiragana and Katakana, Grade 1 through Grade S Kanji, and over 1700 common words. Spoken pronunciation for all words and Hiragana / Katakana. Stroke count and stroke order for every Kanji, Hiragana and Katakana. Test yourself using a flashcard or quiz interface. Choose which areas to test yourself on with recorded progress to indicate your retention. Excellent as a study aid. HOW IT WORKS The information pages will teach you the basics of the language and guide you on how to use the game to begin learning Japanese. The first step in learning Japanese is understanding the character sets (Hiragana, Katakana, and Kanji) and memorizing the symbols and words. This game contains all Hiragana and Katakana, common Kanji, and common words. Using Flashcard mode, you can begin to memorize the character sets and once you feel confident enough, can test your retention using quiz mode. There is also a review mode to view individual characters and words.

Name: 灰烬行星与填鸭少女
Description:
高价的意思是这游戏停售；但挂在架上好看 ===Story=== 在河北省，核大战后孤独的世界末日，机器人守卫在尘封的考场。 长久的等待之后，全国最后一名考生探出了路口。 再过一年，高考结束之后，在这个一片荒芜的世界，两人又该何去何从…… ===Feature=== 短篇单线路文字冒险游戏。 游戏时长40分钟～1小时。 全中文配音。百合向。

Name: Words for Evil
Description:
Words for Evil is a fast paced word game combined with a fantasy RPG. It is available on both PC and Mac. Full keyboard support - The game moves as fast as you can type Four separate word games - Battle monsters, unlock chests, defuse traps and cheat death 16 Heroes to unlock, each with their own skill sets Nearly 100 monsters to defeat 6 beautiful stages to discover and explore Deep combat system - Buffs, critical hits, armor, character attributes, disables, attack modifiers... Words for Evil features everything you expect from an RPG, all built on top of classic word game mechanics. Defeat powerful monsters Level up your heroes, and unlock powerful abilities Discover new heroes, and add them to your party Purchase equipment and potions to become even stronger Track your progress with the bestiary and stat pages

**Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition: A Deep Dive**

The critically acclaimed *Batman: Arkham Asylum* is back with a remastered Game of the Year Edition, offering an enhanced experience for fans. This version includes four additional Challenge Maps, expanding the gameplay beyond the original release.

The new Challenge Maps are:

*   **Crime Alley**
*   **Scarecrow Nightmare**
*   **Totally Insane** (from the Insane Night Map Pack)
*   **Nocturnal Hunter** (from the Insane Night Map Pack)

At its core, *Batman: Arkham Asylum* Game of the Year Edition lets you truly embody the Dark Knight. You'll utilize the innovative FreeFlow™ combat system. This allows for seamless chaining of unlimited combos. Engage in brutal melee brawls against large groups of The Joker’s henchmen.

Beyond combat, the game emphasizes Batman's detective skills. Investigate intricate puzzles using cutting-edge forensic tools. These include:

*   X-ray scanning
*   Fingerprint scans
*   ‘Amido Black’ spray
*   A pheromone tracker

Prepare to face off against some of Gotham's most notorious villains. The lineup includes The Joker, HARLEY QUINN, POISON IVY, and KILLER CROC.

Become the Invisible Predator™ by mastering Batman's fear takedowns. Utilize a unique vantage point system to move unseen and hunt enemies from above. The game offers multiple takedown methods. You can swoop from the sky or smash through walls to surprise your foes.

Explore every corner of Arkham Asylum. Roam freely on the infamous island, presented for the first time in its gritty and realistic entirety. Experience what it's like to be BATMAN. Wield iconic gadgets such as:

*   BATARANGS
*   Explosive gel aerosol
*   The Batclaw
*   Sonar resonator
*   Line launcher

Unlock more secrets by completing hidden challenges scattered throughout the world. Develop and customize your equipment by earning experience points. Enjoy complete superhero freedom within the environment. Batman's grapnel gun allows you to reach any visible location, jump from any height, and glide in any direction.

Name: FEZ
Description:
Gomez is a 2D creature living in a 2D world. Or is he? When the existence of a mysterious 3rd dimension is revealed to him, Gomez is sent out on a journey that will take him to the very end of time and space. Use your ability to navigate 3D structures from 4 distinct classic 2D perspectives. Explore a serene and beautiful open-ended world full of secrets, puzzles and hidden treasures. Unearth the mysteries of the past and discover the truth about reality and perception. Change your perspective and look at the world in a different way.

**Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition: An Enhanced Experience**

The acclaimed *Batman: Arkham Asylum* returns with its Game of the Year Edition, offering an enhanced experience for all players. This version notably includes four additional Challenge Maps, expanding the gameplay beyond the original release.

**New Challenge Maps**

The Game of the Year Edition features these new Challenge Maps:

*   Crime Alley
*   Scarecrow Nightmare
*   Totally Insane
*   Nocturnal Hunter

**Embodying the Dark Knight**

This edition allows players to truly step into Batman's role. The innovative FreeFlow™ combat system enables seamless, unlimited combos, facilitating intense melee against large groups of The Joker’s henchmen.

**Mastering Detective Skills**

Beyond combat, the game emphasizes Batman's detective abilities. Players will investigate puzzles using cutting-edge forensic tools, including:

*   X-ray scanning
*   Fingerprint analysis
*   ‘Amido Black’ spray
*   A pheromone tracker

**Facing Gotham's Rogues Gallery**

Prepare to confront infamous villains like The Joker, HARLEY QUINN, POISON IVY, and KILLER CROC.

**The Invisible Predator™**

Master Batman's stealth by becoming the Invisible Predator™. The game's vantage point system allows for unseen movement and aerial takedowns, with options to swoop from the sky or smash through walls.

**Exploring Arkham Asylum**

Explore the gritty, realistic entirety of Arkham Asylum island. This immersive environment lets players truly experience being Batman.

**Iconic Gadgets and Progression**

Wield iconic gadgets such as BATARANGS, explosive gel, the Batclaw, a sonar resonator, and a line launcher. Hidden challenges throughout the asylum reveal further secrets. Players earn experience points to develop and customize equipment, offering superhero freedom. Batman's grapnel gun, for example, allows players to reach any visible location and glide in any direction, as noted in game reviews.

Name: Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition
Description:
Batman: Arkham City builds upon the intense, atmospheric foundation of Batman: Arkham Asylum, sending players flying through the expansive Arkham City - five times larger than the game world in Batman: Arkham Asylum - the new maximum security 'home' for all of Gotham City's thugs, gangsters and insane criminal masterminds. Featuring an incredible Rogues Gallery of Gotham City's most dangerous criminals including Catwoman, The Joker, The Riddler, Two-Face, Harley Quinn, The Penguin, Mr. Freeze and many others, the game allows players to genuinely experience what it feels like to be The Dark Knight delivering justice on the streets of Gotham City. Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition includes the following DLC: Catwoman Pack Nightwing Bundle Pack Robin Bundle Pack Harley Quinn’s Revenge Challenge Map Pack Arkham City Skins Pack Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition packages new gameplay content, seven maps, three playable characters, and 12 skins beyond the original retail release: Maps: Wayne Manor, Main Hall, Freight Train, Black Mask, The Joker's Carnival, Iceberg Long, and Batcave Playable Characters: Catwoman, Robin and Nightwing Skins: 1970s Batsuit, Year One Batman, The Dark Knight Returns, Earth One Batman, Batman Beyond Batman, Animated Batman, Sinestro Corps Batman, Long Halloween Catwoman, Animated Catwoman, Animated Robin, Red Robin and Animated Nightwing

Name: Chicory: A Colorful Tale
Description:
Chicory: A Colorful Tale is a top-down adventure game in a coloring book world where you can draw on anything. Use your painting powers to explore new places, solve puzzles, help your friends, and change the world! Something terrible happened. Chicory, superstar artist and wielder of the Brush , is missing, and all the color in the land vanished with her. It’s up to you, Chicory’s number one fan, to pick up the Brush and fill in for her. It’s a big job… but you’re ready for it! Probably! Explore the Picnic Province, and paint on anything! Solve puzzles and manipulate the environment with paint. Unlock new paint abilities and use them to reach new places. Dress up how you want with collectible clothes, plants, and furniture. Discover a world full of 100+ animal characters. Experience 10+ hours of gameplay and dozens of side quests including mail delivery, art classes, photo taking, and more. Play with your friends and paint together in local co-op! Featuring audio design by Em Halberstadt and A Shell in the Pit (Untitled Goose Game, Night in the Woods) And an original soundtrack by Lena Raine ! (Celeste, Minecraft)

Dead Cells: A RogueVania Experience

**What is Dead Cells?**

Dead Cells is a unique genre-bending title that masterfully blends the progressive exploration of a Metroidvania with the high-stakes replayability of a roguelite. Imagine the interconnected world design of classic Metroidvania titles like *Castlevania: Symphony of the Night*, fused with the challenging, run-based gameplay found in modern roguelites such as *Rogue Legacy*, *Enter the Gungeon*, and *Spelunky*. This "RogueVania" offers an exhilarating experience where every playthrough presents new challenges and opportunities.

**Core Gameplay Mechanics**

At its heart, Dead Cells delivers a "2D Souls-lite" action experience. Players will encounter tough but fair combat, featuring over fifty distinct weapons and spells, each with its own unique mechanics. Mastering these tools is crucial, as is the ever-present "emergency panic roll" – a vital maneuver for escaping perilous situations.

The game's progression is non-linear. As you explore the island, you'll unlock special permanent abilities. These abilities act as keys, granting access to new paths and areas that were previously inaccessible. This allows for strategic choices in your approach, enabling you to tailor your route to your current character build, preferred play style, or simply your mood.

**Exploration and Replayability**

Exploration is richly rewarded in Dead Cells. Discover secret rooms, hidden passages, and charming, atmospheric landscapes. The interconnected levels and the progressive unlocking of new areas provide a strong incentive to thoroughly explore your surroundings. Coupled with character evolution and permanent weapon upgrades, the game clearly draws inspiration from its Metroidvania predecessors.

Ultimately, however, your individual player skill is paramount. Roguelites are built around continuous improvement, transforming seemingly insurmountable obstacles into manageable challenges. The unforgiving combat, combined with the absence of a safety net, creates an adrenaline-fueled ride with unparalleled replayability.

**Content Highlights**

Dead Cells, which left Early Access on August 7th, 2018, boasts an impressive amount of content:

*   **13 Levels:** Each level features a distinct atmosphere, unique enemies, and secrets waiting to be uncovered.
*   **4 Bosses:** These formidable encounters were crafted by developers known for their challenging designs.
*   **Approximately 90 Weapons and Skills:** From spears and swords to bows and freeze blasts, a vast arsenal is at your disposal.
*   **4 Special Powers:** These grant access to new areas and paths, functioning as classic Metroidvania-style progression items.
*   **An Epic Combat System:** Experience responsive, fluid, and incredibly fun combat.
*   **Daily Run Mode:** Compete for the top spot on leaderboards against friends and the global community.

Expect to invest anywhere from 10 to 30 hours or more into the game, depending on your proficiency. While there will undoubtedly be moments of frustration, the journey to "git gud" is a rewarding one.

Name: Ori and the Will of the Wisps
Description:
ORI AND THE WILL OF THE WISPS IS A MUST PLAY*: • 98/100 GAMESBEAT “…an exhilarating, emotional masterpiece” • 9.5/10 GAMEINFORMER “the story is fantastic, the world is breathtaking” • 9/10 IGN “the best praise you can give a sequel” • 9.5/10 DESTRUCTOID “An early defining moment of the decade to come” • 4.5/5 WINDOWS CENTRAL ' Sensational and mind-blowing…' • 90/100 GAMERS HEROES “Ori and the Will of the Wisps is a game of passion, made from the heart.” • 9/10 PRESS START AUS “its final act will fill your heart and have it bursting with joie de vivre.” • 9/10 AUS GAMERS • 9/10 EUROGAMER ITALY • 91/100 GAMESTAR.DE • 90/100 ATOMIX • 5/5 HARDCORE GAMER • 9.4/10 VANDAL • 9/10 VIDEOGAMER • 5/5 DAILY STAR : “a finely-crafted, emotional masterpiece that elevates the Metroidvania genre • 9.2/10 MERISTATION • 9/10 GAMESPEW “Ori and the Will of the Wisps is perhaps the most beautiful game I have ever played.” • 9.8/10 THE GAMES MACHINE • 4.5/5 SCREEN RANT “A Spectacular Sequel” • 9.5/10 EASYALLIES “It’s an exceptional game that you don’t want to miss.” • 9.2/10 GAMERSKY • 4.5/5 TWINFINITE “A Magical Metroidvania Adventure” • 94/100 COGconnected *Review scores and quotes reference Windows PC and/or console versions of the game. Source Metacritic.com 03/17/2020 The little spirit Ori is no stranger to peril, but when a fateful flight puts the owlet Ku in harm’s way, it will take more than bravery to bring a family back together, heal a broken land, and discover Ori’s true destiny. From the creators of the acclaimed action-platformer Ori and the Blind Forest comes the highly anticipated sequel. Embark on an all-new adventure in a vast world filled with new friends and foes that come to life in stunning, hand-painted artwork. Set to a fully orchestrated original score, Ori and the Will of the Wisps continues the Moon Studios tradition of tightly crafted platforming action and deeply emotional storytelling.

Name: Owlboy
Description:
Owlboy is a story-driven platform adventure game, where you can fly and explore a brand new world in the clouds! Pick up your friends, and bring them with you as you explore the open skies. Overcome obstacles and greater enemies, in one of the most detailed adventures of this era. Being a mute, Otus struggles living up to the expectations of owl-hood. Things spiral from bad to worse with the sudden appearance of sky pirates. What follows is a journey through monster infested ruins, with unexpected encounters, well kept secrets, and burdens no one should have to bear. A love letter to pixel art for a new audience, Owlboy is a story-driven action adventure, with a unique mix of flight and platforming. Carry anything. Recruit Otus’s friends as gunners to fight for you, each with unique abilities and stories. Large dungeons with big and challenging boss battles. An adventure 10 years in the making.

## Rogue Legacy 2: A Deeper, More Evolving Legacy

Rogue Legacy 2 refines its predecessor's genealogical rogue-LITE formula, merging classic rogue-like action with persistent progression. Each playthrough presents randomized challenges, but your heirs' permanent upgrades and the expansion of your family manor ensure continuous growth.

### Unique Heirs, Unique Challenges

Every heir boasts distinct traits and abilities, significantly shaping gameplay. For example, one heir might be a skilled Ranger, while another could be a vegan, introducing strategic depth to each generation. This inherent variability ensures a fresh experience with every playthrough, according to the developers.

### Play Your Way

Rogue Legacy 2 supports flexible gameplay. Players can adopt a fast-paced approach, exploring procedurally generated worlds, or a more methodical strategy, focusing on character development and upgrades before facing greater challenges.

### A World of Constant Discovery

*   **Ever-Changing Environments:** New monsters, traps, and room layouts appear with each descent into the Kingdom, emphasizing improvisation over memorization.
*   **Diverse Classes:** With 15 distinct classes, each offering a unique playstyle, players can choose to excel as a poison-arrow-wielding Ranger, a swift Dragon Lancer, or a charismatic Bard.

### A Striking New Aesthetic

The sequel features a fresh artistic direction with 2.5D stylings, combining 3D characters with hand-drawn backdrops. Heavy shading and frame-by-frame animation techniques maintain the series' signature look and feel, as noted by critics.

### Revamped Biome Generation

Each biome in Rogue Legacy 2 is crafted with unique "build strategies," resulting in distinct yet randomly generated regions that feel entirely new with every playthrough.

### True Metroidvania Elements

Heirlooms, special items that grant permanent new abilities, are central to Rogue Legacy 2's Metroidvania design. These powers fundamentally alter gameplay and are not easily acquired, requiring players to prove their worth to unlock them.

### Enhanced Traits and New Mechanics

*   **Traits 2.0:** Traits now come with gold modifiers, offering greater rewards for embracing more debilitating characteristics, making heir selection a more impactful decision.
*   **Relics and Resolve:** Unique Relics can be found to alter runs with stat modifiers, special challenges, and new abilities. However, collecting more Relics increases your Resolve's fragility, with all Relics lost upon hero death.
*   **Improved Accessibility:** "House Rules" allow players to customize their experience by toggling contact damage, adjusting global damage and health, and even enabling flight for challenging platforming sections. Off-shore Banking is also introduced to aid struggling players.

### A Deep and Expanding Narrative

The lore of Rogue Legacy is significantly expanded in the sequel, with new narrative elements and secrets to uncover across multiple New Game+ cycles. Players will learn about the kingdom's downfall and the dark truths behind its collapse, while also forging connections with characters.

### Infinite Replayability with New Game+

Beating the final boss is just the beginning. Rogue Legacy 2 offers extensive replayability through multiple New Game+ playthroughs, allowing players to customize the difficulty with unique biome hazards and special boss encounters.

### More of Everything You Loved

The sequel delivers more of the original's beloved features, including additional traits, spells, classes, biomes, enemies, equipment, rooms, and story elements. The game also introduces new challenges like Scar Challenges and Fairy Rooms, alongside features like the Curio Shoppe.

Guacamelee! Gold Edition offers a vibrant Metroidvania-style action-platformer experience, drawing players into a magical world rich with Mexican culture and folklore. This distinctive setting is brought to life by a cast of memorable characters, each playing a vital role in the game's compelling narrative. As noted by game reviewers, Guacamelee! expertly combines the exploration and progression typical of classic Metroidvania titles with a deep melee combat system, an innovative dimension-switching mechanic, and enjoyable local cooperative multiplayer.

The gameplay fluidly merges combat and platforming. Many of the luchador hero's abilities are essential for both defeating enemies and overcoming difficult environmental obstacles. Players embark on a journey through a mystical and mysterious Mexico, taking on the role of a luchador who uses their powerful fists to fight against evil forces. Along their adventure, they will acquire potent wrestling techniques, such as the Rooster Uppercut, and the Dimension Swap ability. This latter ability is critical for accessing new areas and discovering hidden secrets, according to game guides.

Key features of Guacamelee! Gold Edition include:

*   **Integrated Combat and Platforming:** Combat moves are used for both fighting enemies and navigating platforming challenges.
*   **Dimension Swapping:** Players can seamlessly switch between multiple overlapping dimensions, including the World of the Living and the World of the Dead, to solve puzzles and open new paths.
*   **'El Infierno' Level Expansion:** This expansion challenges players in the fiery trials of 'El Infierno' to unlock powerful new costumes for Juan and Tostada.
*   **Player Costumes:** Heroes can be customized by swapping costumes, which modify attributes and unlock new achievements.
*   **Steam Integration:** The game supports Steam Achievements, Leaderboards, Cloud Save functionality, and Big Picture Mode.
*   **Steam Workshop:** Players can create and share custom costumes with the game's community.
*   **Local Co-op:** The entire story can be experienced with a friend through drop-in/drop-out 2-player local cooperative play.
*   **Chickens:** Players should anticipate a significant presence of feathered friends!

For those desiring an even more extensive adventure, Guacamelee! Super Turbo Championship Edition is also available on Steam PC. This enhanced version expands upon the Gold Edition by introducing additional powers, levels, enemies, and notable gameplay and graphical enhancements, as detailed in its release notes.

Name: The Ramp
Description:
THE RAMP SUPPORTS KEYBOARD INPUT, BUT IS BEST PLAYED WITH A CONTROLLER. You crave for flow? You just want to shred through a halfpipe without all the boring stuff? Say no more, The Ramp is your jam! YES: tons of flow satisfying & unique skateboarding gameplay easy to learn, hard to master BUT: NO unlockable stuff NO score, NO missions NO guns, explosions and helicopters A quick note from the developer: When thinking about buying The Ramp , please keep in mind that it is a very small game. Maybe not even a game, but rather a digital toy. It was created by a single developer (hi that’s me, Paul) to scratch a very specific itch. The Ramp captures the unparalleled feeling of real life vert skateboarding and that’s pretty much it. There is a lot this game doesn’t feature. What it offers you are the 15 minutes of flow that make a boring day great, at the price of a medium sized cinnamon pistachio latte to go. Please don’t hesitate to get in touch if you have feedback, questions or problems with the game. I’ll do my best to get back to you as quickly as possible. Also let me know if you enjoyed The Ramp , because that really makes my day!

Name: The Pale Beyond
Description:
Five years ago, The Viscount and its crew set sail through The Pale Passage in search of absolute magnetic South. The ship and its crew were tragically lost to the ice, never to be seen again. Her sister ship, The Temperance shall follow in her path, hoping to find answers where The Viscount failed. A polar exploration game set in an unforgiving frozen wasteland where you embark on a treacherous voyage across the ice and through the Pale Beyond. It’s a stunning yet harsh landscape that can change at any moment. Every decision matters and the ice doesn’t care. As the expedition unfolds and the Polar Winter approaches, every decision you make will have a meaningful impact on the story as you navigate your way across the ice. You didn’t ask to lead this expedition, but here you are. Stuck in the ice, Captain missing, miles from civilisation. Someone has to take charge. Manage your meagre resources, balance safety and morale, make the hard calls, and head in the only direction you can - through The Pale Beyond. Keeping the crew (and sled dogs) safe, fed, and warm during the expedition is imperative. Surviving the ice will matter little in the face of a mutiny. Every vote will count. So keep the crew on your side. Featuring original musical compositions, shanties and accordion tunes that will dynamically evolve alongside your journey.

## Röki: A Northern Fairy Tale Adventure Game

Embark on a captivating journey into a forgotten northern realm with Röki, a modern adventure game deeply inspired by Scandinavian folklore. This enchanting experience invites players to discover a world brimming with mythical creatures, uncover hidden paths, and solve ancient puzzles. You'll join Tove on a quest to save her family, venturing deep into a mysterious, long-forgotten land. Explore the ancient wilderness, unravel its secrets, and encounter a rich cast of unique characters in this visually stunning and engaging environment.

Röki immerses players in a meticulously detailed Northern world, brought to life through its signature graphical style. This realm of mystery and monsters offers a visually stunning and engaging environment to explore. Venture forth to seek out the ancient and magical beings that inhabit the Scandinavian wilderness. According to the game's developers, these creatures are described as 'creepy-but-cute,' offering a fresh perspective on traditional Nordic folklore. Some will be friendly, while others may present challenges, adding an element of surprise to your exploration.

The core gameplay mechanics of Röki revolve around exploration, puzzle-solving, and discovery. Key elements that drive the adventure forward include:

*   **Item Discovery:** Players will need to search the ancient wilderness for long-forgotten items. These discoveries will aid Tove on her adventure and unlock new possibilities as she progresses.
*   **Environmental Puzzles:** Deciphering the riddles of the wilderness is crucial. These puzzles will unlock ancient pathways and allow players to progress through the game's narrative.
*   **Journaling and Exploration:** Tove meticulously charts her progress in her journal, mapping uncharted regions and delving into the rich tapestry of Scandinavian folklore. Players can also collect loot and earn unique 'wilderness explorer' badges, rewarding their thoroughness.

Röki is designed as an adventure game for everyone, emphasizing accessibility and universal themes. Its non-violent gameplay, intuitive controls, and engaging narrative make it a welcoming experience for a wide audience. The game offers a satisfying challenge without being overly demanding, providing assistance when needed. This approach presents a modern take on the adventure genre, ensuring that the magic of the northern fairy tale is accessible to all who wish to experience it.

Name: Relicta
Description:
Relicta is a first-person physics-based puzzle game where you need to creatively combine magnetism and gravity in order to unravel the secrets of Chandra Base. Alone in the treacherous depths of the Moon, your scientific mind is the only thing that can keep your daughter alive… Play as a top physicist stranded on an eerie, derelict Moon base. Find your way around the enigmatic, terraformed craters by bending gravity and magnetism to your will in order to solve physical puzzles. Will you rush straight ahead and try to reach safety - or will you take your time to gather clues and unravel the intrigues of 22nd century orbital politics? Buried in the eternal darkness of the lunar craters lies a secret that might claim your daughter’s life - or change the fate of humanity forever. Are you ready to face the ultimate consequences of your research? Features: Mind-bending mechanics - alter gravity and magnetism at will. Complex physical puzzles - combine your abilities in innovative ways to solve these physical riddles. Lovingly detailed environments - each corner tells a story, each new step is a challenge. Deep and enigmatic background story - Find clues and piece together the details about the investigation of the Relicta's anomaly. Immersive original soundtrack - slip into the soundscapes of an sci-fi psychological thriller.

Name: Steep™
Description:
Ride a massive open world across the Alps, where the powder is always fresh and the run never ends. Tame the wilderness on the American continent in the Alaska free update, a new region filled with challenges. The mountain is yours to explore. So strap in, suit up, and drop in. - RIDE YOUR WAY -Conquer the world's most epic mountains on skis, wingsuits, snowboards, and paragliders. - LIVE UNFORGETTABLE MOMENTS WITH OTHERS -Ride solo or drop in next to other players to share thrilling, adrenaline-fueled rides. - THE MOUNTAIN IS YOURS TO EXPLORE -Create your own path through a massive open-world, and share your best custom lines with friends. - PUT YOUR SKILLS TO THE TEST -Prove that you're king of the mountain in unique and spectacular challenges. - SHARE EVERYTHING -Capture your most insane stunts and share via social media. A permanent internet connection is required in order to play the game. - SET YOUR SIGHTS ON THE ALPS Rip through the terrains of a snowy open world. Strap in and suit up for some epic stunts as you ride your way to the peak of the excitement. Experience 360° of visual freedom while you explore the Alps. Let your gaze immerse you in the massive winter playground. Situational awareness has never been more fluid with the integrated Tobii Eye Tracking feature set. Using your gaze to shred the hills enhances your gameplay and lets you embark on the ride of your life. Compatible with all Tobii Eye Tracking gaming devices. ---- Additional notes: Eye tracking features available with Tobii Eye Tracking.

Name: Near Death
Description:
After your plane crash-lands in Antarctica, you find yourself stranded and alone at an abandoned research facility in the midst of a deadly blizzard. Plunged into utter darkness, temperatures 100 degrees below zero, and conditions far too harsh to allow for rescue, you must explore Sutro Station and and use the tools at your disposal in hopes of escaping and finding your way home. Not a survival game, but instead a game about surviving, Near Death pits you against an incredibly cruel opponent: Antarctica. Never more than a few minutes from freezing to death in the darkness of polar night, you must reclaim the station from the elements and fight for your life in a terrifying environment that’s more like another planet than the world you know. Features A fully explorable Antarctic research station with seamless open world navigation over an unforgiving landscape. Unique gameplay and innovative player tools suited to the harsh realities of a frigid, dark continent. Mark your way with light trails in zero-visibility storms, melt frozen obstacles to explore the base in search of much-needed supplies, create pockets of warmth with a personal heater, and more. A dynamic weather system that utilizes snow, wind, temperature, and lighting to create a multitude of Antarctic conditions ranging from blinding whiteouts to brief moments of calm. A real-time temperature simulation that freezes and thaws the environment room by room based on exposure to the elements, building layouts, the base’s power system, and your own ability to establish safe areas with makeshift repairs. Discoverable blueprints and upgrades that enhance your capabilities and increase your ability to withstand the cold. An original score of haunting ambient music that amplifies the isolation of Sutro Station.

Name: Lost Planet™: Extreme Condition
Description:
Driven to the brink of extinction on ice-covered wastelands, humankind fights to survive. Battle to survive against gargantuan alien Akrid and treacherous Snow Pirates on the vast and frozen landscape of EDN III. With no allies at your side, the only thing you can trust is your instincts. Combining a gripping single player campaign and intense multiplayer modes with support for up to 16 players online, Lost Planet is an epic gaming masterpiece. Enormous world maps unfold as players battle across vast snow fields and deserted cities either on foot or in armed, robotic Vital Suits. Key Features: Intense action - A fast-paced third-person shooter with all the depth, intrigue, and intensity of a science fiction classic. Foot and vehicle based gameplay - Command highly powered armed vehicles and weapons, including transformable snow vessels. Vast environments - Snowstorms, arctic winds, towering buildings and mountains of ice are all stunningly realized as battles occur above and below ground, creating a truly immersive and cinematic event of epic proportions. Battle hordes of colossal Akrid. Command heavily armored Vital Suits. Intense 16 multiplayer action. Enhanced DirectX 10 graphics.

## Fade to Silence: Survive the Eternal Winter

**Fade to Silence** throws you into a frozen, post-apocalyptic world where an unending winter reigns. Corrupted nature unleashes monstrous foes, and the harsh environment itself poses a constant danger. Your goal is simple: survive.

### Leading the Charge as Ash

You step into the boots of Ash, a natural leader. Your mission is to explore the desolate, frozen lands and build a safe haven. Gathering vital resources is key, but supplies are scarce. This forces you on risky journeys for even basic upgrades and materials.

### Navigating Perilous Territory

Survival depends on traversing dangerous lands. You'll face Eldritch monsters and the biting cold. Blizzards are the most lethal threat, requiring skill, grit, and a bit of luck to get through.

### The Power of Followers

Recruiting allies is vital. Each follower brings unique skills. These skills unlock access to better resources and gear. Without them, your scavenging is limited to essentials. You'll be stuck with crude tools and weapons.

### Core Gameplay Features

*   **Tense and Tough:** Expect a challenging experience that demands careful planning and resource use.
*   **Explore at Your Pace:** The Exploration Mode lets you enjoy the story on your own terms.
*   **A Huge Winter World:** Explore an 8km² area with varied landscapes.
*   **Wolf Sled Journeys:** Venture into distant areas on extended expeditions.
*   **Build Your Team:** Recruit followers to get better gear. You'll face tough moral choices.
*   **Fight Strange Beasts:** Battle increasingly fearsome Eldritch creatures.
*   **Team Up in Co-op:** Play with a friend after recruiting your first follower.

### Immersion in a Harsh Climate

The game blends its brutal winter setting with a deep, character-focused survival story. A changing weather system boosts immersion. You must read weather patterns and decide wisely about shelter and returning home. Realistic environmental effects, like snow movement, can show paths, reveal hunting spots, or warn of danger. As the game says, "Trust your inner voice. It is your friend." This highlights how crucial intuition is in this unforgiving world.

## Skater XL: Mastering Digital Skateboarding

Skater XL offers a unique digital skateboarding experience, aiming to capture the essence of real-world skating. Its primary strength lies in its innovative, physics-based controls, allowing players to truly master the sport. Unlike games with pre-programmed animations, Skater XL features an Independent Foot Control System.
