High-end Anime Graphics Using the power of the Unreal engine and the talented team at Arc System Works, DRAGON BALL FighterZ is a visual tour-de-force. 3vs3 Tag/Support Build your dream team and sharpen your skills to master high-speed tag combinations. Thrilling Online Features Ranked matches, interactive lobby, crazy 6-player Party Match... There is something for every taste! Exclusive Story Mode Discover a never-seen-before scenario featuring Android 21, a brand new character whose creation was supervised by Akira Toriyama himself. Spectacular Fights Experience aerial combos, destructible stages and famous scenes from the DRAGON BALL anime in 60FPS and 1080p resolution!

Name: Battlerite
Description:
Battlerite ​ ​is​ ​a​ ​PvP​ ​arena​ ​brawler​ ​and​ ​the​ ​spiritual​ ​successor​ ​to​ ​the critically​ ​acclaimed​ ​Bloodline Champions.​ ​Experience​ ​the​ ​unique​ ​combination​ of a ​​top​-down​ ​shooter​ ​meeting a ​fast​-paced fighting​ ​game and take ​part​ ​in​ ​highly​ ​competitive,​ ​adrenaline-fueled​ ​2v2​ ​and​ ​3v3​ ​battles.​ ​ Engage​ ​in quick​ ​and​ ​intense​ ​action​ ​as​ ​you​ ​take​ ​control​ ​over​ ​one​ ​of​ many Champions,​ ​each​ ​with unique abilities to master.​ ​Welcome​ ​to​ ​a​ ​world​ ​where​ ​Champions​ ​dedicate​ ​their​ ​lives​ ​to​ ​the Arena. QUICK​ ​ARENA​ ​ACTION ​​​ Master the Arena​ ​in​ explosive​ ​battles​ ​of reaction.​ Choose your Champion, team up with friends, and dive into combat - for glory awaits only those who seek it. PRECISE​ ​GAMEPLAY​ ​MOVEMENT Aim skill-shots and dodge​ ​projectiles​ ​with​ ​the​ ​use​ ​of​ ​WASD​ ​movement​ ​& cursor​-​based​ ​aiming.​ Wield total control over your champion and execute massive attacks against opponents. PERFORM​ ​BATTLERITES ​​​ Gain​ ​strength​ ​and​ ​upgrade your abilities​ ​using​ ​rites.​ Select ​your​ ​rites​ ​to strategically​ ​customize​ ​your​ ​play​ ​style. ACCOUNT​ ​CUSTOMIZATION ​​ Show​ ​off​ ​your​ ​skills​ ​in​ ​style.​ ​From​ ​weapons​ and outfits ​to​ ​victory​ ​stances, there’s​ ​a​ ​huge​ ​variety​ ​of​ ​cosmetic​ ​customizations​ ​to​ ​make​ ​you​ ​stand​ ​out​ ​from​ ​the​ ​crowd.

## GUILTY GEAR Xrd -SIGN-: A New Era of Anime Fighting Games

**GUILTY GEAR Xrd -SIGN-** has arrived on Steam, heralding a significant evolution for the beloved fighting game series. This installment delivers revolutionary graphics and an overwhelming battle system, building upon a legacy that began in 1998.

### Stunning Visuals: Hand-Drawn Anime Reimagined

A cornerstone of **GUILTY GEAR Xrd -SIGN-** is its breathtaking visual presentation. Every character has been completely redrawn in full 3D, meticulously detailed, and hand-polished by animation masters. This dedication ensures a top-quality, hand-drawn anime effect that brings the vibrant cast to life like never before, according to Arc System Works.

### Revamped Battle System: The Power of Roman Cancel

The game's combat has also undergone a significant overhaul, with a central emphasis on its core system: 'Roman Cancel'. This innovative mechanic empowers players to devise their own game plans and craft unique battle strategies. Mastering Roman Cancel is key to unlocking the full potential of the game's deep combat, as highlighted in numerous gameplay analyses.

### A Roster of Legends and Newcomers

**GUILTY GEAR Xrd -SIGN-** features a compelling clash of 17 characters, blending familiar faces with exciting new additions. The roster includes iconic fighters from previous Guilty Gear titles, such as Sol and Ky, alongside five entirely new characters making their debut. The introduction of Bedman, Sin, Ramlethal, Elphelt, and Leo injects fresh intensity into every battle.

*   **Note:** Sin, Elphelt, and Leo can be unlocked through in-game currency or by purchasing their respective DLCs.

### Diverse Game Modes for Every Player

**GUILTY GEAR Xrd -SIGN-** offers a variety of modes to suit all playstyles.

#### Learning the Ropes

*   **TUTORIAL Mode:** Master the fundamentals of fighting games through the humorous adventures of Sin and Sol.
*   **Training Modes:** Challenge yourself to complete a range of missions designed to hone your skills.

#### Unlocking Content and Customization

*   **GALLERY Mode:** Unlock exclusive illustrations and background music to delve deeper into the game's world.
*   **M.O.M. Mode:** Customize your favorite characters by equipping them with different moves from other fighters, allowing for unique combat combinations, such as Ky wielding Gunflame.

#### Immersive Storytelling

*   **STORY Mode:** Experience the rich lore of Guilty Gear through a unique blend of adventure game elements and animated cutscenes, offering a narrative experience unlike any other.

### Robust NETWORK MODE for Global Competition

The **NETWORK MODE** provides a comprehensive online experience.

*   **Rank Match:** Stake your personal ranking score and battle against players worldwide.
*   **Player Match:** Enjoy casual matches without the pressure of rankings.
*   **Player Match Room:** Communicate with global players and engage in exciting battles.

Furthermore, you can enter the **Rank Match queue** and access offline modes like **ARCADE** and **TRAINING** while waiting for a match. You can also spectate other players' matches by joining their Player Match rooms, offering a spectator's perspective on high-level play.

Name: Counter-Strike: Global Offensive
Description:
Counter-Strike: Global Offensive (CS: GO) expands upon the team-based action gameplay that it pioneered when it was launched 19 years ago. CS: GO features new maps, characters, weapons, and game modes, and delivers updated versions of the classic CS content (de_dust2, etc.). 'Counter-Strike took the gaming industry by surprise when the unlikely MOD became the most played online PC action game in the world almost immediately after its release in August 1999,' said Doug Lombardi at Valve. 'For the past 12 years, it has continued to be one of the most-played games in the world, headline competitive gaming tournaments and selling over 25 million units worldwide across the franchise. CS: GO promises to expand on CS' award-winning gameplay and deliver it to gamers on the PC as well as the next gen consoles and the Mac.'

## Spelunky 2: A Deeper Dive into the Roguelike Sequel

Spelunky 2 invites a new generation of explorers to embark on a perilous journey to the Moon, seeking lost family and legendary treasure. This sequel significantly expands upon the beloved roguelike platformer formula, offering a **vastly larger and more dynamic world** designed to captivate both seasoned veterans and newcomers alike.

The world of Spelunky 2 boasts **increased density with more areas, characters, traps, and items**. Novel interactions between these elements create a truly emergent gameplay experience. Key enhancements include:

*   **A Third Dimension:** Spelunky 2 incorporates **branching paths and multi-layered levels**, allowing players to access a second layer behind the normal playfield for hidden secrets.
*   **Dynamic Liquid Physics:** **Improved liquid physics** for water and lava introduce **new and dynamic challenges**, making the world feel more reactive.
*   **Mounts and Mobility:** Players can **find and ride various mounts**, such as turkeys, which possess unique abilities. Enemies can also utilize these mounts.

Spelunky 2 introduces a **permanent Base Camp** where unlocked characters gather between expeditions. This hub serves as a place for **encouragement and advice**. As players progress, the camp will **expand and develop into a welcoming community**. Here, players can also access **shortcuts and practice their skills**.

More than just a game about overcoming challenges, Spelunky 2 is presented as an **endlessly replayable playground**. It encourages players to **experiment, discover their own strategies, and forge unique stories**. As developers emphasize, **"the more you play, the more the game becomes yours!"** Developers aimed to create a world that felt **"truly alive and full of surprises,"** ensuring a consistently fresh and engaging experience.

Name: Tumblestone
Description:
Tumblestone is the first original action-puzzle game of the past fifteen years. Race your friends in multiplayer or challenge yourself in story mode. Solve progressively more difficult and creative puzzles, help a sausage make friends, and find out what happened to the Tumblecrown. Key Features Competitive multiplayer : Tumblestone's intense puzzle-solving action will turn playing 'just a few more rounds' with friends into a late-night Tumblestone marathon. Local multiplayer : Up to four players on a single computer. Online multiplayer : Play online against your friends or make new ones using Tumblestone's ranked matchmaking system. Bots : Have an open slot? Play against the computer. But can anyone withstand the punishing Nightmare bot? Story mode : The 40+ hour story campaign will test your puzzle-solving prowess. Featuring 10+ gameplay modifiers, challenge puzzles, and boss battles. Arcade modes : Kick back and relax with the casual Marathon mode, scratch an intellectual itch with the Infinipuzzle mode, or get your blood pumping with the fast-paced Heartbeat mode. Leaderboards : Online leaderboards let your friends know you're better than them. Quests : Hundreds of unique quests to complete. Stats : Rank up, then compare how you stack up against your friends. Personalization : Choose from a dozen unique characters and environments.

## N++: A Masterclass in Momentum-Based Platforming

N++ (NPLUSPLUS) delivers a thrilling, momentum-based platforming experience, challenging players to expertly navigate a beautifully minimalist landscape. The core gameplay loop centers on precisely darting around obstacles, narrowly evading a diverse array of enemies, and diligently collecting precious gold. This highly anticipated title signifies the N series' triumphant return to PC after a significant 12-year hiatus. According to the developers, this extended period was dedicated to meticulously perfecting the platforming experience.

### Mastering Momentum and Sci-Fi Challenges

The true essence of N++ is found in mastering momentum to conquer its numerous levels and achieve impressive high scores. Set within a distinct sci-fi universe, players will confront a host of inadvertently homicidal enemy robots, all determined to thwart their progress. The game proudly features meticulously hand-crafted levels, a deliberate choice to avoid procedural generation, ensuring an intensely challenging and consistent platforming experience. Players are tasked with utilizing their fluid movement to effectively "solve" each unique level and successfully reach the exit.

### A Wealth of Engaging Features

Beyond its extensive and demanding single-player campaign, N++ is packed with a wealth of features designed to offer lasting engagement and replayability:

#### Unrivaled Content and Community

*   **Vast Content:** Players can experience an incredible 4,340 meticulously hand-made levels, offering a substantial amount of challenging content.
*   **Community Creation:** Dive into the robust Custom Levels feature, utilize the intuitive Level Editor, and engage in Global Level Sharing to discover and play an endless stream of player-made challenges.

#### Competitive and Cooperative Play

*   **Competitive Play:** Compete against others on global Leaderboards and review replays for every level, including those created by users, to analyze strategies and improve your performance.
*   **Multiplayer Modes:** Enjoy the Local Co-op Mode, supporting up to 4 players, and the Local Competitive Mode, also for up to 4 players, for shared gaming experiences.

#### Extreme Challenges and Customization

*   **Extreme Challenges:** Test your ultimate skills in Hardcore Mode, a single-player challenge specifically designed for the most elite ninjas, and discover hidden Secret challenges that push the boundaries of gameplay.
*   **Audio-Visual Customization:** Immerse yourself in the game's atmosphere with 63 captivating tracks by top electronic artists and personalize the game's aesthetic with 119 different color palettes, allowing for a truly unique visual experience.

N++ offers a gameplay experience with no discernible skill ceiling, as noted by many players, allowing for continuous improvement and mastery over time. Whether you prefer to play in short bursts or extended sessions, the bite-sized nature of the gameplay ensures there's always something new to discover and a higher score to chase, ultimately providing a lifetime of challenging and rewarding fun.

Name: TowerFall Ascension
Description:
TowerFall Ascension is the definitive version of the hit archery combat game. Inspired by classics from the golden age of couch multiplayer, it's a 4-player local party game centering around hilarious, intense versus matches. The core mechanics are simple and accessible, but hard to master and combat is fierce. Loot treasure chests for game-changing power-ups, master the art of catching arrows out of the air, or descend on your foes and stomp them into submission. TowerFall is best played competitively with friends, cross-legged on the floor within punching distance of each other. New in Ascension is the 1- or 2-player co-op Quest mode. Players work together, fighting off a variety of monsters and enemy archers across the land of TowerFall. It's a new adventure to explore when you don't have more friends handy to square off against. New features in TowerFall Ascension include: Brand new 1- or 2-player co-op Quest mode 50 additional Versus arenas, for a total of 120 unique maps More game-changing power-ups, such as Drill Arrows that burrow through walls 4 new unlockable, playable archers, for a total of 8 A huge list of variants to customize your matches - a total of 75 ways to mix things up Plenty of hidden secrets and surprises to discover with your friends

## Bionic Commando Rearmed: A Modern Take on a Classic

Bionic Commando Rearmed breathes new life into the beloved 8-bit classic. This remake features a striking '2.5D' visual upgrade and a host of new content, faithfully recreating the original NES game's iconic side-scrolling gameplay. Players can once again master the art of swinging and shooting.

### Enhanced Gameplay and New Content

While preserving the core mechanics that made the original a hit, Bionic Commando Rearmed introduces several exciting additions. These enhancements aim to provide a fresh yet familiar experience.

*   **2-Player Co-op:** Team up with a friend for cooperative missions.
*   **Smarter Enemy AI:** Face more challenging and adaptive adversaries.
*   **New Bionic Arm Abilities:** Expand your combat and traversal options.
*   **New Weapons:** Discover and utilize an arsenal of fresh firepower.
*   **Bigger Bosses:** Prepare for epic confrontations with reimagined boss encounters.
*   **Online Rankings:** Compete for the top spot on global leaderboards.

### A Story Reimagined

Bionic Commando Rearmed adheres to the original NES game's narrative. It follows Nathan 'R.A.D.' Spencer on his crucial mission to rescue captured agent Super Joe from the clutches of the Imperials. Fans will be delighted to see all the familiar characters and relive the memorable moments that cemented the original's popularity.

### Interconnectivity with the 3D Sequel

This remake also serves as a bridge to its 3D counterpart, Bionic Commando, also available on PC. By completing specific objectives within Rearmed, players can unlock exclusive content and receive in-game hints for the upcoming 3D title. This creates a cohesive story experience across both games, as noted by game reviewers.

### Key Features at a Glance

*   **Classic Side-Scrolling Action:** Experience the signature swinging and shooting gameplay, now enhanced with new abilities, weapons, and bosses.
*   **2-Player Co-op Mode:** Join forces with another player for cooperative adventures.
*   **Modern Visual and Audio Revamp:** Enjoy a complete graphical and auditory upgrade.
*   **Cross-Game Interoperability:** Unlock content and hints for the Bionic Commando sequel by playing Rearmed.
*   **Challenge Rooms:** Test your skills in obstacle courses and swing puzzles, with your performance ranked online.
*   **Top-Down Stages:** Relive the original's 'Enemy Encounter' stages with a top-down perspective and remixed classic music.
*   **Multiplayer Mayhem:** Up to 4 players can engage in frantic shooting and swinging battles.
*   **Art by Shinkiro:** Features in-game art designed by the renowned Capcom artist, Shinkiro.

Name: Rayman® Origins
Description:
Michel Ancel, celebrated creator of Rayman®, Beyond Good & Evil®, and the Raving Rabbids®, returns to his roots to bring us Rayman® Origins: a high-definition, 2D side-scrolling, platforming adventure with full four-player co-op! Play Rayman Origins and discover or rediscover the magical universe and legendary 2D gameplay that captured the hearts of millions of fans... When the Glade of Dreams is overrun by “nefurrious” Darktoons, the Fairy Council hastily invokes Rayman to save the day; but the hero of light isn’t quite all there…To help him, Rayman teams up with his best friend, Globox, and two crafty wizards, the Teensies. Together, the world’s most hilarious team of heroes will need to restore peace to the Glade, or watch as their beloved home vanishes like a bad dream... Key Features Rebirth of a Platforming Legend: It’s been 15 years since the initial launch of Rayman. Rayman Origins brings back many of the classic characters, revived in their original 2D form, as well as a whole new world of characters and environments. Four-Player, Jump-In/Jump-Out, Co-op Gameplay: Play as Rayman in the solo campaign, or have up to three friends jump in at any time to play as Globox or as one of the two Teensies. Players can leave at any time without affecting the others’ progression. Unique Approach to 2D Art: A rich world with over 100 characters and 12 unique environments created by some of the video gaming’s most reputed artists and animators. This creative approach to 2D design will recapture the hearts of platformer fans and introduce a new generation to one of the industry’s best-loved characters in his original 2D form. A Vast Playground: Rayman Origins includes over 60 levels of 2D platforming gameplay designed for all ages and playing styles. Unlock new abilities progressively and return to previous levels to discover new paths and secrets. Variety of Gameplay: Rayman Origins is a platformer at its core, but it has elements of many game genres. Rayman, Globox, and the Teensies gain unique abilities as they progress through the adventure, including swimming, diving and the sensational “HairlyCopter.” The game also features many elements of action, adventure, and beat-’em-up gameplay. Epic Boss Fights: A giant pink monster with hundreds of eyes... A possessed, mountainous golem... An evil daisy-cum-carnivorous plant...Rayman Origins will put players to the test with these and many more challenging boss battles! A Handful of Highly Talented Artists and Engineers: Rayman Origins was developed by the UBIart team in Montpellier and is built on an open-source game engine - the UBIart Framework - designed by Michel Ancel to allow much smaller teams of artists and developers to produce incredibly high-quality graphics and gameplay quickly and efficiently. This garage-game approach has led to great strides in creativity and innovation.

## Rocket League: The Phenomenon of Vehicular Soccer

Rocket League combines arcade soccer with high-octane car action. Its easy-to-learn controls and physics-based gameplay offer deep strategic depth, a fact widely acknowledged by gaming critics.

### Gameplay and Modes

The game provides diverse play options:

*   **Online Matches:** Engage in casual or competitive online play.
*   **Season Mode:** A complete offline experience for solo players.
*   **Extra Modes:** Unique hockey and basketball-inspired gameplay.
*   **Mutators:** Customize matches by altering game rules.

With over 500 trillion cosmetic customization options, players can personalize their vehicles extensively. Rocket League has received over 150 "Game of the Year" awards and nominations, cementing its status as a celebrated sports game.

### Community and Updates

Rocket League has a massive player base exceeding 57 million. Continuous free and paid updates introduce new downloadable content, features, modes, and arenas.

### Recent Additions

*   **Rocket Pass:** Premium offers an XP bonus and up to 70 unique rewards like Battle-Cars and Goal Explosions.
*   **Challenge System:** Complete Weekly Challenges to earn exclusive Rocket Pass rewards.
*   **Esports Shop:** Support favorite teams with new Decals, Wheels, and Player Banners.

### Platform Support

Support for macOS and Linux (SteamOS) has ended due to technological shifts. The final patch on March 10, 2020, disabled online features for these platforms, though offline play remains. The Windows version may have unaddressed bugs.

### Regional Restrictions

Online multiplayer is restricted in certain regions, including China, Crimea, Cuba, Iran, North Korea, Sudan, and Syria, due to service provider agreements.

Software and online features are subject to terms of use and privacy policies found at rocketleague.com.

## Full Metal Furies: A Cooperative Action RPG Focused on Teamwork

**Full Metal Furies** is a cooperative action RPG from the creators of *Rogue Legacy*. It places a strong emphasis on teamwork, ensuring every player's actions are vital for success. Players must work together to defeat specialized foes, unleash powerful combos, and save a world on the edge of ruin. The game supports up to four players, either online or locally, offering a true party experience. For those playing solo, a "Pick 2" quick-switch system adds strategic depth.

### The Core of Cooperation

Cooperation is the heart of **Full Metal Furies**. Victory hinges on coordinated efforts, not just individual prowess. A key mechanic involves enemies deploying colored barriers that can only be broken by allies of the matching color. Reviving fallen teammates is also critical; while revive bars regenerate over time, ally assistance significantly speeds up the process.

The game actively discourages competition. Elements like fighting for last hits, gold, or health drops are removed. All resources are shared, fostering a collaborative environment where everyone benefits from collective success.

### Solo Play Strategy

Even when playing alone, **Full Metal Furies** offers a rich experience. The "Pick 2" system allows solo players to control two party members. This enables dynamic combo execution and aerial enemy juggling through seamless character switching.

### Unique Character Roles

The game features four distinct classes, each with a unique role:

*   **Alex the Friendly Fighter:** Excels in close combat, using counters and intricate combos.
*   **Meg the Near-sighted Sniper:** Specializes in long-range attacks and mine deployment for enemy control.
*   **Triss the Boxy Tank:** Protects allies with shields or by repelling threats.
*   **Erin the Ovally Engineer:** Controls the battlefield with turrets and a versatile firearm.

### Evolving Combat and Diverse Enemies

Each class boasts a unique skill tree for deep ability customization. Players will face over 70 distinct enemy types, each with unique tells and specific counters. New threats are introduced progressively, culminating in challenging, multi-phase Titan battles.

### An Intriguing World and Story

**Full Metal Furies** invites players to explore diverse environments like Thessaly and the Foloi Forest. The game's narrative is substantial, featuring over 20,000 words of story content, secrets, and hidden dimensions. This rich narrative is presented across 8 languages, with 20,000 one-liners. The game is an allegorical action-adventure exploring themes of atonement and allusions.

Name: Guacamelee! 2
Description:
Brawling has never been more beautiful! The long-awaited sequel to the smash hit action-platformer is here: Guacamelee! 2 brings luchador Juan Aguacate out of retirement for a stunning new Metroidvania-style adventure. Explore a huge, hand-crafted world inspired by Mexican culture and folklore, filled with sassy new villains and weirdos (and a few old friends!). Learn a deep repertoire of bone-crunching moves to fend off the skeletal hordes and overcome a multitude of platforming challenges. ...and who said anything about a Chicken Illuminati? Certainly not us! Key Features: New moves like Eagle Boost, Pollo Shot and more add to Juan’s arsenal of combat and platforming abilities. New powers for Juan’s chicken form! Ridiculous chicken-based platforming, combat and exploration. More chicken than you’ll be able to handle (probably). An epic adventure through the worlds of the living and the dead, across rifts in time and space -- more gorgeous than ever thanks to a fancy new rendering engine. Bigger maps, twice as many enemy types as the first game, and a roster of eccentric new bosses. Discover “trainers” from around the world, defeat their challenges, and upgrade your abilities. Soundtrack featuring new music from the composers of the original Guacamelee! OST, plus tracks from special guests Mariachi Entertainment System! Drop-in / drop-out 4-player local co-op through the entire story.

Name: SpeedRunners
Description:
In a city filled with superheroes, getting to crimes becomes a competition on its own. Fortunately there are enough rockets, bombs, grappling hooks, spikes, and other goodies lying around -- to make the competition fun and fast. Welcome to SpeedRunners. SpeedRunners is a 4 player competitive platformer with grappling hooks, power-ups, and interactive environments. Run, jump, swing around, fire rockets, grapple onto people to knock them off screen. Key Features 4 Player Competitive Platforming! Keep up with the fastest player in-game, or fall offscreen and get eliminated! Use weapons like missiles, mines and grappling hooks to screw over your friends, and make new enemies! Local and online multiplayer! Can you have 2 players on a couch against 2 other players on the internet? Yes of course! Bots enabled - play on your own with several AI opponents. Or put them into matches with other people! A tutorial teaches you how to play Controller compatible (and recommended!) A dozen expertly designed maps Unique game modifiers A character named Unic! Full blown level editor with over 10k user created levels An exciting single player campaign Create your own custom in-game trails (visible when you hit super-speed)

Name: Pillars of Eternity
Description:
Prepare to be enchanted by a world where the choices you make and the paths you choose shape your destiny. Obsidian Entertainment, the developer of Fallout: New Vegas™ and South Park: The Stick of Truth™, together with Paradox Interactive is proud to present Pillars of Eternity. Recapture the deep sense of exploration, the joy of a pulsating adventure, and the thrill of leading your own band of companions across a new fantasy realm and into the depths of monster-infested dungeons in search of lost treasures and ancient mysteries. So gather your party, venture forth, and embrace adventure as you delve into a realm of wonder, nostalgia, and the excitement of classic RPGs with Obsidian’s Pillars of Eternity! Play as any one of six races: Human, Aumaua, Dwarf, Elf, Godlike and Orlan. Utilize five core skills to overcome any situation: Stealth, Athletics, Lore, Mechanics and Survival. Deep character customization: Build a character as one of eleven classes such as Barbarian, Chanter, Cipher, Druid, Fighter, Monk, Paladin, Priest, Ranger, Rogue and Wizard. Sculpt your own story: Side with various factions using a reputation system, where your actions and choices have far reaching consequences. Explore a rich and diverse world: Beautiful pre-rendered environments laced with an engaging story and characters bring the world to life.

Name: Divinity: Original Sin (Classic)
Description:
Gather your party and get ready for a new, back-to-the-roots RPG adventure! Discuss your decisions with companions; fight foes in turn-based combat; explore an open world and interact with everything and everyone you see. Join up with a friend to play online in co-op and make your own adventures with the powerful RPG toolkit. In Divinity: Original Sin you take on the role of a young Source Hunter: your job is to rid the world of those who use the foulest of magics. When you embark on what should have been a routine murder investigation, you suddenly find yourself in the middle of a plot that will rattle the very fabric of time. Divinity: Original Sin is a game that gives you a lot of freedom and plenty of gameplay mechanics to use or abuse. The game's epic story may drive you toward your ultimate end-goal, but how you get there is entirely up to you. Or up to you and a friend, because Divinity: Original Sin can be played completely cooperatively, and features both online and local drop-in/drop-out multiplayer. Great adventures become even greater when shared with a trusted comrade-in-arms! Key Features Become part of a reactive, living and vast open world. Explore many different environments, fight all kinds of fantastical creatures and discover tons of desirable items. Experience gripping party- and turn-based combat. Manipulate the environment and use skill & spell combos to overcome your many foes: Use magic to make it rain on your enemies, then cast a lightning spell to fry them to a crisp. Experiment with different skill combinations to ruin the day for enemies and townspeople alike. Play with a friend in co-op multiplayer. Make decisions together (or disagree entirely), as your interactions and relationship with your partner influence the game. Unravel a deep and epic story , set in the early days of the Divinity universe. No prior experience with other Divinity games is necessary, however. The game takes place well before its predecessors, Divine Divinity and Divinity II: The Dragon Knight Saga, but will still feel familiar to fans. Classless character creation lets you design the character of your choice. Endless item interaction and combinations take exploration and experimentation to another level of freedom. Create your own adventures and share them online. With Original Sin comes the powerful toolset used by the game's designers. Yours are endless new stories to make and share with other players! Digital Collector's Edition The Digital Collector's Edition contains: 2 copies of Divinity: Original Sin : one for you and pass on the second key to a friend Award-winning Divine Divinity and Beyond Divinity The Golden Grail DLC : an in-game item that allows you to colour your items in gold and sell them for more. Zandalor's Trunks DLC : enjoy a unique in-game undergarment as rare as it is opinionated. Design Documents Art Pack Soundtrack

## Wasteland 2: Director's Cut - Your Choices Define the Apocalypse

Wasteland 2: Director's Cut is a rich post-apocalyptic role-playing game where your decisions profoundly impact the world. Developed by the producer of the original Fallout, this title plunges you into a brutal environment where survival hinges on astute choices. The game offers approximately 80 hours of engaging gameplay.

### Forge Your Desert Ranger Squad

In Wasteland 2, you will assemble and outfit your Desert Ranger team, arming them with potent weaponry. Strategic thinking is essential as you navigate perilous territories, striving to restore order to the desolate wasteland.

### Unfettered Freedom and Personalization

Wasteland 2 champions player agency and the far-reaching consequences of your actions. The game presents numerous avenues to overcome obstacles, enabling diverse strategic approaches. For instance, you might:

*   Employ lockpicking skills to access new areas.
*   Utilize brute force to breach barriers.
*   Deploy explosives for a decisive entry.

These decisions carry significant and enduring repercussions, influencing game events and permanently altering the destinies of the wasteland's inhabitants. With a vast cast of characters to encounter, thousands of options for customizing your Rangers' appearances, and over 150 distinct weapons, each playthrough offers a unique experience.

### Enhancements in the Director's Cut

The Director's Cut edition significantly elevates the Wasteland 2 experience through several pivotal updates.

#### Striking Visual Fidelity

Powered by Unity 5, the game boasts revamped environments and character models, leveraging contemporary graphics to present a visually arresting post-apocalyptic landscape.

#### Enriched Characters Through Traits

You can bestow unique personality traits upon your squad, providing distinct advantages and disadvantages that lend depth and individuality to your characters.

#### Strategic Combat Depth

The innovative Precision Strikes system refines combat by allowing you to target specific enemy body parts, thereby weakening them with greater efficacy.

#### Expanded Voice Acting

Over 8,000 lines of newly recorded voice-over dialogue further immerse you in the game's world, breathing life into its characters and companions.

### Integrated Steam Functionality

Wasteland 2: Director's Cut also features Steam Cloud Saving, enabling seamless synchronization of your game progress across multiple computers.

## Embark on a Victorian Spacefaring Adventure in Sunless Skies: Sovereign Edition

**Sunless Skies: Sovereign Edition** invites you to captain a steam-powered locomotive through the vast expanse of the cosmos, leading a new Victorian empire among the stars. This definitive edition is packed with content, including new officers, enemies, engines, stories, and mascots. It also features a completely reworked region, a full steam mode for thrilling escapes, and the highly anticipated horn.

### Forge Your Captain's Legacy

Your journey begins by defining your captain's past. Were you an urchin, a priest, or a revolutionary? Each choice shapes your character and reveals what you're hiding. As you advance, you'll uncover more facets of your history, such as being the Black Sheep of the family or having a Lost Love. The skies are unforgiving, and most captains will meet their end. However, each captain leaves a mark on the world, passing down an inheritance to their successors.

### Explore a Hostile, Beautiful Universe

Venture into the **Fallen London Universe**, a deep, dark, and marvelous setting. While this is a new story, not a direct sequel, it expands upon the world seen in *Sunless Sea*. Prepare to encounter:

*   **The High Wilderness:** A wondrous and horrifying vision of space where gravity is unfettered. Winds howl through shattered celestial ruins, fogs coil amidst stellar jungles, and industrial sprawl chokes the heavens.
*   **The Judgements:** Vast, intelligent entities that govern all things, but are now dying, leaving their thrones empty.

### Master Your Locomotive

Your locomotive is your sole defense against the dangers of the Heavens.

*   **Upgrade and Arm:** Equip your vessel with exotic weaponry and equipment, such as a Pneumatic Mining Array or the rapid-fire Brassraven. Craft powerful weapons like the Wrath of Heaven from defeated foes.
*   **Acquire New Vessels:** When funds allow, purchase entirely new locomotives, from the capacious Pellinore-class Trader to the sleek Medea-class Destroyer.

### Survive the Perils of the Skies

The skies are teeming with threats:

*   **Rival Locomotives:** Face scrappy pirates and experimental warships of the imperial navy.
*   **Celestial Abominations:** Battle nightmarish creatures like the Undeparted or swarms of irate Chorister-bees.
*   **Factional Warfare:** Play different factions against each other and learn the unique behaviors of each foe.

### Manage Your Crew and Sanity

Survival hinges on careful management:

*   **Crew Morale:** Keep your crew's spirits high and manage your captain's own nightmares.
*   **Resource Management:** Balance fuel and supplies against your desire to explore, pursue knowledge, or seize riches. "Beware: we are all changed by the dark," warns the game's description.

### Recruit Unique Officers

Populate your ship with upgradeable officers, each with their own quests:

*   A repentant devil
*   An incognito princess
*   An entire brigade of rats
*   Your own Aunt?!

### The Sovereign Edition's Rich Features

*   **Vast Narrative:** Over 800,000 words of intertwining stories, inspired by literary giants like CS Lewis, Jules Verne, HP Lovecraft, and HG Wells.
*   **Stunning Art:** Lush, hand-drawn 2D art brings the world to life.
*   **Diverse Regions:** Explore four distinct regions: the celestial wilderness, an impossible industrial empire, a pagan midnight expanse, and the domain of the dead.
*   **Real-Time Combat:** Engage in dynamic battles against horrifying celestial foes and merciless pirates.
*   **Choice of Playstyles:** Build a lineage of captains through successive deaths or reload your most recent captain to continue your journey.
*   **Narrative Levelling:** Uncover your captain’s past as you traverse the skies.
*   **Rich Trading System:** Earn your fortune through a unique, story-rich trading system or risk it all as a smuggler.
*   **Collectible Pets:** Gather a menagerie of unique companions, including the Inadvisably Big Dog and the Useless Cat.
*   **Full Support:** Enjoy key remapping for keyboard and mouse, and full controller support.

**Failbetter Games**, a small British studio based in London, invites you to "Come with us into the dark."

Name: Muv-Luv Alternative (マブラヴ オルタネイティヴ)
Description:
Muv-Luv Alternative is a direct sequel to Muv-Luv Unlimited , and is the grand finale of the Muv-Luv trilogy. This page contains spoilers for the first game, so if this is your first time hearing about the series, we recommend playing Muv-Luv first. This is it. The chips are down, the die’s been cast, and the fate of the multiverse is on the line. Step back into the cockpit and prepare for deployment in Muv-Luv Alternative, the most critically acclaimed visual novel of all time. This isn’t a cutesy high school rom-com anymore; it’s an epic tale of political conspiracies, international espionage, an alien menace, quantum causality, genetic modification, and much, much more. It’ll test your limits, challenge your worldview, and by the time it’s all over, you’ll be so emotionally spent that it’ll be weeks before you can fully process the implications of what you’ve just witnessed. This definitive release comes complete with a brand new translation, all-new CGs, additional voice acting, and dual language/ tablet support, so if you think you’re ready to take the dive, there’s never been a better time to strap in and see for yourself why so many readers consider this the greatest story ever told. (PLEASE NOTE: The following section contains major spoilers for the previous installment in the franchise. Muv-Luv Alternative picks up where the events of the original Muv-Luv left off, and certain scenes will play out differently depending on your choices in the first game. To get the most out of the Muv-Luv experience, we highly recommend that you complete the original game before starting Muv-Luv Alternative. Click here to jump to the game’s product page on Steam.) Three years have passed since the day Takeru suddenly awoke in a world not his own — a war-torn alternate reality in which mankind was locked in a decades-long struggle against the ruthless extraterrestrial invaders known as the BETA. In that time, he’s been through an awful lot — enlisting in the military, meeting parallel-universe versions of his old friends, and even falling in love. But unbeknownst to Takeru, he and his squadmates were being trained to participate in a top-secret UN plan known as Alternative IV — a last-ditch effort to take back the Earth via experimental technology. Unfortunately, however, development screeched to a halt when the project’s chief executive, Professor Kouzuki, hit a wall in her research, and the UN opted to scrap the project in favor of its successor: Alternative V. A tiny fraction of the population would abandon the Earth in the hopes of finding life anew in another star system. Takeru is one of the ones left behind, and dies in a hopeless war against the BETA. But it seems that fate has bigger plans for Takeru, because he wakes up to find himself back in his childhood bedroom once again. Not in his own world, mind you — but back where he was three years prior. . This was no dream; this was a recurring nightmare. But then it hits him: this is a second chance. Perhaps he can use his knowledge to warn Professor Kouzuki, and together, they can somehow find a way to prevent Alternative V from ever being enacted. If he can change history, then maybe — just maybe — he’ll find the answers to all of his questions. Why has he gone back in time? Why isn’t Sumika here? And most importantly, what IS Alternative IV? Over 50-70 hours reading time. Available in three languages - Japanese, English, and Simplified Chinese. The UI has been reworked, so it's compatible with the newest tablet PCs and touchscreens. User save data are stored in Steam cloud so readers can continue their progress anywhere with ease. Muv-Luv Alternative Reviews (Original AppID) ;browsefilter=toprated&filterLanguage=all

Name: Skullgirls 2nd Encore
Description:
Skullgirls 2nd Encore is a beautiful, fast-paced, and critically acclaimed 2D fighting game that puts players in control of fierce warriors in an extraordinary Dark Deco world. Each of the 14 wildly original characters features unique gameplay mechanics and plenty of personality. Skullgirls is the perfect fighting game for casual and competitive fighting game fans alike. Includes fully voiced story mode, gorgeous animation, and a soundtrack by Michiru Yamane.

## Grim Dawn: An Apocalyptic ARPG Experience

Step into the grim world of Grim Dawn, an action RPG set in a post-apocalyptic fantasy realm where humanity teeters on the brink of extinction. In this unforgiving land, iron holds more value than gold, and trust is a rare commodity. Grim Dawn offers a deep character development system, an abundance of unique items, robust crafting, and quests that present meaningful choices with lasting consequences.

### Core Gameplay Mechanics

*   **Dual Class System:** Combine any of the six distinct base classes—Soldier, Demolitionist, Occultist, Nightblade, Arcanist, and Shaman—each boasting over 25 skills and modifiers. This allows for an incredible diversity of character builds.
*   **Item Skills:** Enhance your chosen class with over 250 unique skills granted by items and equipment add-ons, further diversifying gameplay.
*   **Vast Loot System:** Discover hundreds of items across common, magical, rare, epic, and legendary tiers. The game features over 20,000 possible magical affix combinations and more than 200 rare affixes.
*   **Choice and Consequence Quests:** Face difficult decisions that significantly impact the world. Your actions can determine the fate of strangers, families, and entire villages. The game currently features over 35 quests and 75+ lore notes to uncover.

### Factions and World Interaction

*   **Faction Favor:** Earn favor with human factions to unlock new quest lines, vendor discounts, and exclusive faction-based items and augments.
*   **Shifting Alliances:** Some neutral factions can be turned into allies, but aiding one may make you an enemy of another. Hostile factions will remember your deeds, increasing their hatred and dispatching powerful enemies to hunt you.
*   **Rebuilding the World:** Contribute to the survival and prosperity of human enclaves by securing resources, rebuilding structures, and rescuing survivors who can then aid your cause.

### Advanced Customization and Combat

*   **Devotion System:** This additional layer of skill customization allows you to acquire bonuses and powerful secondary effects. Unlock these by finding and restoring corrupted shrines throughout the world, which grant points to spend on a vast constellation map.
*   **Fast-Paced Combat:** Experience visceral combat with enemy blood spatters, ragdoll physics, and satisfying death effects. Engage in house-to-house combat, leaving a trail of destruction.
*   **Rotatable Camera:** Freely survey the world from any angle with the rotatable camera, though it is not required for gameplay.

### Exploration and Challenges

*   **Secrets and Perils:** Encounter over 200 unique enemy heroes and bosses, each with their own deadly skill sets. Discover more than 20 secret areas hidden behind destructible environments and locked doors.
*   **Rogue-Like Dungeons:** Descend into challenging, locked dungeons that require crafted keys. Enemy levels increase as you progress, and player teleportation is disabled, offering a high-stakes experience where completion is the only escape.
*   **Dynamic Weather:** The world comes alive with region-specific climates and dynamic weather effects, from mild rain to booming thunderstorms, and wind gusts that affect the environment.

### Crafting and Development

*   **Recipe-Based Crafting:** Collect over 250 crafting recipes to combine salvaged components into unique items. Higher-tiered recipes allow for the creation of items of immense power.
*   **Skill Point Reclaim:** The ability to pay to reclaim skill points alleviates the frustration of early, uninformed choices that could negatively impact character development.

Grim Dawn is developed by Crate Entertainment, an independent studio founded by veterans from companies like Blizzard North and Irrational. Players are encouraged to join the community, provide feedback, and help shape the future development of the game through polls and forum discussions.

The Banner Saga is a Viking-inspired role-playing game that places a strong emphasis on player choice and its consequences. Players guide a caravan across a perilous, hand-drawn world, making decisions that shape the narrative and the fate of their civilization. The game's design ensures that every choice, from dialogue to combat, has a meaningful impact, leading to a unique experience with each playthrough. Not all characters will survive this epic quest, but their stories will be remembered.

The game offers a rich experience with several key features:

*   **Playable Characters:** Over 25 unique characters are available to join your journey.
*   **Races:** Encounter both humans and the powerful Varl, a race of horned giants.
*   **Classes:** Seven distinct classes provide varied abilities and upgrade paths, allowing for a customizable play style.

Combat in The Banner Saga is strategic and consequential. Victory, defeat, and the permanent loss of characters are all possible outcomes, adding significant tension to every encounter. Beyond combat, managing your caravan is critical for survival and for protecting the civilization you are trying to save.

The game boasts beautifully hand-drawn 2D graphics and intricate combat animations, complemented by an evocative score from Grammy-nominated Austin Wintory. This immersive fantasy realm is inspired by Norse mythology.

Additionally, "Factions," a free-to-play multiplayer component, allows players to test their skills against others using many of the game's character classes. The Banner Saga is the first part of a planned trilogy, with your progress and storyline carrying over into subsequent games, ensuring a continuous and evolving narrative.

Name: Kelvin and the Infamous Machine
Description:
Kelvin and the Infamous Machine is a hilarious point-and-click adventure in which you stumble irresponsibly through history to help legendary geniuses complete their masterworks! Kelvin is the well-meaning research assistant of Dr. Edwin Lupin, an outstanding but tacky physicist who goes completely nuts when his life’s work, a shower-shaped time machine, is ridiculed by the scientific community. Bent on leaving his mark, Lupin launches himself into the past to prevent history’s greatest geniuses from completing their defining works, so HE can complete them instead. Now the very fabric of time is beginning to unravel, and it’s up to Kelvin and his fellow research assistant Lise to repair it. Point and click your way through three wacky, gorgeously drawn chapters to help Ludwig van Beethoven, Isaac Newton, and Leonardo da Vinci achieve their destined greatness! Classic point-and-click gameplay, featuring both pointing and clicking. Beautiful hand-drawn 2D environments. A huge variety of wacky puzzles that increase in difficulty as you go. 56 quirky, fully animated characters Over 2000 lines of written dialog. Original soundtrack with 12 unique tracks. And of course, the unique opportunity to annoy three of the greatest minds in history and save the universe!

Name: Battle Chasers: Nightwar
Description:
Battle Chasers: Nightwar is an RPG inspired by the classic console greats, featuring deep dungeon diving, turn-based combat presented in a classic JRPG format, and a rich story driven by exploration of the world. Classic turn-based combat inspired by the console RPG greats, with a unique overcharge mana system and incredible Battle Bursts. Beautiful, randomly-generated dungeons loaded with traps, puzzles, secrets and loot. Explore an overworld peppered with hidden dungeons, rare bosses and randomly appearing friends and foes. Action oriented, randomly-generated dungeons loaded with traps, puzzles and secrets. Use each hero's unique dungeon skills to survive Build your adventuring party by choosing three of six available heroes from the classic Battle Chasers comic series, each with unique abilities, perks, items and dungeon skills Dive into the deep crafting system, using the unique ingredient-overloading system to create epic items! The best-selling comic book Battle Chasers was first released in the late 90s and quickly generated a passionate cult following.

Name: Dota 2
Description:
The most-played game on Steam. Every day, millions of players worldwide enter battle as one of over a hundred Dota heroes. And no matter if it's their 10th hour of play or 1,000th, there's always something new to discover. With regular updates that ensure a constant evolution of gameplay, features, and heroes, Dota 2 has truly taken on a life of its own. One Battlefield. Infinite Possibilities. When it comes to diversity of heroes, abilities, and powerful items, Dota boasts an endless array—no two games are the same. Any hero can fill multiple roles, and there's an abundance of items to help meet the needs of each game. Dota doesn't provide limitations on how to play, it empowers you to express your own style. All heroes are free. Competitive balance is Dota's crown jewel, and to ensure everyone is playing on an even field, the core content of the game—like the vast pool of heroes—is available to all players. Fans can collect cosmetics for heroes and fun add-ons for the world they inhabit, but everything you need to play is already included before you join your first match. Bring your friends and party up. Dota is deep, and constantly evolving, but it's never too late to join. Learn the ropes playing co-op vs. bots. Sharpen your skills in the hero demo mode. Jump into the behavior- and skill-based matchmaking system that ensures you'll be matched with the right players each game.

## Orcs Must Die! Unchained: A New Era of Tower Defense

Orcs Must Die! Unchained injects a fresh dose of cooperative action into the beloved tower defense formula, featuring thrilling 3-player gameplay. This installment raises the stakes with more brutal traps and relentless orcish invaders, demanding strategic prowess and formidable allies for success.

### A Familiar World, A New Threat

Set years after Orcs Must Die! 2, the game returns to its humorous fantasy setting. New rifts have opened, drawing heroes to battle for control of these magical portals. Maximillian and Gabriella, having rebuilt the Order, now confront the Unchained – an organized army led by powerful heroes, a significant departure from the mindless hordes of the past.

### Core Gameplay: Strategy and Destruction

The heart of Orcs Must Die! remains: intense action and strategic trap-laying. Players team up to decimate millions of monsters. The gameplay loop encourages players to:

*   **Construct elaborate trap gauntlets:** Design deadly combinations to halt invaders before they reach the rift.
*   **Unlock and upgrade traps:** Discover new traps and enhance existing ones for maximum destructive potential.
*   **Engineer creative defenses:** Adapt strategies with a variety of traps for hilarious and violent enemy eliminations.
*   **Leverage elemental and physics-based powers:** Employ these forces to overcome challenging enemy waves.

### A Diverse Roster of Heroes

Orcs Must Die! Unchained boasts a diverse roster of unique heroes, each offering deep gameplay options and inventive ways to stop the orcish onslaught. Alongside returning favorites Maximillian and Gabriella, new characters like Blackpaw, Hogarth, Stinkeye, and Bloodspike ensure a hero for every playstyle.

### Engaging Game Modes

The game offers several engaging modes:

*   **Survival Mode:** Experience 3-player co-op defense and climb the ranks of orc-slaying prowess.
*   **Weekly Challenges and Daily Quests:** Earn opportunities to unlock additional traps and upgrade components.
*   **Endless Mode:** The beloved endless survival mode returns with enhanced 3-player co-op.
*   **Sabotage Mode:** This new competitive mode pits two teams of three against each other. Players defend their rift while simultaneously sending spells, minions, and bosses to disrupt opponents in an alternate dimension. The team with the most rift points wins.

Sabotage mode delivers a fresh, fast-paced experience where strategic defense meets offensive disruption, promising a trap-snapping, spell-slinging good time.

Name: Plants vs. Zombies GOTY Edition
Description:
Zombies are invading your home, and the only defense is your arsenal of plants! Armed with an alien nursery-worth of zombie-zapping plants like peashooters and cherry bombs, you'll need to think fast and plant faster to stop dozens of types of zombies dead in their tracks. Obstacles like a setting sun, creeping fog and a swimming pool add to the challenge, and with five game modes to dig into, the fun never dies! Features Play five game modes: Adventure, Mini-Games, Puzzle, Survival, plus the stress-free Zen Garden Conquer all 50 levels of Adventure mode  through day, night, and fog, in a swimming pool and on the rooftop Battle 26 types of zombies including pole-vaulters, snorkelers and Zomboni drivers Earn 49 powerful perennials and collect coins to buy a pet snail, power-ups and more! Open the Almanac to see all the plants and zombies, plus amusing facts and quotes Browse Crazy Daves shop for special plants and tools to stem any zombie assault Amazing graphics and soundtrack, plus a bonus music video Infinite replayability: the game is never the same experience twice! Unlock all the Steam Achievements

Name: The Last Friend
Description:
In a world that has become yet another post-apocalyptic future where humanity is distracted by chaos, destruction, rampant mutants and a thing called surviving, something even more sinister is afoot... The World's doggos are disappearing! Now enters Alpha (you) who at an early age lost his man's best friend... While traveling the wastelands he comes across some mutants up to no good dognapping a lost puppy! During this battle he discovers has the ability to understand what the pup can say and his name is T. Juan! Now T. Juan joins Alpha on this grand adventure looking for answers about what truly has happened to all the doggos. It’s time to join them and put dem paws to the pavement! Woof! Got to Pet them All From the warm and fluffy Newfoundland who has a healing passive, the Tibetan Mastiff with a beast mode unlocked, and to the ever charismatic Beagle, it's up to you to rescue these fearless pups and then set them loose on the bad guys! Welcome to the World, Pup The world has changed and some could even say it’s gone to the dog house…WOOF!!! Get ready to explore deserted badlands, ruined cities, a military base or two and not to mention forgotten jungles teeming with challenges as you set out in an upgradable RV! Who let the ‘Brawl’ out It’s a dog eat dog world out there so best bring your best when it comes to going all paws with the various bad guys you’ll be sure to face! A Unique Bark on Tower Defense Your bite isn’t your only defense when dealing with overly tanned mutants, electrifying enemies, and one or two tofu aficionados! From super soakers, steel walls, and wire traps you’ll have your pick of the litter when it comes to offensive and defensive options to protect your yard!

Name: The Riftbreaker
Description:
You play the role of captain Ashley S. Nowak - you are the Riftbreaker, an elite scientist/commando inside a powerful Mecha-Suit. Enter a one-way portal to Galatea 37, a distant planet at the far reaches of the Milky Way Galaxy, with the purpose of building up a base that will allow travel back to Earth and further colonization. Ashley's Mecha-suit, which she calls 'Mr. Riggs', can withstand the harshest environmental conditions and has a full range of equipment for base construction, resource extraction, gathering specimens and of course - combat. It is capable of traveling through rifts that connect space across vast distances. BASE BUILDING Your task is to construct a two-way rift back to Earth. It is a very complex invention and requires enormous amounts of energy. Simple solar collectors and a few tons of steel will not be enough. You will need to build up a complex chain of mines, refineries, powerplants and research facilities to complete this mission. DEFENSE Your presence on this planet will not go unnoticed. As you build up your industry and disrupt the natural order, the world will start seeing you as a threat. Build up your defenses. Construct walls, barriers and defense towers as the attacks get stronger with every passing day. You will face thousands of hostile creatures trying to eliminate your presence. EXPLORATION Galatea 37 is an unknown planet in the Sycorax belt of the Milky Way galaxy. Long distance surveys detected that it is inhabitable and perfect for colonization. The planet is full of rare minerals and substances that can be found in various locations around the globe. Varied biomes can surprise you with unknown fauna and flora as well as harsh weather conditions. Construct local outposts in resource-rich locations that will transport the required resources using rift technology. CAMPAIGN Take on an epic journey across all the different biomes of Galatea 37. You will establish multiple persistent bases across the globe that will fuel your economy. Research alien substances and lifeforms, as well as fight hordes of alien creatures, clearly not happy with your interference in the natural order of the planet. The campaign spans multiple hours and offers a remarkable degree of freedom in a super detailed, procedurally generated world. You can decide on the order of your priorities and what technologies you want to use. You’re the only human there, after all. SURVIVAL Your mission is to survive a set amount of time, fighting off increasingly difficult waves of enemy creatures. Each mission in the game is randomized, offering nearly endless replayability. SANDBOX If intense fight for survival is not your thing either, then try out the Sandbox mode, where we give you control over the entire game – including resources, enemy spawns, and weather conditions. CUSTOMIZE YOUR GAMEPLAY The Riftbreaker™’s gameplay can be customized to fit your playstyle. You can change the frequency of enemy attacks as well as their strength and numbers, resource abundance, weather events, enemy damage, and tons of other settings. There are also multiple difficulty presets to suit the needs of both hardcore strategy players as well as those that want a laid-back base-building experience. COMMUNITY DRIVEN DEVELOPMENT If you've read everything and arrived all the way down here, then you might be interested in helping us shape the game. Please come and talk to us on the forums, our official Discord server or through any other of our social media. We'll be sharing inside info about our development progress, and we'd love to hear your feedback. Please come and help us make Riftbreaker the game You want to play!

Orcs Must Die! 2: A Deeper Dive into the Orc-Slaying Frenzy

The battle against the orcish hordes continues with renewed intensity in *Orcs Must Die! 2*. Building upon the success of its predecessor, the 2011 AIAS Strategy Game of the Year, this sequel from Robot Entertainment invites players to once again defend the realm against overwhelming numbers of monstrous foes.

### Choose Your Champion

Players can step back into the fray as either the formidable War Mage, a hero who charges headfirst into danger, or the cunning Sorceress, who employs strategic mind-control and potent magic to keep the enemy at bay. Each character offers a distinct playstyle, catering to different tactical preferences.

### A World of New Threats and Defenses

The campaign plunges players into new fortresses and treacherous dwarven mines, where they must unleash a dizzying array of weapons, spells, guardians, traps, and trinkets to decimate thousands of orcs and other vile creatures. According to Robot Entertainment, the game features over 20 deadly enemies, including formidable new additions like Earth Elementals, Trolls, and Bile Bats, alongside familiar favorites from the original game.

### Diverse Game Modes for Endless Action

*Orcs Must Die! 2* offers a variety of modes to keep the action fresh and challenging.

#### Co-Op Campaign

Team up with a friend and continue the epic narrative in a brand-new story-based campaign. This mode can be enjoyed in single-player or, as highlighted by the developers, in cooperative play, allowing for enhanced strategic coordination.

#### Endless Mode

For those seeking an ultimate test of their defensive prowess, the new Endless Mode pits players against increasingly difficult waves of enemies. This mode is available for solo play or with a friend, promising a true survival challenge.

#### Classic Mode

A special treat for Steam players who own the original *Orcs Must Die!*, Classic Mode automatically unlocks co-op versions of 10 beloved levels from the first game, now populated with new enemy types.

### Unlocking and Upgrading Your Arsenal

The game boasts an impressive arsenal of more than 50 traps, weapons, and guardians, featuring both classic defenses and an all-new assortment of magical trinkets. A massive upgrade system allows for extensive customization, with over 225 persistent trap and weapon upgrades to unlock. This extensive progression system enables players to tailor their arsenal to their unique slaying style.

### Replayability and Competition

*Orcs Must Die! 2* is designed for extensive replayability, offering multiple game modes, a challenging "Nightmare" difficulty setting, and an enormous skull-ranking system. Furthermore, a scoring system and leaderboards encourage friendly competition, allowing players to vie for supremacy on both single-player and co-op leaderboards.

In *Orcs Must Die!*, a fantasy action-strategy game by Robot Entertainment, your primary objective is to eliminate waves of orcs using any means available. As a powerful War Mage, you'll utilize a diverse arsenal of weapons, spells, and traps to defend twenty-four unique fortresses. These strongholds are constantly under attack by a relentless onslaught of monstrous enemies, including hulking ogres, menacing hellbats, and, of course, a vast number of grotesque orcs.

### Gameplay and Strategy

The game features a compelling story-driven campaign with multiple difficulty settings, including the challenging "Nightmare Mode." The core gameplay centers on strategically deploying defenses to annihilate incoming enemy waves. Players can choose to incinerate orcs in lava pits, crush them with ceiling traps, or freeze and shatter them with magic. The experience promises an exhilarating orc-slaying adventure.

### Key Features

*   **Defend 24 Fortresses:** Each fortress presents unique environmental challenges, requiring strategic prowess to secure.
*   **Utilize 6 Weapons and Spells:** Access a variety of offensive tools, from crossbows and bladestaffs to powerful elemental magic.
*   **Deploy 19 Traps and Minions:** Employ traps like arrow walls, spike traps, and spinning blades, and summon allies to aid your defense.
*   **Confront 11 Unique Enemies:** Face formidable foes such as ogres, hellbats, and the ubiquitous orcs.
*   **Engage in a Story-based Campaign:** Progress through three acts to uncover the source of the orc assaults.
*   **Unlock Persistent Upgrades:** Enhance your traps to improve their effectiveness against tougher enemy waves.
*   **Experience High Replayability:** "Nightmare Mode" and a skull ranking system encourage repeated play for higher scores and greater challenges.
*   **Compete on Leaderboards:** Aim for the title of "Best Orc Killer" on global leaderboards.

Name: Monday Night Combat
Description:
Monday Night Combat is a class-based, third-person shooter… and the most popular lethal sport of the future! It blends intense combat, finishing moves, and gameshow-like challenges and rewards to produce an action experience unlike any other. Why fight for “honor” or “duty” when you can fight for the real American dream: cash, fame and endorsements? Key Features: It’s the Throwback Throwdown in Monday Night Combat! Uncle Tully’s Funland is now available in Crossfire with new game play features! First up we have Chickey Cantor. He will now spawn in Uncle Tully’s Funland. Make Chickey fly away by shooting him and earn a big single-life buff for your entire team! Wait for Chickey to slam the ground and then you can grapple him. Ride him for eight seconds and earn big money! Just be careful, riders tend to be easy targets for enemy Pros. Secondly we’re introducing new bot spawners. These spawners have buttons for specifically spawning Jackbots, Black Jacks, Slims, Scramblers, Gremlins, Gapshots and Bouncers. Co-op Blitz mode allow players to defend their Money Ball against armies of robots by themselves or four player co-op over Steam. During various Blitz challenges, players can spend money earned by destroying bots to build defensive turrets around the Moneyball, upgrade one of six unique character classes, or set off robot crushing environment hazards. The Challenges vary from a ten round Exhibition Blitz to endless robot waves of ever increasing difficulty in Super Sudden Death Blitz. Money earned from each Challenge goes into a persistent Lifetime Earnings that allows players to unlock over 370 ProTags, create custom classes, and get ranked on Leaderboards. Competitive Multiplayer Crossfire mode pits teams of players against each other over Steam. Each team is supported by an endless stream of robots fighting on their behalf; overwhelming your opponent’s stream, upgrading your Pros, and base defenses will be the key to your success! Customizable Characters Each Pro caters to their unique style of play and comes with their own set of upgradeable skills. Customize those skills and abilities even further with a variety of unlockable products in the Custom Class feature. Persistent Stats Every game of Monday Night Combat earns the player money that goes towards their Lifetime Earnings. Lifetime Earnings can be spent on unlocking custom classes and buying earned ProTags. How much Lifetime Earnings you have also determines what level you are. Monday Night Combat keeps a large set of persistent statistics for all aspects of gameplay. MNC features over 370 ‘ProTags’ which are customizable tags you can show off to other players and friends. Dedicated Servers Host multiple instances of MNC dedicated servers with full stand alone client.

Name: Ratropolis
Description:
Ratropolis combines roguelite, deck building, and tower defense with real time strategy gameplay. Lead your small rat outpost to safety and defend your rat citizens from predators and monstrous creatures. Build the largest 'Ratropolis!' and etch your name into rat history! Choose from over 500 cards of economy, building, military, and skill types to execute your strategic command. All leaders begin their journey with a deck of 8 basic cards. Building an efficient deck is key for protecting your rats from waves of rat-thirsty enemies. Add, remove and upgrade your cards to create a deck worthy of a true leader! Defending your rats in the city will be a challenge. Get aid from advisers with talents in finance, defense, or leadership. They will provide you with better options when chaos arises. When the city falls your campaign will end, but with every end a new beginning is born. Unlock new cards to expand your options and make each defense a new experience. Now lead Ratropolis to victory and save your Ratizens from destruction! Features Unique Gameplay: Real-time deck building card game combined with roguelite and tower defense elements! Have you ever played anything like that before? Very Addictive: Highly engaging and rapid gameplay that requires quick judgment and response Replayability: Easy to play but difficult to master. 100+ Events: Random decision events give you a new experience every time you play 500+ Cards: Unlock new features and cards to become stronger after every game. 6 Possible Endings: Choose your own adventure! 6 Leaders! Each with their own play style and traits. Lead Cute Rats, not Feral Cats!

Monday Night Combat (MNC) reimagines combat sports as a futuristic game show, blending intense third-person shooter action with competitive rewards like cash, fame, and endorsements. This unique fusion of combat, spectacular finishing moves, and engaging challenges creates an unparalleled action experience.

The game's features expand significantly within "Uncle Tully's Funland" on the Crossfire map. Players can encounter Chickey Cantor, who bestows a single-life team buff when shot. Chickey can also be grappled and ridden for eight seconds, earning substantial in-game currency, though this leaves the rider vulnerable. Advanced bot spawners allow players to summon specific enemy types, including Jackbots, Black Jacks, Slims, Scramblers, Gremlins, Gapshots, and Bouncers.

Co-op Blitz mode offers a cooperative defense challenge where players, solo or with up to three teammates, must protect their Money Ball from relentless robot waves. Strategic defense involves using earned money to construct turrets, while players can upgrade one of six distinct character classes. Environmental hazards can be activated to crush robots, and Blitz challenges range from a ten-round Exhibition Blitz to the increasingly difficult, endless waves of Super Sudden Death Blitz.

Money earned in each challenge contributes to a persistent "Lifetime Earnings" pool, enabling players to unlock over 370 unique ProTags, create custom character builds, and climb global leaderboards.

In competitive multiplayer's Crossfire mode, teams battle each other, supported by an endless stream of allied robots. Success depends on overwhelming enemy robot forces, upgrading your own Pros, and fortifying base defenses. Each "Pro" character has a unique playstyle and upgradeable skills, further refined through the Custom Class feature. Persistent statistics track all gameplay aspects, with Lifetime Earnings determining player level and unlocking custom classes and ProTags. MNC also supports dedicated servers for multiple instances of the game with full standalone client functionality.

## Far Cry 3: Embrace the Darkness

Far Cry 3 plunges players into a perilous open-world first-person shooter experience set on a tropical island rife with danger. Here, ruthless warlords engage in the slave trade, and outsiders are prime targets for ransom. Your desperate mission to rescue your friends will force you to confront the island's darkness head-on.

### Key Features of Far Cry 3

*   **An Open-World FPS Adventure:**
    *   **Customization:** Tailor your weapons, skills, and combat approach.
    *   **Playstyles:** Choose between intense run-and-gun action, stealthy takedowns, or long-range sniping.

*   **An Island of Danger and Discovery:**
    *   **Diverse Environments:** Explore mountain ranges, swampy grasslands, and white sandy beaches.
    *   **Activities:** Discover relics, hunt exotic animals, play mini-games, and utilize various transportation methods (land, sea, air).
    *   **Locations:** Battle through towns, temples, and river ports.

*   **A Memorable Story and Insane Characters:**
    *   **Narrative:** Embark on a gritty journey into the dark side of humanity, penned by a Writers Guild Award winner.
    *   **Cast:** Encounter an engaging and disturbed ensemble of characters.

*   **Full Co-op Campaign:**
    *   **Multiplayer:** Team up with up to three friends in a four-player online campaign.
    *   **Objective:** Work together to survive against the odds, experiencing the island through the eyes of a wayward crew.

*   **Innovative Multiplayer:**
    *   **Teamwork:** Rewards skill and cooperative play.
    *   **Support Mechanics:** Level up by boosting teammates with battle cries, reviving them, and calling in support weapons.
    *   **Post-Match Choices:** Engage in fun and twisted interactive cutscenes where players decide the fate of their foes.

*   **Map Editor for New Content:**
    *   **Creation Tools:** The powerful and user-friendly Far Cry® Map Editor returns with enhanced features.
    *   **Community Content:** Access a constant stream of new maps created by a dedicated community, with the best being showcased globally.
    *   **Ease of Use:** Create your own amazing maps quickly and easily.

*   **Cutting-Edge Graphics and Gameplay:**
    *   **Development Team:** Far Cry® 3 is being developed by the acclaimed team behind titles such as Assassin’s Creed® 2, Assassin’s Creed® Brotherhood, and World in Conflict®.

Name: MONSTER HUNTER RISE
Description:
Rise to the challenge and join the hunt! In Monster Hunter Rise, the latest installment in the award-winning and top-selling Monster Hunter series, you’ll become a hunter, explore brand new maps and use a variety of weapons to take down fearsome monsters as part of an all-new storyline. The PC release also comes packed with a number of additional visual and performance enhancing optimizations. Ferocious monsters with unique ecologies Hunt down a plethora of monsters with distinct behaviors and deadly ferocity. From classic returning monsters to all-new creatures inspired by Japanese folklore, including the flagship wyvern Magnamalo, you’ll need to think on your feet and master their unique tendencies if you hope to reap any of the rewards! Choose your weapon and show your skills Wield 14 different weapon types that offer unique gameplay styles, both up-close and from long range. Charge up and hit hard with the devastating Great Sword; dispatch monsters in style using the elegant Long Sword; become a deadly maelstrom of blades with the speedy Dual Blades; charge forth with the punishing Lance; or take aim from a distance with the Bow and Bowguns. These are just a few of the weapon types available in the game, meaning you’re sure to find the play style that suits you best. Hunt, gather and craft your way to the top of the food chain Each monster you hunt will provide materials that allow you to craft new weapons and armor and upgrade your existing gear. Go back out on the field and hunt even fiercer monsters and earn even better rewards! You can change your weapon at any of the Equipment Boxes any time, so the possibilities are limitless! Hunt solo or team up to take monsters down The Hunter Hub offers multiplayer quests where up to four players can team up to take on targets together. Difficulty scaling ensures that whether you go solo or hit the hunt as a full four-person squad, it’s always a fair fight. Stunning visuals, unlocked framerate and other PC optimizations Enjoy beautiful graphics at up 4K resolution, HDR with support for features including ultrawide monitors and an unlocked frame rate make to make this a truly immersive monster-hunting experience. Hunters will also get immediate access to a number of free title updates that include new monsters, quests, gear and more. Enjoy an exciting new storyline set in Kamura Village This serene locale is inhabited by a colorful cast of villagers who have long lived in fear of the Rampage - a catastrophic event where countless monsters attack the village all at once. 50 years after the last Rampage, you must work together with the villagers to face this trial. Experience new hunting actions with the Wirebug Wirebugs are an integral part of your hunter’s toolkit. The special silk they shoot out can be used to zip up walls and across maps, and can even be used to pull off special attacks unique to each of the 14 weapon types in the game. Buddies are here to help The Palico Felyne friends you already know and love from previous Monster Hunter adventures are joined by the brand new Palamute Canyne companions! Wreak havoc by controlling monsters Control raging monsters using Wyvern Riding and dish out massive damage to your targets! Fend off hordes of monsters in The Rampage Protect Kamura Village from hordes of monsters in an all-new quest type! Prepare for monster hunting on a scale like never before!

Name: Monster Hunter Stories 2: Wings of Ruin
Description:
A new adventure awaits you in this second installment of the turn-based RPG series set in the world of Monster Hunter! Become a Rider and form bonds with friendly monsters known as Monsties to fight alongside them as you take part in an epic story. You play as the grandson of Red, a legendary Rider. The story begins with a fateful encounter with Ena, a Wyverian girl who has been entrusted with an egg with the potential to hatch into a legendary Rathalos which could wreak havoc if awakened to its destructive power. Embark on a journey which will test the bonds of friendship in a changing world, and discover the truth behind the legends of old.

**Far Cry 4: A Journey into the Perilous Heart of Kyrat**

Far Cry 4 immerses players in the stunning yet dangerous nation of Kyrat, a fictional land situated within the awe-inspiring Himalayas. This region, steeped in ancient customs and a history of strife, sets the scene for an epic adventure. Players step into the shoes of Ajay Ghale, returning to Kyrat to fulfill his mother's dying wish. What begins as a personal quest rapidly spirals into the core of a brutal civil war, as Ajay finds himself caught in the fight to free the country from the iron grip of the tyrannical dictator, Pagan Min.

### Exploring the Dynamic World of Kyrat

The game offers an expansive and dynamic open world, where peril and the unforeseen are ever-present. The environment itself feels alive, teeming with both wildlife and hidden dangers. Players will traverse varied landscapes, from lush, dense forests to the harsh, snow-covered summits of the Himalayas. This world is more than just a setting; it is vibrant and undeniably lethal.

### Key Gameplay Elements

**An Expansive Open World:**
