*   **Dynamic, Non-Scripted AI:** Encounter intelligent enemies whose actions are not predetermined. Medics will bravely rescue wounded comrades, and common soldiers will develop a palpable fear of your presence. Your in-game reputation and actions can directly influence enemy behavior, leading them to surrender or flee in terror. Prepare for unpredictable encounters where enemy reactions are never certain.
*   **Intense Multiplayer:** Test your skills against friends in a competitive multiplayer arena, but remain vigilant. Trust is a luxury you may not be able to afford, as alliances can shift and betrayal is always a possibility. All the cutting-edge technical features from the single-player campaign are seamlessly integrated into the multiplayer experience.

Name: Aliens Go Home Run
Description:
A combination of Breakout, Shoot Em Up, and Baseball, Aliens Go Home Run puts you in the shoes of Sally, a young girl with a passion for baseball. When she hits a home run so hard, the ball flies into space and crashes into a faraway planet belonging to an alien race, creating a crater in the process. Now, the aliens are taking revenge on Earth, and its up to Sally to save the day! Features include: 70 levels of Brick-Breaking Action! 9 Intense Boss Fights Several different power-ups and enemy types Awesome chiptune soundtrack by +TEK Online leaderboards to compare your level scores against the world! A robust Level Editor with Steam Workshop support

## Master Ancient Tactics in Field of Glory II

Field of Glory II, a turn-based tactical wargame, lets you command armies from the Roman Republic's rise. Developed by Richard Bodley Scott, it uses a new 3D engine to recreate ancient battles with great detail. This game is perfect for strategy fans.

### Core Gameplay and Strategic Depth

Engage in a wide range of conflicts, from fighting for or against Rome to exploring "what-if" scenarios with different nations. Success depends on smart strategy and leading diverse armies well.

### Key Features for Authentic Warfare

Field of Glory II has many historically accurate units, each with unique tactics. Play in several engaging modes:

*   **Historical Battles:** Recreate twelve major ancient battles. These include Bagradas (255 BC), Trebia (218 BC), Cannae (216 BC), Ilipa (206 BC), Zama (202 BC), Magnesia (190 BC), Pydna (168 BC), Chaironeia (86 BC), Tigranocerta (69 BC), Bibracte (58 BC), Carrhae (53 BC), and Thapsus (46 BC). You can command either side in these scenarios.

*   **Custom Battle System:** Create endless "what-if" battles on realistic, computer-generated terrain. This system uses carefully researched army lists with over 86 historically accurate units. These include Roman legionaries, Greek hoplites, Carthaginian spearmen, Hellenistic pike phalanxes, Gallic warbands, horse archers, lancers, various cavalry, war elephants, chariots, and light troops.

*   **Campaign Mode:** Change history by guiding generals through their careers or waging war with any ancient nation against another. Victories boost unit experience and morale.

### Streamlined and Accessible Design

The game offers quick strategic decisions and smooth transitions between battles. A random map generator provides endless, realistic battlefields for custom games and campaigns. Scenario goals vary, including open battle, pursuit, and rearguard actions.

### Robust Features for All Players

Field of Glory II provides classic turn-based, tile-based gameplay with an easy-to-use interface. Battles can involve a few units or up to 80 per side. Named generals affect combat and morale. The game includes single and multiplayer modes with good AI and six difficulty levels. Modding support, including a map editor, adds replay value. The Slitherine PBEM server makes online play simple for historical and "what-if" scenarios.

Name: Act of War: Direct Action
Description:
Tomorrow's War Is NOW Ripped from today's headlines, Act of War: Direct Action™ is a frightening tale of suspense, international intrigue and geopolitical military conflict. This real-time strategy experience puts you squarely in control of counterterrorist forces and delivers a first look at tomorrow's war. The Situation: A crippling energy crisis. Terrorist attacks. Massive strikes. Global instability. The Enemy: A shadowy Consortium of back-room conspirators determined to throw the world into utter chaos using widespread terror tactics. The Heroes: A new 'direct action' operation known as Task Force TALON to counter massive military assaults, rescue hostages, conduct classified spy missions, take prisoners and stop an unpredictable enemy bent on toppling the world's governments. Command ultra-realistic modern military units Power-packed combination of high-end cinema, video effects and live action Intense multiplayer operations for up to eight players Real urban combat, including POW captures and landscape destruction Gripping storyline by NY Times bestselling author, Dale Brown

Name: Crusader Kings II
Description:
The Dark Ages might be drawing to a close, but Europe is still in turmoil. Petty lords vie against beleaguered kings who struggle to assert control over their fragmented realms. The Pope calls for a Crusade to protect the Christians in the Holy Land even as he refuses to relinquish control over the investiture of bishops - and their riches. Now is the time for greatness. Expand your demesne and secure the future of your dynasty. Fill your coffers, appoint vassals, root out traitors and heretics, introduce laws and interact with hundreds of nobles, each with their own agenda. A good lord will always need friends to support him. But beware, as loyal vassals can quickly turn to bitter rivals, and some might not be as reliable as they seem... Stand ready, and increase your prestige until the world whispers your name in awe. Do you have what it takes to become a Crusader King? Crusader Kings II explores one of the defining periods in world history in an experience crafted by the masters of Grand Strategy. Medieval Europe is brought to life in this epic game of knights, schemes, and thrones... Key features: Start a game at any point between 1066 and 1337 and play until 1453 Pick a Christian lord and make sure his dynasty survives as you play a succession of his descendants through the ages Gain Prestige for every successive character you play, furthering the glory of your Dynasty Expand your feudal domain - and keep it from falling apart Unravel the plots of your courtiers and vassals, each with their own opinions and agendas Take up the Cross and fight the Moor, the Heathen and the Heretic. Defend against the onslaught of the Mongol Horde Struggle with the Pope for control of the bishops Relive the Middle Ages with up to 32 other players in a competitive multiplayer mode

## "Not For Broadcast": Control the News, Shape the Nation

In the darkly funny simulation game "Not For Broadcast," you become the master of the national news. Your job is to edit the nightly broadcast, deciding what the country sees and hears. This isn't just about reporting; it's about controlling the story, handling chaos, and pleasing sponsors. You'll deal with famous people, tricky politicians, and weird ads.

As the editor, you have a lot of power. Your main tasks are:

### Choosing What to Show

*   **Camera Angles:** Pick exciting or shocking shots to grab viewers.
*   **Censoring:** Use the red button to hide bad words or sensitive topics. This keeps the show acceptable and fits the political mood.

### Shaping the Narrative

*   **Headlines:** Decide which stories air. You can make people look like heroes or villains.
*   **Ads:** Choose sponsors, even the strange ones, to fund the show and add to the game's humor.

"Not For Broadcast" puts you in a world where the show must go on, no matter what happens. From big storms to major threats, your main goal is to keep broadcasting. The game tests how well you can keep viewers watching as the news gets wilder.

The game has funny moments with stars and odd ads. But it also covers serious topics like war and political trouble. The game makers say, "Everything’s fine," showing the game's funny, mocking style. Your job is to ignore the mess, focus on the ads, and tune out the worried news team. You are the artist, and the broadcast is your work. Keep the public watching and the show running, no matter what.

Name: Suzerain
Description:
As President Anton Rayne, lead Sordland during your first term of this text-based narrative RPG. Navigate a political drama, driven by conversations with your cabinet members and other significant figures in a country with its own complicated history. With looming border conflicts, entrenched corruption, economic crisis and people desperate for reform, as leader the difficult choices fall on your shoulders as you strive to uphold your election promises. In 1954, the country of Sordland is emerging from a 20-year dictatorship, following a bloody civil war. You play as a charismatic young man, Anton Rayne, who has surprised everyone by rising to the top of the party in power and getting elected as the new President of Sordland. The people are hungry for democratic reforms after decades under a traditionalist power. The economy is in shambles and the political landscape is shifting. Neighboring superpowers are watching closely, and there are military threats on the horizon. As President, you have the final say but every choice you make has an impact. Your colleagues, the opposition, corporations; everyone has a point of view. Think and act carefully: once enacted your choices can not be reversed. Good luck, Mr. President. The game opens with a prologue in which Anton lives through formative events that shape his history from childhood through to the moment he is elected. Take this further by customising your look and style. At the end of Anton’s term, visualize how his choices impacted the country and how he lands on the Sordish political spectrum. Work closely with the Cabinet and prominent figures to forge strong policies and practices. You will need to keep your allies on your side and carefully consider where you will compromise your values and who you will make an enemy of. Everyone has their own ambitions in play. Leading a country is demanding. Face constant conflict about which is more important, serving the country or supporting your family. Is it possible to be a good father and a good president at the same time? Weighty, dramatic conversations : Navigate intricate conversations in this 400K-word branching political drama. Every choice has consequences : Make difficult choices on security, economy, diplomacy and more. Even outside the office, your values and beliefs will be challenged. Make allies and enemies : Interact with a wide array of characters with different personalities and ideologies. The oath of office versus family and values: See the real impact of the choices made in office on your family and close relationships Pay attention to current events : Follow the situation in Sordland through reports and news. What will your legacy be? : You can take the country in many different directions, resulting in one of 9 different major endings. Every decision you make is final: there is an autosave feature that does not allow loading earlier saves. Make choices carefully.

## Forge Your Industrial Empire in Anno 1800

Step into the Industrial Age with **Anno 1800™**, a city-building game where your choices shape your empire. This game challenges you to manage **fast tech growth** and a **tough political scene** in the 19th century. Your goal: build a strong industrial power, from Europe's busy cities to South America's lush jungles.

### Key Game Elements

Anno 1800's play centers on core ideas:

#### City Building
Grow **large cities** that meet your people's changing needs.

#### Trade and Supply
Create **good supply lines** and profitable trade routes to link your towns.

#### World Exploration
Go to new lands and start **global trips** to find key resources and chances.

#### Diplomacy and War
Beat rivals with **smart talks, trade deals, or force**.

### New and Classic Features

Anno 1800 blends old Anno fun with **fresh ideas**. Play a **story mode**, a **free sandbox**, and the usual **Anno online play**.

Liked features return:

*   Unique AI foes
*   Trade goods you can move
*   Random maps
*   Play over many sessions
*   Items to boost your realm

### Industrial Era Additions

To bring the era to life, Anno 1800 adds **new features**:

#### Global Expeditions
Send teams out to seek **riches and renown**.

#### Workforce System
The new workforce system makes running your factories **harder and more real**.

#### South America's Resources
Get the **"black gold"** that powers this age by settling South America.

"We aim to make Anno 1800 the best Anno game," said a Ubisoft Blue Byte rep. Players can join the team at **anno-union.com**. This site has the newest news, dev notes, and behind-the-scenes looks. You can give feedback, vote on ideas, and help **build the game**.

Name: Tropico 3
Description:
Engage in a tropical power trip! Become the dictator of a remote island during the Cold War. Charm, persuade, intimidate, oppress, or cheat your people to stay in power! Are you a kind and generous leader? A corrupt and ruthless tyrant ruling with an iron fist? Turn your island into a tourist paradise or an industrial power. Make promises to the electorate or slander political adversaries to get the crucial votes for the upcoming elections. Send your avatar to congratulate the people, visit the island of another player, or just sun-bathe on the Caribbean beach. Play the Cold War superpowers against each other to your maximum advantage. Tropico 3 offers a tongue-in-cheek, light-hearted take on real world issues like third world politics, corruption and totalitarian regimes. A campaign consisting of 15 missions Random map generator Timeline editor The Avatar — customizable and under the player's control Election speeches Simulation of the life, family, and political views of each Tropican Vehicles and Roads New buildings and new units

In Tropico 6, El Presidente returns to lead your banana republic, evolving the beloved dictator simulation with the groundbreaking ability to manage **multiple islands simultaneously** within vast archipelagos. This expansion introduces new logistical challenges and strategic considerations for governing an island nation spread across a wider geographical area.

To overcome these hurdles, Tropico 6 offers **completely new transportation and infrastructure possibilities**. Players can now:

*   Build bridges to physically connect islands.
*   Construct tunnels for alternative transit routes.
*   Transport citizens and tourists using enhanced methods like taxis, buses, and aerial cable cars.

Beyond infrastructure, Tropico 6 enhances the player's ability to project power. Agents can be dispatched on **raids to foreign lands** to steal iconic **world wonders and monuments**, adding them to your personal collection as a testament to your international influence. Players can also **customize the looks of their palace at will**, and **election speeches are back**, allowing El Presidente to address the populace and secure loyalty.

The game features a **revised research system** focused on the political aspects of dictatorship, linking technological advancements to political maneuvering. Tropico 6 challenges you to prove yourself through **four distinctive eras**, each with unique opportunities and obstacles. You must navigate international challenges and balance your people's needs with your ambitions. The game also supports **online multiplayer for up to 4 players**.

Name: Tropico 4
Description:
The world is changing and Tropico is moving with the times - geographical powers rise and fall and the world market is dominated by new players with new demands and offers - and you, as El Presidente, face a whole new set of challenges. If you are to triumph over your naysayers you will need to gain as much support from your people as possible. Your decisions will shape the future of your nation, and more importantly, the size of your off-shore bank account. Tropico 4 expands on the gameplay of the previous game with new political additions ∼ including more superpowers to negotiate with, along with the ability to elect ministers into power to help get your more controversial policies passed. But remember to keep your friends close and your enemies closer as everyone has an agenda! Your political mettle will be thoroughly tested, as new natural disasters will have the populace clamoring for you and your cabinet to help them recover from some of the worst Mother Nature can dish out. Key Features: New campaign consisting of 20 missions on 10 new maps. 20 new buildings including Stock Exchange, Shopping mall, Aqua Park and a Mausoleum to El Presidente. Six new interactive disasters including volcanoes, droughts and tornadoes. Council of Ministers – selected citizens to ministerial posts in the government to help push through your more controversial decisions. National Agenda – receive objectives from Tropican factions, foreign geopolitical powers or opportunities relating to current island events such as ongoing disasters. Trading system – import and export goods to/from other nations to boost your economy or production.

## Orwell: Your Role in National Security

In Orwell, you assume the critical role of the Nation's first human researcher for a powerful governmental security program. This program, also named Orwell, possesses the unprecedented ability to survey the online presence of every citizen, monitor all personal communications, and access any computer. Your crucial task is to sift through the vast amounts of data Orwell collects. You must decide what information is vital for security forces and what should be disregarded, all while striving to preserve citizen privacy.

### The Terrorist Threat

The Nation is currently reeling from a series of terror attacks. The capital city of Bonton, in particular, has been rocked by a recent incident. Orwell, and by extension, you, are immediately put to the test. Your investigation begins with a single person of interest. Your objective is to help security forces build a profile of a network of potential culprits.

### Your Investigative Toolkit

As Orwell's human researcher, you will utilize a comprehensive set of tools. These include:

*   **Investigating Digital Lives:** You will delve into citizens' online activities. This encompasses searching web pages, scouring social media posts, examining dating site profiles, and reviewing news articles and blogs.
*   **Infiltrating Private Lives:** You will gain access to sensitive personal information. This includes chat communications, personal emails, hacked PC data, and even medical files.
*   **Making Crucial Connections:** You will piece together disparate information. This is essential to build a comprehensive understanding of suspects.

### The Weight of Your Decisions

The information you choose to pass on to security forces will have direct and significant consequences. You determine what information is seen and acted upon, significantly influencing how suspects are perceived. This power comes with profound ethical questions.

*   Are the individuals you identify truly terrorists?
*   What do their digital footprints reveal about their true nature?
*   What if you uncover truths about them that even their loved ones are unaware of?
*   What is the ultimate price of the security the Nation so desperately desires?

### Securing the Nation's Freedom

Your ultimate goal is to identify and apprehend terrorists. This ensures the citizens of the Nation can sleep soundly, confident that Orwell is watching over them.

**MATURE CONTENT WARNING:** Please be advised that Orwell contains mature language and themes, and is not suitable for younger players.

Name: Beholder 2
Description:
Every citizen of our great State dreams of working at the Prime Ministry! You are lucky, intern – your dream has come true! While you are at the bottom of the career ladder, that is more than many of your fellow citizens will ever achieve! Have you already decided what you're going to become? Will you become a diligent and responsible officer decorated by the Wise Leader himself? Or will you become a hardline careerist capable of destroying anyone who stands between you and the Prime Minister's seat? Or maybe you are just a whistle-blower? If so, who sent you? And why? Whatever the case, you are now part of the Ministry! From this moment on, no one beyond these walls has ascendance over you! You are free to shape your own future! So, what are you going to become?

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
Description:
With over 6 million units sold and unprecedented critical acclaim from fans and press around the world, Sid Meier's Civilization is recognized as one of the greatest PC game franchises of all-time. Now, Sid Meier and Firaxis Games will take this incredibly fun and addictive game to new heights by adding new ways to play and win, new tools to manage and expand your civilization, all-new easy to use mod capabilities and intense multiplayer modes and options*. Civilization IV will come to life like never before in a beautifully detailed, living 3D world that will elevate the gameplay experience to a whole new level. Civilization IV has already been heralded as one of the top ten games of 2005, and a must-have for gamers around the globe! *Mac version's Online Multiplayer is no longer supported.

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
Description:
With over 6 million units sold and unprecedented critical acclaim from fans and press around the world, Sid Meier's Civilization is recognized as one of the greatest PC game franchises of all-time. Now, Sid Meier and Firaxis Games will take this incredibly fun and addictive game to new heights by adding new ways to play and win, new tools to manage and expand your civilization, all-new easy to use mod capabilities and intense multiplayer modes and options*. Civilization IV will come to life like never before in a beautifully detailed, living 3D world that will elevate the gameplay experience to a whole new level. Civilization IV has already been heralded as one of the top ten games of 2005, and a must-have for gamers around the globe! *Mac version's Online Multiplayer is no longer supported.

Name: Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition
Description:
DISCLAIMER This legacy version of COH1 will also give you access to the latest updated version of COH1 - simply called 'Company of Heroes' in your Steam library. PLEASE USE THE LATTER TO PLAY ONLINE , and visit the associated pages to join the COH1 Steam Community & Modding scene: COH1 Community Hub COH1 Steam Workshop DESCRIPTION Delivering a visceral WWII gaming experience, Company of Heroes redefines real time strategy gaming by bringing the sacrifice of heroic soldiers, war-ravaged environments, and dynamic battlefields to life. Beginning with the D-Day Invasion of Normandy, players lead squads of Allied soldiers into battle against the German war machine through some of the most pivotal battles of WWII. Through a rich single player campaign, players experience the cinematic intensity and bravery of ordinary soldiers thrust into extraordinary events. A Cinematic Single Player Experience that captures the turmoil of WWII as never before. Advanced squad AI brings your soldiers to life as they interact with the changing environment, take cover, and execute advanced squad tactics to eliminate all enemy opposition. Stunning Visuals - Relic's next generation cutting-edge engine provides graphic quality and a physics driven world that is unprecedented in an RTS. Environmental Strategy - Real-time physics and a completely destructible environment guarantee no two battles ever play out in the same way. Destroy anything and re-shape the battlefield! Use buildings and terrain to your advantage, or deny them to the enemy. 2-8 Player Multiplayer Competition via LAN or Internet - Go online with friends and join the ultimate battle of Axis versus Allies.

Name: Company of Heroes
Description:
DISCLAIMER FOR ADDITIONAL USER REVIEWS , please visit the 'Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition' page. Total conversions available on Steam for COH1 are also listed on the Legacy Edition page. DESCRIPTION Delivering a visceral WWII gaming experience, Company of Heroes redefines real time strategy gaming by bringing the sacrifice of heroic soldiers, war-ravaged environments, and dynamic battlefields to life. Beginning with the D-Day Invasion of Normandy, players lead squads of Allied soldiers into battle against the German war machine through some of the most pivotal battles of WWII. Through a rich single player campaign, players experience the cinematic intensity and bravery of ordinary soldiers thrust into extraordinary events. A Cinematic Single Player Experience that captures the turmoil of WWII as never before. Advanced squad AI brings your soldiers to life as they interact with the changing environment, take cover, and execute advanced squad tactics to eliminate all enemy opposition. Stunning Visuals - Relic's next generation cutting-edge engine provides graphic quality and a physics driven world that is unprecedented in an RTS. Environmental Strategy - Real-time physics and a completely destructible environment guarantee no two battles ever play out in the same way. Destroy anything and re-shape the battlefield! Use buildings and terrain to your advantage, or deny them to the enemy. 2-8 Player Multiplayer Competition via LAN or Internet - Go online with friends and join the ultimate battle of Axis versus Allies.

## Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare: A New Era of Combat

Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare, from Infinity Ward, marks a new era in combat gaming. This action-thriller plunges players into a modern global conflict. You will step into the boots of both a U.S. Marine and a British S.A.S. operative. Your mission: to stop a dangerous rogue group that threatens world stability. Victory hinges on using advanced tech, superior firepower, and smart assaults. Speed and precision are vital for success.

### Modern Arsenal and Gear

The game boasts over 70 real-world modern weapons and equipment. These include:

*   Assault rifles with laser sights
*   Claymore mines
*   .50 caliber sniper rifles
*   M-249 SAW machine guns

Special gear further boosts your combat edge:

*   Night-vision goggles
*   Ghillie suits

### Immersive Battlefield Experience

Engage in modern warfare, from solo missions to large-scale battles. Air support is crucial for success. Deployments include:

*   Fast-roping from helicopters
*   Riding in attack choppers
*   Using jets for air strikes
*   Engaging from aerial gunships

### Next-Generation Graphics and Sound

Stunning next-gen graphics and advanced effects deliver a photo-realistic world. Key visual elements include:

*   Realistic depth of field
*   Sophisticated rim-lighting
*   Character self-shadowing
*   Dynamic texture streaming
*   Physics-enabled effects

Authentic battle chatter and award-winning sound design pull you deep into the fight.

### Enhanced Multiplayer Community

Building on Call of Duty 2, the multiplayer offers a lasting online experience. Key features include:

*   **Create-a-Class:** Tailor your loadout.
*   **Experience Points:** Earn unlockable weapons and perks.
*   **Matchmaking and Leaderboards:** Track your progress and compete worldwide.

Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare's multiplayer provides fun and addictive online play.

Name: Rome: Total War™ - Collection
Description:
Once the Roman Empire is under your command, don't lay down your sword just yet - the Barbarians are coming. With two award-winning titles from the esteemed Total War series, you'll have twice as many obstacles and opportunities to control and conquer the greatest empire ever known to man. The Collection Edition includes: Rome: Total War Guide one of three noble Roman families on a century spanning quest to seize control of the Roman Empire. Rome: Total War - Barbarian Invasion (official expansion pack to Rome: Total War) Witness the decline of Rome as Barbarian hordes attack, forcing a bitter internal struggle between rival factions. Voted 2004 Best Strategy game by IGN, GameSpy and GameSpot. Fight alongside or against history's greatest leaders such as Julius Caesar, Spartacus, and Hannibal to expand or destroy the Roman Empire. Lay siege against the Romans as Attila the Hun, fearful Saxons, or other savage factions using signature weapons and abilities. Command warrior-tested legions in cinematic epic battles with thousands of soldiers on-screen at once. A century-spanning campaign charges players with strategically managing the economic, civil, religious and military arms of their empire.

## Master the Galaxy with Galactic Civilizations® II: Ultimate Edition

Embark on an epic journey of interstellar conquest with **Galactic Civilizations® II: Ultimate Edition**. This complete package combines the acclaimed **Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords**, its expansion **Dark Avatar**, and the concluding chapter, **Twilight of the Arnor**, for an unmatched strategy experience.

### The Foundation: Dread Lords

**Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords** sets the stage for your empire. You will oversee all aspects of your civilization, including economic growth, technological progress, diplomatic ties, and military strength. Explore randomly generated galaxies or follow a compelling campaign against the fearsome Dread Lords.

### Expanding Your Empire: Dark Avatar

The **Dark Avatar** expansion significantly broadens strategic options. This pack introduced key mechanics such as:

*   Utilizing asteroid belts for valuable resources.
*   Conquering unique planets that require advanced technologies.
*   Deploying spies for sabotage or intelligence gathering.

**Dark Avatar** also improved the AI and added new diplomatic agreements, creating a more challenging and lively galaxy.

### The Climax: Twilight of the Arnor

In **Twilight of the Arnor**, the galaxy faces a devastating war initiated by the Dread Lords. Humanity leads a fierce resistance, introducing:

*   A new, potent threat known as Terror Stars.
*   Unique technology paths tailored for each civilization.
*   Advanced tools for creating custom scenarios and campaigns.

This expansion also features new ship designs and planetary upgrades, enhancing the vast game world.

### Key Elements for Galactic Control

The **Ultimate Edition** is loaded with features for deep strategic gameplay:

*   A stunning 3D engine that brings the galaxy to life.
*   An intuitive Shipyard for designing your starships.
*   A variety of factions to command or create.
*   Multiple ways to win, including conquest, culture, diplomacy, technology, or ascension.
*   Dynamic galaxies offering endless replayability.
*   An intelligent AI that provides a tough challenge.
*   Online multiplayer to compete globally.
*   Extensive modding support for player-created content.
*   Complex systems for trade, treaties, and alliances.

This edition provides the ultimate way to experience this celebrated space strategy saga.

Name: Crusader Kings III
Description:
Your legacy awaits. Choose your noble house and lead your dynasty to greatness in a Middle Ages epic that spans generations. War is but one of many tools to establish your reign, as real strategy requires expert diplomatic skill, mastery of your realm, and true cunning . Crusader Kings III continues the popular series made by Paradox Development Studio, featuring the widely acclaimed marriage of immersive grand strategy and deep, dramatic medieval roleplaying. Take command of your house and expand your dynasty through a meticulously researched Middle Ages. Begin in 867 or 1066 and claim lands, titles, and vassals to secure a realm worthy of your royal blood. Your death is only a footnote as your lineage continues with new playable heirs, either planned… or not. Discover a sprawling simulated world teeming with peasants and knights, courtiers, spies, knaves and jesters, and secret love affairs. An extensive cast of historical characters can be romanced, betrayed, executed, or subtly influenced. Explore a vast medieval map stretching from the snowswept Nordic lands to the Horn of Africa, and the British Isles in the west to the exotic riches of Burma in the east. Claim, conquer, and rule thousands of unique counties, duchies, kingdoms, and empires. Each character is larger than life, with traits and lifestyle choices determining their actions and schemes. Prompt fear and dread as you rule with an iron fist, or inspire your subjects with magnanimous deeds. Genetics can be passed along to your children, be it the gift of genius or crippling stupidity. Groom your heir with the appropriate guardians or educate them yourself. If found wanting, marry them off or despatch them through other means. Customize your ruler and noble house, from appearance to attributes, and create a monarch worthy of all their inherited virtues and vices. Govern an ever-evolving realm and grant titles to whom you see fit - or usurp your liege to claim their crown as your own. Be wary of rivals, from restless serfs to revengeful concubines. The shadows stir frequently, and danger lurks around every darkened corner. Recruit agents and other unsavory elements to undermine, blackmail, or murder those who stand in your path. Or be inspired by the bard and ballad, and seduce your way to power and influence. Blood will flow. Assemble men-at-arms units and powerful knights. Manage your battlefield tactics and armies. Raid and plunder nearby lands or hire mercenaries and Holy Orders for your major conflicts. Be a pious king to invite the religious powers to your side, or design your own faith as you battle between everlasting fame or eternal damnation. Bring novel innovations to your culture and construct mighty castles and bastions to increase the wealth, prestige, and security of your realm. The paths to follow are limitless: experience thousands of dynamic events and life-altering decisions tailored to each and every conceivable situation and character. There are countless ways of securing and keeping your place in the history books.

### Experience World War II Like Never Before

Call of Duty® thrusts you into the intense reality of World War II, showcasing its most critical events. This game focuses on the brave actions of everyday soldiers and unsung heroes from allied nations. Their combined efforts were vital in shaping the world we know today.

### Squad Up for Victory

The gameplay captures the raw chaos of battle, putting you in charge of a unified squad. This team cohesion is key. Your squadmates offer crucial covering fire and protect wounded allies. The game features realistic squad movements and tactics. It also highlights the distinct personalities and specialized skills of each soldier, which shine through in combat. This emphasizes that victory was a collective achievement, not the work of one person or nation.

### Multiple Perspectives on War

For the first time in the Call of Duty® series, you can see the war from different angles. Experience the conflict through the eyes of American, British, and Russian soldiers. This varied approach deepens the story and offers a fuller picture of the war's worldwide effects.

### Key Features of Call of Duty®

*   **24 Immersive Missions:** Explore four linked historical campaigns that delve into major WWII moments.
*   **Varied Mission Types:** Tackle a range of objectives, such as:
    *   Sabotage missions
    *   Large-scale assaults
    *   Stealth operations
    *   Vehicle battles
    *   Rescue missions
*   **Authentic World War II Setting:** The game faithfully recreates period weapons, famous locations, historical vehicles, and the intense sounds of war. This attention to detail delivers a highly realistic and gripping World War II experience.

Call of Duty® is a product of Activision Publishing, Inc., released in © 2003. Activision and Call of Duty are registered trademarks of Activision Publishing, Inc. All rights reserved. Other trademarks are the property of their respective owners.

Name: Silent Hunter® III
Description:
The king of submarine simulations returns with an all-new 3D engine, new crew command features, and more realistic WWII naval action than ever before. The movie-like graphics and simple, tension-filled gameplay make this the perfect game for the realism fanatic and the casual gamer. Realistic and immersive environment: The suspense-filled atmosphere includes realistic 3D water modeling, day/night cycles, and historically accurate subs, ships, and aircraft. The detailed U-boat interiors, changing weather effects, and engaging audio represent the ultimate in WWII submarine warfare. A deadly array of U-boats and weapons: Playable U-boats include Type II, VII, IX, and XXI submarines. Take aim against Allied convoys and warships. In recreating the great submarine battles of WWII, players will hide in silence just below threatening escort ships, fire deadly torpedoes, or surface and pound enemies with the deck gun. Dynamic campaign: Create your own realistic naval war story. Your military career will be influenced by successful command decisions in an unscripted and non-linear WWII campaign. Accessible to players of all skill levels: Players will experience a simplified learning curve that will be easier to handle than standard simulations. Use the naval academy tutorial to learn the basics. Customize the realism settings for play that appeals to a variety of WWII combat fans. Command your crew: The crew will take orders and evolve based on the results of each patrol. Multiplayer cooperative play: For up to eight players via LAN.

## Half-Life: Alyx: A VR Revolution in the Iconic Franchise

**Half-Life: Alyx** marks a triumphant return for Valve to the beloved Half-Life universe, reimagined entirely for virtual reality. This groundbreaking title plunges players into an **impossible fight for survival** against the formidable alien race known as the Combine. Set between the pivotal events of Half-Life and Half-Life 2, the narrative places you in the shoes of **Alyx Vance**, humanity's last beacon of hope.

### The Combine's Iron Grip and the Seeds of Resistance

Since the catastrophic Black Mesa incident, the Combine's dominion over Earth has only intensified. They have systematically corralled the remaining human population into heavily controlled cities. Among these confined survivors are some of Earth's most brilliant minds, including **you and your father, Dr. Eli Vance**. As **founders of a nascent resistance movement**, you and your father have secretly continued your vital scientific endeavors. Your clandestine activities involve **performing critical research** and **developing invaluable tools** for the brave few who dare to defy the Combine's oppressive rule. Each day brings new insights into your enemy's operations, fueling your relentless pursuit of a **critical weakness**.

### Immersive VR Gameplay: Built from the Ground Up

Valve's ambitious return to the Half-Life universe was **purpose-built for virtual reality**, a decision that fundamentally shapes the core gameplay experience. VR technology was specifically leveraged to unlock the **deep environmental interactions, intricate puzzle-solving, expansive world exploration, and visceral combat** that define Half-Life.

*   **Strategic Aiming:** Lean around cover, such as a broken wall, or duck under a Barnacle to execute **impossible shots**.
*   **Resourceful Scavenging:** **Rummage through shelves** to locate essential items like healing syringes and shotgun shells.
*   **Interactive Manipulation:** **Manipulate tools** to bypass alien security systems and hack interfaces.
*   **Tactical Distraction:** **Toss objects**, like a discarded bottle, through windows to divert enemy attention.
*   **Intense Encounters:** Experience the visceral thrill of **ripping a Headcrab off your face** and expelling it from your immediate vicinity.

### Empowering the Community with Source 2 Tools

Half-Life: Alyx goes beyond its compelling single-player campaign by **including a robust set of Source 2 tools**. These powerful tools empower **any player to build and contribute their own custom levels** and environments. These community-created experiences are then made readily available for others to enjoy through the **Half-Life: Alyx Steam Workshop**. Valve’s renowned level authoring tool, **Hammer**, has been significantly updated to incorporate all the game's virtual reality gameplay mechanics and components, ensuring a seamless and powerful creation experience for aspiring level designers.

Name: Undertale
Description:
Welcome to UNDERTALE. In this RPG, you control a human who falls underground into the world of monsters. Now you must find your way out... or stay trapped forever. ((Healthy Dog's Warning: Game contains imagery that may be harmful to players with photosensitive epilepsy or similar condition.)) features: Killing is unnecessary: negotiate out of danger using the unique battle system. Time your attacks for extra damage, then dodge enemy attacks in a style reminiscent of top-down shooters. Original art and soundtrack brimming with personality. Soulful, character-rich story with an emphasis on humor. Created mostly by one person. Become friends with all of the bosses! At least 5 dogs. You can date a skeleton. Hmmm... now there are 6 dogs...? Maybe you won't want to date the skeleton. I thought I found a 7th dog, but it was actually just the 3rd dog. If you play this game, can you count the dogs for me...? I'm not good at it.

## Street Fighter V: Your Ultimate Guide

Street Fighter V (SFV) offers a deep fighting game experience. This guide covers its core features and content.

### Choosing Your Fighter

SFV features **16 unique characters** at launch. Each has a distinct story and playstyle. Finding a fighter that fits you is key to success.

### Game Modes and Match Types

SFV provides various ways to play.

#### Ranked and Casual Matches

Compete globally in **Ranked Matches** to climb leaderboards and earn **Fight Money**. For practice or fun with friends, use **Casual Matches**.

#### Battle Lounge

Create custom lobbies in **Battle Lounge** to **challenge friends directly**.

#### Cross-Play

SFV supports **cross-play** between PlayStation 4 and Steam, broadening the player base.

### Expanded Content: Arcade Edition

The **Arcade Edition** added new modes:

*   **Arcade Mode:** Relive classic Street Fighter eras.
*   **Team Battle Mode:** Lead a team to victory.
*   **Extra Battle Mode:** Earn rewards, XP, and **Fight Money** through challenging online fights.

### Earning In-Game Currency

**Fight Money** is the main currency. Use it to buy characters, costumes, and stages.

### Story Mode: "A Shadow Falls"

Experience the **FREE cinematic story mode, "A Shadow Falls."** It details M. Bison's plot to conquer the world.

### The Definitive Edition: Champion Edition

**Street Fighter V: Champion Edition** is the complete package. It includes content from the original and Arcade Editions, plus all characters released after the Arcade Edition, all stages, and over **200 costumes**.

### Mastering the V-System

The **V-System** offers unique mechanics for each character.

#### V-Trigger

Activate **V-Trigger** for powerful, game-changing moves that use the V-Gauge. These can deal **significant damage**.

#### V-Skill

**V-Skills** are unique moves or buffs that fill the V-Gauge, aiding offense and defense.

#### V-Reversal

Use a **V-Reversal** (costs one V-Gauge stock) to interrupt an opponent's attack and **regain control**.

#### Special and EX Special Attacks

**Special Attacks** are crucial for controlling space. **EX Special Attacks** are stronger versions that use one bar of the Critical Gauge.

#### Critical Art

The **Critical Art** is your ultimate attack. Charge your **Critical Gauge** to unleash this powerful finisher for a decisive win.

Name: Borderlands 2
Description:
A new era of shoot and loot is about to begin. Play as one of four new vault hunters facing off against a massive new world of creatures, psychos and the evil mastermind, Handsome Jack. Make new friends, arm them with a bazillion weapons and fight alongside them in 4 player co-op on a relentless quest for revenge and redemption across the undiscovered and unpredictable living planet. Key Features: All-New Characters and All-New Classes: Four all new playable classes including the Siren, the Commando, the Gunzerker and the Assassin. Step into the role of the Gunzerker, whose highly deadly skills allow him to dual-wield any two weapons found in the game. Not only that, you will build on that skill to do more things with two guns than you ever imagined possible. Dual machine guns? Cool. Dual rocket launchers? Of course! Dual Sniper Rifles? Sure, if that’s your thing! Want to try other styles? More tactical perhaps? There are multiple classes to choose from! Dynamic Co-op online, and LAN: Share your adventures with friends both online and via LAN. Borderlands 2 features a seamless system enabling you to drop in and drop out of a campaign without ever having to restart the game. On top of that you can even take your new gear from any game to any other! World Connected Story: Find yourself left for dead in the frozen tundra of Pandora as you begin your quest of revenge and redemption. Expose the evil surrounding the Hyperion Corporation and take on the perpetrator of a universe-wide grand deception -- the nefarious Hyperion CEO, Handsome Jack. (Oh, also: he's stolen credit for the opening of the Vault.) 87 Bazillion...Everything: In addition to the new gun system, you will lust after procedurally generated shields, grenades, Relics, class mods and much, much more. And you thought the original Borderlands had a ton of loot! Brand new environments on Pandora: Hunt through entirely brand new areas of Pandora that are more alive than ever! From the arctic tundra, through the dangerous grasslands, past the mysterious corrosive caverns to beyond, you’ll be surprised by the unpredictable world of Pandora at every turn! Brand new enemies: A whole slew of new enemies are out there to kill you in Borderlands 2. Hulking, gorilla-like Bullymongs, vicious predatory Stalkers and the Hyperion mechanical army, run by Handsome Jack, are just some of the new enemies in Borderlands 2. Note: The Mac and Linux versions of Borderlands 2 are available in English, French, Italian, German and Spanish only.

Guacamelee! Gold Edition is a vibrant Metroidvania-style action-platformer set in a magical world inspired by Mexican culture and folklore. This unique game blends open-world exploration with a robust melee combat system and an innovative dimension-switching mechanic.

Players control a luchador who must use wrestling techniques to battle an evil threat. Key abilities include:

*   **Integrated Combat and Platforming:** Combat moves are essential for both fighting enemies and navigating intricate environments.
*   **Dimension Swapping:** Switch between the World of the Living and the World of the Dead to solve puzzles and access new areas.
*   **'El Infierno' Level Expansion:** A special expansion level with fiery challenges where new costumes can be unlocked.
*   **Player Costumes:** Customize your hero with costumes offering different attributes and contributing to achievements.
*   **Steam Integration:** Full support for Steam Achievements, Leaderboards, Cloud Save, Big Picture Mode, and Trading Cards.
*   **Steam Workshop:** Create and share custom costumes with the community.
*   **2-Player Local Co-op:** Experience the entire story with a friend.
*   **Chickens:** Expect an abundance of chickens, a recurring humorous element.

For an expanded adventure, Guacamelee! Super Turbo Championship Edition is available, featuring additional powers, new levels, more enemies, and improved gameplay and graphics.

Name: West of Loathing
Description:
Say howdy to West of Loathing -- a single-player slapstick comedy adventure role-playing game set in the wild west of the Kingdom of Loathing universe. Traverse snake-infested gulches, punch skeletons wearing cowboy hats, grapple with demon cows, and investigate a wide variety of disgusting spittoons. Talk your way out of trouble as a silver-tongued Snake Oiler, plumb the refried mysteries of the cosmos as a wise and subtle Beanslinger, or let your fists do the talking as a fierce Cow Puncher. Explore a vast open world and encounter a colorful cast of characters, some of whom are good, many of whom are bad, and a few of whom are ugly. Features: a sprawling open world, chock full of danger, quests, puzzles, and mysteries lush hand-drawn black and white graphics full stick-figure customization thousands of jokes, gags, and goofs crunchy turn-based combat (but only if you want it) liberal use of the Oxford comma over 50 hats disreputable saloons several gulches a drunk horse NOTE: characters are not literally colorful (the game is in black and white)

### Altering Fate: The Core of STEINS;GATE

Can you truly change the course of destiny and protect those you hold dear? STEINS;GATE, the celebrated time-travel science-fiction interactive visual novel developed by 5pb. and Nitroplus, places these profound decisions directly into your hands. This title is consistently recognized as one of the most exceptional visual novels ever produced, a distinction earned through its captivating narrative and deeply engaging gameplay.

### A Discovery That Unravels Time

The narrative of STEINS;GATE unfolds around a group of bright, resourceful young students who accidentally discover a groundbreaking method for altering the past. Their pivotal discovery involves a modified microwave oven, capable of sending messages through time. What begins as a series of intriguing, almost casual experiments, rapidly escalates into a perilous entanglement with a vast and shadowy conspiracy. This conspiracy, according to the game's lore, involves SERN, the organization behind the Large Hadron Collider, and a cryptic individual known as John Titor, who purports to be a traveler from a grim future.

### The Innovative "Phone Trigger" System

Player agency within STEINS;GATE is masterfully facilitated through the innovative "phone trigger" system. This unique mechanic allows players to receive incoming calls and text messages, presenting them with critical choices: to respond or to ignore. These seemingly small decisions carry immense weight, directly influencing the game's branching narrative and ultimately leading to a multitude of distinct and often surprising endings.

### Key Features for an Immersive Experience

Several key features contribute significantly to STEINS;GATE's deeply immersive experience:

*   **Non-Linear Visual Novel:** Dive into a rich, intricate narrative featuring multiple branching paths. Each choice you make as the player will lead to a different conclusion, shaping the unfolding events.
*   **HD 1080P Graphics:** Immerse yourself in the meticulously crafted world of STEINS;GATE with stunning high-definition visuals. The beautifully rendered illustrations bring the characters and environments to life.
*   **Phone Trigger System:** Engage directly with the story through Rintaro's cellphone. Your decisions on whether to answer calls or reply to emails are pivotal in steering the unfolding events and determining the fate of the characters.

### Critical Acclaim and Player Journey

With an estimated reading time of 30-50 hours, STEINS;GATE offers a substantial and unforgettable journey. The game has garnered widespread critical acclaim, earning numerous accolades from esteemed publications. These include:

*   `EXEMPLARY` - DESTRUCTOID (8/10)
*   `A REMARKABLE WORK` - US GAMER
*   `A MODERN CLASSIC` - KOTAKU
*   `UNFORGETTABLE` - GAMEMASTER
*   ★★★★★ 5/5 - EUROGAMER
*   34/40 - Famitsu

Name: Pony Island
Description:
Pony Island is a suspense puzzle game in disguise. You are in limbo, trapped in a malevolent and malfunctioning arcade machine devised by the devil himself. The devil detests having his puzzles solved and poor programming exposed; you will need to think outside the box to proceed and you will be insulted when you do. In Pony Island you will... Peer behind the rotting curtain of 'Pony Island' to repair its broken code Be forced to play along with The Devil's demented game of ponies Explore the depths of the cryptic software system that runs His game This game is about as indie as it gets. Daniel Mullins - Creator Simon Jenkins - Consulted Designer Jonah Senzel - Musician @EnzoPiou - French Localization FenixTM - Italian Localization @77pali - German Localization Luis Redin (Fusti) - Spanish Localization Kenneth Mohr - Danish Localization Alan K. Cirino - Portuguese Localization Berke Oğuz Yılmaz - Turkish Localization @TomWojcik1 - Polish Localization Barrie van der Velden - Dutch Localization Farhad Alyshev - Russian Localization Video playthrough by LoganicYT !

## Russian Subway Dogs: A Chaotic Arcade Simulation

Welcome, comrades, to **Russian Subway Dogs**! This chaotic arcade-simulation plunges you into the gritty reality of scavenging for food amidst Moscow's bustling subway commuters. Inspired by real-life stray dogs who have mastered navigating the city's intricate transit system, this game offers a unique and challenging experience.

### Survive the Urban Jungle

Survival is a constant battle against volatile vodka bottles, rival canine competitors, and the rare, but formidable, Subway Bear! Developed by the creators of *They Bleed Pixels*, *Russian Subway Dogs* promises a fresh take on arcade gameplay.

### Campaign Mode: A Proletariat's Challenge

Embark on an epic **Campaign Mode** featuring dozens of levels and over 100 unique challenges. Your demanding boss, the Proletaricat, and its mischievous kittens will push your scavenging skills to the limit. Can you complete levels with a vegetarian diet? Protect a bear? Or prevent pigeons from engaging in cannibalism? Success will lead you to the secret station at the end of the line!

### Endless Mode: Climb the Leaderboards

For the competitive spirit, **Endless Mode** offers endless replayability. Compete for a top spot on the online leaderboards, where a score-driven difficulty algorithm ensures each round is a fresh challenge. Random Proletaricat mini-challenges add another layer of unpredictable fun.

### Simulated Systems and Strategic Mayhem

*Russian Subway Dogs* is packed with simulated systems that allow for a wide range of strategic exploitation. From navigating environments with fire and ice to cooking wildlife for sustenance and dealing with toxic chocolate, your choices have consequences. Will you risk consuming tasty but toxic treats for bonus points, or use them to thwart rival dogs? Harness the power of hot sauce for fiery barks, or feed it to a pigeon for aerial support? The game empowers you to use your wits and abilities to fill your belly and cause maximum mayhem.

### Unlockable Critters and Special Guests

Beyond playing as a canine, *Russian Subway Dogs* allows you to unlock and play as a variety of beloved characters from other indie games and comics. These special guests include:

*   Question Hound from KC Green's *Gunshow*
*   Fidel from *Fidel Dungeon Rescue*
*   Nacho & Rad Shiba from *VA-11 HALL-A*
*   Ratcoon from *Ruin of the Reckless*
*   Uay Chivo from *Guacamelee!*
*   Nidhogg from *Nidhogg 2*
*   Clawed Kitty, inspired by *They Bleed Pixels*

### A Soundtrack to Remember

The game features an original soundtrack by Peter Chapman, also known as COINS, the talented musician behind the scores for *Guacamelee!*, *LittleBigPlanet Karting*, and *Modnation Racers*. His work blends Slavic sounds and Baltic beats with electronic dance music, creating a truly memorable auditory experience.

Whether you're a dog person or a cat enthusiast, *Russian Subway Dogs* offers a simple yet challenging experience for all. It's easy enough for a puppy to pick up, but packed with depth for seasoned players.

Name: The End Is Nigh
Description:
If you are reading this you are probably dead... Just kidding, you aren't dead... YET! See, in the future, everything dies... for the most part. and this is a game about just that. The End Is Nigh! -the management Gameplay: The End Is Nigh is a sprawling adventure platformer where the player takes control over Ash, one of few 'things' that have 'survived' the 'end of the world'. Follow Ash as he flops his way through a future of pain and suffering. Feel his stress levels rise as you throw him into an endless swarm of decaying, mutant animal-like creatures and help aid his final epic quest... to simply make a friend (out of pieces of people he finds along his journey). Oh, also you collect video game cartridges and tumors! if that does anything for ya. Features: 600+ levels! 12+ explorable chapters! 20+ collectible and fully playable mini game cartridges! (each with their own tiny achievements!) 80+ achievements that will make you feel good about yourself 100s of collectible little squishy tumors! loads of hidden extras and endings that you will probably see someone else find before you do! and stress!

## F.E.A.R.: A Cinematic Experience of Action, Tension, and Terror

Step into the role of the hero within your own epic narrative, a thrilling blend of intense action, palpable tension, and chilling terror. The saga begins with a perplexing infiltration of a multi-billion dollar aerospace compound by a mysterious paramilitary force. These intruders take hostages, yet conspicuously issue no demands, leaving authorities baffled.

### The Government's Response and the F.E.A.R. Initiative

In response to this unprecedented situation, the government dispatches a Special Forces team. However, their mission ends in swift and utter obliteration. Live footage of the ensuing massacre reveals an inexplicable wave of destruction, tearing the soldiers apart with supernatural force. Faced with such extraordinary circumstances and no other viable recourse, the elite F.E.A.R. (First Encounter Assault Recon) team is assembled. Their directive is clear and singular: evaluate the threat and eliminate the intruders at any cost.

### F.E.A.R. Extraction Point: A Perilous Escape

The narrative continues with *F.E.A.R. Extraction Point*, a direct continuation that kicks off with a dramatic and explosive event. As the F.E.A.R. team attempts to depart the immediate vicinity via helicopter, their escape is violently thwarted, resulting in a crash. This unforeseen incident forces the team to navigate the treacherous landscape in search of an alternate extraction point. Their journey is fraught with peril, as they must battle the now-unleashed Alma and her paranormal minions throughout a devastated urban environment.

### F.E.A.R. Perseus Mandate: Unraveling Armacham's Secrets

In *F.E.A.R. Perseus Mandate*, the conflict escalates as the original F.E.A.R. team and Delta Force engage in a desperate struggle for control. Simultaneously, a second F.E.A.R. team is deployed with a crucial objective: to uncover the dark and hidden past of the Armacham Technology Corporation (ATC). As a member of this secondary F.E.A.R. unit, your mission is to delve deeper into the secrets surrounding a clandestine project at the ATC facilities. It is important to note that the multiplayer component for this expansion is no longer available.

Name: Year Walk
Description:
In the old days man tried to catch a glimpse of the future in the strangest of ways. Experience the ancient Swedish phenomena of year walking through a different kind of first person adventure that blurs the line between two and three dimensions, as well as reality and the supernatural. Venture out into the dark woods where strange creatures roam, on a vision quest set in 19th century Sweden. Solve and decipher cryptic puzzles, listen for clues, and learn about mysterious folklore creatures in the built-in encyclopedia as you seek to foresee your future and find out if your loved one will ever love you back. Mysteries and clues await everywhere in Year Walk, but to fully understand the events that took place on that cold New Year's Eve, you will have to delve deeper than the adventure and lose yourself between fact and fiction. This edition of Year Walk features several new additions: • New locations within the game • Map • Updated art • New puzzles • Integrated Encyclopedia about the mysterious myths and creatures encountered in the game • Hint system • Steam Achievement Puzzles ... and more!

**F.E.A.R. 2: Project Origin** plunges players into a desperate fight for survival just before the catastrophic blast unleashed by the original F.E.A.R. team. As Special Forces Sgt. Michael Becket, your mission quickly becomes a harrowing battle against the unleashed fury of Alma Wade. With Alma's terrifying powers out of control, your squad is thrust into an apocalyptic landscape, seeking a way to destroy her.

The game emphasizes strategic environmental combat, allowing players and enemies to exploit their surroundings. Players can leverage enhanced reflexes to slow down time, enabling precise maneuvers and tactical advantages. Expect intense, close-quarter action across diverse environments, facing all-new enemies with advanced combat tactics. World interaction enhancements deepen tactical possibilities, allowing players to create instant cover and remove obstacles.

Beyond the single-player campaign, F.E.A.R. 2 offers multiplayer competition. The enhanced graphics engine elevates the action horror genre with heightened visuals and effects, creating an immersive experience. Enemies exhibit realistic behavior, utilizing the environment against you through vastly enhanced AI. Crucially, the game maintains the authenticity of the Alma storyline, providing a definitive continuation of the saga.

Released on April 16, 2009, the **Toy Soldier Update** introduced a unique multiplayer experience where players are shrunk to mere inches in height, battling within miniature environments. This update included several new maps:

*   **FullTilt:** Players battle inside a retro 1970s era pinball machine, 'Snake Fist,' with dynamic elements providing cover for fast-paced action.
*   **Cockroach:** This map offers a blood-drenched hospital room filled with heart-pounding action, allowing players to climb various objects.
*   **Recess:** Players wage mayhem from a giant sandcastle to a toy bulldozer, with the ability to blend in with plastic army men adding a unique tactical layer.

Name: Five Nights at Freddy's
Description:
Welcome to your new summer job at Freddy Fazbear's Pizza, where kids and parents alike come for entertainment and food as far as the eye can see! The main attraction is Freddy Fazbear, of course; and his two friends. They are animatronic robots, programmed to please the crowds! The robots' behavior has become somewhat unpredictable at night however, and it was much cheaper to hire you as a security guard than to find a repairman. From your small office you must watch the security cameras carefully. You have a very limited amount of electricity that you're allowed to use per night (corporate budget cuts, you know). That means when you run out of power for the night- no more security doors and no more lights! If something isn't right- namely if Freddybear or his friends aren't in their proper places, you must find them on the monitors and protect yourself if needed! Can you survive five nights at Freddy's? 'For all the simplicity of the game’s controls and premise, Five Nights at Freddy‘s is frightening. It’s a fantastic example of how cleverness in design and subtlety can be used to make an experience terrifying. Simple still images and proper character design steal the show in this game, and show that Scott Cawthon knows quite a lot about the secret fears people feel when looking at creepy dolls and toys. It’s elegant in how it sows fear, and is a must-own for anyone who likes scary games.' -Joel Couture IndieGameMag.com This game was created using Clickteam Fusion!

Name: Five Nights at Freddy's 3
Description:
Thirty years after Freddy Fazbear's Pizza closed it's doors, the events that took place there have become nothing more than a rumor and a childhood memory, but the owners of 'Fazbear's Fright: The Horror Attraction' are determined to revive the legend and make the experience as authentic as possible for patrons, going to great lengths to find anything that might have survived decades of neglect and ruin. At first there were only empty shells, a hand, a hook, an old paper-plate doll, but then a remarkable discovery was made... The attraction now has one animatronic.

Name: Slender: The Arrival
Description:
You're on your own. No one to come for you. No one to help you. No one to hear you scream. Slender: The Arrival is the official videogame adaption of Slender Man, developed in collaboration with Eric 'Victor Surge' Knudson, creator of the paranormal phenomenon that has been terrifying the curious-minded around the world since its inception, with Mark Hadley and Blue Isle Studios. Back in 2012, Mark Hadley ( AgentParsec ) created a game that captivated gamers around the world. Slender: The Eight Pages was a short, experimental first-person game that helped breathe new life into the horror genre through its use of unadulterated tension and fear. Experience the horror all over again. Slender: The Arrival is the official re-imagining and expansion of the original game created by Mark Hadley, teamed up with the writers behind the Marble Hornets series and the development team at Blue Isle Studios . The Arrival features a brand new storyline, improved visuals, great replay value, and most importantly, survival horror at its best.

Name: Five Nights at Freddy's 2
Description:
Welcome back to the new and improved Freddy Fazbear's Pizza! In Five Nights at Freddy's 2, the old and aging animatronics are joined by a new cast of characters. They are kid-friendly, updated with the latest in facial recognition technology, tied into local criminal databases, and promise to put on a safe and entertaining show for kids and grown-ups alike! What could go wrong? As the new security guard working nights, your job is to monitor cameras and make sure nothing goes wrong after-hours. The previous guard has complained about the characters trying to get into the office (he has since been moved to day-shift). So to make your job easier, you've been provided with your very own empty Freddy Fazbear head, which should fool the animatronic characters into leaving you alone if they should accidentally enter your office. As always, Fazbear Entertainment is not responsible for death or dismemberment.

### Uncover the Secrets of Kraven Manor

Step into the atmospheric and mysterious world of Kraven Manor. This game challenges players to uncover its secrets, solve intricate puzzles, and confront a growing threat. The core of this experience lies in a unique mechanic: the ability to dynamically alter your environment.

### The Architectural Scale Model

In the manor's extravagant entryway sits an intricate scale model of Kraven Manor itself. This model serves as the central hub for environmental manipulation. By finding miniature room models scattered throughout the house and returning them to this central model, you can actively reshape the manor around you. As you place these miniature rooms, they manifest in real space, creating new pathways and revealing hidden areas. Each new room constructed not only alters the physical layout but also exposes further revelations into the troubling past of William Kraven, the manor's enigmatic former resident, according to the game's developers.

### Key Gameplay Features

Kraven Manor offers a compelling gameplay experience with several key features designed to enhance immersion and challenge.

#### Immersive First-Person Atmosphere

Step into a hauntingly beautiful world rendered in first-person perspective, drawing you deeper into the manor's mysteries.

#### Atmospheric Sound Design

Experience chilling symphonies and unsettling sounds that will keep you on edge.

#### Architectural Gameplay

Become the architect of Kraven Manor by manipulating its scale model, directly influencing the game world.

#### Tension and Puzzles

Prepare for a mounting threat and challenging puzzles that focus on psychological tension, as noted by early player feedback.

#### Unique Antagonist

Face a relentless antagonist who will pursue you throughout your journey.

#### Collectible Secrets

Discover hidden secrets within the manor that lead to a rewarding ending.

#### Nightmare Mode

For a greater challenge, Nightmare Mode offers a scarier experience with a limited flashlight battery.

#### Customization Options

Enjoy graphical settings and custom key binding options to tailor the experience.

#### Multilingual Support

Face your fears in 14 different languages.

Kraven Manor invites you to confront your deepest fears and test your resolve. The doors of this mysterious estate are open, and its secrets await.

Name: Five Nights at Freddy's 4
Description:
This time, the terror has followed you home. In this last chapter of the Five Nights at Freddy's original story, you must once again defend yourself against Freddy Fazbear, Chica, Bonnie, Foxy, and even worse things that lurk in the shadows. Playing as a child whose role is yet unknown, you must safeguard yourself until 6am by watching the doors, as well as warding off unwanted creatures that may venture into your closet or onto the bed behind you. You have only a flashlight to protect yourself. It will scare away things that may be creeping at the far end of the hallways, but be careful, and listen. If something has crept too close, then shining lights in its eyes will be your end.

Name: Daylight
Description:
You awake, trapped in an abandoned hospital. Your only source of light is your phone. You hit a dead-end and must turn around, but behind you lurks an eerie presence and strange noises... Experience Daylight, a procedurally generated psychological thriller for your PC. Unreal Engine 4 enhances the visuals of your escape to freedom like never before, heightening every bone-chilling detail of your surroundings. Get lost in a maze that changes with every playthrough, allowing for limitless replayability and the tension of unpredictability every time you start the game. Navigate to safety while avoiding what lurks in darkness. What will be waiting for you down the next corridor?

Name: Okami HD
Description:
Experience the critically acclaimed masterpiece with its renowned Sumi-e ink art style in breathtaking high resolution. Take on the role of Amaterasu, the Japanese sun goddess who inhabits the form of a legendary white wolf, on a quest to defeat Orochi, an eight-headed demon and tyrannical monster responsible for turning the world of Nippon into a ruined wasteland. Players will be able to choose between modern widescreen format or the original release’s 4:3 ratio. Interactive loading game screens from the original game are also included.

Name: The Longest Journey
Description:
The Longest Journey is an amazing graphical adventure, where the player controls the protagonist, April Ryan, on her journey between parallel universes. Embark on an exciting and original journey of discovery, where you will explore, solve puzzles, meet new people, face terrifying monsters, learn, grow, and live the adventure of a lifetime! Over 150 locations spanning two distinct and detailed worlds More than 70 speaking characters 40+ hours of gameplay 20+ minutes of high-resolution pre-rendered video footage Cinematic musical score

Name: The Curse of Monkey Island
Description:
I've sailed the seas from Trinidad to Tortuga and I've never seen anything like it! The engagement ring I gave Elaine has a terrible pirate curse on it. LeChuck is behind it, I'm sure. I should have known that nothing good could come out of that evil zombie's treasures. And if that's not bad enough, the clairvoyant I met in the mangrove swamp told me that if I am to break the curse and save Elaine, I will have to die! Excerpted from ''The Memoirs of Guybrush Threepwood: The Monkey Island Years'' - Third in the legendary Monkey Island series of graphic adventures - Film quality animation, voice, sound and music--the undead come to life before your very eyes! - Incredible high-resolution (640 x 480) graphics! - A barrel of gameplay--estimated 30-plus hours! - Two difficulty settings: regular and Mega-Monkey (now with more puzzley goodness)! - New and improved insults suitable for swordfights and other fun occasions!

Name: Resident Evil 2
Description:
The genre-defining masterpiece Resident Evil 2 returns, completely rebuilt from the ground up for a deeper narrative experience. Using Capcom’s proprietary RE Engine, Resident Evil 2 offers a fresh take on the classic survival horror saga with breathtakingly realistic visuals, heart-pounding immersive audio, a new over-the-shoulder camera, and modernized controls on top of gameplay modes from the original game. In Resident Evil 2, the classic action, tense exploration, and puzzle solving gameplay that defined the Resident Evil series returns. Players join rookie police officer Leon Kennedy and college student Claire Redfield, who are thrust together by a disastrous outbreak in Raccoon City that transformed its population into deadly zombies. Both Leon and Claire have their own separate playable campaigns, allowing players to see the story from both characters’ perspectives. The fate of these two fan favorite characters is in players hands as they work together to survive and get to the bottom of what is behind the terrifying attack on the city. Will they make it out alive? A spine-chilling reimagining of a horror classic - Based on the original release in 1998, the new game has been completely rebuilt from the ground up for a deeper narrative experience. A whole new perspective – New over-the-shoulder camera mode and modernized control scheme creates a more modern take on the survival horror experience and offers players a trip down memory lane with the original gameplay modes from the 1998 release. Terrifyingly realistic visuals – Built on Capcom’s proprietary RE Engine, Resident Evil 2 delivers breathtakingly photorealistic visuals whilst stunning lighting creates an up-close, intense and atmospheric experience as players roam the corridors of the Raccoon City Police Department (RPD). Face the grotesque hordes – Zombies are brought to life with a horrifyingly realistic wet gore effect as they react in real time taking instant visible damage, making every bullet count. Iconic series defining gameplay – Engage in frenzied combat with enemies, explore dark menacing corridors, solve puzzles to access areas and collect and use items discovered around the environment in a terrifying constant fight for survival. See favorite characters in a whole new light - Join rookie police officer Leon S. Kennedy on his first day in the job and college student Claire Redfield, who is searching for her brother amidst a terrifying zombie epidemic. Step into the rookie shoes of both heroes - Enjoy separately playable campaigns for both Leon and Claire, allowing players to see the story from both characters’ perspective.

Name: Rise of Nations: Extended Edition
Description:
Rise of Nations Rise of Nations is a real-time strategy game that spans all history. Start with a single city in the Ancient Age; gather resources; build an infrastructure; research technologies; construct Wonders of the World such as the Pyramids and the Eiffel Tower; and expand your military might across the world, conquering hostile nations with bombers, battleships, and tanks—all over your lunch hour! In Rise of Nations there are: 18 Nations—each with special abilities and unique military units. Over a hundred military units operating on the ground, sea, and air— from Hoplites to Frigates to Helicopters. Over two dozen buildings with upgrades and technologies that will take your nation from a small City to an Information Age society. 14 Wonders of the World—the Terra Cotta Army, the Taj Mahal, the Eiffel Tower. Each gives your nation special bonuses. More than a dozen map types, ranging from the Amazon Rainforest to the Himalayas to the Nile Delta. Conquer the World campaign—a linked series of dozens of scenarios. The Extended Edition includes: Rise of Nations Rise of Nations: Thrones and Patriots New in the Extended Edition: Improved Visuals Improved water Improved textures Full-screen anti-aliasing Full Steamworks Integration Multiplayer with ranked matches (ELO) Achievements Trading Cards Cloud saves

Name: There Is No Game: Wrong Dimension
Description:
' There Is No Game: Wrong Dimension ' is a Point&Click comedy adventure ( and Point&Click only! ) that will take you on a journey you never asked to go on, through silly and unexpected video game universes. Will you be able to play along with the ' Game ' to find your way home? We sincerely think NOT . A Point&Click comedy adventure. You can go ahead and put your controller back up on the shelf. Incredible 3D graphics that are flat. Completely flat. And very pixelated. Almost fully voiced. (May contain traces of foreign accents here and there.) Solve riddles that require you to think 'Outside the box'. Hint system included because you can't think 'Outside the box'... Shorter than an MMORPG, which leaves you plenty of time to finish some REAL good games. Discover the Top 10 best walls. The fourth one will surprise you! Motion sickness free, which is pretty remarkable for a non-VR experience. Contains tons of bugs... but it’s supposed to be like that. And lots of other surprises! You haven't heard of “ There Is No Game ”, winner of the 2015 Construct Jam? That's perfect! Go play Battle of Duty instead of clicking on the image below to try this weird, totally pointless video game.

Name: Sid Meier's Pirates!
Description:
Sail the Caribbean, marauding all on the high seas or ally your ship and crew as a privateer in search of riches - the life you choose is up to you. Face dogged enemies, raid unsuspecting villages, woo fair maidens, avoid capture or dig for buried treasure. Discover what it takes to become one of the most famous pirates in history!

## Monkey Island™ 2 Special Edition: LeChuck’s Revenge™ - A Classic Reimagined

Embark on a pirate adventure in *Monkey Island™ 2 Special Edition: LeChuck’s Revenge™*, where aspiring pirate Guybrush Threepwood once again faces his undead nemesis, LeChuck. This beloved LucasArts adventure game has been updated with numerous new features, building on the success of *The Secret of Monkey Island™: Special Edition*.

### The Legend of Big Whoop

After LeChuck's apparent defeat, Guybrush Threepwood seeks the legendary treasure of Big Whoop. However, LeChuck returns as a zombie, fueled by a desire for vengeance. Guybrush must use his wit and adventurous spirit to overcome his foe and become the premier pirate in the Caribbean.

### Challenges and Encounters

Guybrush's journey involves:

*   Voodoo dolls
*   Spitting contests
*   Amusement parks

He will meet allies, face new enemies, and use his "mojo" to survive LeChuck's wrath.

### Signature Special Edition Features

Experience *Monkey Island™ 2* with these enhancements:
