In **Crossfire mode**, teams of players battle it out over Steam. Each team is supported by an endless stream of robots fighting on their behalf. Success hinges on **overwhelming your opponent's stream, upgrading your Pros, and fortifying your base defenses.**

#### Customizable Characters

Each Pro is designed for a **unique playstyle** and comes with their own set of upgradeable skills. Further customize these skills and abilities with a variety of unlockable products through the **Custom Class feature.**

### Unlockables and Statistics

Every game of Monday Night Combat earns you money that contributes to your **Lifetime Earnings**. This can be spent on unlocking custom classes and purchasing earned ProTags. Your **Lifetime Earnings also determine your player level.** Monday Night Combat meticulously tracks a **large set of persistent statistics** for all aspects of gameplay. The game features over 370 **‘ProTags’** – customizable tags to showcase your achievements to other players and friends.

### Dedicated Servers

Monday Night Combat supports **dedicated servers**, allowing for multiple instances of the game to run with a full standalone client.

Name: Thief™ Gold
Description:
Stalk your prey on the quest for stolen goods with your blackjack, sword, and an assortment of unique arrows. Steal for money and uncover the hidden agendas of your allies and enemies as you play through an unravelling story of deception and revenge. Survive in a world where shadows are your only ally, trust is not an option, and confrontation results in death! Key Features: Pioneering stealth based gameplay brings a new dimension to first person action. Thief™ Gold includes Thief™ The Dark Project (12 huge missions with multiple environments) and the Gold update (3 new campaign missions which deepen the plot and add five new types of enemies) Advanced enemies can see, hear, speak, and sound alarms. Your arsenal includes: blackjack, sword, fire arrows, water arrows, rope arrows and more

In the year 2008, the world faces a new kind of conflict: information warfare. This era is defined by citywide blackouts, sabotage of the stock exchange, and the electronic hijacking of national defense systems. To combat these escalating threats, elite operatives must infiltrate deep into hostile territory, gathering critical intelligence closer than ever to enemy soldiers. You step into the role of Sam Fisher, the NSA's most accomplished black-ops agent, tasked with navigating this dangerous landscape.

To achieve your objectives, you will employ a range of lethal and stealthy tactics. This includes close-range combat, utilizing your combat knife, and wielding the prototype Land Warrior rifle. You will also master radical suppression techniques, such as the inverted neck break, to neutralize threats efficiently. Beyond solo missions, the game introduces cooperative multiplayer infiltration, where effective teamwork becomes your most potent weapon. As the enemy's capabilities evolve, so too must your strategies and skills.

*   **Deadly Agility:** Experience an incredibly complete and fluid variety of moves, encompassing athletic maneuvers, stealthy approaches, and silent takedowns.
*   **Real Weapons of Tomorrow:** Access the most comprehensive arsenal of weapons and gadgets, ranging from your trusty knife to the experimental Land Warrior System.
*   **As Good as Real:** Witness groundbreaking graphics technology, delivering unparalleled visuals on any system. An advanced physics engine powers realistic ragdoll physics, particle effects, and perfect environmental interaction.
*   **Ultimate Challenge:** Confront intelligent AI with distinct personal attributes and natural behaviors. NPCs are acutely aware of their surroundings and possess memory of past events, creating dynamic and unpredictable encounters.
*   **Amazing Replayability:** Explore totally open level designs featuring multiple paths and optional secondary objectives, ensuring a fresh experience with each playthrough.
*   **Co-op Stealth:** Engage in multiplayer with friends, coordinating your infiltration efforts in an all-new cooperative challenge.

Please note that as of August 2016, the online features for *Tom Clancy's Splinter Cell Chaos Theory®* are no longer supported. Consequently, the Multiplayer and Co-op modes are no longer accessible.

## METAL GEAR SOLID V: THE PHANTOM PAIN - A New Era of Tactical Espionage

**METAL GEAR SOLID V: THE PHANTOM PAIN** by Konami Digital Entertainment ushers in a new era for tactical espionage. This installment, built on the powerful Fox Engine, offers players unmatched tactical freedom within its vast open world.

### The Story: Revenge in the Cold War

The year is 1984. Nine years have passed since the events of MGSV: GROUND ZEROES and the fall of Mother Base. Players step into the shoes of Snake, also known as Big Boss. Waking from a nine-year coma, Snake finds a world still gripped by the Cold War and the threat of nuclear weapons. Driven by a thirst for revenge, Snake aims to build a new private army and strike back at the shadowy group XOF.

### Exploring Mature Themes

The METAL GEAR SOLID series is known for tackling deep, mature themes. The Phantom Pain dives into the psychology of war, examining the terrible acts that occur when people are trapped in its cycle.

### A Landmark Gaming Experience

MGSV: The Phantom Pain is set to be a major release, leaving a lasting impact on gaming. Its innovative open-world design, stunning visuals, and rich gameplay combine for a truly immersive experience. Players can look forward to:

*   **Cinematic Storytelling:** A gripping narrative that pulls players into the drama.
*   **Heavy Themes:** Thought-provoking looks at the human cost of war.
*   **Immersive Tactical Gameplay:** Unprecedented freedom in how missions are approached, allowing for varied player strategies.

### Key Features of MGSV: The Phantom Pain

*   **Open-World Design:** Players enjoy complete freedom in mission approach and progression. This allows for diverse strategies and boosts replayability.
*   **Fox Engine Power:** The advanced Fox Engine provides:
    *   Photorealistic graphics that set new visual standards.
    *   Careful game design for deeper immersion.
    *   True next-generation production quality.
*   **Enhanced Online Connectivity:** Online features improve overall function and access across devices, creating a more connected gameplay experience.

Name: Tom Clancy's Splinter Cell®
Description:
Infiltrate terrorists' positions, acquire critical intelligence by any means necessary, execute with extreme prejudice, and exit without a trace! You are Sam Fisher, a highly trained secret operative of the NSA's secret arm: Third Echelon. The world balance is in your hands, as cyber terrorism and international tensions are about to explode into WWIII. Go Behind the Headlines into the Real World of Modern Espionage - Enter the realistic Tom Clancy universe. Suit up with the latest classified field operative gear and weapons. A New Level of Stealth Action - All the best stealth action plus all new moves. Highly interactive environments giving players more gameplay options and the ability to strategize their actions. Deep Environments. Unparalleled Immersion - Stunning environments driven by the Unreal™ engine. Dynamic lighting and sound effects that match reality. Pulse-Pounding Action on a Global Scale - Over 20 Hours of stealth action. Diverse mission objectives that can be achieved by different means for increased replay value.

Name: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition
Description:
Critically acclaimed Batman: Arkham Asylum returns with a remastered Game of the Year Edition, featuring 4 extra Challenge Maps. The additional Challenge Maps are Crime Alley; Scarecrow Nightmare; Totally Insane and Nocturnal Hunter (both from the Insane Night Map Pack). Utilize the unique FreeFlow™ combat system to chain together unlimited combos seamlessly and battle with huge groups of The Joker’s henchmen in brutal melee brawls Investigate as Batman, the WORLD’S GREATEST DETECTIVE, by solving intricate puzzles with the help of cutting edge forensic tools including x-ray scanning, fingerprint scans, ‘Amido Black’ spray and a pheromone tracker Face off against Gotham’s greatest villains including The Joker, HARLEY QUINN, POISON IVY and KILLER CROC Become the Invisible Predator™ with Batman’s fear takedowns and unique vantage point system to move without being seen and hunt enemies Choose multiple takedown methods, including swooping from the sky and smashing through walls. Explore every inch of Arkham Asylum and roam freely on the infamous island, presented for the first time ever in its gritty and realistic entirety Experience what it’s like to be BATMAN using BATARANGS, explosive gel aerosol, The Batclaw, sonar resonator and the line launcher Unlock more secrets by completing hidden challenges in the world and develop and customize equipment by earning experience points Enjoy complete superhero freedom in the environment with the use of Batman’s grapnel gun to get to any place you can see, jump from any height and glide in any direction

## Dishonored: A Supernatural Assassin's Revenge

Dishonored is a first-person action game where you play as a supernatural assassin seeking revenge. The game's flexible combat lets you eliminate targets creatively, mixing supernatural powers, weapons, and gadgets. Your choices shape mission results, whether you strike from the shadows or attack directly.

### The City of Dunwall: A World of Intrigue

The story takes place in Dunwall, a dirty industrial whaling city where steampunk tech and otherworldly forces mix. Framed for the Empress's murder, you become a notorious assassin, known by a mask. Dunwall is hit by plague and run by a corrupt government. Dark powers give you supernatural abilities, but this power has a price. The truth of your betrayal is unclear, and your old life is gone.

### Key Features: Unleash Your Inner Assassin

#### Improvise and Innovate Your Approach

Each assassination offers a unique play style. You can:

*   Use shadows and sound for silent movement.
*   Face enemies with great force.

The flexible combat system promotes creative mixes of abilities, powers, and gadgets. The main goal is to improvise and innovate to create your own play style.

#### Action with Meaningful Consequences

The world of Dishonored reacts to your actions. You can:

*   Move like a ghost, fighting corruption.
*   Leave a trail of destruction.

Your decisions directly affect mission outcomes, making for a replayable and personal experience.

#### Master Supernatural Abilities

A set of strong supernatural abilities changes combat and stealth. These include:

*   Teleportation for getting into places.
*   Possessing creatures to scout ahead.
*   Stopping time to plan attacks.

The link between abilities and weapons offers many ways to get past challenges. An upgrade system lets you master new abilities and gadgets.

#### A City Unlike Any Other

Enter an original world created by Viktor Antonov, art director of Half-Life 2. Arkane and Bethesda built a steampunk city where industry and the supernatural meet, creating a very intriguing atmosphere. As one developer said, "The world is yours to discover," highlighting the freedom and depth of exploration.

Name: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition
Description:
Critically acclaimed Batman: Arkham Asylum returns with a remastered Game of the Year Edition, featuring 4 extra Challenge Maps. The additional Challenge Maps are Crime Alley; Scarecrow Nightmare; Totally Insane and Nocturnal Hunter (both from the Insane Night Map Pack). Utilize the unique FreeFlow™ combat system to chain together unlimited combos seamlessly and battle with huge groups of The Joker’s henchmen in brutal melee brawls Investigate as Batman, the WORLD’S GREATEST DETECTIVE, by solving intricate puzzles with the help of cutting edge forensic tools including x-ray scanning, fingerprint scans, ‘Amido Black’ spray and a pheromone tracker Face off against Gotham’s greatest villains including The Joker, HARLEY QUINN, POISON IVY and KILLER CROC Become the Invisible Predator™ with Batman’s fear takedowns and unique vantage point system to move without being seen and hunt enemies Choose multiple takedown methods, including swooping from the sky and smashing through walls. Explore every inch of Arkham Asylum and roam freely on the infamous island, presented for the first time ever in its gritty and realistic entirety Experience what it’s like to be BATMAN using BATARANGS, explosive gel aerosol, The Batclaw, sonar resonator and the line launcher Unlock more secrets by completing hidden challenges in the world and develop and customize equipment by earning experience points Enjoy complete superhero freedom in the environment with the use of Batman’s grapnel gun to get to any place you can see, jump from any height and glide in any direction

**Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition: An Expanded Gotham Experience**

For fans eager to delve deeper into the gritty world of Gotham City, the **Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition** presents an unparalleled opportunity. This critically acclaimed title significantly expands upon the immersive atmosphere established in its predecessor, *Batman: Arkham Asylum*, offering players a vastly larger and more intricate playground. According to Rocksteady Studios, the developers, Arkham City itself is an astonishing five times the size of the original game's world. This sprawling metropolis has been transformed into a maximum-security sanctuary, a walled-off district housing Gotham's most notorious criminals.

Within this expansive urban environment, players once again assume the mantle of the Caped Crusader, experiencing firsthand the visceral thrill of delivering justice to the city's most dangerous inhabitants. The game is renowned for its impressive roster of iconic villains, a collection that ensures a constant and formidable challenge for Batman. These adversaries include:

*   Catwoman
*   The Joker
*   The Riddler
*   Two-Face
*   Harley Quinn
*   The Penguin
*   Mr. Freeze

And a host of other formidable foes, guaranteeing a dynamic and engaging experience.

The **Game of the Year Edition** elevates the original experience by bundling a wealth of previously released downloadable content (DLC). This comprehensive package ensures players have access to a substantial amount of new gameplay and cosmetic additions. The included content comprises:

*   **Downloadable Content Packs:**
    *   Catwoman Pack
    *   Nightwing Bundle Pack
    *   Robin Bundle Pack
    *   Harley Quinn’s Revenge
    *   Challenge Map Pack
    *   Arkham City Skins Pack

This edition provides substantial new gameplay content, featuring a variety of exciting additions:

*   **Seven New Maps:** These maps offer fresh environments for players to test their skills, including:
    *   Wayne Manor
    *   Main Hall
    *   Freight Train
    *   Black Mask
    *   The Joker's Carnival
    *   Iceberg Lounge
    *   Batcave
*   **Three Playable Characters:** Players can step into the shoes of additional iconic characters beyond Batman:
    *   Catwoman
    *   Robin
    *   Nightwing
*   **Twelve Unlockable Skins:** A diverse collection of skins allows for extensive customization of Batman and his allies, including:
    *   1970s Batsuit
    *   Year One Batman
    *   The Dark Knight Returns
    *   Earth One Batman
    *   Batman Beyond
    *   Animated Batman
    *   Sinestro Corps Batman
    *   Long Halloween Catwoman
    *   Animated Catwoman
    *   Animated Robin
    *   Red Robin
    *   Animated Nightwing

This comprehensive collection offers an unparalleled opportunity to explore Gotham's underbelly and embody the Dark Knight in what is widely considered his most expansive and definitive adventure to date.

**Deus Ex: Human Revolution - Director's Cut: Augmentations and Conspiracy**

**Deus Ex: Human Revolution - Director's Cut** immerses you in a world reshaped by human augmentation. You step into the shoes of Adam Jensen, a former SWAT officer now leading security for a major biotech company. A brutal attack draws him into a complex web of corporate secrets and a vast conspiracy, forever changing his life and foreshadowing societal unrest.

### A Society on the Brink

The **Director's Cut** unfolds in a near-future teetering on the edge of chaos. This instability is fueled by rapid technological leaps, particularly in human augmentation. This progress has carved a stark divide within society.

*   **The Augmented Elite:** Individuals who can afford cutting-edge mechanical enhancements.
*   **The Disenfranchised Masses:** Those left behind, unable to access these new technologies.

Beneath this advanced surface, unseen powers seek to steer humanity's destiny, paving the way for a "human revolution."

### Gameplay: Your Path, Your Choice

**Deus Ex: Human Revolution - Director's Cut** masterfully blends action with role-playing elements. Players can tackle challenges through combat, utilizing a range of augmentations and weapon upgrades. The game champions diverse playstyles, enabling players to unlock new abilities and boost skills in crucial areas:

*   **Stealth**
*   **Social Interaction**
*   **Hacking**
*   **Combat**

Jensen's growth directly reflects your chosen approach to the game.

### Player Choice and Story Impact

A core element of the **Director's Cut** is player agency and its ripple effects. The game presents numerous ways to navigate situations, with your decisions profoundly shaping the narrative. This is particularly evident in the expanded story, which incorporates content from "The Missing Link" and "Tongs Mission." The developers sought to craft a world that felt both futuristic and unsettlingly familiar.

### Enhanced Replayability and Developer Insights

The **Director's Cut** boosts replayability by offering fresh strategies for boss encounters. The **Newgame+ feature** allows players to restart their journey with all their previously acquired augmentations. Developer commentaries are accessible in English, and the original "Making of" video provides a glimpse into the game's development process.

Name: Crysis
Description:
Adapt to Survive  An epic story thrusts players into an ever-changing environment, forcing them to adapt their tactics and approach to conquer battlefields ranging from newly frozen jungle to zero-gravity alien environments. Suit up!  A high-tech Nanosuit allows gamers to augment their abilities in real time on the battlefield. Players can choose to enhance their speed, strength, armor and cloaking abilities to approach situations in creative tactical ways. Customizable Weaponry  A huge arsenal of modular weaponry gives gamers unprecedented control over their play style. Blow the opposition away with experimental weapons, discover alien technology and utilize custom ammunition from incendiary-tipped rounds to tactical munitions that can silently put foes to sleep. Veni Vidi Vici  Lifelike enemy AI challenges players to assess a situation and approach it strategically. It isn't about having the fastest trigger finger  players are challenged to be proactive in the fight, not reactive. Zero-G Gameplay  Battle a horrifying alien species in a true Zero-gravity environment, where physics change everything as players must adapt to moving in Zero-G and contending with the recoil from their weapons and more. Next-Generation Graphics  Built from the ground up using Crytek's proprietary CryENGINE 2™, Crysis' visuals define 'state of the art,' with full DX10 support and scalable options to deliver solid performance on older machines. Open, Physicalized World  Choose your own path through the open world of Crysis, destroying obstacles, driving vehicles from VTOL's to boats and using the environment itself against your enemies. [/b] [/list]

## Slay the Princess: A Twisted Fairy Tale

Embark on a perilous journey through a secluded forest, leading to a mysterious cabin. Within its depths, in the very basement, resides a Princess. Your grim objective is to slay her. Failure to do so will herald the end of the world. This formidable Princess will employ every tactic imaginable to thwart your mission. She will beguile, deceive, and offer you the world, and if you succumb to her manipulations, she will ensure your demise repeatedly. You must not allow this to transpire. Remember, the fate of humanity rests squarely upon your shoulders.

### The Princess's Deceptions

The narrative challenges conventional fairy tale tropes. Instead of rescuing damsels in distress, you are tasked with eliminating a Princess. This is not a cosmic horror entity; she is a human Princess, and according to the game's premise, she can be vanquished if you maintain your resolve. The developers strongly advise against attempting to romance her, as such endeavors will inevitably lead to unfavorable outcomes. While the possibility of death is ever-present, expect to experience it frequently. Vigilance and unwavering focus on your objective are paramount.

### Gameplay Mechanics and Features

*   **Voice Acting:** The game boasts full voice acting, featuring the acclaimed performances of Jonathan Sims and Nichole Goodnight.
*   **Hand-Penciled Art:** Every background and character sprite is meticulously hand-drawn with pencil and paper by Ignatz-winning graphic novelist Abby Howard, lending a unique and artistic visual style.
*   **Branching Narrative:** Experience a dynamic story where your dialogue choices and deeply held beliefs shape your character and dictate the unfolding events. This creates a truly personalized and unpredictable adventure.
*   **Psychological Horror:** Slay the Princess is a choice-driven psychological horror visual novel that blends dramatic branching narratives with light RPG elements.
*   **No Time Loops:** Contrary to some popular narrative devices, the game explicitly states that time is a strictly linear concept and does not involve time loops.

This innovative roleplaying experience hails from the creators of *Scarlet Hollow*. Slay the Princess offers a compelling blend of dramatic choices, psychological tension, and distinctive artistry, promising a memorable and challenging encounter with a Princess unlike any you've encountered before.

Name: Return to Castle Wolfenstein
Description:
World War II rages and nations fall. SS head Himmler has Hitler's full backing to twist science and the occult into an army capable of annihilating the Allies once and for all. Battling alone, you're on an intense mission to pierce the black heart of the Third Reich and stop Himmler -- or die trying. Fighting in advanced team-based multiplayer mode, you'll wage your own WWII in an all-out Axis vs. Allies contest for frontline domination. Powered by the Quake III Arena engine, the Wolfenstein universe explodes with the kind of epic environments, A.I., firepower and cinematic effects that only a game created by true masters can deliver. The dark reich's closing in. The time to act is now. Evil prevails when good men do nothing. Epic Environments Intense Story-Driven Action Ferocious A.I. Big Screen Cinematic Effects Team-Based Multiplayer Action

Name: Unavowed
Description:
A demon possessed you one year ago. Since that day, you unwillingly tore a trail of bloodshed through New York City. Your salvation comes in the form of the Unavowed – an ancient society dedicated to stopping evil. You are free, but your world is in tatters. You have no home, no friends, and are wanted by the police. Your old life is gone, but perhaps you can start a new one. Join the ranks of the Unavowed, and fight against the oncoming darkness. Features: Choose a male or female protagonist Three playable origin stories Branching storyline A total of four companion characters to choose from, each with their own talents and abilities. Twice the resolution of a typical Wadjet Eye Game! All the usual guff – voice acting, commentary, original music, etc

Name: Dishonored 2
Description:
Game Description Reprise your role as a supernatural assassin in Dishonored 2. Praised by PC Gamer as “brilliant”, IGN as “amazing” and “a super sequel, IGN as “amazing” and “a superb sequel”, declared a “masterpiece” by Eurogamer, and hailed “a must-play revenge tale among the best in its class” by Game Informer, Dishonored 2 is the follow up to Arkane Studio's first-person action blockbuster and winner of more than 100 'Game of the Year' awards, Dishonored. Play your way in a world where mysticism and industry collide. Will you choose to play as Empress Emily Kaldwin or the royal protector, Corvo Attano? Will you make your way through the game unseen, make full use of its brutal combat system, or use a blend of both? How will you combine your character's unique set of powers, weapons and gadgets to eliminate your enemies? The story responds to your choices, leading to intriguing outcomes, as you play through each of the game's hand-crafted missions. Story Dishonored 2 is set 15 years after the Lord Regent has been vanquished and the dreaded Rat Plague has passed into history. An otherworldly usurper has seized Empress Emily Kaldwin’s throne, leaving the fate of the Isles hanging in the balance. As Emily or Corvo, travel beyond the legendary streets of Dunwall to Karnaca, the once-dazzling coastal city that holds the keys to restoring Emily to power. Armed with the Mark of the Outsider and powerful new abilities, track down your enemies and take back what’s rightfully yours. Key Features The Assassins As fully voiced characters, Emily Kaldwin and Corvo Attano now bring their own perspectives and emotional responses to the world and story. Use each character’s set of powers, gadgets and uniquely-tuned weapons in creative ways as you explore the world – whether you fight your way through the city streets or sneak across the rooftops - and which enemies you decide to eliminate or spare. Supernatural Powers Advanced bonecharm crafting and all-new upgrade trees allow you to customize your powers in vastly different ways. Become a living shadow to silently stalk your targets, link enemies so they share a common fate, or mesmerize your foes and dominate their minds. Choose from nearly infinite combinations of violence, nonlethal combat, powers and weapons to accomplish your objectives. Imaginative World From the grimy, rat-infested streets of Dunwall to the lush, exotic coasts of a decaying Karnaca, immerse yourself in stylized locales created by Arkane’s premiere art and narrative teams. The world is a character in its own right, rich with story, architecture and eclectic characters. It is also punctuated by signature mission locations, such as the Dust District, ravaged by dust storms and warring factions, and a madman’s mansion made of shifting walls, deadly traps and clockwork soldiers. The Void Engine Dishonored 2 is beautifully brought to life with the new Void Engine, a leap forward in rendering technology, built from id Tech and highly-customized by Arkane Studios. Designed to support world-class art direction and take full advantage of the powerful hardware this generation has to offer, the Void Engine allows for significant advances to all game systems, including responsive stealth and combat Artificial Intelligence, lighting and graphical rendering, impressively dense urban environments, and story presentation.

Name: Control Ultimate Edition
Description:
Control Ultimate Edition Control Ultimate Edition contains the main game and all previously released Expansions ('The Foundation' and 'AWE') in one great value package. A corruptive presence has invaded the Federal Bureau of Control…Only you have the power to stop it. The world is now your weapon in an epic fight to annihilate an ominous enemy through deep and unpredictable environments. Containment has failed, humanity is at stake. Will you regain control? Winner of over 80 awards, Control is a visually stunning third-person action-adventure that will keep you on the edge of your seat. Blending open-ended environments with the signature world-building and storytelling of renowned developer, Remedy Entertainment, Control presents an expansive and intensely gratifying gameplay experience. Key features Uncover the mysteries Can you handle the bureau’s dark secrets? Unfold an epic supernatural struggle, filled with unexpected characters and bizarre events, as you search for your missing brother, and discover the truth that has brought you here. Everything is your weapon Unleash destruction through transforming weaponry and telekinetic powers. Discover new ways to annihilate your enemies as you harness powerful abilities to turn everything around you into a lethal weapon. Explore a hidden world Delve deep into the ominous expanses of a secretive government agency. Explore the Bureau’s shifting environments only to discover that there is always more than meets the eye… Fight for control Battle a relentless enemy through exciting missions and challenging boss fights to earn powerful upgrades that maximize abilities and customize your weaponry.

## Infernax: A Gory Quest to Save a Cursed Land

Embark on an epic adventure in Infernax, a challenging action-adventure game where your decisions shape the fate of a land ravaged by unholy magic. As a valiant knight returning to your homeland, you'll discover it's been overrun by ruthless, bloodthirsty monsters intent on your demise. Your quest is to find and destroy the source of this corruption, a perilous journey filled with difficult choices and brutal combat.

### Uncover a Dangerous and Unique Open World

Infernax presents a vast and perilous open world, teeming with secret areas waiting to be uncovered. Navigate treacherous terrains and confront a menagerie of dangerous beasts and unholy creatures. The game features challenging castle-dungeons and numerous boss battles that will test your combat prowess. Prepare yourself, because this adventure is about to get incredibly gory.

### Forge Your Path with Meaningful Decisions

Every choice you make in Infernax carries significant weight, leading to multiple endings based on your actions. Will you choose to slay your enemies or offer them aid? How will you utilize the experience gained from vanquishing monsters? Invest your hard-earned points into increasing your life, mana, or damage output to tailor your character to your preferred playstyle. Remember, a single decision can dramatically alter the course of your journey. The consequences of your actions are far-reaching, and even seemingly minor deeds can have lasting repercussions.

### Gear Up and Grow Stronger

To aid you in your quest to reverse the curse plaguing your land, Infernax offers a robust level-up system. Earn money by defeating monsters and use your savings to purchase new items and unlock essential skills. Visit the blacksmith to acquire better weapons and armors, ensuring you are adequately equipped for the escalating challenges ahead. Every choice you make can also unlock different side quests, offering opportunities to obtain powerful weapons, valuable skills, or additional funds. Storm the castle, confront its formidable bosses, and put an end to the mysterious curse before more innocent lives are lost. Ultimately, the responsibility to rid the land of Upel of its monstrous inhabitants falls upon your shoulders, and the path you choose to achieve this is entirely yours.

Name: Alan Wake
Description:
When the wife of the best-selling writer Alan Wake disappears on their vacation, his search turns up pages from a thriller he doesn’t even remember writing. A Dark Presence stalks the small town of Bright Falls, pushing Wake to the brink of sanity in his fight to unravel the mystery and save his love. Presented in the style of a TV series, Alan Wake features the trademark Remedy storytelling and pulse-pounding action sequences. As players dive deeper and deeper into the mystery, they’ll face overwhelming odds, plot twists, and cliffhangers. It’s only by mastering the Fight With Light combat mechanic that they can stay one step ahead of the darkness that spreads across Bright Falls. With the body of an action game and the mind of a psychological thriller, Alan Wake’s intense atmosphere, deep and multilayered story, and exceptionally tense combat sequences provide players with an entertaining and original gaming experience. Enhanced for the PC Includes Alan Wake Special Episodes “The Signal” and “The Writer” Experience Alan Wake’s Pacific Northwest in higher resolutions and higher fidelity than the Xbox360 version. Fully configurable mouse and keyboard support, or if you prefer to play with the Steam or Microsoft gamepad connected to your PC, you can do that too! Lots of customizable graphics settings and support for 4:3, 16:9 and 16:10 aspect ratios! Multithreaded engine that takes advantage of quad core CPUs. Additional features our fans have sought after such as field of view adjustment as well as “hide HUD”. Works with AMD Eyefinity 3D 3-screen mode.

## The Vanishing of Ethan Carter: An Immersive Mystery

**A Dual Experience Awaits**

Good news for players! Purchasing *The Vanishing of Ethan Carter* now grants you access to two distinct experiences: the original game and its enhanced Unreal Engine 4 remaster, *The Vanishing of Ethan Carter Redux*. Further details are available via a provided link.

### Unraveling the Mystery

*The Vanishing of Ethan Carter* is a first-person, story-driven mystery game that prioritizes exploration and discovery above all else. Combat and explosions are entirely absent, with the developers aiming for an experience that leaves a lasting, subtle impact.

Players step into the shoes of Paul Prospero, an occult-minded detective. Upon receiving a disturbing letter from Ethan Carter, Paul journeys to Ethan's home in Red Creek Valley, only to find the situation far more dire than anticipated. Ethan has vanished amidst a brutal murder, and Paul soon suspects this is not the only local tragedy to investigate.

### Inspired by Macabre Tales

Drawing inspiration from early twentieth-century weird fiction and other macabre tales, *The Vanishing of Ethan Carter* seeks to advance immersive storytelling in video games. While featuring a private detective and mental challenges, the game is not heavily puzzle-focused. Instead, the emphasis lies on atmosphere, mood, and the profound humanity of its characters.

### Your Role in the Investigation

The discoveries within Red Creek Valley will not unfold passively. Players must actively engage with the environment. By utilizing Paul's supernatural ability to communicate with the deceased and employing their own keen observation skills, players will uncover the truth behind a series of murders, the origins of a dark, ancient force within the valley, and the ultimate fate of the missing boy.

### Key Features

*   **Explore a Photorealistic World:** Traverse the beautiful yet ominous Red Creek Valley, brought to life with revolutionary photogrammetry technology for nearly photorealistic environments.
*   **Communicate with the Departed:** Interact with spirits to witness their final moments, gathering crucial clues to piece together Ethan's disappearance and his family's fate.
*   **Non-Linear Narrative:** Experience a story that blends the allure of pulp, private eye, and horror fiction, influenced by literary giants like Raymond Chandler, Algernon Blackwood, Stefan Grabinski, and H. P. Lovecraft.
*   **Investigate at Your Own Pace:** Conduct the investigation on your own terms and at your preferred speed.

While the game contains unsettling moments, it prioritizes a pervasive sense of unease over outright terror, ensuring players can navigate the mystery without undue distress.

Name: Creaks
Description:
Meet Your New Neighbours The ground starts shaking, light bulbs are breaking - and something rather unusual is happening right behind the walls of your very room. Equipped with nothing but wit and courage, you slowly descend into a world inhabited by avian folk and seemingly deadly furniture monsters. From the creators of indie classics Machinarium and Samorost comes Creaks, an immersive puzzle game that delights the senses with its hand-painted visuals, precise animation, eerie sounds, and an eclectic original score from Hidden Orchestra. Proceed at your own pace at figuring out the solutions to dozens of carefully designed puzzles, explore the mansion for hidden paintings and uncover the great secret. Creaks is best enjoyed with a controller and a good pair of headphones.

Name: Ghost Master®
Description:
Grim spectres, howling banshees, and sly gremlins are yours to command as you unleash ghastly spirits on the town of Gravenville and scare the wits out of its citizens. In the world of the Ghost Master, spooks do your bidding, as you solve puzzles and unlock mysteries in a challenge that combines the best of strategy, adventure, and resource management games. Up to 15 unique, hair-raising adventures with multi-branching scenarios - all within a coherent plot and complete virtual world. Spook's-eye view - an innovative 3-D camera lets you view the action from the perspective of humans or ghosts. Revolutionary special effects, incredibly detailed characters, and macabre settings inspired by classic horror films. Groundbreaking artificial intelligence-interact with up to 30 AI-driven characters at every level. Eleven expansive and distinctive locations, including the town's lunatic asylum, military base, sorority and frat houses, and police station. Ghost Master © 2003 Empire Interactive Europe Ltd. Developed by Sick Puppies, a studio of Empire Interactive. Europe Ltd. Ghost Master, Empire and 'E' are trademarks or registered trademarks of Empire Interactive. Europe Ltd. in the UK, Europe and/or other countries. All rights reserved.

Name: Deus Ex: Human Revolution - Director's Cut
Description:
You play Adam Jensen, an ex-SWAT specialist who's been handpicked to oversee the defensive needs of one of America's most experimental biotechnology firms. Your job is to safeguard company secrets, but when a black ops team breaks in and kills the very scientists you were hired to protect, everything you thought you knew about your job changes. Key Features: A divided near-future: discover a time of great technological advancement, but also a time of chaos and conspiracy. Mechanical augmentations of the human body have divided society between those who can afford them, and those who can’t. Opposing forces conspire from the shadow to control the destiny of mankind: a human revolution is coming. A perfect mix of action and role-play: the game uniquely combines action-packed close-quarters takedowns with intense shooting, offering a vast array of character augmentations and upgrades for the many weapons at your disposal. Unlock new abilities and increase your stealth, social, hacking or combat skills: the game rewards all styles of play and approaches. Determine how you want your character to evolve, based on how you want to play the game. Choices and consequences: shoot your way through the enemies, sneak up behind them without being traced, hack systems to retrieve crucial information, or use your social skills to extract information from key characters – there are always choices, multiple approaches, multiple paths and multiple tools at your disposal. Choose your playing style and face the consequences of your actions: you decide how the story unfolds in his enhanced storyline featuring the full integration of 'The Missing Link' and 'Tongs Mission'. Find more ways to defeat the new and improved Boss Fights, use the Newgame+ feature to replay the story with your previously acquired augmentations. Learn more about the game with the developers commentaries in ENGLISH ONLY and the original 'Making of'video.

Name: Deus Ex: Mankind Divided
Description:
The year is 2029, and mechanically augmented humans have now been deemed outcasts, living a life of complete and total segregation from the rest of society. Now an experienced covert operative, Adam Jensen is forced to operate in a world that has grown to despise his kind. Armed with a new arsenal of state-of-the-art weapons and augmentations, he must choose the right approach, along with who to trust, in order to unravel a vast worldwide conspiracy. Buy Deus Ex: Mankind Divided now and receive the following bonus content FREE: “Desperate Measures” extra in-game mission Covert Agent Pack (Intruder Gear, Enforcer Gear and Classic Gear + 1 Praxis Kit + 1000 Credits)

**Ashes of the Singularity: Escalation - Command Your Galactic Empire**

The technological singularity has opened the galaxy to humanity. Players command vast armies across planets, building an empire. But a new enemy threatens this hard-won control.

### The Substrate: A Galactic Menace

The Substrate seeks to destroy humanity. As a leader in the Post-Human Coalition, you must fight this threat. Rogue human factions also complicate the struggle, each claiming planets for themselves.

### Core Gameplay Elements

*   **Choose Your Side:** Play as the Post-Human Coalition or the Substrate. This choice defines your strategy.
*   **Massive Scale:** The Nitrous engine allows for huge maps and battles with thousands of units. Experience true large-scale real-time strategy.
*   **Multiple Ways to Play:**
    *   **Multiplayer:** Compete online in ranked or unranked matches.
    *   **Single Player:** Engage a smart AI in skirmishes or campaigns.
*   **Deep Strategy:** Success requires smart choices in:
    *   Researching technologies.
    *   Deploying armies on varied terrain.
    *   Managing your economy.
    *   Building effective unit forces.

The galactic war has escalated. Choose your side and fight for control. This massive RTS demands tactical skill and quick decisions.

Name: Deus Ex: Invisible War
Description:
Approximately 20 years after the events depicted in Deus Ex, The World is only beginning to recover from a Catastrophic worldwide depression. In the Chaotic period of recovery, several religious and political factions see an opportunity to re-shape a worldwide government to their agendas, understanding that the right moves now could determine the shape of human society for decades  even centuries  to come. In this techno-nightmare, take part in the dark struggle to raise the world from its own ashes. Dynamic and innovative 1st person-action/adventure brings a level of reality unprecedented in a videogame. Biotech modifications allow players to see through walls, leap 40 feet into the air, regenerate critical body damage or render yourself radar invisible. Globe-hop to real world locations such as Seattle, Antarctica, and Cairo. Cunning stealth gameplay, with darkness and sound affecting enemy awareness. Variable gameplay offers multiple solutions to problems and support for varying stylistic approaches. Non-lethal, non-violent resolution to conflict, allowing players to make ethical statements through their actions. The player's progress through the game is supported by an unprecedented freedom of action by a dynamic, non-linear story with responsive plot branches.

Name: SUPERHOT: MIND CONTROL DELETE
Description:
MIND CONTROL DELETE is █ first person shooter where time m░ves only w▒en you move. No regen▒rati░g he▀lth bars. No conv▒nie▄tly pla▒ed am▄o dr▄p█▒■ YOU SHOULDN’T BE HERE. YOU HAVE ALREADY WON. BUT THERE IS MORE. The long-awaited third game in the groundbreaking SUPERHOT franchise - MIND CONTROL DELETE gives you more insight into the world of SUPERHOT, more story, more weapons, more enemies, more purpose, more signature gameplay. Time only moves when you do. Keep dancing the slow-motion ballet of destruction for so much longer than ever before. Built on the foundations of smash-hit SUPERHOT and the best-selling SUPERHOT VR , MIND CONTROL DELETE delivers more of SUPERHOT’s signature power fantasy. Amass an arsenal of new skills and new weapons. New enemies pour in from every direction. You are in complete control as you shoot, slice, and explode your way through dozens and dozens of increasingly challenging and varied combat encounters. The closer you get to the core, the more powerful you become. Unlock new skills. Uncover snippets of precious knowledge - of the meaning that you crave so much. You begin to believe. MIND CONTROL DELETE Features: More gameplay. MCD is much bigger and longer than its predecessors. Become immersed in the SUPERHOT universe for increased understanding and extraordinary slow motion combat. More mechanics at your disposal. Experiment with new play styles, new weapons, different character builds and fresh tactics to outsmart and dominate your enemies. More bosses, enemies and characters to control. Test your arsenal of tricks and weapons against increasingly deadlier, smarter foes. More progression and power to accumulate. Amass skills, hacks and special techniques to conquer ever more dangerous enemies. More polish applied over nearly four years of Early Access development. MCD offers a more refined, sharper, flashier experience than any SUPERHOT so far. More story. More lore. More meaning? You shoot and slice. You move forward. You repeat. You repeat. You repeat. It becomes a ritual. It starts to mean something again. You take a moment to consider. You’ve been here before. So many times. Maybe this time it will actually mean something. Everything explodes into action. You hope this time will be different. Is this VR? Will this be VR? MCD is a regular, non-VR title. It’s designed for conventional screens and longer play sessions. If you played and enjoyed SUPERHOT VR, you’ll have a blast playing the original SUPERHOT and MCD as well SUPERHOT: MIND CONTROL DELETE started out life in Early Access. With many thanks to our wonderful players, Kickstarter Backers, and Early Access community, we couldn’t have done this without you, Thank you, SUPERHOT Team

Name: VA-11 Hall-A: Cyberpunk Bartender Action
Description:
VA-11 HALL-A: Cyberpunk Bartender Action is a booze em' up about waifus, technology, and post-dystopia life. In this world, corporations reign supreme, all human life is infected with nanomachines designed to oppress them, and the terrifying White Knights ensure that everyone obeys the laws. But, this is not about those people. You are a bartender at VA-11 HALL-A, affectionately nicknamed 'Valhalla.' Although it is just a small bar downtown, it attracts the most fascinating people this side of dystopia. Keep your clients lubricated and you will be made privy to the most interesting stories. --- 'Although there aren't dialogue options, VA-11 HALL-A creates a storytelling experience that's grippingly personal. If, like many game theorists argue, story should always act as a supporter to mechanics, then VA-11 HALL-A is the exception that makes the rule.' - Kill Screen 'Never falls into the trap of simply alternating “gameplay” and “story” as so many narrative-based games do; rather, everything you do feels relevant to what is unfolding in front of you.' - Moe Gamer 'It's through these brief, unguarded conversations that the cyberpunk bartending sim slowly unfolds its story; not of a dystopian world, but of the people living in it.' - PC Gamer --- Learn about daily life in the cyberpunk dystopia of Glitch City. A branching storyline where your decisions do not depend on traditional choices, but through the drinks you prepare. Visuals inspired by old Japanese adventure games for the PC-98, with a modern touch for an otherworldly experience. Get to know your clients, their tastes, and prepare the drink that will change their lives.

Name: VirtuaVerse
Description:
In a future not too far away, one Artificial Intelligence has prevailed over all other AIs and their governments. Society has migrated to a permanently integrated reality connected to a single neural network that continuously optimizes people's experiences by processing personal data. Nathan, an outsider still refusing to comply with the new system, makes a living off the grid as a smuggler of modded hardware and cracked software. Geared with his custom headset, he is among the few that can still switch AVR off and see reality for what truly is. He shares an apartment in the city with his girlfriend Jay, a talented AVR graffiti writer whose drones have been bit-spraying techno-color all over the augmented space in the city. Waking up one morning, Nathan discovers that Jay disappeared overnight, but not before leaving a cryptic message on their bathroom mirror. Having accidentally broken his custom headset, Nathan is now disconnected and determined to find out what happened to Jay, but he soon finds himself tangled up in an unexpected journey involving Jay's hacker group and a guild of AVR technomancers. Travelling around the world, he'll have to deal with hardware graveyards, digital archeology, tribes of cryptoshamans, and virtual reality debauchery.

**Phoenix Point: Lead Humanity's Last Stand Against Alien Invasion**

In Phoenix Point, a strategy game from the creator of X-COM, humanity faces its darkest hour. A relentless, mutating alien menace has overrun Earth, pushing the remnants of mankind to the brink. Your leadership is crucial for the Phoenix Project, a clandestine organization comprised of Earth's brightest minds and most courageous soldiers, to repel this invasion and reverse the tide of extinction.

### The Phoenix Project's Mission

As the leader of the Phoenix Project, your responsibilities are multifaceted:

*   **Research and Development:** Discover and implement new technologies to combat the alien threat.
*   **Global Exploration:** Traverse a ravaged planet to uncover resources and strategic locations.
*   **Base Management:** Establish and fortify bases to support your operations.
*   **Resource Allocation:** Wisely manage vital resources to sustain your efforts.
*   **Tactical Domination:** Lead your forces to victory on the battlefield.

### Navigating Factions

You are not alone in this struggle. Several distinct factions, each with their own ideologies and objectives, vie for control and survival:

*   **New Jericho:** A corporatist faction with a militaristic approach.
*   **Synedrion:** An indecisive group focused on technological advancement.
*   **Disciples of Anu:** A fanatical organization with mystical beliefs.

These factions, along with various subfactions, present both opportunities and challenges. You can engage with them through Phoenix Point's diplomacy system, employ subterfuge to acquire necessary resources, or confront them with overwhelming military force. Achieving victory will be a formidable undertaking, regardless of your chosen path.

### Evolving Threats and Deep Narrative

Phoenix Point offers a wealth of content, including over two years of updates and community-driven improvements, such as Steam Workshop support for mods. Face an ever-evolving alien threat that adapts to your strategies, ensuring no two encounters are ever the same. Delve into a complex narrative with multiple endings, requiring several playthroughs to fully uncover the secrets of the Pandoravirus and the origins of the mutants.

### Strategic Combat and Visionary Design

The game features a unique free-aiming system, allowing you to take direct control of your soldiers' shots in combat. Target enemy weak spots, critical equipment, or vital areas for maximum tactical advantage. Designed by Julian Gollop, the visionary behind the original X-COM series, Phoenix Point seamlessly blends classic strategy ethos with modern visuals and advanced systems, delivering a best-in-class experience.

Name: Gamedec
Description:
Gamedec is a single-player non-combat cyberpunk isometric RPG. You are a game detective, who solves crimes inside virtual worlds. Use your wits to gather info from your witnesses and suspects, get to the bottom of deceptive schemes, save lives, and investigate the extraordinary relationships between virtual worlds and their inhabitants. The game continually adapts to your choices and never judges – You are the sum of your choices. Welcome to Warsaw City of the 22nd century. The Tech of the future is so advanced that the term 'real' is relative and 'life' and 'death' have many meanings. Virtual worlds give rise to problems of the human nature: lust, sloth, envy, and pride. The residents of these virtual game-worlds need specialists – Gamedecs - Private Investigators with experience in those worlds who work to discover the secrets and explores mechanics hidden in those realities for the commission of your clients. You are one of them. You are a Gamedec. Gamedec emulates the nature of tabletop RPGs by focusing on character development through decision making. Gather aspects and craft your unique set of professions that will allow you to lead investigations in a way that fits your style. Discover extraordinary relationships between the virtual worlds and their inhabitants thanks to the gathered information in the codex. Like in classic tabletop RPGs, you’re given the freedom to approach situations from multiple angles rather than forcing a single solution – the choice is yours and yours alone. Gamedec General Features: Interact with NPCs to gather intel and access different dialogue options depending on your choices, developed profession and acquired knowledge. Visit numerous virtual worlds - from the deceitful farm-like environment, through dark-noir cyberpunk realities to fantasy-based realms. Use your Codex and Deduction to unscramble facts and evidence to conclude the case. Find your own answer and respond accordingly to your own ethics, integrity or just a sense of poetic justice. Shape your Character through actions that grant positive or negative effects – Determine how to you want to be perceived by the other by selecting traits, which correspond to your gameplay style. Develop your own Gamedec through your decisions, choices, and actions. Meet various characters in both Realium and Virtualium that can be friendly, or hostile – depending on your decisions throughout the game. /

Name: Warp Frontier
Description:
Vincent Cassini, decorated war hero, but still just a Captain in the police force he started, is patrolling the orbital slums of his home planet Cetus, when he stumbles across a lead in a war crime that resulted in the mysterious disappearance of thousands of Cetans, including his first wife and best friend. Captain Cassini and his robot partner MAC, must ally with morally questionable characters to stop an old enemy before their crimes are erased forever. Solve puzzles in point and click adventure style and navigate Vince’s relationships with his family, allies and enemies. The decisions you make and the order in which you undertake tasks result in varying outcomes each playthrough, potentially costing the lives of thousands. Your actions ultimately decide what type of father, partner, friend, officer and saviour Vince will be. Make decisions that affect the lives of thousands of people, and determine relationships between family and friends A 2D point and click adventure in HD 6-8 hours of gameplay with branching decisions, resulting in multiple unique ending sequences Authentic Australian feel, voiced by a predominantly Australian cast An alternate timeline of humanity branching from a catastrophic singularity event Original Soundtrack by Thomas Regin Explore space in your own ship, from the planet surface to the outer reaches of the planetary ring

## EVE Online: Your Gateway to the Ultimate Space Sandbox

EVE Online is a premier space MMO, offering a massive, single-shard universe where players forge their own destiny. With over 7,000 solar systems and nearly two decades of player-driven history, this vast expanse invites engagement in epic PvP and PvE battles, intricate mining, exploration, and industrial pursuits. As an immortal Capsuleer, you can pilot over 350 customizable starships, from agile Frigates to colossal Battleships and Freighters.

### Forge Your Path in New Eden

EVE Online offers limitless possibilities. Embark on a solo journey through wormhole space, build a powerful industrial empire, or unite with fellow players to conquer new frontiers. Your path is yours to create.

### Play Free with Alpha Clones

Experience the vast spaceship MMO for free as an Alpha Clone. This access allows piloting Frigates, Destroyers, Cruisers, Battlecruisers, and Battleships from any faction. For unlimited ship access and accelerated skill training, an upgrade to Omega Clone is available.

### A Unified Universe: The Single Shard Advantage

EVE Online operates on a single server, meaning all players share the same universe. This unique single-shard design fosters a dynamic and interconnected player experience. Every action, battle, and claimed system contributes to the rich, ongoing history of New Eden.

### Witness Gaming's Largest Battles

EVE Online holds the Guinness World Record for the largest multiplayer video game PvP battle, with 8,825 players participating in a single conflict, according to Guinness World Records. Engage in massive spaceship combat from the outset or train skills to command these epic fleets.

### A Thriving Player-Driven Economy

The game's economy is unparalleled in scale, unified by its single-shard nature. Trade on local markets, manufacture new ships and equipment, or make strategic investments informed by player politics.

### Unparalleled Customization and Choice

*   **Ship Variety:** Pilot over 350 distinct vessels.
*   **Module Customization:** Equip thousands of unique modules to tailor ship performance.
*   **Strategic Design:** Configure ships as swift fighters or heavily shielded brawlers.
*   **Abyssal Deadspace:** Enhance equipment with alien technology discovered in challenging Abyssal Deadspace environments.

### Continuously Evolving Universe

With over 17 years of active development and consistent free expansions, EVE Online remains one of the longest-running space MMOs. Join a vibrant universe shaped by the collective history and ongoing activity of millions of players.

## HITMAN 3: Your Gateway to the World of Assassination

HITMAN 3 is the ultimate platform for experiencing the complete World of Assassination trilogy. For those who have already mastered HITMAN 2 on Steam, a smooth transition is guaranteed. Purchasing HITMAN 3 automatically grants you an 'Access Pass' for the locations from HITMAN 2. These Access Pass DLCs are applied directly to your account, making all your previously unlocked locations available from the moment you launch HITMAN 3.

### Embrace the Role of Agent 47

HITMAN 3 brings the acclaimed World of Assassination trilogy to a thrilling conclusion. Step into the iconic role of Agent 47, a master assassin celebrated for his unmatched expertise. The game demands creativity and improvisation, challenging you to design and execute the most cunning and spectacular assassinations. Explore vast, open-ended sandbox environments scattered across the globe, each presenting unique avenues for stealth and strategic planning.

### Dismantle the Shadowy Providence

The narrative of HITMAN 3 follows Agent 47 as he partners with his long-lost ally, Lucas Grey. Their shared objective is to bring down the clandestine organization known as Providence. This relentless pursuit forces them to continuously evolve their tactics. As the story progresses and the conflict resolves, both Agent 47 and the world he inhabits will be irrevocably transformed.

### A Globetrotting Espionage Adventure

Embark on an exotic expedition through a variety of meticulously detailed environments. HITMAN 3 features a diverse range of meticulously crafted locations, each ripe with opportunities for emergent gameplay. These destinations include:

*   A colossal skyscraper in Dubai
*   The bustling, neon-drenched streets of Chongqing
*   The scenic vineyards of Mendoza

### Unparalleled Immersion and Replayability

Every location in HITMAN 3 is rendered with exceptional fidelity, providing players with a deeply immersive experience. The award-winning Glacier technology, developed by IO Interactive, underpins HITMAN 3's responsive and engaging game world. This technology is crucial for delivering unparalleled player freedom and fostering immense replayability, enabling countless approaches to every mission.

Name: Prison Architect
Description:
Welcome Wardens! Only the world’s most ruthless Warden can contain the world’s most ruthless inmates. Design and develop your personalized penitentiary in Prison Architect. Key Features: Customized Confinement Allocate resources to optimize your compound, but don’t restrict the flow of the crowd lest you encounter a flood, fire, fight, or full-blown riot. Invest and Innovate Tap federal money with grant applications & direct your funds to combat disease, gang activity, litigation, and more! Management and Muscle Ensure your prison is *mostly* ethical and safe with top-notch staff including armed guards, psychologists, doctors, lawyers and snitches. Detention by Design Each prisoner’s criminal history requires custom treatment programs, labor schedules, and reform workshops. Lockdown Showdown Attempt a high-stakes escape of your own supermax prison in Escape Mode, or try Online mode to test one of 12,000 player-created prisons. Expand your empire limitlessly in Sandbox mode.

Name: Recettear: An Item Shop's Tale
Description:
Recettear is the story of an item shop, the girl who lives in it, and the fairy who turned her life upside down. Recette Lemongrass finds herself in charge of an item shop built into her house, in order to pay back a loan her father took and then skipped out on - and Tear, her newfound fairy companion, won't take no for an answer! As Recette, you have to decide how you'll get your stock - either through playing the markets in town or going out into the wild with an adventuring friend and thrashing beasts until they give up the goodies - how much to sell things for, what the shop should look like, and how to best go about getting the money Tear needs to pay off the loan. If you can't come up with the money... well, hope you like living in a cardboard box. Key features: Manage all aspects of an item shop – from stock to interior design! Explore randomized dungeons – never quite the same twice! Multiple adventurers to choose from when dungeon-diving – no two play the same! Plenty to do after beating the game – challenge yourself with Survival Mode or play to your heart's delight in Endless Mode! Engaging story, localized by Carpe Fulgur – get to know the people of Pensee!

Name: The Corporate Machine
Description:
The Corporate Machine™ is Stardock's classic 2001 real-time economic strategy game, available now on Steam. Dive back into the timeless battle for one of the most ruthless environments ever created: international trade. Corporations exist in a constant state of war: Plotting to destroy their rivals, CEOs chase world domination through economic strategies less deadly but more complex than any military maneuver. Control the market, or face the prospect of buyout and bankruptcy. Build your business empire, dominate the industry, and amass a fortune you will need that private island to fully enjoy.

## Wanderlust: Playable Travel Stories

Embark on a unique literary adventure with **Wanderlust: Travel Stories**, a collection of playable novels that blend literature with interactive gaming. If you're seeking a truly different experience, this is for you.

### Diverse Travel Narratives

Wanderlust features:

*   **Four long stories**
*   **Five short stories**

Each narrative is crafted by a dedicated team of authors, offering a rich tapestry of voices. You'll embody characters like an **idealistic student**, a **jaded reporter**, or a **terrible planner**.

### Authentic Journeys

Inspired by **real events and places**, Wanderlust takes you to:

*   The **statues of Rapa Nui**
*   The **streets of Bangkok**
*   The **Antarctic**
*   The **Serengeti**

These tales are by **passionate travelers and experienced reporters**.

### Emotions as Your Compass

Your choices directly influence characters' **moods**, which in turn **colors your perception of the world**. The developers emphasize that **all emotions are valid**, including sadness and fatigue, as they are an **integral part of the human experience**.

### Immersive Aesthetic

Wanderlust uses a **tasteful aesthetic** with bespoke photography and immersive soundscapes. The minimalist presentation provides **just enough to stir your imagination**.

### The Art of Slow Gaming

Wanderlust champions **Slow Gaming**, offering a **slow-paced and meditative experience**. There's no need to rush; **take in every moment at your own pace**. Explore their **Slow Gaming Manifesto** for more.

### From Renowned Creators

This experimental playable travel documentary comes from the **creators of The Witcher, Dying Light, and Hitman**. They invite you to **join them on this journey**.

### Connect with Wanderlust

Follow Wanderlust on social media: [Facebook](link-to-facebook), [Twitter](link-to-twitter), and [Instagram](link-to-instagram).

Imagine Earth is a real-time planet simulation and build-up strategy game where players manage space colonies on distant worlds. The core gameplay revolves around exploring, populating, and developing these planets into thriving, profitable hubs on a global scale, while also engaging in interplanetary trade.

A central conflict in Imagine Earth pits the profit-driven goals of interstellar corporations against the necessity of maintaining habitable living conditions for the colonists. As your colony expands, exhaust emissions and ground pollution directly impact the global climate. Rising temperatures can lead to melting polar caps, ultimately threatening your settlements with devastating sea-level rise.

To foster growth and meet the resource demands of your burgeoning cities, you will need to construct various facilities:

*   **Production:** Build power plants, farms, and factories.
*   **Resource Extraction:** Dig for valuable ideon crystals and other minerals.
*   **Development:** Research new technologies and constructs to enhance your colony's capabilities.
*   **Management:** Pacify internal riots and strive to maximize growth while preserving a healthy ecosystem.

Players must also contend with a variety of environmental and external threats:

*   **Natural Disasters:** Prepare for asteroid strikes, twisters, wildfires, volcanic eruptions, and rising sea levels.
*   **Hostile Forces:** Defend against space raiders and aggressive alien investors.
*   **Interactions:** Coexist and trade with native populations, merchants, and rival colonies.

The game's narrative is set in 2048, a future where massive corporations have already heavily exploited Earth's resources. The discovery of ideon crystals opens up space exploration, but the underlying capitalist ethos remains. This leads to intense competition and economic warfare on newly discovered planets. Players can exploit fossil resources and minerals to expand rapidly, with additional funding available through selling colony shares. Hostile takeovers of opposing companies are also a strategic option.

Interplanetary trade is facilitated by merchants and technology traders who will purchase extracted resources and sell advanced technologies. Cooperating colonies and alien tribes also participate in this economic network.

**Key Features:**

*   **Global, Real-time Experience:** Play on dynamic, global maps rather than static grids.
*   **Campaign Mode:** A story-driven campaign across 9 distinct planets and missions.
*   **Competition Mode:** Engage in strategic gameplay against up to 5 AI factions with unique agendas.
*   **Extensive Construction:** Over 50 construct types with more than 80 individual upgrades.
*   **Diplomacy and Trade:** Interact with local colonies and space traders.
*   **Defense Systems:** Utilize tower defense mechanics with energy shields and lasers against various invaders.
*   **Research and Development:** Pursue advanced and sustainable technologies.
*   **Share Market:** Refinance your colony or execute hostile takeovers.
*   **Freeplay Mode:** Endless worlds and challenges generated by a procedural planet generator.
*   **Planet Editor:** Terraforming and customization tools for creating and sharing planets.
*   **Climate Simulation:** Experience realistic local pollution, worldwide emissions, melting polar caps, and dynamic disasters.
*   **Diverse Disasters:** Face chemical spills, oil slicks, radioactive contamination, wildfires, tornadoes, volcanoes, dying forests, growing deserts, and alien/robotic invasions.

Name: Tropico 4
Description:
The world is changing and Tropico is moving with the times - geographical powers rise and fall and the world market is dominated by new players with new demands and offers - and you, as El Presidente, face a whole new set of challenges. If you are to triumph over your naysayers you will need to gain as much support from your people as possible. Your decisions will shape the future of your nation, and more importantly, the size of your off-shore bank account. Tropico 4 expands on the gameplay of the previous game with new political additions ∼ including more superpowers to negotiate with, along with the ability to elect ministers into power to help get your more controversial policies passed. But remember to keep your friends close and your enemies closer as everyone has an agenda! Your political mettle will be thoroughly tested, as new natural disasters will have the populace clamoring for you and your cabinet to help them recover from some of the worst Mother Nature can dish out. Key Features: New campaign consisting of 20 missions on 10 new maps. 20 new buildings including Stock Exchange, Shopping mall, Aqua Park and a Mausoleum to El Presidente. Six new interactive disasters including volcanoes, droughts and tornadoes. Council of Ministers – selected citizens to ministerial posts in the government to help push through your more controversial decisions. National Agenda – receive objectives from Tropican factions, foreign geopolitical powers or opportunities relating to current island events such as ongoing disasters. Trading system – import and export goods to/from other nations to boost your economy or production.

Name: Trolley Problem, Inc.
Description:
There is a runaway trolley careering down the railway tracks. On the tracks are five people unable to move. You are next to a lever. If you pull this lever the trolley will switch to a different set of tracks. However, you notice that there is a person on the other track. Watch the situation play out and five people die. Choose to pull the lever and only one person gets killed - but by you. What will you do? And that’s just for starters. Trolley Problem, Inc. is a darkly comedic narrative game based on real world philosophical papers, in which you are asked to make a series of impossible choices from two awful answers. Wrestle with your moral compass, decide the fate of millions – and then see how your choices compare to the rest of the world. * A tightly-wound, two-hour narrative experience. * Questions are based on genuine philosophical papers, complete with references. * It’s you vs The Narrator as every decision you make is challenged. * Compare your choices with other players. * Full Twitch integration - let your audience help guide your decisions Trolley Problem, Inc. is a brilliant, challenging, uncomfortable, comedic game from Samuel Read-Graves, the executive producer of Gang Beasts. What will you do?

**Hundred Days - Winemaking Simulator: Cultivate Your Dream Winery**

Embark on a journey to establish and manage your very own winery in "Hundred Days - Winemaking Simulator." This immersive game grants you complete control over every facet of the winemaking process, from the initial planting of vines to the final sale of your exquisite creations.

**Key aspects of your winemaking empire include:**

*   **Vineyard Management:**
    *   Choose which grape varietals to cultivate, learning the optimal methods for their growth and the precise timing for harvesting.
    *   Analyze your vineyard's soil to select the grape varieties that will thrive best in those specific conditions.
    *   Organize essential vineyard tasks such as pruning and chipping.
    *   Implement targeted treatments to protect your vines from diseases.
    *   Monitor the ripeness of your grapes to determine the perfect moment for harvest.

*   **Winemaking Process:**
    *   Follow the entire winemaking process, making critical decisions about the type of wine you wish to produce, or what the market demands.
    *   Enhance the unique characteristics of your wine through careful winemaking techniques.
    *   Select the specific yeasts and bacteria crucial for the fermentation stages.
    *   Decide on the methods and duration for aging your wines.

*   **Business and Marketing:**
    *   Sell your produced wine to fuel your company's expansion and growth.
    *   Customize your wine bottles, selecting their shape, color, and other aesthetic features.
    *   Develop your sales network and tailor your product's characteristics to appeal to different customer types.
    *   Manage marketing and social media activities to elevate your company's global reputation.

As in reality, every decision you make, from the vineyard to the sales floor, will profoundly influence the quantity and quality of the wine you produce. A high-quality wine will not only boost your company's worldwide reputation but also command a higher price, enabling you to grow your business more effectively and rapidly. "Hundred Days" offers a simulative and realistic approach, making it an ideal experience for both novice winemakers and seasoned enthusiasts.

## Rise of the Tomb Raider™: 20 Year Celebration - An Expanded Adventure

The **Rise of the Tomb Raider: 20 Year Celebration** edition significantly enhances the acclaimed base game by integrating a comprehensive Season Pass. This expanded adventure offers players an even deeper dive into Lara Croft's compelling narrative and challenging world, building upon the original's foundation of exploration, combat, and puzzle-solving.

### New Story and Survival Challenges

This special edition introduces several exciting new modes and features designed to test Lara's resilience and expand her story:

*   **Blood Ties:** Explore the iconic Croft Manor and delve into its history and Lara's personal connections in this entirely new story chapter.
*   **Lara's Nightmare:** Defend Croft Manor against a terrifying zombie invasion in this thrilling new mode.
*   **Co-Op Endurance Mode:** Team up with a friend in an online cooperative mode, facing extreme environmental conditions and resource scarcity together.
*   **Extreme Survivor Difficulty:** This setting presents the ultimate challenge, pushing players' survival skills to their absolute limit.
*   **Nostalgic Content:** Don an outfit and wield a weapon inspired by *Tomb Raider III*, and unlock five classic Lara Croft skins.

### Existing DLC Expansions

The Season Pass also incorporates previously released downloadable content:

*   **Baba Yaga: The Temple of the Witch:** Venture into a new, mysterious tomb harboring an ancient terror.
*   **Cold Darkness Awakened:** Face relentless waves of infected predators in this challenging combat scenario.

### Core Gameplay Pillars

At its heart, "Rise of the Tomb Raider" is defined by Lara's personal journey and her struggle against human adversaries and the unforgiving natural world.

#### Lara's Unfolding Mystery

Lara Croft embarks on a perilous quest to uncover an ancient mystery, drawing the attention of the dangerous organization Trinity. Racing against time, Lara's investigation leads her to a myth surrounding the Lost City of Kitezh. Driven by the urgent need to secure its hidden secrets, Lara sets off for Siberia.

#### Woman vs. Wild

Lara faces not only human enemies but also the brutal forces of nature. Players will need to hunt animals for crafting, scavenge for rare resources, and navigate treacherous environments.

#### Guerilla Combat Tactics

The game emphasizes strategic combat. Players can utilize the environment, configure Lara's gear and weapons, craft explosives, and wield her signature bows and climbing axe.

#### The Return of Tomb Raiding

Tomb raiding is a central focus, with tombs presented as larger and more intricate than ever before. Players will explore vast ancient spaces filled with deadly traps, solve complex environmental puzzles, and decipher ancient texts to uncover a world brimming with secrets.

Name: Tomb Raider
Description:
Tomb Raider explores the intense and gritty origin story of Lara Croft and her ascent from a young woman to a hardened survivor. Armed only with raw instincts and the ability to push beyond the limits of human endurance, Lara must fight to unravel the dark history of a forgotten island to escape its relentless hold. Download the Turning Point trailer to see the beginning of Lara’s epic adventure. KEY FEATURES: A Turning Point: Experience Lara Croft’s intense origin story from a young woman to a hardened survivor. An All-New Raiding Experience: Explore a mysterious island filled with environmental puzzles, visceral combat, and tombs to discover. Fight to Live: Salvage resources, gain experience, and upgrade Lara’s weapons and tools to survive the island’s hostile inhabitants. Survive as a Team: Play a variety of multiplayer modes as Lara’s Shipmates or Yamatai’s Scavengers.

Name: Resident Evil 5
Description:
Story The Umbrella Corporation and its crop of lethal viruses have been destroyed and contained. But a new, more dangerous threat has emerged. Years after surviving the events in Raccoon City, Chris Redfield has been fighting the scourge of bio-organic weapons all over the world. Now a member of the Bioterrorism Security Assessment Alliance (BSAA), Chris is sent to Africa to investigate a biological agent that is transforming the populace into aggressive and disturbing creatures. Joined by another local BSAA agent, Sheva Alomar, the two must work together to solve the truth behind the disturbing turn of events. Content Description This game is a port of the Games for Windows - Live version that was released in 2009. If you buy the Untold Stories Bundle here on Steam, it will be the same as upgrading to Resident Evil 5 Gold Edition. NOTE Does not support NVIDIA GeForce 3D Vision which came with the original Games for Windows - Live version. If you have previously purchased the Games For Windows Live version of Resident Evil 5, you can redeem a free copy of the Steam version. Please check the below information for details. Steamworks Migration FAQ /

Name: The Wolf Among Us
Description:
From the makers of the 2012 Game of the Year: The Walking Dead, comes a gritty, violent and mature thriller based on the award-winning Fables comic books (DC Comics/Vertigo). As Bigby Wolf - THE big bad wolf - you will discover that a brutal, bloody murder is just a taste of things to come in a game series where your every decision can have enormous consequences. An evolution of Telltale's ground-breaking choice and consequence game mechanics will ensure the player learns that even as Bigby Wolf, Sheriff of Fabletown, life in the big bad city is bloody, terrifying and dangerous.
