Over a season of content spanning across 5 episodes: Episode 1: Faith - Available Now Episode 2: Smoke and Mirrors - Available Now Episode 3: A Crooked Mile - Available Now Episode 4: In Sheep's Clothing - Available Now Episode 5: Cry Wolf - Available Now Key Features From the team that brought you 2012 Game of the Year, The Walking Dead Based on the Eisner Award-winning Fables comic book series Now, it’s not only WHAT you choose to do that will affect your story, but WHEN you choose to do it A mature and gritty take on characters from fairytales, legends and folklore who have escaped into our world A perfect place to begin your Fables journey, even if you’ve not read the comics; this game is set before the events seen in the first issue

Name: The Walking Dead
Description:
The Walking Dead is a five-part game series set in the same universe as Robert Kirkman’s award-winning comic book series. Play as Lee Everett, a convicted criminal, who has been given a second chance at life in a world devastated by the undead. With corpses returning to life and survivors stopping at nothing to maintain their own safety, protecting an orphaned girl named Clementine may offer him redemption in a world gone to hell. Based on Robert Kirkman’s Eisner-Award winning comic book series, The Walking Dead allows gamers to experience the true horror of the zombie apocalypse. A tailored game experience: live with the profound and lasting consequences of the decisions that you make in each episode. Your actions and choices will affect how your story plays out across the entire series. You’ll be forced to make decisions that are not only difficult, but that will require you to make an almost immediate choice. There’s no time to ponder when the undead are pounding the door down!

Name: Broken Sword 3 - the Sleeping Dragon
Description:
An ancient conspiracy. A broken code. An unsolved murder. Welcome to Broken Sword – The Sleeping Dragon, the multi BAFTA-nominated adventure. Once more George and Nico must travel the world, wrestling danger, and piecing together the clues that will unravel the secrets of the Sleeping Dragon. Powerful seismic events are shaking the world. Something sinister is emerging. An Ancient Conspiracy, the Secret of the Templars, and a fiendish source of pure Evil are responsible. The death of a back bedroom computer hacker in Paris is just the beginning of another extraordinary adventure for George Stobbart and Nico Collard. Welcome to the world of Broken Sword. Key Features: Includes breathtaking 3D graphics A powerful and unique interface Submerge yourself into Broken Sword universe with The Sleeping Dragon’s unique visual style.

Name: Rainbow Billy: The Curse of the Leviathan
Description:
HEROES COME IN ALL COLORS. Rainbow Billy: The Curse of the Leviathan is a wholesome, creature capture, 2.5D Adventure-Puzzle-Platformer with over 30 hours of gameplay! It is a family-friendly, openly accessible, RPG-infused adventure in which you must save whimsical creatures by bringing back color to the world you once knew! Rainbow Billy tells a universal coming of age story about dealing with changes in the world and accepting ourselves and the others around us! Sometimes it only takes a conversation, empathy, and a new point of view to make a world of a difference. EXPLORE A WONDROUS, EXPANSIVE WORLD! Play over 30 hours of gameplay with dark caverns on secret islands to hidden coves off in the stormy seas. Explore a rich world filled with 85+ islands and caves, treasure, fish (because every great game has a fishing minigame!), friendship and... danger! BEFRIEND CURIOUS CREATURES! Collect over 60 strange, lovable creatures and help them with their problems in non-violent encounters! Create your own unique team to save the day! SOLVE ENVIRONMENTAL PUZZLES! Each world is filled with clever challenges and secrets that unlock new areas to explore! RECOLOR THE WORLD! Restore color to a monochrome world and help your friends find the courage to be their true selves in a story about empathy and growth.

Name: The Walking Dead: Season Two
Description:
The Walking Dead: Season Two continues the story of Clementine, a young girl orphaned by the undead apocalypse. Left to fend for herself, she has been forced to learn how to survive in a world gone mad. Many months have passed since the events seen in Season One of The Walking Dead, and Clementine is searching for safety. But what can an ordinary child do to stay alive when the living can be just as bad – and sometimes worse – than the dead? As Clementine, you will be tested by situations and dilemmas that will test your morals and your instinct for survival. Your decisions and actions will change the story around you, in this sequel to 2012’s Game of the Year. Decisions you made in Season One and in 400 Days will affect your story in Season Two Based on Robert Kirkman’s award-winning comic books Play as Clementine, an orphaned girl forced to grow up fast by the world around her

Name: Batman: The Enemy Within - The Telltale Series
Description:
In this latest chapter from the award-winning studio behind Batman - The Telltale Series, both Bruce Wayne and Batman will be forced into precarious new roles. The Riddler has returned to terrorize Gotham City, but his gruesome puzzles merely foreshadow an even greater crisis. With the arrival of a ruthless federal agent and the return of a still nascent Joker, Batman must navigate uneasy alliances while Bruce Wayne undertakes a perilous series of deceptions. Which of Batman’s new allies will you choose to trust? And how deep into the darkness will you let Bruce descend? Includes access to all five episodes (available now!) in this all-new season from the award-winning studio, Telltale Games.

Name: Resident Evil 4
Description:
In resident evil 4 , special agent Leon S. Kennedy is sent on a mission to rescue the U.S. President’s daughter who has been kidnapped. Finding his way to a rural village in Europe, he faces new threats that are a departure from the traditional lumbering zombie enemies of the earlier instalments in the series. Leon battles horrific new creatures infested by a new threat called Las Plagas and faces off against an aggressive group of enemies including mind-controlled villagers that are tied to Los Illuminados, the mysterious cult which is behind the abduction. Key Features Stunning HD running at a smooth 60 frames per second for the first time. A complete visual overhaul has been performed to bring this revered title to the highest graphical quality ever. Fully optimized for the wide screen, texts have been sharpened and textures have been upgraded on characters, backgrounds and in-game objects. Steam platform support with Steam Achievements, Steam Cloud, Steam Trading Cards, global leaderboards, and full game controller support. Native keyboard and mouse support with customizable key binding, mouse sensitivity, and mouse acceleration settings. This new PC version will include everything from the prior iterations including subtitle support in English, French, Italian, German, and Spanish as well as previously released bonus content such as the Separate Ways epilogue.

Name: Persona 5 Royal
Description:
Prepare for the award-winning RPG experience in this definitive edition of Persona 5 Royal, featuring a treasure trove of downloadable content included! Forced to transfer to a high school in Tokyo, the protagonist has a strange dream. “You truly are a prisoner of fate. In the near future, ruin awaits you.” With the goal of “rehabilitation” looming overhead, he must save others from distorted desires by donning the mask of a Phantom Thief. Key Features: Explore Tokyo, unlock Personas, customize your own personal Thieves Den, experience alternate endings, and more Become the ultimate Phantom Thief and defy conventions, discover the power within, and fight for justice in the definitive version of Persona 5 Royal Includes over 40 items of previously released downloadable content Choose between Japanese and English VO

Name: Portal 2
Description:
Portal 2 draws from the award-winning formula of innovative gameplay, story, and music that earned the original Portal over 70 industry accolades and created a cult following. The single-player portion of Portal 2 introduces a cast of dynamic new characters, a host of fresh puzzle elements, and a much larger set of devious test chambers. Players will explore never-before-seen areas of the Aperture Science Labs and be reunited with GLaDOS, the occasionally murderous computer companion who guided them through the original game. The game’s two-player cooperative mode features its own entirely separate campaign with a unique story, test chambers, and two new player characters. This new mode forces players to reconsider everything they thought they knew about portals. Success will require them to not just act cooperatively, but to think cooperatively. Product Features Extensive single player: Featuring next generation gameplay and a wildly-engrossing story. Complete two-person co-op: Multiplayer game featuring its own dedicated story, characters, and gameplay. Advanced physics: Allows for the creation of a whole new range of interesting challenges, producing a much larger but not harder game. Original music. Massive sequel: The original Portal was named 2007's Game of the Year by over 30 publications worldwide. Editing Tools: Portal 2 editing tools will be included.

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
Description:
With over 6 million units sold and unprecedented critical acclaim from fans and press around the world, Sid Meier's Civilization is recognized as one of the greatest PC game franchises of all-time. Now, Sid Meier and Firaxis Games will take this incredibly fun and addictive game to new heights by adding new ways to play and win, new tools to manage and expand your civilization, all-new easy to use mod capabilities and intense multiplayer modes and options*. Civilization IV will come to life like never before in a beautifully detailed, living 3D world that will elevate the gameplay experience to a whole new level. Civilization IV has already been heralded as one of the top ten games of 2005, and a must-have for gamers around the globe! *Mac version's Online Multiplayer is no longer supported.

## Divinity: Original Sin - Enhanced Edition: A Revamped RPG Classic

Divinity: Original Sin - Enhanced Edition revitalizes the classic RPG experience, offering a comprehensive overhaul with thousands of improvements designed to captivate a broad spectrum of players. This enhanced version invites you to embark on an epic journey, reminiscent of the golden age of role-playing games.

At its core, the game immerses players in a rich, reactive world where strategic turn-based combat and meaningful companion interactions are paramount. As a young Source Hunter, your mission to combat the misuse of dark magic quickly spirals into a grand conspiracy threatening the very fabric of time.

The "Enhanced Edition" designation is thoroughly deserved, featuring:

*   **Full voiceovers** for a more immersive narrative.
*   **New game modes** that introduce fresh challenges and enhance replayability.
*   **Hours of revised story content**, including a **brand-new ending**.
*   **New weapon styles, skills, puzzles, and enemies**.
*   **Improved loot and balancing**.

Divinity: Original Sin - Enhanced Edition caters to diverse playstyles through its distinct game modes:

*   **Explorer Mode:** Prioritizes the story-focused RPG experience.
*   **Classic Mode:** Appeals to those who appreciate the original game's balance.
*   **Tactician Mode:** Presents a significant challenge for hardcore players with reworked encounters and smarter enemy AI.
*   **Honour Mode:** Offers the ultimate test for tactical geniuses with a single, unforgiving playthrough.

The game champions unparalleled freedom, allowing players to manipulate the environment and combine skills and spells in creative ways. For instance, players can transform ice into water, boil it to create steam, and then electrify the steam to stun enemies. This level of environmental interaction is a hallmark of the Divinity series.

Players can also team up in co-op multiplayer, either online or via split-screen, to unravel a deep and epic story. The classless character creation system empowers players to design their ideal character, while the extensive item interaction and combinations elevate exploration and experimentation. As one developer stated, "We wanted to give players the tools to truly shape their own adventure."

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
Description:
With over 6 million units sold and unprecedented critical acclaim from fans and press around the world, Sid Meier's Civilization is recognized as one of the greatest PC game franchises of all-time. Now, Sid Meier and Firaxis Games will take this incredibly fun and addictive game to new heights by adding new ways to play and win, new tools to manage and expand your civilization, all-new easy to use mod capabilities and intense multiplayer modes and options*. Civilization IV will come to life like never before in a beautifully detailed, living 3D world that will elevate the gameplay experience to a whole new level. Civilization IV has already been heralded as one of the top ten games of 2005, and a must-have for gamers around the globe! *Mac version's Online Multiplayer is no longer supported.

**Divinity: Original Sin 2 - Definitive Edition: Forge Your Divine Path**

The Divine is dead, and the encroaching Void threatens all of existence. Within you lie dormant powers, poised to awaken and shape the destiny of Rivellon. The battle for Divinity has commenced, demanding wise choices and cautious trust, as darkness resides in every heart. Who will you become in this new era of Divinity?

**Your Divine Identity:**

*   **Choose your race:** Will you be a flesh-eating Elf, an Imperial Lizard, or an Undead, resurrected from the grave?
*   **Experience unique reactions:** Discover how the world responds differently based on your chosen race and origin.
*   **Select from origin characters:** Embark on quests with 6 unique origin characters, each possessing their own rich backgrounds.
*   **Create your own hero:** Alternatively, craft your own character as a Human, Lizard, Elf, Dwarf, or Undead.

Every decision carries weight, and the world of Rivellon offers unparalleled freedom for exploration and experimentation. Go anywhere, converse with anyone, and interact with everything. As noted by Larian Studios, the developers, you can even eliminate NPCs without hindering your progress and converse with every animal, as ghosts may also hold hidden secrets.

**Revolutionary Turn-Based Combat:**

Prepare for the next generation of tactical combat. As highlighted in game reviews, players can unleash devastating elemental combinations and leverage environmental advantages, including height, to secure victory. Master over 200 skills across 12 distinct skill schools. However, be warned: the game's AI 2.0 is designed to be exceptionally challenging.

**Unleash Your Imagination:**

*   **Cooperative Play:** Explore the vast and intricate world of Rivellon alone or with a party of up to 4 players in a seamless drop-in/drop-out cooperative experience.
*   **Multiplayer Options:** Engage in online multiplayer or local split-screen with full controller support for up to 4 players.
*   **Game Master Mode:** Elevate your adventures by crafting your own narratives and campaigns within the Game Master Mode.
*   **Community Content:** Download fan-made campaigns and mods directly from the Steam Workshop.
*   **Visual Fidelity:** Experience an ultimate 4K visual journey that propels RPGs into a new era.

**Company of Heroes Legacy Edition: Your Entry Point to WWII Real-Time Strategy**

The Company of Heroes Legacy Edition serves as your gateway to the latest iteration of this acclaimed World War II real-time strategy (RTS) game, now simply titled 'Company of Heroes,' accessible through your Steam library. For optimal online play and to fully engage with the thriving COH1 Steam Community and its extensive Modding scene, it is highly recommended to utilize the updated version. Additional resources and avenues for community interaction can be discovered via the COH1 Community Hub and the COH1 Steam Workshop.

### A Visceral World War II Experience

Company of Heroes offers a deeply immersive and visceral World War II gaming experience. It revolutionized the RTS genre by vividly depicting the sacrifices of its soldiers, the devastating impact of war on environments, and the dynamic nature of battlefield combat. The game's narrative begins with the pivotal D-Day Invasion of Normandy. Here, players assume command of Allied soldier squads, facing off against the formidable German war machine and progressing through some of World War II's most critical engagements.

### The Single-Player Campaign

The game features a compelling single-player campaign designed to draw players into the cinematic intensity and the sheer bravery of ordinary soldiers confronting extraordinary circumstances. This narrative experience captures the profound turmoil of World War II with an unprecedented level of detail.

### Core Gameplay Mechanics

Company of Heroes distinguishes itself through several key features that define its strategic depth:

*   **Intelligent Squad AI:** Soldiers are brought to life with advanced artificial intelligence. They dynamically react to their surroundings, seeking cover and executing sophisticated squad tactics to overcome enemy forces.
*   **Cutting-Edge Visuals:** Developed using Relic's advanced, next-generation engine, the game delivers exceptional graphic quality and a physics-driven world. This set a new benchmark for RTS titles upon its release.
*   **Environmental Strategy:** The integration of real-time physics and a fully destructible environment ensures that every battle unfolds with unique challenges. Players possess the ability to destroy virtually any element on the map, allowing them to reshape the battlefield to their strategic advantage. Effective utilization of buildings and terrain is paramount for success, providing crucial cover or denying vital resources to the enemy.
*   **Robust Multiplayer:** Players can participate in competitive multiplayer matches for 2-8 players, either via LAN or over the internet. These engagements offer the ultimate strategic showdown between Axis and Allied forces.

## Company of Heroes: A Groundbreaking WWII Real-Time Strategy Experience

Company of Heroes delivers a visceral and immersive World War II gaming experience, fundamentally redefining the real-time strategy (RTS) genre. It brings to life the sacrifice of heroic soldiers, the devastation of war-torn environments, and the dynamism of intense battlefields. This acclaimed title plunges players into the heart of pivotal WWII conflicts, beginning with the iconic D-Day invasion of Normandy.

### Lead Allied Forces Through Pivotal WWII Battles

In Company of Heroes, you will command squads of Allied soldiers, pitting them against the formidable German war machine. The game's rich single-player campaign allows players to experience the cinematic intensity and profound bravery of ordinary soldiers thrust into extraordinary and harrowing events. This narrative-driven experience captures the turmoil of WWII with unprecedented depth and realism.

### Advanced AI and Environmental Interaction

The game's advanced squad AI breathes life into your soldiers. They dynamically interact with the ever-changing environment, instinctively seeking cover and executing sophisticated squad tactics to overcome enemy opposition. This intelligent AI ensures that each engagement feels organic and challenging.

### Stunning Visuals and a Destructible World

Powered by Relic's cutting-edge, next-generation engine, Company of Heroes boasts graphic quality and a physics-driven world that was unprecedented for its time in the RTS genre. The environmental strategy is a key component, with real-time physics and a completely destructible environment guaranteeing that no two battles will ever unfold in precisely the same way. Players can destroy virtually anything, reshaping the battlefield to their strategic advantage. Utilize buildings and terrain for cover and tactical superiority, or deny these crucial elements to your adversaries.

### Engage in Multiplayer Competition

For those seeking a competitive edge, Company of Heroes offers robust multiplayer options for 2-8 players via LAN or the internet. Go online with friends and join the ultimate battle of Axis versus Allies, testing your strategic prowess against other players in thrilling online skirmishes.

***

**DISCLAIMER:** For additional user reviews and information, please visit the 'Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition' page. Total conversions available on Steam for COH1 are also listed on the Legacy Edition page.

## Dwarf Fortress: Master a Deeply Simulated World

Dwarf Fortress offers an unparalleled simulation. It crafts an entire world with endless gameplay. Updated since 2003, its Steam release boasts better graphics and accessible tutorials. This legendary title is now easier to dive into.

### Forge Your Fortress, Manage Your Dwarves

Generate a unique world. Guide a colony of dwarves as they mine, build, and face their demise. Dwarf Fortress is a complex construction, management, and roguelike simulation. Steer your colony through threats of starvation, dragonfire, and madness. Dwarves have simulated personalities and intricate relationships. Watch out for treacherous aquifers and ravenous beasts. Witness the rise and fall of your civilization. Learn from every setback.

### Unrivaled Depth and Simulation

The game's combat model is detailed. It includes dwarf proficiencies, anatomical damage, material properties, aimed attacks, and wrestling. It also features pain, nausea, and poison impacts.

World generation is profound, featuring:

*   Hundreds of diverse creatures, many unique per world.
*   Generated culture, including poetry, music, and dances.
*   Dynamic weather tracking wind, humidity, and air masses for storms.
*   Geological detail with over two hundred rock and mineral types.

### Enhanced Presentation and Accessibility

The Steam edition has a new pixel art tileset. It includes a 15-track soundtrack in the Dwarvish language. Improved in-game tutorials guide new players. Learn to build your first fort and maintain dwarf happiness.

### The Dwarf Fortress Experience

Command your dwarves as they seek wealth. Ensure they have food and beer. Guide them through surviving attacks, wilderness perils, or reanimated dead.

Key management tasks include:

*   Crafting treasures.
*   Establishing nobility.
*   Monitoring dwarf morale.
*   Managing water for farming or magma disasters.
*   Observing cultural development through taverns and libraries.

Dwarf Fortress inspired titles like RimWorld and Minecraft. Developed by Tarn and Zach Adams, the game aims to simulate all of existence. Bay 12 Games estimates they are 44% complete. Remember: Losing is fun!

Name: Rome: Total War™ - Collection
Description:
Once the Roman Empire is under your command, don't lay down your sword just yet - the Barbarians are coming. With two award-winning titles from the esteemed Total War series, you'll have twice as many obstacles and opportunities to control and conquer the greatest empire ever known to man. The Collection Edition includes: Rome: Total War Guide one of three noble Roman families on a century spanning quest to seize control of the Roman Empire. Rome: Total War - Barbarian Invasion (official expansion pack to Rome: Total War) Witness the decline of Rome as Barbarian hordes attack, forcing a bitter internal struggle between rival factions. Voted 2004 Best Strategy game by IGN, GameSpy and GameSpot. Fight alongside or against history's greatest leaders such as Julius Caesar, Spartacus, and Hannibal to expand or destroy the Roman Empire. Lay siege against the Romans as Attila the Hun, fearful Saxons, or other savage factions using signature weapons and abilities. Command warrior-tested legions in cinematic epic battles with thousands of soldiers on-screen at once. A century-spanning campaign charges players with strategically managing the economic, civil, religious and military arms of their empire.

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
Description:
With over 6 million units sold and unprecedented critical acclaim from fans and press around the world, Sid Meier's Civilization is recognized as one of the greatest PC game franchises of all-time. Now, Sid Meier and Firaxis Games will take this incredibly fun and addictive game to new heights by adding new ways to play and win, new tools to manage and expand your civilization, all-new easy to use mod capabilities and intense multiplayer modes and options*. Civilization IV will come to life like never before in a beautifully detailed, living 3D world that will elevate the gameplay experience to a whole new level. Civilization IV has already been heralded as one of the top ten games of 2005, and a must-have for gamers around the globe! *Mac version's Online Multiplayer is no longer supported.

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
Description:
With over 6 million units sold and unprecedented critical acclaim from fans and press around the world, Sid Meier's Civilization is recognized as one of the greatest PC game franchises of all-time. Now, Sid Meier and Firaxis Games will take this incredibly fun and addictive game to new heights by adding new ways to play and win, new tools to manage and expand your civilization, all-new easy to use mod capabilities and intense multiplayer modes and options*. Civilization IV will come to life like never before in a beautifully detailed, living 3D world that will elevate the gameplay experience to a whole new level. Civilization IV has already been heralded as one of the top ten games of 2005, and a must-have for gamers around the globe! *Mac version's Online Multiplayer is no longer supported.

## Divinity: Original Sin 2 - Definitive Edition: A World of Unparalleled Choice

Embark on an epic journey in Divinity: Original Sin 2 - Definitive Edition, a game where the Divine has perished, the Void looms, and dormant powers within you are poised to awaken. The struggle for Divinity has commenced, demanding wise choices and cautious trust, as darkness resides in every heart. This critically acclaimed RPG invites you to define your identity in a world that dynamically responds to your every decision.

### Forge Your Unique Hero

The game offers unparalleled freedom in character creation, allowing you to shape your destiny:

*   **Origin Characters:** Choose from six distinct origin characters, each boasting unique backgrounds and personal quests that weave into the main narrative.
*   **Custom Races:** Alternatively, forge your own path as a Human, Lizard, Elf, Dwarf, or even an Undead resurrected from the grave.
*   **Consequential Choices:** Every decision you make, from dialogue to actions, carries significant consequences, shaping your narrative and the world around you.

### Experience Unrivaled Freedom and Tactical Combat

Divinity: Original Sin 2 - Definitive Edition is renowned for its deep gameplay systems and player agency:

*   **Explore and Experiment:** Venture anywhere, converse with anyone, and interact with every element of the world without limitations. You can even eliminate NPCs without hindering your progress.
*   **Master Elemental Combat:** Engage in deep, tactical, turn-based battles. Unleash devastating elemental combinations and strategically utilize environmental advantages, including height.
*   **Vast Skill System:** Master over 200 skills across 12 distinct skill schools, allowing for intricate and creative combat strategies.
*   **Challenging AI:** Be vigilant, as the advanced AI 2.0 presents a formidable challenge, adapting to your tactics.

### Dive into Cooperative Adventures and Expanded Content

Share the rich world of Rivellon with friends or explore new creative avenues:

*   **Cooperative Multiplayer:** Experience the vast and intricate world solo or with a party of up to four players. Enjoy seamless drop-in/drop-out cooperative play, both online and in local split-screen with full controller support.
*   **New Modes:** Beyond the main campaign, discover new challenges in the brand-new PvP and Game Master modes.
*   **Create Your Own Stories:** In Game Master Mode, craft your own narratives and adventures, becoming the architect of your own RPG experiences.
*   **Community Content:** Access a wealth of fan-made campaigns and mods through the Steam Workshop, ensuring endless replayability.

### Immerse Yourself in Stunning Visuals

Divinity: Original Sin 2 - Definitive Edition delivers an ultimate 4K experience, elevating the RPG genre with breathtaking visual fidelity.

Name: Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition
Description:
DISCLAIMER This legacy version of COH1 will also give you access to the latest updated version of COH1 - simply called 'Company of Heroes' in your Steam library. PLEASE USE THE LATTER TO PLAY ONLINE , and visit the associated pages to join the COH1 Steam Community & Modding scene: COH1 Community Hub COH1 Steam Workshop DESCRIPTION Delivering a visceral WWII gaming experience, Company of Heroes redefines real time strategy gaming by bringing the sacrifice of heroic soldiers, war-ravaged environments, and dynamic battlefields to life. Beginning with the D-Day Invasion of Normandy, players lead squads of Allied soldiers into battle against the German war machine through some of the most pivotal battles of WWII. Through a rich single player campaign, players experience the cinematic intensity and bravery of ordinary soldiers thrust into extraordinary events. A Cinematic Single Player Experience that captures the turmoil of WWII as never before. Advanced squad AI brings your soldiers to life as they interact with the changing environment, take cover, and execute advanced squad tactics to eliminate all enemy opposition. Stunning Visuals - Relic's next generation cutting-edge engine provides graphic quality and a physics driven world that is unprecedented in an RTS. Environmental Strategy - Real-time physics and a completely destructible environment guarantee no two battles ever play out in the same way. Destroy anything and re-shape the battlefield! Use buildings and terrain to your advantage, or deny them to the enemy. 2-8 Player Multiplayer Competition via LAN or Internet - Go online with friends and join the ultimate battle of Axis versus Allies.

## Company of Heroes: A Groundbreaking WWII Real-Time Strategy Experience

For those seeking additional user reviews or information on total conversions for the original *Company of Heroes* (COH1), please visit the 'Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition' page on Steam.

### Immerse Yourself in the Chaos of World War II

*Company of Heroes* delivers a visceral and unforgettable World War II gaming experience, fundamentally redefining the real-time strategy (RTS) genre. This title brings to life the sacrifice of heroic soldiers, the devastation of war-ravaged environments, and the dynamism of intense battlefields.

### A Cinematic Single-Player Campaign

The game begins with the pivotal D-Day Invasion of Normandy. Players take command of Allied soldier squads, leading them into fierce combat against the formidable German war machine. You will navigate through some of the most crucial and defining battles of World War II. Through a rich and engaging single-player campaign, players will experience the cinematic intensity and profound bravery of ordinary soldiers thrust into extraordinary and harrowing events. This campaign captures the turmoil of WWII with an unprecedented level of detail and emotional impact.

### Advanced Squad AI and Environmental Strategy

*Company of Heroes* features advanced squad artificial intelligence that breathes life into your soldiers. They dynamically interact with the ever-changing environment, instinctively seeking cover and executing sophisticated squad tactics to overcome enemy opposition.

The game boasts stunning visuals, powered by Relic's next-generation, cutting-edge engine. This technology provides graphic quality and a physics-driven world that is truly unprecedented in the RTS genre. Environmental strategy is paramount; real-time physics and a completely destructible environment ensure that no two battles will ever unfold in precisely the same way. Players can destroy virtually anything, allowing them to actively re-shape the battlefield. Utilize buildings and terrain to your strategic advantage, or deny these crucial elements to your enemy.

### Engage in Multiplayer Competition

For those seeking a competitive edge, *Company of Heroes* offers 2-8 player multiplayer competition via LAN or the internet. Go online with friends and join the ultimate battle of Axis versus Allies, testing your strategic prowess against other players in thrilling real-time engagements.

## Dwarf Fortress: A Deep Dive into Simulated Worlds

Dwarf Fortress offers an incredibly detailed and complex gaming experience, with each generated world presenting unique challenges. Since its 2003 debut, this title has been a benchmark for deep simulation.

### Core Gameplay: Managing Your Dwarven Colony

Players manage a group of dwarves, tasked with mining, building, and survival. The game simulates many elements, including:

*   **Civilizations:** Witness the rise and fall of societies with their own histories.
*   **Individual Dwarves:** Each dwarf has unique personalities and moods.
*   **Diverse Lifeforms:** Encounter numerous animals, monsters, and cultural groups.
*   **Weather Systems:** Experience dynamic weather driven by simulated atmospheric conditions.
*   **Complex Geology:** Explore worlds with over two hundred rock and mineral types.

### Enhanced Experience for Newcomers

The recent Steam edition improves accessibility with:

*   **Integrated Tutorials:** Guides help players learn fortress construction and dwarf management.
*   **Visually Rich Graphics:** A new tileset offers a more appealing visual presentation.
*   **Original Musical Score:** Immerse yourself with a 15-track soundtrack.

### Unparalleled Simulation Depth

The combat system is highly detailed, accounting for:

*   Individual skills and body parts.
*   Material properties.
*   Combat maneuvers like grappling.
*   The effects of pain and poisons.

World generation is also a feat, creating not only landscapes but also:

*   Randomly generated poetry, music, and dances, adding cultural depth.

### A Groundbreaking Legacy

Dwarf Fortress has inspired games like RimWorld and Minecraft. It was acquired by the Museum of Modern Art, recognizing its innovation. Creators Tarn and Zach Adams aim to simulate all of existence, estimating they are 44% complete. The game's philosophy, "Losing is fun!", captures its challenging yet rewarding nature.

Name: Rome: Total War™ - Collection
Description:
Once the Roman Empire is under your command, don't lay down your sword just yet - the Barbarians are coming. With two award-winning titles from the esteemed Total War series, you'll have twice as many obstacles and opportunities to control and conquer the greatest empire ever known to man. The Collection Edition includes: Rome: Total War Guide one of three noble Roman families on a century spanning quest to seize control of the Roman Empire. Rome: Total War - Barbarian Invasion (official expansion pack to Rome: Total War) Witness the decline of Rome as Barbarian hordes attack, forcing a bitter internal struggle between rival factions. Voted 2004 Best Strategy game by IGN, GameSpy and GameSpot. Fight alongside or against history's greatest leaders such as Julius Caesar, Spartacus, and Hannibal to expand or destroy the Roman Empire. Lay siege against the Romans as Attila the Hun, fearful Saxons, or other savage factions using signature weapons and abilities. Command warrior-tested legions in cinematic epic battles with thousands of soldiers on-screen at once. A century-spanning campaign charges players with strategically managing the economic, civil, religious and military arms of their empire.

Name: Team Fortress 2
Description:
The most fun you can have online - PC Gamer Is now FREE! There’s no catch! Play as much as you want, as long as you like! The most highly-rated free game of all time! One of the most popular online action games of all time, Team Fortress 2 delivers constant free updates—new game modes, maps, equipment and, most importantly, hats. Nine distinct classes provide a broad range of tactical abilities and personalities, and lend themselves to a variety of player skills. New to TF? Don’t sweat it! No matter what your style and experience, we’ve got a character for you. Detailed training and offline practice modes will help you hone your skills before jumping into one of TF2’s many game modes, including Capture the Flag, Control Point, Payload, Arena, King of the Hill and more. Make a character your own! There are hundreds of weapons, hats and more to collect, craft, buy and trade. Tweak your favorite class to suit your gameplay style and personal taste. You don’t need to pay to win—virtually all of the items in the Mann Co. Store can also be found in-game.

Name: Tom Clancy's Splinter Cell Chaos Theory®
Description:
The year is 2008. Citywide blackouts ... stock exchange sabotage ... electronic hijacking of national defense systems ... this is information warfare. To prevent these attacks, operatives must infiltrate deep into hostile territory and aggressively collect critical intelligence, closer than ever to enemy soldiers. You are Sam Fisher, the NSA's most elite black-ops agent. To achieve your mission you will kill from close range, attack with your combat knife, shoot with the prototype Land Warrior rifle, and use radical suppression techniques such as the inverted neck break. Also take on cooperative multiplayer infiltration missions, where teamwork is the ultimate weapon. As the enemy evolves, so must you. Deadly agility - Incredibly complete and fluid variety of moves including athletic moves, stealth moves, stealth kills. Real weapons of tomorrow - The most complete arsenal of weapons and gadgets, from the knife to the experimental Land Warrior System. As good as real - Never-before-seen graphics technology offers the best visuals on any system yet. Advanced physics engine allowing rag doll physics, particle effects, and perfect interaction with the environment. Ultimate challenge - Intelligent AI with personal attributes, natural behavior where NPCs are aware of thier environments and remember past events. Amazing replayability - Totally open level design with multipaths and optional secondary objectives. Co-op stealth - Play multiplayer with friends and coordinate your infiltration in an all-new multiplayer challenge. Please note that as of August 2016, the online features for this game are no longer supported. The Multiplayer mode / Co-op mode will no longer be accessible.

## Metal Gear Solid V: The Phantom Pain - A New Era of Tactical Espionage

Konami Digital Entertainment proudly presents the latest installment in the acclaimed series: **Metal Gear Solid V: The Phantom Pain**. This chapter marks a significant evolution for the franchise, powered by the groundbreaking Fox Engine. Prepare for an unparalleled gaming experience where tactical freedom reigns supreme, allowing players to approach open-world missions with unprecedented autonomy.

### The Phantom Pain: A Story of Revenge and Global Crisis

Set in 1984, nine years after the devastating events of MGSV: Ground Zeroes and the subsequent fall of Mother Base, players awaken as Snake, also known as Big Boss. Emerging from a nine-year coma, Snake finds himself in a world still grappling with the chilling realities of the Cold War and the ever-present threat of nuclear proliferation. Fueled by a burning desire for revenge, Snake assembles a new private army and plunges back into the heart of conflict, relentlessly pursuing the shadowy organization known as XOF.

### Exploring Mature Themes and Immersive Gameplay

The METAL GEAR SOLID team continues its tradition of ambitiously exploring profound and mature themes. *The Phantom Pain* delves deeply into the psychology of warfare, examining the horrific atrocities that arise from those caught in its vicious cycle. Anticipated by many for its expansive open-world design, stunning photorealistic visuals, and feature-rich gameplay, MGSV: The Phantom Pain is poised to become a landmark title in the gaming industry. Its legacy will be defined by its cinematic storytelling, weighty thematic explorations, and deeply immersive tactical gameplay.

### Key Features of The Phantom Pain:

*   **Unrestricted Open-World Design:** Experience ultimate freedom in how you approach missions and navigate the overall game progression. The world is your battlefield, and the choices are yours to make.
*   **Revolutionary Fox Engine:** Witness the power of the Fox Engine, delivering breathtaking photorealistic graphics, meticulously crafted game design, and true next-generation production quality.
*   **Augmented Online Connectivity:** The experience extends beyond the console, with online connectivity designed to enhance overall functionality and accessibility across other devices, enriching your engagement with the game.

Name: Slay the Spire
Description:
We fused card games and roguelikes together to make the best single player deckbuilder we could. Craft a unique deck, encounter bizarre creatures, discover relics of immense power, and Slay the Spire! Features Dynamic Deck Building : Choose your cards wisely! Discover hundreds of cards to add to your deck with each attempt at climbing the Spire. Select cards that work together to efficiently dispatch foes and reach the top. An Ever-changing Spire : Whenever you embark on a journey up the Spire, the layout differs each time. Choose a risky or safe path, face different enemies, choose different cards, discover different relics, and even fight different bosses! Powerful Relics to Discover : Powerful items known as relics can be found throughout the Spire. The effects of these relics can greatly enhance your deck through powerful interactions. But beware, obtaining a relic may cost you more than just gold... Slay the Spire left Early Access and comes with: Four characters that each have their own unique set of cards. 350+ fully implemented cards. 200+ different items to be found. 50+ unique combat encounters. 50+ mysterious events that can help or harm you. Daily Climbs allow you to compare yourself with every other player in the world. Custom mode that allows mixing and matching various crazy run modifiers.

Name: HEX: Shards of Fate
Description:
HEX: Shards of Fate – Magical World for Keen Card Players HEX: Shards of Fate is an exciting challenge for fans of cards, action and strategy. Explore the fabulous world of Entrath, wrestle your way through sinister dungeons and use skill and guile in matches against other players. This digital card game combines the best of two worlds: classic TCGs and online RPGs . Create powerful decks from over 1,000 unique cards and dive into epic battles. Earn equipment items and use socketing gems to further improve your deck, whilst a variety of champions with individual skills complement your card armies. Cool animations and effects enrich the gaming experience on your road to victory! Experience HEX: Shards of Fate Play the first digital TCG with RPG elements Select a champion from eight races and three classes Explore dungeons in the exciting single-player mode Put your skills to the test in 1 vs 1 matches and hone your strategies Trade cards with friends and other players Win amazing prizes in daily tournaments with up to 128 players

Name: 魔物讨伐团
Description:
《魔物讨伐团》是经典传奇卡牌游戏《Monster Slayers》的官方中文强化版本，除全文官方汉化之外，还收录了全部DLC并对原有系统进行了大幅强化。本作是一款融合了卡牌对战和RPG的Roguelike冒险游戏。玩家可以操作多达14种职业（盗贼、游侠、骑士、牧师、野蛮人、法师、刺客、武僧、兽王、狂战士、亡灵巫师、药剂师、飞龙、商人），通过不断与各类离奇魔物的战斗以及亲历各类随机事件来搭建专属于自己的传奇牌组。完善的卡牌设计加上独特的天赋系统等于近乎无限的牌组搭配于出牌可能。 《魔物讨伐团》官方讨论QQ群791224753，欢迎各位卡友加入讨论！职业卡牌选手以及知名UP主等你来哦！ 游戏特色 多达14名职业：6名基础职业+6名进阶职业+2名特殊风格职业，解锁后各自拥有独有的牌组。 超爽的出牌手感：出牌与攻击招式紧密结合，当一套连招下来，你就知道什么叫做爽！ 个性化角色系统：融合丰富表情并可换装的纸娃娃系统+真人配音，代入感强烈。 声望与装备体系：即使战斗失败也能通过积累装备与声望来不断强化下一次战斗体验，装备与声望换取的天赋是永远的希望。 丰富的克制设定：火与水，光明与黑暗，相生相克充斥其间。比如牧师可以压制不死亡灵，对付畏惧火焰的敌人最好的方式是燃烧。 独一无二的组牌过程 职业卡组+战斗获取+商人购买+随机事件+随从技能+天赋树解锁+装备提供=你的最终牌组效果。 更加讲究策略的探索式地图 可见的地图选择与职业互克将运气与策略有机的结合起来，面对丰富离奇的怪物们，穿越无数的地牢，勇敢的去战斗吧！那些杀不死你的，只会让你变得更加强大！ 传奇模式与无尽模式 通关才是游戏的开始，新职业的解锁，新玩法的出现，带来的是更多卡牌组合，更多武器装备以及更多的游戏快乐！

Name: Monster Slayers
Description:
Developed by Nerdook (Reverse Crawl, Vertical Drop Heroes), Monster Slayers is a complete reimagining of the free web-based hit of the same name, which has been played over 4 million times on gaming portal, Kongregate. A rogue-like deck-building RPG adventure, Monster Slayers uses an innovative card-based battle system and lets you customize a deck to suit your play style. Create a new hero to join the Monster Slayers Guild and choose your path through the perilous Northern Valley as you follow your quest to defeat the legendary Harbinger and become a true Monster Slayer. Features Battle undead goblins, lion outlaws, mighty dragons and other monstrous foes using a unique card-based combat system Strategically shape your deck as you acquire new cards from merchants, treasure chests, and allies Collect fame from each run to unlock new abilities that can be used by future heroes Every playthrough is different: levels, enemy encounters and loot are randomly generated Choose from six different classes: Rogue, Ranger, Knight, Barbarian, Cleric, Wizard Recruit companions to join you on your quest and make use of their special abilities Equip your hero with stat-boosting loot to improve the chances of victory Fight for your place at the top of the Monster Slayers leaderboards Inspired by the much-loved deck-building RPG, Dream Quest, created by Peter Whalen (Hearthstone)

Monster Train offers a unique strategic roguelike deck-building experience where players defend the last burning pyre of Hell from angelic forces. The game introduces a novel three-vertical-playfield system, demanding careful tactical positioning.

To reclaim Hell, players must strategically navigate powerful locations, each offering distinct benefits:

*   **Champion Upgrades:** Enhance your hero's abilities.
*   **Unit Recruitment:** Add new allies to your cause.
*   **Card Upgrades:** Improve existing cards for greater power.
*   **Passive Bonuses:** Gain persistent advantages.
*   **Card Duplication:** Replicate powerful cards at special map nodes.

The game features five distinct clans, each with its own surprising gameplay mechanics. Players can select a primary and supporting clan, granting access to cards from both. During a run, cards can be further enhanced through a mix-and-match upgrade system, opening up diverse victory paths.

**Key Features:**

*   Over 220 unique cards.
*   Ten different starter decks.
*   Five monster clans with varied playstyles.
*   Each clan has 10 unlockable levels, introducing new cards.
*   Multiple upgrade paths for clan-specific champions.
*   Steam Workshop mod support.
*   Cards can be upgraded twice.
*   More than 21 unique random events.
*   25 covenant (difficulty) levels.

**Multiplayer Modes:**

*   **Hell Rush:** An eight-player, real-time competitive mode where players face identical resources and opponents, testing decision-making under pressure.
*   **Daily Challenge:** Players tackle a new, heavily modified run daily with gameplay mutators, competing globally and against friends on skill-focused leaderboards.
*   **Custom Challenge:** Design and share unique challenges with friends, each with its own leaderboard.

**Content Updates:**

*   **Friends & Foes Update:** Introduced new champions, bosses, cards, and artifacts, significantly expanding strategic options and replayability. It also added player-requested features like personal run records and an enemy wave counter.
*   **Wild Mutations Update:** Added 35 new mutators, new difficulty settings for experienced players, and simpler ways to challenge friends and the community.
*   **Herzal's Workshop Update:** Introduced mod support, allowing for extensive community-driven content.

**Thronebreaker: The Witcher Tales: A Regal RPG Adventure**

Dive into the perilous world of The Witcher with *Thronebreaker: The Witcher Tales*, a unique single-player RPG. Created by the minds behind *The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt*, this game expertly combines story-driven exploration with compelling card battles. It tells a grand story of bravery and the outcomes of your choices.

### Queen Meve's Royal Challenge

The game focuses on **Queen Meve**, a seasoned leader of Lyria and Rivia. She faces the growing danger of a Nilfgaardian invasion. Her path is one of ruin and vengeance, filled with tough decisions and a strong will.

### Core Gameplay Elements

*   **A Grand Story:** Enjoy a 30-hour narrative with 20 different outcomes for the world. Your choices truly matter, influencing the world's destiny and its complex characters, who can become friends or foes.
*   **World Exploration:** Travel across new and intriguing areas of The Witcher universe. Explore lively countrysides, scarred battlefields, majestic castles, and snowy peaks. You can save villages, find hidden treasures, and collect vital supplies.
*   **Camp Development:** Build and improve your battle camp. Train your troops, unlock new abilities, and sharpen your strategic thinking. Manage your resources, trade with others, and boost your allies' strength.
*   **Tactical Combat:** Build a powerful army and face epic story battles. These fights demand clever puzzle-solving and smart use of your army's special skills.

### Exclusive Digital Extras

*   The official *Thronebreaker* soundtrack.
*   A digital copy of the *GWENT: Art of The Witcher Card Game* artbook.
*   Concept art, including a map of Lyria.
*   The Witcher graphic novel, 'Fox Children'.
*   A Steam copy of *The Witcher: Enhanced Edition Director’s Cut*.

Recognized by IGN as "**One of the best-written RPGs in years**" (9.4/10) and by GameSpot as "**Superb**" (9/10), *Thronebreaker* provides a deeply engaging and satisfying quest.

Name: Chaos Reborn
Description:
From Julian Gollop, the designer of the original, award-winning XCOM game comes Chaos Reborn - a turn-based wizard combat game with single player Realm Quests and many online options. Between 2 and 6 players can challenge each other to magical duels in a variety of arenas using a spell deck of interesting spells and creatures - including the Gooey Blob, Shadow Wood, and more. There is a monthly league system and several game modes with live or asynchronous battles. You can explore the Realms of Chaos fighting Wizard Lords and Kings, and invite players to join you in co-op battles, or act as an invader in someone else's realm. These Realms can be designed by player Wizard Kings and rated by other players.

## Astrea: A Dice-Building Roguelike Adventure

Astrea reimagines the deck-building roguelike genre by substituting cards with dice and introducing a unique dual "damage" system: Purification and Corruption. Your objective is to assemble a formidable dice pool to cleanse Astrea's pervasive corruption and rescue the Star System.

### Core Gameplay Mechanics

The heart of Astrea lies in its innovative dual-purpose action system.

*   **Purification vs. Corruption:** This system allows for strategic dual-use actions.
    *   **Purification:** Can be employed to damage enemies or restore your own health.
    *   **Corruption:** Can be used to inflict damage upon yourself or to heal enemies.
    *   Players can utilize Purification to pacify adversaries or strategically employ Corruption on themselves to activate potent abilities.

*   **Dynamic Health Bar:** Your health bar serves a dual role beyond simply tracking life points.
    *   Skills are intrinsically linked to your health bar and are activated by taking Corruption damage.
    *   Unleash powerful abilities by carefully managing your Corruption levels, but be mindful of the risk of being overwhelmed by it.

### Dice and Character Customization

Astrea emphasizes deep customization through its dice system.

*   **Dice, Not Cards:** Construct a personalized dice pool that aligns with your preferred playstyle.
    *   Choose from an extensive collection of over 350 unique dice.
    *   Three distinct dice types offer varying risk-reward profiles:
        *   Reliably safe options
        *   Perfectly balanced choices
        *   Powerfully risky selections

*   **Dice Face Customization:** Forge your destiny by directly editing the faces of your dice.
    *   Assign new actions to specific die faces.
    *   Increase the probability of achieving powerful results in your favor.

### Playable Characters and Companions

Select from a diverse cast of characters and allies.

*   **Six Brave Oracles:** Each Oracle possesses unique dice sets, abilities, and distinct playstyles.
    *   Whether you favor brute force or intricate strategy, you can find an Oracle that matches your tactical approach, ranging from spellcasters to berserkers.

*   **Upgradeable Support Sentinels:**
    *   Over 20 enchanted constructs offer supportive dice rolls, serving as dependable allies throughout your combat encounters.

### Run Modifiers and Events

Enhance your runs with a variety of modifiers and unexpected events.

*   **Modifying Blessings:**
    *   Imbue your Oracle with over 170 unique passive effects that can fundamentally alter your tactical approach.
    *   **Star Blessings:** Provide lower-powered passive effects.
    *   **Black Hole Blessings:** Offer potent passive effects that come with a significant drawback.

*   **Random Events:**
    *   Encounter more than 20 random events at mysterious locations that can dramatically influence the outcome of your run.

### Enemy Interaction and Difficulty Scaling

Engage with enemies in dynamic ways and tailor the challenge.

*   **Enemy Manipulation:**
    *   Enemies attack using their own dice, providing opportunities to manipulate their rolls and alter their intended actions.

*   **Difficulty Levels:**
    *   Customize your challenge with 16 distinct difficulty levels.

### Lore: The Crimson Dawn Cataclysm

In ages past, a mystical star presided over a thriving Star System, its disciples being the Six-Sided Oracles. This era of harmony was violently disrupted by the Crimson Dawn Cataclysm, a celestial inferno that corrupted the land and scattered the Oracles' creations. Eons later, descendants of these Oracles embark on a quest to complete their predecessors' unfinished battle and restore their star system.

**Reigns: Game of Thrones: Ascend the Iron Throne and Forge Your Own Westerosi Legacy**

Step into the treacherous world of Westeros with Reigns: Game of Thrones, a captivating blend of the award-winning HBO® TV series and the critically acclaimed Reigns swipe-and-tap gameplay. This unique experience allows you to claim the Iron Throne, not just as one ruler, but as a formidable cast of iconic characters. Through the fiery visions of Melisandre, you'll navigate the intricate political landscape and confront the hostile factions that threaten the Seven Kingdoms.

As Cersei Lannister, Jon Snow, Daenerys Targaryen, Tyrion Lannister, Sansa Stark, and others, you will:

*   **Rule from the Iron Throne:** Experience the weight of leadership as different monarchs, each with their own unique challenges and unfolding mysteries.
*   **Impose Your Will:** Make life-altering decisions with a simple swipe left or right. Respond to the impassioned pleas and unpredictable demands of Westeros's inhabitants. Should a character prove too troublesome, you can tear their card in half, but be prepared for the unforeseen consequences of such a drastic action.
*   **Reenvision Westeros:** Melisandre's visions serve as your canvas, extending the narrative beyond the television series. Explore alternate timelines and imagine the myriad fates of those who aspire to rule. Will you rebuild the Great Sept of Baelor as Cersei, or chart a different course for the Seven Kingdoms if Sansa Stark had married Jaime Lannister?

Beyond the grand political machinations, even the most powerful rulers require moments of respite. Reigns: Game of Thrones offers regal mini-games, from thrilling jousting tournaments to rowdy tavern brawls, each with its own set of consequences that can impact your reign.

This entry represents the biggest and deepest installment in the Reigns series to date. It doesn't merely retell familiar stories; instead, it empowers you to forge entirely new adventures at your whim. Complementing your journey is the iconic soundtrack from the HBO series, composed by Ramin Djawadi, which will underscore your every decision as you decide the fate of Westeros and its people.

©2018 Home Box Office, Inc. All Rights Reserved. HBO and related trademarks are the property of Home Box Office, Inc.

## Gordian Quest: A Deckbuilding RPG Adventure

Embark on an epic deckbuilding RPG adventure in *Gordian Quest*. This game blends classic RPG elements with modern roguelite features and strategic turn-based combat. A sinister curse has plunged the land of Wrendia into darkness, unleashing monsters and scoundrels. As heroes rise, you must lead them on a perilous journey to save what remains of this fallen world and destroy the root of evil. Your Gordian Quest is about to begin.

### Core Gameplay Mechanics

#### Party Management
Form parties of heroes, each possessing unique classes, skills, and playstyles. Lead and manage them on challenging missions, fostering bonds and discovering new abilities.

#### Strategic Combat
Engage in turn-based battles utilizing a vast array of hundreds of passive and active skills. Discover and formulate powerful hero combos.

#### Hero Progression
Train, upgrade, and equip your heroes with a wide selection of weapons, armor, and enchanted trinkets to enhance their capabilities.

### Game Modes

#### Campaign Mode
Journey through 4 acts, from the troubled lands of Westmire to the enigmatic Sky Imperium, in an epic quest to save Wrendia.

#### Realm Mode
Experience a fast-paced roguelite challenge with an ever-changing game world, unpredictable threats, and rewarding encounters. Conquer 5 realms or face an endless challenge.

#### Adventure Mode
Explore procedurally generated areas or tackle solo challenges in this end-game mode.

#### Skirmish Mode
Engage in 1v1 battles, pitting your party of three against a friend.

### Key Features

#### Diverse Heroes
Choose from ten distinct heroes, including the Swordhand, Cleric, Ranger, Scoundrel, Spellbinder, Druid, Bard, Warlock, Golemancer, and Monk.

#### Vast Skill System
Access nearly 800 passive and active skills to customize your heroes' abilities.

#### High Replayability
Procedurally generated maps, dungeons, and randomized hero skills ensure each playthrough is unique.

#### Adjustable Difficulty
Experience a hardcore permadeath mode or a more casual approach where death is a temporary setback.

#### Loot and Relics
Gather items and relics to boost your heroes' power, including mysterious items that can both bless and curse.

#### Carryover Rewards
A progression system with an Artifacts system rewards continued play across different modes.

#### Meaningful Decisions
Shape your adventure through critical choices and dice rolls.

Name: Half-Life 2: Episode Two
Description:
Half-Life® 2: Episode Two is the second in a trilogy of new games created by Valve that extends the award-winning and best-selling Half-Life® adventure. As Dr. Gordon Freeman, you were last seen exiting City 17 with Alyx Vance as the Citadel erupted amidst a storm of unknown proportions. In Episode Two, you must battle and race against Combine forces as you traverse the White Forest to deliver a crucial information packet stolen from the Citadel to an enclave of fellow resistance scientists. Episode Two extends the award-winning Half-Life gameplay with unique weapons, vehicles, and newly-spawned creatures.

Name: Half-Life 2: Episode One
Description:
Half-Life 2 has sold over 4 million copies worldwide, and earned over 35 Game of the Year Awards. Episode One is the first in a series of games that reveal the aftermath of Half-Life 2 and launch a journey beyond City 17. Also features two multiplayer games. Half-Life 2 not required.

Name: The Wolf Among Us
Description:
From the makers of the 2012 Game of the Year: The Walking Dead, comes a gritty, violent and mature thriller based on the award-winning Fables comic books (DC Comics/Vertigo). As Bigby Wolf - THE big bad wolf - you will discover that a brutal, bloody murder is just a taste of things to come in a game series where your every decision can have enormous consequences. An evolution of Telltale's ground-breaking choice and consequence game mechanics will ensure the player learns that even as Bigby Wolf, Sheriff of Fabletown, life in the big bad city is bloody, terrifying and dangerous. Over a season of content spanning across 5 episodes: Episode 1: Faith - Available Now Episode 2: Smoke and Mirrors - Available Now Episode 3: A Crooked Mile - Available Now Episode 4: In Sheep's Clothing - Available Now Episode 5: Cry Wolf - Available Now Key Features From the team that brought you 2012 Game of the Year, The Walking Dead Based on the Eisner Award-winning Fables comic book series Now, it’s not only WHAT you choose to do that will affect your story, but WHEN you choose to do it A mature and gritty take on characters from fairytales, legends and folklore who have escaped into our world A perfect place to begin your Fables journey, even if you’ve not read the comics; this game is set before the events seen in the first issue

Name: Sam & Max: Beyond Time and Space
Description:
Join the Freelance Police on a bizarre adventure from the North Pole to the Fountain of Youth, from outer space to Hell and back. Sam & Max: Beyond Time and Space is a remastered version of Telltale’s second season of episodic Sam & Max games, lovingly updated by a small team of the original developers. Sam is a six-foot canine detective with a nose for justice. Max is a hyperkinetic rabbity-thing with a taste for mayhem. Together, they’re the Freelance Police—an irreverent comedy duo whose esoteric crime-fighting style has been entertaining comic book and video game fans for more than thirty years. In this five-episode collection of interconnected cases, Sam & Max are back on the crime beat in a showdown with Santa Claus, a race to subdue a giant volcano, and a face-off with a Eurotrash vampire. And then things get even weirder. Is paranoid shopkeeper Bosco on to something with his talk of a grand conspiracy? Is diner proprietress Stinky hiding the truth about what happened to her grandfather (also named Stinky)? Will flaky neighbor Sybil Pandemik ever find true love? Did someone say… BIRTHDAY?! Hop into the DeSoto for a hilarious outing that won IGN’s Adventure Game of the Year award the first time around and now looks and sounds better than ever, with gorgeous HD graphics, overhauled lighting and lip-sync, finessed cinematography, remastered audio, and eight all-new musical tracks featuring live jazz musicians. Zombies will dance. Mariachis will sing. A giant battle robot will trash the streets. And when their friends’ lives are on the line, Sam and Max will risk their very souls to set things right. Features: An adventure game that makes you laugh: Explore unexpected places, chat with eccentric characters, and tease out brain-tickling puzzles in an interactive story that has a joke hiding behind every hotspot. Beautifully remastered: Lighting, lip-sync, cinematography, audio, music, and more have been updated and enhanced to bring Sam & Max’s second episodic season up to modern standards. No walkthrough required: The game detects when you’re stuck and provides subtle contextual hints. Hint frequency can be customized to accommodate all playing styles. Optional driving mini-games: Take the wheel of Sam & Max’s 1960 DeSoto convertible for fun diversions from the story. The hood decals and car upgrades you win carry over across episodes. Localization: English voice with subtitles in English, French, Italian, German, and Spanish.

Name: Alan Wake
Description:
When the wife of the best-selling writer Alan Wake disappears on their vacation, his search turns up pages from a thriller he doesn’t even remember writing. A Dark Presence stalks the small town of Bright Falls, pushing Wake to the brink of sanity in his fight to unravel the mystery and save his love. Presented in the style of a TV series, Alan Wake features the trademark Remedy storytelling and pulse-pounding action sequences. As players dive deeper and deeper into the mystery, they’ll face overwhelming odds, plot twists, and cliffhangers. It’s only by mastering the Fight With Light combat mechanic that they can stay one step ahead of the darkness that spreads across Bright Falls. With the body of an action game and the mind of a psychological thriller, Alan Wake’s intense atmosphere, deep and multilayered story, and exceptionally tense combat sequences provide players with an entertaining and original gaming experience. Enhanced for the PC Includes Alan Wake Special Episodes “The Signal” and “The Writer” Experience Alan Wake’s Pacific Northwest in higher resolutions and higher fidelity than the Xbox360 version. Fully configurable mouse and keyboard support, or if you prefer to play with the Steam or Microsoft gamepad connected to your PC, you can do that too! Lots of customizable graphics settings and support for 4:3, 16:9 and 16:10 aspect ratios! Multithreaded engine that takes advantage of quad core CPUs. Additional features our fans have sought after such as field of view adjustment as well as “hide HUD”. Works with AMD Eyefinity 3D 3-screen mode.

Name: The Walking Dead
Description:
The Walking Dead is a five-part game series set in the same universe as Robert Kirkman’s award-winning comic book series. Play as Lee Everett, a convicted criminal, who has been given a second chance at life in a world devastated by the undead. With corpses returning to life and survivors stopping at nothing to maintain their own safety, protecting an orphaned girl named Clementine may offer him redemption in a world gone to hell. Based on Robert Kirkman’s Eisner-Award winning comic book series, The Walking Dead allows gamers to experience the true horror of the zombie apocalypse. A tailored game experience: live with the profound and lasting consequences of the decisions that you make in each episode. Your actions and choices will affect how your story plays out across the entire series. You’ll be forced to make decisions that are not only difficult, but that will require you to make an almost immediate choice. There’s no time to ponder when the undead are pounding the door down!

Name: Strong Bad's Cool Game for Attractive People: Season 1
Description:
You may already know Strong Bad from his regular appearances answering emails and doling out not-so-useful advice on Homestarrunner.com . Now he's the star of a five episode comedy series, Strong Bad's Cool Game for Attractive People. With all new storylines co-written by the guys from Homestarrunner.com , you'll feel like you're inside Strong Bad's world. (You may even start to talk like him!) Each episode has a different theme and you get to hang out with with Homestar, The Cheat, Bubs - the whole crew. It's like a Strong Bad cartoon on steroids. As Strong Bad would say, what the crap are you waiting for? Includes all 5 episodes: Homestar Ruiner: When a practical joke goes awry, Strong Bad has to get the loafing Homestar Runner out of his house. Strong Badia the Free: Join the Homestarmy and help Strong Bad bring down the corrupt King of Town. Baddest of the Bands: Hurting for cash, Strong Bad turns to the gods of rock and roll for some divine inspiration. Dangeresque 3: Strong Bad lands the role of a lifetime in this blockbuster movie event. 8-Bit Is Enough: Trogdor's on the loose! Send the dragon packing and restore balance.

## Sam & Max Save the World Remastered: A Beloved Classic Returns

Get ready to welcome back your favorite crime-fighting duo! Sam & Max Save the World Remastered brings the beloved first season of episodic games back to life. This modern take on a game once hailed as "gaming's first sitcom" has been lovingly updated by a core group of the original developers, with the blessing of creator Steve Purcell. It's now celebrated as "the remaster you didn't know you were waiting for."

### What's New in the Remaster?

The Freelance Police are back and better than ever with a host of enhancements.

*   **Enhanced Graphics:** Experience the familiar world with a visual upgrade.
*   **Widescreen and Gamepad Support:** Enjoy a more immersive and modern gameplay experience.
*   **New Musical Tracks:** Five fresh musical pieces add to the game's unique atmosphere.

Beyond these technical improvements, the core of what made Sam & Max Save the World a hit remains.

*   **Brain-Tickling Puzzles:** Engage your mind with the series' signature challenging puzzles.
*   **Offbeat Humor:** Prepare for the same hilarious and quirky dialogue and situations.

These elements were enough to earn the original game IGN's Best Adventure GOTY award, and they continue to shine in this remastered edition.

### The Case of the Hypnotized Troublemakers

The adventure kicks off with a seemingly simple case for the self-proclaimed Freelance Police. The Commissioner reports former child stars causing chaos. What begins as petty vandalism quickly escalates into a full-blown conspiracy. Sam and Max discover that the perpetrators have been mysteriously hypnotized, their eyes spinning with a tell-tale "spinny thing."

### Unraveling the Conspiracy

To crack this baffling case, Sam's keen detective skills and Max's uninhibited mayhem will be put to the test. They'll need to utilize an assortment of inventory items and rely on the help of familiar faces like Sybil Pandemik, Bosco, and Jimmy Two-Teeth. The investigation will take them from the familiar streets of Sam & Max's neighborhood to the hallowed grounds of the White House lawn. It will also delve into the depths of the internet and even venture all the way to the moon. This perplexing mystery only gets weirder and funnier as Sam and Max race to uncover the source of the malfeasance and thwart a dastardly plan, a journey that has captivated players for years.

Name: Necrobarista
Description:
'This is a story about death and coffee.' Inspired equally by film and anime, Necrobarista is a unique take on the visual novel medium. Follow a dynamic and diverse cast of characters as they navigate Melbourne's hipstery coffee culture, the questionable ethics of necromancy, and the process of letting go. Final Pour is the definitive edition of Necrobarista, bringing a year's worth of updates and enhancements to the table, as well as brand new features and stories: Full cinematic recomposition in 1.85:1 aspect ratio, bringing a whole new perspective to the story. Devil's Den : A new episode featuring Samantha kicking someone in the head. Studio Mode : Compose your own shots, add dialogue, and tell stories using the same tools as us! Doodle Mode : Remember those homicidal robots we mentioned before? Now you can draw faces on them! They're fine with it. Three new additions to the soundtrack from Necrobarista music producer Jeremy Lim . Other features: Stylized, fully 3D cinematic presentation that draws from anime aesthetics. Soundtrack by Kevin Penkin , BAFTA-nominated composer for Florence , Made in Abyss, and Norn9. Delve into the world of the Terminal and fantasy Melbourne through free-roaming first-person scenes. Featuring goon-sack robots, alchemical coffee, and Australian folk hero Ned Kelly. Support for fourteen languages, including Korean, Arabic, and Russian.

Name: The Walking Dead: A New Frontier
Description:
When family is all you have left…how far will you go to protect it? After society was ripped apart by undead hands, pockets of civilization emerge from the chaos. But at what cost? Can the living be trusted on this new frontier? As Javier, a young man determined to find the family taken from him, you meet a young girl who has experienced her own unimaginable loss. Her name is Clementine, and your fates are bound together in a story where every choice you make could be your last.

Name: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim
Description:
EPIC FANTASY REBORN The next chapter in the highly anticipated Elder Scrolls saga arrives from the makers of the 2006 and 2008 Games of the Year, Bethesda Game Studios. Skyrim reimagines and revolutionizes the open-world fantasy epic, bringing to life a complete virtual world open for you to explore any way you choose. LIVE ANOTHER LIFE, IN ANOTHER WORLD Play any type of character you can imagine, and do whatever you want; the legendary freedom of choice, storytelling, and adventure of The Elder Scrolls is realized like never before. ALL NEW GRAPHICS AND GAMEPLAY ENGINE Skyrim’s new game engine brings to life a complete virtual world with rolling clouds, rugged mountains, bustling cities, lush fields, and ancient dungeons. YOU ARE WHAT YOU PLAY Choose from hundreds of weapons, spells, and abilities. The new character system allows you to play any way you want and define yourself through your actions. DRAGON RETURN Battle ancient dragons like you’ve never seen. As Dragonborn, learn their secrets and harness their power for yourself.

## Unreal Tournament 2004: Editor's Choice Edition - A Deep Dive

Unreal Tournament 2004: Editor's Choice Edition stands as a landmark in the multiplayer first-person shooter genre. It masterfully blends intense arena combat with notable technological leaps. This version offers a superior experience for dedicated players, boasting a wide array of game modes and meticulously crafted environments.

### Diverse Gameplay Modes

UT2004 presents **ten distinct game modes**, catering to both strategic team players and solo warriors. Players will encounter challenging scenarios across detailed indoor arenas and expansive outdoor landscapes, engaging in battles against **up to 32 opponents online**.

#### Assault Mode

This beloved mode, reimagined for UT2004, tasks teams with defending and attacking fortified bases. Scenarios are dynamic, ranging from moving trains to alien motherships.

#### Onslaught Mode

Onslaught emphasizes team-based combat, where players capture strategic points to dismantle the enemy's power core. This mode shines in **massive outdoor environments**, with a strong focus on vehicular warfare.

### Expanded Arsenal and Technology

UT2004 introduces an enhanced arsenal and improved technological capabilities.

#### Vehicle Combat

A variety of **land, air, and space-based vehicles** are vital for tactical success. With options from single-person fighters to five-person transports, players have **numerous choices** for mechanized engagements.

#### Maps and Weaponry

Explore **over 95 maps**, including more than 45 new additions for existing and new game modes. These maps span vast outdoor areas, deep space, and confined indoor arenas.

The weaponry from Unreal Tournament 2003 returns, enhanced by **three new weapons**:

*   **Mine Layer:** This weapon deploys spider-like bombs that actively track enemies.
*   **Anti-Vehicle Rocket Launcher (AVRiL):** Fires specialized rockets designed to target and destroy enemy vehicles.
*   **Grenade Launcher:** Launches timed explosives that bounce and can adhere to enemies or vehicles.

The **Sniper Rifle from the original Unreal Tournament** also makes a return, completely redesigned and upgraded.

### New Factions and Technological Enhancements

Unreal Tournament 2004 introduces **32 new characters across four distinct teams**:

*   **Thunder Crash:** A human team led by Malcolm.
*   **Corrupt:** A robotic team led by Xan Kriegor.
*   **Iron Skull:** A Skaarj warrior team.
*   **Hellions:** A mercenary and pirate team.

UT2004 delivers a **significant technology update**, according to many reviews, offering a faster, smoother, and more immersive experience. Critics lauded the "astounding graphical fidelity and performance improvements."

Name: Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition
Description:
DISCLAIMER This legacy version of COH1 will also give you access to the latest updated version of COH1 - simply called 'Company of Heroes' in your Steam library. PLEASE USE THE LATTER TO PLAY ONLINE , and visit the associated pages to join the COH1 Steam Community & Modding scene: COH1 Community Hub COH1 Steam Workshop DESCRIPTION Delivering a visceral WWII gaming experience, Company of Heroes redefines real time strategy gaming by bringing the sacrifice of heroic soldiers, war-ravaged environments, and dynamic battlefields to life. Beginning with the D-Day Invasion of Normandy, players lead squads of Allied soldiers into battle against the German war machine through some of the most pivotal battles of WWII. Through a rich single player campaign, players experience the cinematic intensity and bravery of ordinary soldiers thrust into extraordinary events. A Cinematic Single Player Experience that captures the turmoil of WWII as never before. Advanced squad AI brings your soldiers to life as they interact with the changing environment, take cover, and execute advanced squad tactics to eliminate all enemy opposition. Stunning Visuals - Relic's next generation cutting-edge engine provides graphic quality and a physics driven world that is unprecedented in an RTS. Environmental Strategy - Real-time physics and a completely destructible environment guarantee no two battles ever play out in the same way. Destroy anything and re-shape the battlefield! Use buildings and terrain to your advantage, or deny them to the enemy. 2-8 Player Multiplayer Competition via LAN or Internet - Go online with friends and join the ultimate battle of Axis versus Allies.

Name: Freespace 2
Description:
The year is 2367, thirty two years after the Great War. Or at least that is what YOU thought was the Great War. The endless line of Shivan capital ships, bombers and fighters with super advanced technology was nearly overwhelming. As the Terran and Vasudan races finish rebuilding their decimated societies, a disturbance lurks in the not-so-far reaches of the Gamma Draconis system. Your nemeses have arrived... and they are wondering what happened to their scouting party.

Name: DARK SOULS™ II
Description:
We are currently in the process of restoring the online servers for the DARK SOULS series on PC. We plan to restore online service for each game progressively, bringing back servers for DARK SOULS™ II once we complete the necessary work to correct the problem. We will provide additional updates as soon as the restoration schedule is finalized. We want to thank all our players for your patience and understanding as we work to fix this issue. Developed by FROM SOFTWARE, DARK SOULS™ II is the highly anticipated sequel to the gruelling 2011 breakout hit Dark Souls. The unique old-school action RPG experience captivated imaginations of gamers worldwide with incredible challenge and intense emotional reward. DARK SOULS™ II brings the franchise’s renowned obscurity & gripping gameplay innovations to both single and multiplayer experiences.
