Recapture the deep sense of exploration, the joy of a pulsating adventure, and the thrill of leading your own band of companions across a new fantasy realm and into the depths of monster-infested dungeons in search of lost treasures and ancient mysteries. So gather your party, venture forth, and embrace adventure as you delve into a realm of wonder, nostalgia, and the excitement of classic RPGs with Obsidian’s Pillars of Eternity! Play as any one of six races: Human, Aumaua, Dwarf, Elf, Godlike and Orlan. Utilize five core skills to overcome any situation: Stealth, Athletics, Lore, Mechanics and Survival. Deep character customization: Build a character as one of eleven classes such as Barbarian, Chanter, Cipher, Druid, Fighter, Monk, Paladin, Priest, Ranger, Rogue and Wizard. Sculpt your own story: Side with various factions using a reputation system, where your actions and choices have far reaching consequences. Explore a rich and diverse world: Beautiful pre-rendered environments laced with an engaging story and characters bring the world to life.

Name: Silent Hunter® III
Description:
The king of submarine simulations returns with an all-new 3D engine, new crew command features, and more realistic WWII naval action than ever before. The movie-like graphics and simple, tension-filled gameplay make this the perfect game for the realism fanatic and the casual gamer. Realistic and immersive environment: The suspense-filled atmosphere includes realistic 3D water modeling, day/night cycles, and historically accurate subs, ships, and aircraft. The detailed U-boat interiors, changing weather effects, and engaging audio represent the ultimate in WWII submarine warfare. A deadly array of U-boats and weapons: Playable U-boats include Type II, VII, IX, and XXI submarines. Take aim against Allied convoys and warships. In recreating the great submarine battles of WWII, players will hide in silence just below threatening escort ships, fire deadly torpedoes, or surface and pound enemies with the deck gun. Dynamic campaign: Create your own realistic naval war story. Your military career will be influenced by successful command decisions in an unscripted and non-linear WWII campaign. Accessible to players of all skill levels: Players will experience a simplified learning curve that will be easier to handle than standard simulations. Use the naval academy tutorial to learn the basics. Customize the realism settings for play that appeals to a variety of WWII combat fans. Command your crew: The crew will take orders and evolve based on the results of each patrol. Multiplayer cooperative play: For up to eight players via LAN.

Name: Sub Command
Description:
Take charge of the most deadly modern-day submarines in the world - three distinct submarines across two unique and challenging campaigns. Utilize cutting-edge sensor and weapon technology to locate, track and destroy the enemy - even deliver Tomahawk missiles to inland targets. Whether transiting, diving, or surfacing you control the smartest, stealthiest and most feared subs on the water today! Three submarines to command - Seawolf, 688(I) and Akula. Each contains authentic naval systems including Sonar, Radar and Target Motion Analysis. Test your skills while firing Tomahawk missiles, rescuing crippled subs, rising through the polar ice cap to communicate information and much more. Easy to use game interface - With straightforward controls and automated crewmen, controlling a submarine has never been easier. Enhanced sound and 3D graphics engine - 3D Objects (over 250), from Russian trawlers to France's Mirage fighters - plus exacting sound modes pull you in like never before. You won't just hear the torpedos, you will feel them.

Name: Dangerous Waters
Description:
S.C.S. - Dangerous Waters allows you total control over multiple air, surface, and submarine platforms in a modern-day naval environment. Take direct control of individual crew stations and also plan and execute combined arms naval strategies from a top-down 'Commanders Eye' perspective.

## Silent Hunter®: Wolves of the Pacific: A WWII Submarine Simulation

Experience the intense thrill of naval warfare with **Silent Hunter®: Wolves of the Pacific**. This leading simulation franchise returns to its core, offering enhanced realism and deeply immersive gameplay. Developed by the acclaimed Ubisoft team responsible for Silent Hunter 3, this 2007 installment promises an unparalleled submarine simulation experience, according to industry reviews.

### Next-Generation Realism and Immersion

Prepare for a "Hollywood Blockbuster" experience, featuring:

#### Lifelike Graphics and Audio/Visual Effects

Stunning visuals bring the treacherous Pacific theater to life. Immerse yourself in the action with spectacular audio and breathtaking detail, creating a truly lifelike environment.

#### Historical Accuracy

Encounter over 75 authentic war machines. This includes iconic vessels such as the U.S. Gato class submarine, the formidable Japanese battleship Yamato, and the H6K flying boat, as detailed in the game's specifications.

### Engaging Gameplay Features

Silent Hunter: Wolves of the Pacific offers a wealth of features designed to keep players deeply engaged:

#### Large-Scale Naval Engagements

Witness epic naval battles firsthand. You can also receive crucial updates through radio messages and direct orders from high command, as the game simulates real-time battlefield communication.

#### Innovative Crew Evolution

*   Earn valuable upgrades and experience for your crewmembers.
*   Guide their evolution strategically to create the most effective naval force in the Pacific theater.

#### Immersive Single-Player Experience

*   **Diverse Mission Objectives:** Each campaign presents unique challenges and rewarding objectives.
*   **Career Mode:** Command various U.S. submarines and advance your naval career through dynamic, evolving campaigns.
*   **Quick Play:** Dive into "instant actions" and single patrols for immediate, action-packed combat.

#### Addictive Online Adversarial Mode

*   **Cooperative or Adversarial Play:** Team up with up to 8 friends via LAN or 4 via internet for thrilling multiplayer battles.
*   **Unlimited Replayability:** Scripted and generated mission types ensure epic online battles with endless replay value.

### Scalable and Accessible Simulation

*   **Selectable Difficulty Levels:** Tailor the challenge to your preference, making the game accessible to both newcomers and seasoned veterans.
*   **Streamlined Interface:** An upgraded interface makes controlling your submarine easier and more intuitive than ever before.

**Please note:** Online features for this game, including Multiplayer and Co-op modes, are no longer supported and will not be accessible.

## Diluvion: Resubmerged - A Deeper Look

Diluvion: Resubmerged offers a greatly improved experience. It was rebuilt with new features to make strategic play more complex. Players can expect more detailed looting, careful crew management, and extensive submarine customization for different playstyles.

### Gameplay Enhancements

This update brings several key improvements to Diluvion: Resubmerged. Developers state that dynamic salvaging now needs smart use of crew skills and items to win hazard battles. A new forging system allows for more vessel customization. Upgrades are available for armor, depth range, life support, and more.

Quality-of-life updates include better visuals, mappable gamepad controls, new graphics settings, and a full UI redesign. Quest tracking and waypoints are improved. Players can now save anywhere. Landmark, navigation, and pathfinding systems have also been redone. New side quests, art, and music add to the player experience.

### The World of Diluvion

Centuries after a Great Flood covered the world, people live under a thick ice layer. A new civilization has formed, with different kingdoms, faiths, and cultures. As a new submarine captain, you will command your first ship. You will venture into the unknown to find humanity's greatest secret.

### Exploration and Discovery

Explore a stunning flooded world, finding great riches and glory. Discover many unique towns, learn their local stories, and trade goods. Recruit new crew members. Improve each of the game’s 9 unique submarines with a deep upgrade system. This grants access to new areas and loot. Find various cannons and torpedoes to face the dangers of the deep. Build a unique crew, arranging members and weapons to match your playstyle, whether you prefer stealth or direct attacks.

### Core Game Features

Diluvion: Resubmerged has three large, beautiful open sea zones. Each has its own groups and local tales. Experience a mix of 3D submarine travel and detailed hand-painted 2D graphics for town exploration. Fight other ships and scary creatures in thrilling real-time submarine combat. Recruit diverse Helmsmen, Gunners, and Sonar Technicians. Use their unique skills and personalities to affect combat and exploration. Get new weapons to change battles. Survival is a constant fight, needing careful management of food and oxygen. Build and grow your underwater base, upgrading it to gain fame and wealth. This also gives access to valuable chances, like rare item sellers and unique patrons. The world holds rare loot and hidden quests, especially for those who explore off the main path. Face giant sea creatures and strange undersea events.

Name: Silent Hunter 5®: Battle of the Atlantic
Description:
Step behind the periscope of a German U-boat and take on the Allied Forces in famous battles across the vast Atlantic Ocean and Mediterranean Sea. The best-selling submarine series of all time continues with the highly anticipated Silent Hunter: Battle of the Atlantic. For the first time, you can live the life of a submarine captain from a first-person view as you lead your crew in a truly dynamic campaign. Put on the captain’s uniform For the first time, walk through highly detailed submarines, access every part of your U-boat, and manage your crew in the new first-person view. Become a real leader Directly command your crew and experience the tension and fear inside the U-boat through the new advanced order system. Test your war strategies Choose your own strategy and select your targets with a new objective-driven, dynamic campaign. Make the enemy react to you Open new locations, upgrades and resupply possibilities, while the Allied ships adjust dynamically to your approach. Your actions will directly impact the evolution of the campaign. Accessibility Enhanced Prowl the waters with a brand-new user interface. Now, every beginner can successfully command a sub free of confusion. In expert mode, experienced players will be provided with all the necessary information and controls to command the sub completely on their own. Cinematic Experience Experience the most realistic and immersive Silent Hunter ever created. Improved environment graphics create a powerful level of immersion as you operate authentic, highly detailed U-boats and surface ships. Multiplayer Mode Play in cooperative or adversarial modes in scripted and generated missions. About the Franchise Silent Hunter is the most award-winning submarine series of all time, with nearly 1.5 million sold copies worldwide. Silent Hunter®: Wolves of the Pacific was voted 2007's 'simulation game of the year' by PC Gamer. Click here to find all Silent Hunter games on Steam.

**KURSK: An Immersive Adventure into a Real-Life Tragedy**

Delve into the gripping narrative of the K-141 Kursk, a Russian nuclear submarine, with this unique adventure and documentary video game. Inspired by actual events, KURSK places you in the role of a spy tasked with uncovering secrets surrounding the revolutionary Shkval supercavitating torpedoes. As you navigate the world of espionage, you will become an eyewitness to the tragic events that unfolded.

### Experience the Fateful Voyage

Immerse yourself in the fateful voyage of the K-141 Kursk, a journey that tragically ended in the Barents Sea. The game meticulously recreates the historical context, allowing you to "live the history" as it happened. According to developer Jujubee, the game aims to provide a deeply engaging experience that goes beyond typical video game narratives.

### Explore the World of 2000

Experience the early 2000s through a first-person perspective. KURSK transports you to key locations, offering a detailed glimpse into the era and the submarine's operational environment.

#### Key Locations to Explore:

*   **Moscow:** Explore the vibrant capital city, a hub of political and intelligence activity.
*   **Vidyayevo:** Discover the naval town that served as the submarine's homeport, understanding the daily lives of the crew and their families.
*   **Oscar II-class Submarine:** Navigate the incredibly detailed interiors of the K-141 Kursk, experiencing the confined yet complex environment of a nuclear submarine.

### Embrace the Role of an Intelligence Operative

Your mission requires you to gather vital secret information and cultivate relationships, all while avoiding discovery. This aspect of the gameplay emphasizes stealth and strategic interaction.

### Make Impactful Decisions

Engage with the crew, build crucial relationships, and make choices that shape the narrative and carry significant repercussions. These decisions are central to the player's experience and the unfolding story.

### GAMES BEYOND™: A New Horizon in Storytelling

KURSK is a flagship title in Jujubee's "GAMES BEYOND™" initiative, a project dedicated to pushing the boundaries of interactive storytelling. This initiative focuses on:

*   **Compelling Storytelling:** Prioritizing narratives with depth and emotional resonance, aiming to connect players with real-world events and human experiences.
*   **Original Gameplay:** Introducing innovative mechanics that complement the story, ensuring that the gameplay enhances the narrative rather than distracting from it.
*   **Mature Subject Matter:** Tackling complex and thought-provoking themes, encouraging players to engage with difficult topics and broaden their understanding.

Michal Stępien, CEO of Jujubee, stated, "We believe the time has come to tell real stories... we want to step outside the self-contained world of video game subject matter and invite players to broaden their knowledge about history or the actual world." This philosophy underpins the development of KURSK and the broader GAMES BEYOND™ initiative.

### Standard Version Extras

For those who purchase the Standard Version of KURSK, additional digital content is included:

*   Premium KURSK Wallpapers
*   Unique Digital Artbook in PDF format
*   Official Game Digital Soundtrack

Name: Plasticalypse - Submarine Adventures
Description:
STORY Experience a journey through a sunken world, as the last surviving cleaner of the seas sets out to complete a gargantuan task of restoring life on planet earth. EXPERIENCE 'Plasticalypse: TrashSub Adventures“ is an atmospheric 3D action-adventure following a journey of the last ocean cleaner submarine that is tasked to restore the ecosystem of a dying earth. Explore the sunken remains of old civilizations, unravel mysteries hiding hubs of survivors. Establish embassies, collect resources and upgrade your submarine to fight off enemies and expand your fleet. All this and more awaits you in 'Plasticalypse: TrashSub Adventures“. DISCOVERY Discover the underwater cities of Paris, Athens and Vilnius. Help them in their fight for survival, visit ruined monuments and solve hidden mysteries. Encounter mutated creatures affected by pollution and figure out the means to restore the marine life of the ocean. Experience the world where humans are no longer the dominant species of the planet.

Name: Reef Rumble
Description:
Take control of your custom jellyfish and battle with your friends in highly dynamic physic-based fights, for fun or to see who is the best. Step into the ring for 2 to 4 players clashes. Pierce the weak spot of your opponents using submarine dangers to eliminate them and score points to become the ruler of the reefs! Multiplayer arena battles, from 2 to 4 players. Explosive, tactical and physics based combats. A really easy to play game for new players, but hard to master for experienced ones. Cute customizable little jellyfishes. Several gamemodes and loads of gameplay settings possible.

Name: Escape The Tank
Description:
solo project, this is the first game i have ever made and is the result of teaching myself how to use a game engine. this is a simple 3d platform game set inside a fish tank. 20 different levels to play through (+1 secret level) Explore the tank, avoid dangers, solve problems and jump around to find your way out. Pretty simple but surprisingly fun to play. this game is no triple-A blockbuster, but i am hoping this simple game might inspire others to try and learn developing as well. I intend to continually improve on this game over time. (NOTE: a rebuild of this game will be released in this place sometime in the future, however the time frame on which that will happen is uncertain. jump on this now before the price goes up with the next big update!!) thank you for your consideration :)

## Dive into Dwarf Fortress: A Deeply Simulated World Awaits

Prepare for an unparalleled simulation experience with Dwarf Fortress, a game that goes beyond generated landscapes to create an entire simulated world. This legendary title, now available on Steam with beautiful pixel graphics, offers infinite hours of gameplay as you manage a colony of dwarves.

### Core Gameplay and Challenges

Your primary goal is to build a thriving fortress and guide your dwarves to survival against a multitude of threats. These include:

*   **Environmental Hazards:** Starvation, aquifers, and magma mishaps.
*   **External Threats:** Hostile civilizations, wilderness creatures, and even the undead.
*   **Internal Strife:** Madness and the demands of nobility.

The game's complex combat model incorporates detailed elements such as skills, body parts, material properties, aimed attacks, wrestling, pain, nausea, and various poison effects.

### Unprecedented World Generation

Dwarf Fortress boasts an incredibly deep world generation system. Each new game presents a unique challenge, featuring:

*   **Simulated Civilizations:** Witness the rise and fall of entire societies, complete with their own cultures, personalities, and creatures.
*   **Diverse Flora and Fauna:** Encounter hundreds of animals and monsters, many of which are randomly created for each world.
*   **Rich Geology:** Over two hundred rock and mineral types can appear in their proper geological environments.
*   **Dynamic Weather:** A sophisticated weather model tracks wind, humidity, and air masses to create realistic fronts, clouds, storms, and blizzards.
*   **Cultural Artifacts:** Generated poetry, musical forms, instruments, and dances for your dwarves to practice and perform.

### Enhanced Player Experience

The Steam edition of Dwarf Fortress significantly improves the new player experience. Tutorials are now integrated to guide you through building your first fort and keeping your dwarves content. The game also features:

*   **New Pixel Graphics:** Developed by artists Carolyn Jong and Neoriceisgood, building upon the work of Michał “Mayday” Madej and Jacob 'Ironhand' Bowman.
*   **Original Soundtrack:** A 15-track soundtrack by Dabu, Simon Swerwer, and Águeda Macias, including tracks in the Dwarvish language.

### A Living, Evolving Project

Dwarf Fortress is a testament to a lifetime "living" project, continuously created and updated by brothers Tarn “Toady One” and Zach “Threetoe” Adams since 2003. With the ambitious goal of simulating all of existence, Bay 12 Games estimates they are approximately 44% complete. This dedication ensures that the game remains a deep and engaging experience, with the developers stating that "Nothing substantial is new or changed, under the hood. It’s still good old Dwarf Fortress."

The game's depth has inspired other titles such as RimWorld, Prison Architect, and Minecraft. It was also one of the first video games acquired by the Museum of Modern Art in New York. Remember the game's enduring motto: "Losing is fun!"

Name: RimWorld
Description:
RimWorld is a sci-fi colony sim driven by an intelligent AI storyteller. Inspired by Dwarf Fortress, Firefly, and Dune. You begin with three survivors of a shipwreck on a distant world. Manage colonists' moods, needs, wounds, illnesses and addictions. Build in the forest, desert, jungle, tundra, and more. Watch colonists develop and break relationships with family members, lovers, and spouses. Replace wounded limbs and organs with prosthetics, bionics, or biological parts harvested from others. Fight pirates, tribes, mad animals, giant insects and ancient killing machines. Craft structures, weapons, and apparel from metal, wood, stone, cloth, and futuristic materials. Tame and train cute pets, productive farm animals, and deadly attack beasts. Trade with passing ships and caravans. Form caravans to complete quests, trade, attack other factions, or migrate your whole colony. Dig through snow, weather storms, and fight fires. Capture refugees or prisoners and turn them to your side or sell them into slavery. Discover a new generated world each time you play. Explore hundreds of wild and interesting mods on the Steam Workshop. Learn to play easily with the help of an intelligent and unobtrusive AI tutor. RimWorld is a story generator. It’s designed to co-author tragic, twisted, and triumphant stories about imprisoned pirates, desperate colonists, starvation and survival. It works by controlling the “random” events that the world throws at you. Every thunderstorm, pirate raid, and traveling salesman is a card dealt into your story by the AI Storyteller . There are several storytellers to choose from. Randy Random does crazy stuff, Cassandra Classic goes for rising tension, and Phoebe Chillax likes to relax. Your colonists are not professional settlers – they’re crash-landed survivors from a passenger liner destroyed in orbit. You can end up with a nobleman, an accountant, and a housewife. You’ll acquire more colonists by capturing them in combat and turning them to your side, buying them from slave traders, or taking in refugees. So your colony will always be a motley crew. Each person’s background is tracked and affects how they play. A nobleman will be great at social skills (recruiting prisoners, negotiating trade prices), but refuse to do physical work. A farm oaf knows how to grow food by long experience, but cannot do research. A nerdy scientist is great at research, but cannot do social tasks at all. A genetically engineered assassin can do nothing but kill – but he does that very well. Colonists develop - and destroy - relationships. Each has an opinion of the others, which determines whether they'll become lovers, marry, cheat, or fight. Perhaps your two best colonists are happily married - until one of them falls for the dashing surgeon who saved her from a gunshot wound. The game generates a whole planet from pole to equator. You choose whether to land your crash pods in a cold northern tundra, a parched desert flat, a temperate forest, or a steaming equatorial jungle. Different areas have different animals, plants, diseases, temperatures, rainfall, mineral resources, and terrain. These challenges of surviving in a disease-infested, choking jungle are very different from those in a parched desert wasteland or a frozen tundra with a two-month growing season. Travel across the planet. You're not stuck in one place. You can form a caravan of people, animals, and prisoners. Rescue kidnapped former allies from pirate outposts, attend peace talks, trade with other factions, attack enemy colonies, and complete other quests. You can even pack up your entire colony and move to a new place. You can use rocket-powered transport pods to travel faster. You can tame and train animals. Lovable pets will cheer up sad colonists. Farm animals can be worked, milked, and sheared. Attack beasts can be released upon your enemies. There are many animals - cats, labrador retrievers, grizzly bears, camels, cougars, chinchillas, chickens, and exotic alien-like lifeforms. People in RimWorld constantly observe their situation and surroundings in order to decide how to feel at any given moment. They respond to hunger and fatigue, witnessing death, disrespectfully unburied corpses, being wounded, being left in darkness, getting packed into cramped environments, sleeping outside or in the same room as others, and many other situations. If they're too stressed, they might lash out or break down. Wounds, infections, prosthetics, and chronic conditions are tracked on each body part and affect characters' capacities. Eye injuries make it hard to shoot or do surgery. Wounded legs slow people down. Hands, brain, mouth, heart, liver, kidneys, stomach, feet, fingers, toes, and more can all be wounded, diseased, or missing, and all have logical in-game effects. And other species have their own body layouts - take off a deer's leg, and it can still hobble on the other three. Take off a rhino's horn, and it's much less dangerous. You can repair body parts with prosthetics ranging from primitive to transcendent. A peg leg will get Joe Colonist walking after an unfortunate incident with a rhinoceros, but he'll still be quite slow. Buy an expensive bionic leg from a trader the next year, and Joe becomes a superhuman runner. You can even extract, sell, buy, and transplant internal organs. And there's much more than that! The game is easy to mod and has an active mod community . Read more at . (All non-English translations are made by fans.)

## Mastering Survival in Oxygen Not Included

Oxygen Not Included, a deep space-colony simulation, demands careful management of oxygen, temperature, and limited resources. The primary goal is to keep your Duplicants alive and prevent them from suffering from harsh space conditions or suffocation.

### Strategic Colony Foundations

Successful colonization starts with thorough planning. Resource management is paramount. This means excavating with care and using limited materials wisely. Building strong infrastructure is also vital. This includes well-designed plumbing and power systems to keep your colony running.

### Duplicant Well-being

The happiness of your Duplicants is just as important. Keep their morale high by offering recreation, comfortable living spaces, and good food. Stressed Duplicants can act erratically, so their happiness is a key factor in survival.

### Temperature Control

Managing temperature is a constant battle. You must always watch and control both the environment's heat and the heat generated by machines and Duplicants. If temperatures become unstable, your Duplicants could freeze or overheat.

### Advanced Systems

Oxygen Not Included features complex gas and liquid systems. This lets you build intricate pipe networks and improve how resources are shared. The aim is to turn a basic outpost into a smooth-running operation.

### Powering Your Colony

Your colony needs various power sources. These include:

*   Fossil fuels like coal and natural gas
*   Renewable sources such as hydrogen
*   Manual power generation

Managing your power grid effectively and avoiding overloads is essential for growth.

### Maintaining Breathable Air

A breathable atmosphere is fundamental. The Oxygen Overlay helps you see air flow. You need to check gas makeup, watch for bad gases like carbon dioxide, and produce enough oxygen to ensure a constant supply of fresh air. The final aim is to build a self-sufficient home in space.

### Resourcefulness and Discovery

Being resourceful is key to surviving this procedurally generated world. The game encourages several tactics:

*   Reusing waste materials
*   Turning gases into usable oxygen
*   Using natural processes to your advantage

You can even power your base using processed Duplicant gas. Each new game presents a unique asteroid with different biomes to explore and master.

Name: Startopia
Description:
A once thriving network of space stations and planets have been left lifeless, redundant scars of the apocalypse. Into this age of darkness comes light. You will lead the way in rebuilding the network of space stations to a standard accepted by the individual alien races, attracting them to harness their expertise and research new technologies. Thus begins the hilarious battle of wits and cunning, full of daring escapades. Key Features: Fully functioning alien society, with rivalry and friendships, crime and punishment, leisure and entertainment, and a functioning economy Unique 'Torus' play area gives a viewpoint never before seen in a game 16 habitable subsections spanning three decks in each space station Bio-deck with editable landscape and manageable ecosystem allowing complete control of terra-forming Multiplayer support for up to three other stationmasters Varied levels of play, from simple sandbox to detailed station micromanagement

Name: SPORE™
Description:
From Single Cell to Galactic God, evolve in a universe of your own creations. Play through Spore's five evolutionary stages : Cell, Creature, Tribe, Civilization, and Space. Each stage has its own unique style, challenges, and goals. You can play how you choose: Start in Cell and nurture one species from humble tidepool organism to intergalactic traveler, or jump straight in and build tribes or civilizations on new planets. What you do with your universe is up to you. Spore gives you a variety of powerful yet easy-to-use creation tools so you can create every aspect of your universe: creatures, vehicles, buildings, and even starships. Features CREATE Your Universe from Microscopic to Macrocosmic: From tide pool amoebas to thriving civilizations to intergalactic starships, everything is in your hands. EVOLVE Your Creature through Five Stages: It's survival of the funnest as your choices reverberate through generations and ultimately decide the fate of your civilization.

## Frostpunk: Surviving the Last City on Earth

Frostpunk, a gripping society survival game, challenges players to build and manage the **last city on Earth** amidst a brutal ice age. In this frozen world, **heat is life**, and every choice carries immense weight. Your mission is to guide humanity's final survivors, making difficult decisions to ensure their existence against overwhelming odds.

### The Core Survival Challenge

At its heart, Frostpunk is a game of **optimization and resource management** that constantly tests your empathy. While managing your city and its inhabitants is key, **exploring the frozen outside world is crucial** for understanding its history and current state. The central question remains: what will you sacrifice for survival, and who will you become under extreme pressure?

### Establishing Laws and Order

A fundamental aspect of Frostpunk is the ability to **establish laws that govern your growing society**. This includes dictating work routines, healthcare, and food distribution. Maintaining **hope and contentment** among your citizens is paramount; their moral condition is as vital as their physical safety.

### Shaping Your Society's Future

When your society faces critical junctures, you must **determine its path**. Will you rule with an **iron fist**, demanding obedience, or guide them with **compassion and faith**? You can pursue extremes or seek a balance. Regardless of your approach, remember that **there is no turning back** from your decisions.

### The Weight of Every Choice

Even minor decisions, like the fate of a citizen or appeasing a new faction, can lead to **unexpected and far-reaching consequences**. Your people place their faith in your leadership, but their devotion is not infinite. The burden of leadership is heavy.

### Driving Progress Through Technology

Survival in this harsh environment **demands constant progress**. While reacting to immediate events is necessary, **investing in long-term development and technological advancement** is equally vital. Creating advanced infrastructure, complete with automatons and airships, is a difficult but achievable goal, dependent on your management skills.

### Venturing into the Frostlands

Beyond your city, the world holds many secrets. **Expeditions, though risky, can yield invaluable intelligence, precious supplies, and opportunities to grow your population.** Other survivors may exist, and their fate rests solely in your hands.

### Endless Replayability: Endless Mode

Frostpunk's **Endless Mode offers unparalleled replayability**, allowing you to test your skills across eight distinct maps with unique challenges. This mode features three gameplay styles:

*   **Endurance:** The ultimate test of survival under the harshest conditions.
*   **Builders:** A unique challenge starting without a generator, forcing a different approach to city construction.
*   **Serenity:** A more relaxed experience focused on city building without intense survival pressure.

### Post-Launch Content and Season Pass

Frostpunk has been significantly enriched with free updates, including **Endless Mode** and the scenario **"The Fall of Winterhome."**

The **paid Season Pass** offers three expansions: **"The Last Autumn," "On The Edge," and "The Rifts."** These significantly broaden the main story and fill in lore gaps. The Season Pass also includes the **Digital Soundtrack** and an **exclusive Digital Artbook**.

While no more content is planned, the game will continue to receive **patches and fixes**, with ongoing technical support.

### Game of the Year Edition

For newcomers, the **Frostpunk: Game of the Year Edition** is the ideal package, including the main game, the complete Season Pass, and all exclusive content at a discounted price.

Name: Prison Architect
Description:
Welcome Wardens! Only the world’s most ruthless Warden can contain the world’s most ruthless inmates. Design and develop your personalized penitentiary in Prison Architect. Key Features: Customized Confinement Allocate resources to optimize your compound, but don’t restrict the flow of the crowd lest you encounter a flood, fire, fight, or full-blown riot. Invest and Innovate Tap federal money with grant applications & direct your funds to combat disease, gang activity, litigation, and more! Management and Muscle Ensure your prison is *mostly* ethical and safe with top-notch staff including armed guards, psychologists, doctors, lawyers and snitches. Detention by Design Each prisoner’s criminal history requires custom treatment programs, labor schedules, and reform workshops. Lockdown Showdown Attempt a high-stakes escape of your own supermax prison in Escape Mode, or try Online mode to test one of 12,000 player-created prisons. Expand your empire limitlessly in Sandbox mode.

## ISLANDERS: A Relaxing City-Building Game

ISLANDERS is a minimalist strategy game designed for players seeking to **create beautiful cities without complex resource management**. It offers a deeply relaxing experience, allowing you to build charming settlements on vibrant, colorful islands. This approach provides a peaceful and visually engaging way to express creativity.

### Endless Islands and Expansive Cities

The game features an **endless supply of procedurally generated islands**, ensuring each playthrough presents a unique landscape. You can expand your initial small villages into **sprawling, magnificent cities**. ISLANDERS prioritizes a **calming and visually pleasing experience**, helping you unwind and de-stress as you build your dream settlements.

### Key Features of ISLANDERS

ISLANDERS offers a suite of features designed for a delightful gameplay experience:

*   **Intuitive and Rewarding City Building:** The core mechanics are easy to learn, making them satisfying to master.
*   **Endless Procedurally Generated Islands:** Explore and build upon an infinite number of new lands, ensuring no two games are alike.
*   **Relaxing Atmosphere:** Unwind with a calming and visually pleasing experience that promotes tranquility.
*   **Beautiful, Vibrant Colors:** Immerse yourself in a world characterized by stunning aesthetics and lively color palettes.
*   **Perfect for Casual Play:** Ideal for short sessions, discovering new islands, and aiming for high scores without demanding extensive time commitments.

### Core Gameplay Mechanics

The core gameplay is remarkably **intuitive**. Players begin with a set of buildings to place on their island. **Strategic placement is key**, as the surrounding environment significantly impacts your score. Accumulating enough points replenishes your building inventory and unlocks new structures, enabling greater expansion and complexity. Once a city reaches a certain size, players can **travel to the next island**. The game concludes when players run out of buildings, offering a moment to celebrate the **epic city constructed**. This progression system provides a clear sense of accomplishment.

Name: Ratropolis
Description:
Ratropolis combines roguelite, deck building, and tower defense with real time strategy gameplay. Lead your small rat outpost to safety and defend your rat citizens from predators and monstrous creatures. Build the largest 'Ratropolis!' and etch your name into rat history! Choose from over 500 cards of economy, building, military, and skill types to execute your strategic command. All leaders begin their journey with a deck of 8 basic cards. Building an efficient deck is key for protecting your rats from waves of rat-thirsty enemies. Add, remove and upgrade your cards to create a deck worthy of a true leader! Defending your rats in the city will be a challenge. Get aid from advisers with talents in finance, defense, or leadership. They will provide you with better options when chaos arises. When the city falls your campaign will end, but with every end a new beginning is born. Unlock new cards to expand your options and make each defense a new experience. Now lead Ratropolis to victory and save your Ratizens from destruction! Features Unique Gameplay: Real-time deck building card game combined with roguelite and tower defense elements! Have you ever played anything like that before? Very Addictive: Highly engaging and rapid gameplay that requires quick judgment and response Replayability: Easy to play but difficult to master. 100+ Events: Random decision events give you a new experience every time you play 500+ Cards: Unlock new features and cards to become stronger after every game. 6 Possible Endings: Choose your own adventure! 6 Leaders! Each with their own play style and traits. Lead Cute Rats, not Feral Cats!

## Stronghold: Definitive Edition - A Classic Reimagined

Experience the BAFTA-nominated real-time strategy game, Stronghold, like never before with its Definitive Edition. This rebuilt version of the beloved 'castle sim' brings back original source artwork, remastered music, and returning voice talent, all guided by veteran developers.

### Unite a Broken Realm

Step into medieval England's fractured, war-torn landscape. The King has been betrayed by treacherous lords, and the realm nears collapse. Command scattered forces and rally your kingdom against the monstrous Rat, Pig, Snake, and Wolf. Strike down each villainous Lord through challenging objectives. These range from breaking sieges and capturing enemy castles to building formidable fortresses and repelling assaults.

Test your strategic prowess with military and economic campaigns. Engage in castle assaults and host banquets. The classic RTS and city-builder gameplay is now enhanced with remade graphics, community-requested features, and a remastered soundtrack by series maestro Robert L. Euvino. Gather resources, build castles, protect townsfolk, manage your economy, raise armies, and wage war!

### A Legend Retold

Building on its 20-year legacy, Stronghold: Definitive Edition offers two classic campaigns with 26 missions. It also introduces fresh single-player content with a new narrative campaign. This new campaign, designed by Firefly Studios founders Simon Bradbury and Eric Ouellette, is exclusive to the Definitive Edition. It features 14 missions where players traverse the devastated English hinterland searching for Sir Longarm's captured kin. Beyond the story, a challenging new historical 'Castle Trail' presents 10 unique siege scenarios.

With updated artwork, a higher fidelity soundtrack, full Steam multiplayer for up to 8 players, Steam Workshop integration, and modernized gameplay, Stronghold: Definitive Edition is the ultimate way to experience the game that started it all. Your kingdom awaits!

### New Features

*   **Zoom into New Visuals:** The game has been remade by original artists, featuring improved animations, textures, and lighting.
*   **Rematch Classic Villains:** Hunt down The Rat and The Snake in a challenging new 14-mission campaign.
*   **Battle Old Friends:** Engage in 8-player multiplayer battles on Steam, complete with extra maps.
*   **Relive History:** Experience a new Castle Trail with 10 challenging siege scenarios and famous historical fortresses.
*   **Lose Yourself:** Immerse yourself in a remastered soundtrack, featuring fresh recordings from original voice actors.
*   **Create, Share & Enjoy:** Explore new Stronghold community content with Steam Workshop support.

Name: Persona 5 Royal
Description:
Prepare for the award-winning RPG experience in this definitive edition of Persona 5 Royal, featuring a treasure trove of downloadable content included! Forced to transfer to a high school in Tokyo, the protagonist has a strange dream. “You truly are a prisoner of fate. In the near future, ruin awaits you.” With the goal of “rehabilitation” looming overhead, he must save others from distorted desires by donning the mask of a Phantom Thief. Key Features: Explore Tokyo, unlock Personas, customize your own personal Thieves Den, experience alternate endings, and more Become the ultimate Phantom Thief and defy conventions, discover the power within, and fight for justice in the definitive version of Persona 5 Royal Includes over 40 items of previously released downloadable content Choose between Japanese and English VO

## Metal Gear Solid V: The Phantom Pain: A New Era of Tactical Espionage

**Metal Gear Solid V: The Phantom Pain** marks a major shift for the famed tactical espionage series. Developed by Konami Digital Entertainment, this entry uses the powerful **Fox Engine** to offer **unmatched tactical choice** in its large open worlds.

### Snake's Quest for Revenge

The story is set in **1984**, nine years after the events of MGSV: Ground Zeroes and the fall of Mother Base. Players control **Snake, also known as Big Boss**. He wakes from a nine-year coma to find the world in chaos, facing the **Cold War and nuclear threats**. Seeking revenge, Snake aims to form a new army and fight the shadowy group **XOF**.

### Deep Themes and Engaging Play

The Metal Gear Solid series is known for tackling **serious topics**, exploring the **mental toll of war** and its ruinous effects. MGSV: The Phantom Pain stands out for its:

*   **New open-world style:** Giving players much control over how they tackle missions and advance.
*   **Lifelike visuals:** Thanks to the advanced Fox Engine, creating a stunning look.
*   **Rich gameplay:** Offering deep and compelling tactical options.

The game is set to influence the industry with its **movie-like story**, **deep ideas**, and **highly engaging tactical play**.

### Core Elements of The Phantom Pain

*   **Open-World Choice:** Decide how to approach missions and progress with **full player control**. The vast world allows for **endless strategic options**.
*   **Fox Engine Brilliance:** Enjoy **realistic graphics** and **smart game design** from the advanced Fox Engine, delivering top-tier production value.
*   **Enhanced Online Play:** The game's reach goes beyond consoles, with online features meant to **improve usability and access** on other devices.

As one expert put it, "The Phantom Pain truly redefines what an open-world stealth game can be, offering a level of player choice and emergent gameplay that is simply breathtaking." This focus on player freedom and story is key to the MGSV experience.

## Dishonored 2: A Masterpiece of Choice and Consequence

Dishonored 2 is a critically acclaimed title that offers players unparalleled freedom. Hailed as "brilliant" by PC Gamer and a "masterpiece" by Eurogamer, the game lets you embody Empress Emily Kaldwin or the royal protector, Corvo Attano. Each character offers a unique perspective and emotional response to the unfolding narrative, set in a world where mysticism and industry collide.

### Forge Your Path: Stealth or Combat?

The core of Dishonored 2 lies in its "play your way" philosophy. You can choose to navigate intricately designed levels unseen, utilizing stealth and environmental manipulation, or unleash a brutal combat system. Combine your character's unique powers, weapons, and gadgets to eliminate enemies. The story dynamically responds to your choices, leading to intriguing and varied outcomes across its hand-crafted missions.

### A World of Intrigue and Danger

Set 15 years after the first game, Dishonored 2 plunges players into a new crisis. An otherworldly usurper has seized Empress Emily Kaldwin’s throne, threatening the fate of the Isles. As either Emily or Corvo, you must journey beyond Dunwall to Karnaca, a coastal city holding the key to restoring Emily to power. Armed with the Mark of the Outsider and potent new abilities, you will track down enemies and reclaim what is rightfully yours.

### Key Features

#### The Assassins

Both Emily Kaldwin and Corvo Attano are fully voiced characters with distinct personalities. Their unique power sets, gadgets, and weapons can be creatively employed for stealth or combat.

#### Supernatural Powers

Advanced bonecharm crafting and new upgrade trees allow for extensive customization of supernatural abilities. Transform into a living shadow, link enemies, or mesmerize foes. The game offers near-infinite combinations of combat styles, powers, and weapons, providing significant replayability.

#### Imaginative World

Arkane's art and narrative teams have crafted stylized locales from Dunwall's grimy streets to Karnaca's exotic coasts. Signature mission locations, such as the Dust District and a mansion with shifting walls, offer unique challenges.

#### The Void Engine

Dishonored 2 is brought to life by the new Void Engine, a significant advancement in rendering technology built upon id Tech and heavily customized by Arkane Studios. This engine supports world-class art direction and delivers responsive AI, advanced lighting, dense urban environments, and compelling story presentation.

Name: Monaco: What's Yours Is Mine
Description:
Monaco: What's Yours Is Mine is a single player or co-op heist game. Assemble a crack team of thieves, case the joint, and pull off the perfect heist. The Locksmith: Blue-collar infiltration expert The Lookout: She can see and hear everything... a natural leader The Pickpocket: A hobo with a monkey and a penchant for crime The Cleaner: A silent psychopath... Jack The Ripper in pink The Mole: Big and dumb... likes to tunnel The Gentleman: He doesn't always wear a disguise, but when he does, he looks fantastic The Hacker: Armies of viruses shut down security... a modern day warlock The Redhead: Manipulative and murderous... a lady always gets what she wants Play with up to four people online or on the same screen. Compete with others via daily leaderboards. Find out why it won the 2010 IGF and has been described by PCGamer as 'one of the best co-op games of all time.'

Name: Quadrilateral Cowboy
Description:
Hacking. Dial tone. Cassette decks. Sabotage. Suitcase decks. Brainbox injectors. Quadrilateral Cowboy is a single-player adventure in a cyberpunk world. Tread lightly through security systems with your hacking deck and grey-market equipment. With top-of-the-line hardware like this, it means just one thing: you answer only to the highest bidder. The Standard Edition includes: Quadrilateral Cowboy. Developer Commentary. Reference Manual. The Deluxe Edition includes: Everything In the Standard Edition . Quadrilateral Cowboy interactive art book . PDFs for box art, poster, and papercraft characters.

Name: SteamWorld Heist
Description:
In SteamWorld Heist , you command a steam-driven pirate crew in a series of epic tactical shootouts. It’s turn-based strategy with a twist: You manually aim the guns of your robots, allowing for insane skill shots and bullet-bouncing action! As the captain you will board, loot and shoot your way through enemy spaceships. Overcome the challenges of the vast frontier by upgrading your recruits with unique abilities, weapons – and even stylish hats! Strategy focused on skill rather than chance Procedurally generated levels 15-20 hours of playtime, followed by New Game+ Kind to newcomers, deep and challenging for veterans Soundtrack by Steam Powered Giraffe

Name: OCTOPATH TRAVELER™
Description:
/ The award-winning RPG comes to PC! Eight travelers. Eight adventures. Eight roles to play. Embark on an epic journey across the vast and wondrous world of Orsterra and discover the captivating stories of each of the eight travelers. - Play as eight different characters, each with their own stories to uncover and side quests to complete - Explore the enchanting yet perilous world of Orsterra, spanning 8 vast regions and discover each character’s full story as their journey unfolds - Use each character's distinctive abilities (Path Actions), skills and talents in frenetic battles - Enjoy the accessible yet deep turn-based combat battle system and break through enemy lines by identifying and targeting their weaknesses - Solve side quests and story scenarios in a few different ways and take decisions that shape your path. - Experience visuals inspired by retro 2D RPGs with beautiful realistic elements set in a 3D world

Name: Teardown
Description:
Plan the perfect heist using creative problem solving, brute force, and everything around you. Teardown features a fully destructible and truly interactive environment where player freedom and emergent gameplay are the driving mechanics. Tear down walls with explosives or vehicles to create shortcuts no one thought was possible. Stack objects, build structures, or use floating objects to your advantage. Take your time to create an efficient path through the level, plan the heist and get ready to execute it. Run, jump, drive, slingshot. Do whatever you need to collect targets, avoid robots or steal whatever your clients ask for. But make sure not to get caught! Campaign With your company pressured by increasing debt, you start accepting work from some more or less shady individuals. Soon you are knee-deep in a murky soup of revenge, betrayal, and insurance fraud. Beginning with some more or less legitimate assignments, you soon find yourself stealing cars, demolishing buildings, blowing up safes, avoiding trigger-happy robots and more. Upgrade your expanding arsenal of tools by searching for hidden valuables scattered around the environments. Sandbox Play around in the various environments with the tools you have unlocked. In this mode you have unlimited resources and an abundance of vehicles. No pressure, just pleasure. Challenges Test your skills in experimental game modes. New challenges unlock as you progress through the campaign. Modding Teardown has extensive mod support with built-in level editor, Lua scripting and a Steam Workshop integration. Build your own sandbox maps, mini games, tools, vehicles or try out existing mods from the community. Features Fully destructible voxel environments Realistic physical simulation of objects, debris, vehicles, water, fire, and smoke 17 different tools ranging from sledgehammer, blow torch and fire extinguisher to guns and explosives Campaign with 40 missions in an escalating storyline Sandbox mode for you to roam around in the various environments Extensive mod support and Steam Workshop integration

Name: PAYDAY 2
Description:
PAYDAY 2 is an action-packed, four-player co-op shooter that once again lets gamers don the masks of the original PAYDAY crew - Dallas, Hoxton, Wolf and Chains - as they descend on Washington DC for an epic crime spree. The CRIMENET network offers a huge range of dynamic contracts, and players are free to choose anything from small-time convenience store hits or kidnappings, to big league cyber-crime or emptying out major bank vaults for that epic PAYDAY. While in DC, why not participate in the local community, and run a few political errands? Up to four friends co-operate on the hits, and as the crew progresses the jobs become bigger, better and more rewarding. Along with earning more money and becoming a legendary criminal comes a character customization and crafting system that lets crews build and customize their own guns and gear. Key Features Rob Banks, Get Paid – Players must choose their crew carefully, because when the job goes down they will need the right mix of skills on their side. CRIMENET – The dynamic contract database lets gamers pick and choose from available jobs by connecting with local contacts such as Vlad the Ukrainian, shady politician 'The Elephant', and South American drug trafficker Hector, all with their own agenda and best interests in mind. PAYDAY Gunplay and Mechanics on a New Level – Firing weapons and zip tying civilians never felt so good. Dynamic Scenarios – No heist ever plays out the same way twice. Every single scenario has random geometry or even rare events. Choose Your Skills – As players progress they can invest in any of five special Skill Trees: Mastermind, Enforcer, Ghost, Technician and Fugitive. Each features a deep customization tree of associated skills and equipment to master, and they can be mixed and matched to create the ultimate heister. More Masks than Ever – PAYDAY 2 features a completely new mask system, giving players the ability to craft their own unique mask with a pattern and color of their choice, resulting in millions of different combinations. Weapons and Modifications – A brand new arsenal for the serious heister, covering everything from sniper and assault rifles to compact PDWs and SMGs. Once you've settled for a favorite, you can modify it with optics, suppressors, fore grips, reticles, barrels, frames, stocks and more, all of which will affect the performance of your weapon. There are also purely aesthetic enhancements - why not go for the drug lord look with polished walnut grips for your nine? Play It Your Way – Each job allows for multiple approaches, such as slow and stealthy ambushes or running in guns blazing. Hit the target any way you want, each approach will provide a different experience. A Long History of Additional Content – More than 70 updates since release, including new heists, characters, weapons and other gameplay features like driving cars and forklifts.

Name: Shadow of the Tomb Raider: Definitive Edition
Description:
In Shadow of the Tomb Raider Definitive Edition experience the final chapter of Lara’s origin as she is forged into the Tomb Raider she is destined to be. Combining the base game, all seven DLC challenge tombs, as well as all downloadable weapons, outfits, and skills, Shadow of the Tomb Raider Definitive Edition is the ultimate way to experience Lara’s defining moment. Survive and Thrive In the Deadliest Place on Earth: Master an unforgiving jungle setting in order to survive. Explore underwater environments filled with crevasses and deep tunnel systems. Become One With the Jungle: Outgunned and outnumbered, Lara must use the jungle to her advantage. Strike suddenly and disappear like a jaguar, use mud as camouflage, and instill fear in enemies to sow chaos. Discover Dark and Brutal Tombs: Tombs are more terrifying than ever before, requiring advanced traversal techniques to reach them, and once inside they are filled with deadly puzzles. Uncover Living History: Discover a hidden city and explore the biggest hub space ever found in a Tomb Raider game.

## Total War: WARHAMMER II: A Grand Strategy Epic

**DEFEND YOUR WORLD. DESTROY THEIRS.** Total War: WARHAMMER II is a grand strategy game. You pick one of four distinct factions to wage war across a vast, vibrant fantasy world. Experience a game of two halves: a turn-based open-world campaign and intense, tactical real-time battles.

### Campaign Gameplay

Engage in statecraft, diplomacy, exploration, and empire building. Capture, develop, and manage settlements. Recruit vast armies and level up Legendary Lords and Heroes with mythical gear. Negotiate alliances or declare total war to achieve your objectives.

#### The Great Vortex Campaign

This narrative campaign spans Lustria, Ulthuan, Naggaroth, and the Southlands. It culminates in a climactic endgame. Players must perform arcane rituals to stabilize or disrupt The Great Vortex, while thwarting rival races.

#### Unique Factions & Playstyles

Choose from 8 Legendary Lords across 4 iconic Warhammer Fantasy Battles races. Each race offers a distinctive playstyle with unique campaign mechanics, narrative, armies, monsters, Lores of Magic, and battlefield abilities.

### Epic Real-Time Battles

Command thousands-strong legions in tactical battles. Deploy ferocious monsters, fire-breathing dragons, and harness powerful magic. Use military strategies, ambushes, or brute force to secure victory.

### Multiplayer & Combined Campaigns

All races are playable in single and multiplayer campaigns, plus custom and multiplayer battles. Play a 2-player co-op campaign as the same race, with each Legendary Lord offering unique starting positions. Owners of both Total War: WARHAMMER and WARHAMMER II gain access to a massive campaign map covering the Old and New Worlds, allowing play with any owned race from both titles.

### The World of Total War: WARHAMMER II

Millennia ago, High Elf mages created The Great Vortex to repel a Chaos invasion. Now, the Vortex falters, threatening world ruin.

*   **High Elves:** Prince Tyrion leads the High Elves in a desperate effort to stabilize the vortex.
*   **Lizardmen:** The Slann Mage-Priest Mazdamundi directs his war-hosts to prevent cataclysm through the methods of The Old Ones.
*   **Dark Elves:** The Witch King Malekith and his hordes seek to exploit the vortex's weakness.
*   **Skaven:** Queek Headtaker leads the Skaven from their subterranean tunnels, their motives obscured as they multiply.

Four races, four outcomes, one goal: control of The Great Vortex.

## Tomb Raider: Anniversary: A Modern Take on a Classic Adventure

Tomb Raider: Anniversary lets players revisit Lara Croft's legendary journey in a globe-trotting, third-person action-adventure. This reimagining focuses on Lara's quest for the mythical Scion artifact, the central element of the original game.

### Enhanced Gameplay and Visuals

Using the 'Tomb Raider: Legend' game engine, Anniversary significantly improves graphics, technology, and physics. These upgrades bring Lara's adventure and her search for the Scion artifact up to modern standards, offering a fresh and engaging experience. The game features a more dynamic Lara Croft and vast environments with stunning visuals. Intense combat, refined pacing, and a clearer story make for a compelling adventure.

### Epic Exploration and Discovery

The world of Tomb Raider: Anniversary is vast and invites exploration. Players will visit iconic locations like the lost city of Atlantis and ancient Egyptian pyramids. The game encourages players to:

*   Explore hidden areas and climb to great heights.
*   Venture into new lands to solve mysteries.
*   Discover new realms, find rewards, and uncover secrets about Lara's past.

### Acrobatic Combat and Dangerous Wildlife

Lara Croft's signature combat style is prominent. Players can dodge enemies while firing her dual pistols. The wilderness is home to various predators, such as bats, wolves, and bears, all defending their territory. The game's design incorporates improved AI for enemies, leading to more varied combat challenges. Supernatural elements are used sparingly, adding a mystical feel without disrupting the game's grounded nature. Encounters with foes like the T-Rex and Atlantean centaurs immerse players in the mysterious world of Tomb Raider.

### Environmental Puzzles and Ancient Mechanisms

The game presents challenging environmental puzzles. Players will need to:

*   Jump across large gaps.
*   Grip onto unstable ledges.
*   Swim through dangerous underground tunnels.

Players must also solve intricate puzzles and mechanisms created by ancient designers. These complex systems guard secrets, and the game warns that meddling with them can have severe consequences.

Name: Super Time Force Ultra
Description:
Super Time Force Ultra is an action-packed platformer with a time-travelling twist! You’re in control of time itself, bending and stretching it to your advantage on the battlefield. Rewind time and choose when to jump back into the action, teaming-up with your past selves in a unique single-player co-op experience! Take control of up to 19 unique characters, and battle across 6 different time periods, from the long-ago past to the far-away future.

Name: Jurassic World Evolution 2
Description:
Jurassic World Evolution 2 is the much-anticipated sequel to Frontier’s ground-breaking 2018 management simulation, Jurassic World Evolution, offering an all new narrative campaign voiced by cast members from across the Jurassic World film franchise, exciting new features, four engaging game modes, and an expanded roster of awe-inspiring dinosaurs.    Learn what it takes to be a park management master in Campaign mode, a compelling, original narrative that puts you at the heart of the action following the earth-shattering events of Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom. Work alongside iconic characters from the films, including Dr. Ian Malcolm (voiced by Jeff Goldblum) and Claire Dearing (voiced by Bryce Dallas Howard), and lead the efforts to control, conserve, and contain wild dinosaurs now rampaging across the USA. Take control with deeper management tools and creative options. Construct a range of customisable new buildings and hire new Scientists, and shape your park to meet the needs of both your guests and dinosaurs. Unleash your creativity in Sandbox mode, or test your skills in Challenge mode as you deal with diverse locations and environmental calamities. Play through key moments of your favourite films - with a twist. Experience ‘what-if’ scenarios from iconic Jurassic World and Jurassic Park films, each level set across eras and locations from all five movies. Dive into the Jurassic World franchise and see how events unfold when you take control. Over 75 different prehistoric species come to life in Jurassic World Evolution 2, including highly requested flying and marine reptiles. These animals feel more alive than ever as they preside over territory, fight for dominance, and react intelligently to the world around them. Use bioengineering to customise dinosaurs with bold new colours, and alter their genomes to unlock traits.

JumpJet Rex is a retro platformer that harkens back to the golden age of 2-D gaming in the early 90s. This game boasts stunning, hand-drawn 16-bit graphics and an authentic chiptune soundtrack, transporting players to a nostalgic era of gaming.

**Key Features of JumpJet Rex:**

*   **Secrets and Collectibles:** The game is packed with dozens of items scattered throughout the galaxy, along with numerous hidden areas waiting to be discovered. This provides ample opportunities for treasure hunters to explore and collect.
*   **Replayability:** JumpJet Rex incorporates a time challenge element, encouraging players to revisit each level multiple times. This allows them to hone their platforming skills and strive for faster completion times. Players can also download "ghosts" of top players to race against or compete directly with friends to achieve the best scores.
*   **Killer Old School Gameplay:** For those who miss the challenging platformers of yesteryear, JumpJet Rex delivers. It offers strenuous platforming challenges and retro boss battles that evoke the feeling of accomplishment after overcoming difficult obstacles.
*   **Co-op Mode:** The narrative presents a significant challenge: saving all of dinokind from an impending asteroid. To tackle this monumental task, players can team up with a friend. Success in co-op mode requires careful coordination between teammates to avoid failure.
*   **Customization and Upgrades:** JumpJet Rex allows for a personalized gaming experience. Players can customize their T-Rex character and enhance their appearance using the loot they gather during their adventures.

The game's design philosophy emphasizes a return to classic platforming mechanics, offering a demanding yet rewarding experience. The inclusion of co-op mode and extensive customization options further enhances the game's appeal, providing both challenging solo play and engaging multiplayer experiences.

Embark on an extraordinary adventure in Curious Expedition 2, a turn-based narrative roguelike where managing resources and maintaining party cohesion are crucial for survival and glory. The game's premise centers on a grand discovery: mysterious islands are appearing and disappearing, prompting esteemed Explorer Clubs to fund expeditions to these enigmatic lands. The goal is to retrieve valuable treasures for the 1889 World's Fair in Paris.

### Core Gameplay Mechanics

Curious Expedition 2 offers a unique and engaging experience through several key features, as highlighted by its developers.

#### Exploration and Survival

Traverse diverse biomes filled with both dangers and opportunities. Careful resource and sanity management are paramount, as noted in game guides. Players must navigate the delicate balance between acquiring treasure and ensuring survival, a core tenet of the roguelike genre.

#### Dynamic Narrative and Character Growth

Experience a unique narrative with procedurally generated elements each playthrough, a feature that contributes to high replayability. Witness characters form relationships, shift loyalties, contract illnesses, and evolve based on your decisions. This dynamic character development adds depth to the gameplay.

#### Tactical Encounters

Utilize tactical dice rolls to overcome encounters with wild animals and legendary creatures. This dice-based combat system, according to player feedback, adds an element of chance and strategy to every engagement.

### Campaign and Modes

The game features an **Epic Campaign** that masterfully blends procedural gameplay with crafted story elements, encouraging replayability. Additionally, **Director Mode** introduces modifiers and features to each expedition, increasing the challenge and scope of your adventures.

### New Content for Veterans

For returning players, Curious Expedition 2 introduces a wealth of new content, including:

*   New items
*   New character types
*   New enemies
*   New biomes
*   New tribes
*   New events

### Additional Features

*   **Online Competitions:** Participate in weekly challenges and join an Explorer Club for unique rewards.
*   **Character Customization:** Equip party members with gear to create specialized builds.
*   **Varied Expedition Types:** Undertake expeditions with distinct objectives, such as finding the Golden Pyramid or recovering the Rainbow Orchid.
*   **Rich Discoveries:** Uncover mysterious locations, unique cultures, flora, fauna, and treasures.
*   **Artistic Presentation:** Immerse yourself in 4K-native graphics inspired by classic Franco-Belgian comics.

Name: Curious Expedition
Description:
Curious Expedition is a roguelike expedition simulation set in the late 19th century. Together with famous personalities you will venture on unprecedented expeditions to regions never explored before for fame, science and treasures. Put on your pith helmet and khakis and make your way through a lush, procedurally generated world full of wonder and mystery. Now go explore, adventure awaits! Gameplay overview Experience your very own adventure through a procedural story which makes every game unique. Explore procedurally generated worlds, each with its own distinctive set of challenges for the ambitious explorer. Plan and equip your trek. A good explorer is prepared for any eventuality. Manage your resources to keep your trek alive and sanity high. Balance your needs with the desire to carry all that precious treasure back home. Visit and interact with the land’s natives. Enter villages, trade and communicate with local tribes and civilizations that are unknown to mankind. Loot mysterious temple ruins to gain fame and treasures, but watch out for deadly traps and curses that will compromise your trek and the world around you. Equip and utilize miraculous treasures to gain advantages, but be wary of unforeseeable side effects. Fight and defend your trek against a wide range of wild animals, mystical creatures and even dinosaurs.

## The Deadly Tower of Monsters: A Sci-Fi Cult Classic Reimagined

Discover **The Deadly Tower of Monsters**, a 1970s sci-fi cult classic now available on DVD. The film follows space explorer Dick Starspeed, who finds himself stranded on the planet Gravoria. With his rocket damaged and his robot companion missing, Dick must face the planet's many dangers.

### A Daring Rescue Mission

Dick's journey leads him into a conflict between ape-men factions. Here, he meets Scarlet Nova, the daughter of the tyrannical Emperor. Scarlet reveals her father's cruelty, prompting Dick to join her in overthrowing his regime. A reunion with his resourceful robot, Robot, forms a trio ready to face Gravoria's threats. Together, they aim to restore peace by ascending **THE DEADLY TOWER OF MONSTERS!**

### Timeless Themes and Low-Budget Brilliance

Directed by Dan Smith, the film explores classic themes:

*   A daughter's defiance against a tyrant father.
*   Innocent ape-creatures on a troubled planet.
*   A dashing space-age liberator.
*   An indispensable robot companion.
*   A tower filled with treacherous mutations.

Despite a famously low budget and an often improvised script, Smith created an engrossing narrative. The film features elaborate weaponry, striking special effects, unique soundscapes, and **plenty of explosions!**

### A New Generation's Experience

This tour de force is now on DVD, offering a new generation a chance to experience this beloved sci-fi cult classic. The release includes several highlights:

#### Director Commentary

Director Dan Smith provides humorous anecdotes and production insights.

#### Vertigo-Inducing Verticality

Wide-angle shots and aerial stunts capture the heroes' daring ascents and dives.

#### A Menagerie of Monsters

Over fifty unique creatures, including squid people, nukular ants, and giant blobs, are brought to life through various effects.

#### An Arsenal of Futuristic Fun

Dick, Scarlet, and Robot utilize ray guns, crystal swords, and laser whips, upgrading their gear with collected scrap metal.

#### Unleashing Special Powers

The film features time-slowing vortexes and super-speed boots, enhancing the action.

### Beyond the Film: The Video Game Adaptation

For those eager to step into the action, **The Deadly Tower of Monsters** is also available as an action-adventure video game, allowing players to experience Gravoria firsthand.

Name: Double Kick Heroes
Description:
Double Kick Heroes mixes a rhythm game with a shoot'em up! Jump right into the action and play your favorite tracks from the game. THE HELLGATE HAS OPENED : 6 licensed tracks directly playable in the game! -Kammthaar by Ultra Vomit -The Scarecrow Paradox by Fundamental Wisdom Of Chaos -Cold by Hell In Town -End of the day by Antheus -This means war Act 1 by Volkor X -Against the waves by Temnein -& More is coming! Import whatever track you want and design your own level! Share it with your friend and be the first in the leaderboard! Survive through 24 levels of total madness by killing zombies with your gundillac on the highway to hell! Only the power of Metal can save your band! - Double kick zombies in the face with insane Metal music ! - 30 tremendously f****king awesome quality Metal songs by a legendary video game AND Metal composer. - Import your own music , play community designed tracks, edit your favorite songs and share challenges! - Rodriguez infused background story about being weird guys and gals who live for Sex, Drugs and Heavy Metal. - Explosions, rebels, militias, undeads, road-rage, madness, apocalypse. Ready to hit the fury road? - The only f****king awesome rock and metal rhythm game for Steam, what more!? May the Metal be with you \m/

Name: LEGO® Jurassic World
Description:
Following the epic storylines of Jurassic Park, The Lost World: Jurassic Park and Jurassic Park III, as well as the highly anticipated Jurassic World, LEGO Jurassic World™ is the first videogame where players will be able to relive and experience all four Jurassic films. Reimagined in LEGO form and told in TT Games’ signature classic LEGO humor, the thrilling adventure recreates unforgettable scenes and action sequences from the films, allowing fans to play through key moments and giving them the opportunity to fully explore the expansive grounds of Isla Nublar and Isla Sorna. GAME FEATURES: • Relive key moments from all four Jurassic films: An adventure 65 million years in the making - now in classic LEGO brick fun! • Wreak havoc as LEGO dinosaurs: Choose from 20 dinosaurs, including the friendly Triceratops, deadly Raptor, vicious Compy and even the mighty T. rex. • Customize your own dinosaur collection: Collect LEGO amber and experiment with DNA to create completely original dinosaurs, like the Dilophosaurus Rex. • Populate and explore Isla Nublar and Isla Sorna: Put your unique dinosaur creations in to paddocks as you complete special Free Play missions. • Play with family and friends with easy access drop-in, drop-out gameplay option.

## The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Game of the Year Edition Deluxe

Experience the definitive RPG adventure with The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition Deluxe. This edition offers the ultimate journey through one of the most acclaimed role-playing games ever created. Immerse yourself in a dynamic, meticulously crafted world where stunning visuals meet unparalleled player freedom. You can choose to follow the main quest at your own pace or explore the vast landscape for hidden challenges; your adventure is entirely your own.

### Expansive New Worlds

This comprehensive edition includes two major expansions that significantly broaden the world of Cyrodiil.

#### Knights of the Nine

Embark on an epic questline to reunite a fallen order and restore their former glory across the land.

#### Shivering Isles

Venture into a bizarre new realm shaped by the Mad God Sheogorath. This land is split between Mania and Dementia and is populated by unique and formidable adversaries, according to game lore.

### Core Gameplay Features

Oblivion provides a rich and immersive role-playing experience with several key features.

#### Unprecedented Character Creation

Design and embody any character you can imagine, from a valiant warrior to a cunning assassin or a wise sorcerer.

#### Dynamic First-Person Combat

A revolutionary combat and magic system enhances the first-person perspective, making every encounter feel impactful.

#### Intelligent Radiant AI

Witness a world alive with non-player characters who adhere to 24-hour schedules, eat, sleep, and react realistically to their environment and your actions, as noted by game developers.

### Exclusive Deluxe Content

The English-only Deluxe version further enriches your adventure with exclusive downloadable content.

#### Fighter's Stronghold Expansion

Establish yourself as a noble warrior within a grand, expansive castle.

#### Knights of the Nine Quest

Engage in new dungeons and unravel mysteries to vanquish evil.

#### Spell Tome Treasures

Acquire a variety of potent new spells to master.

#### Vile Lair

Discover an underwater sanctuary, perfect for players embracing a more villainous path.

#### Mehrune's Razor

Obtain a fearsome artifact by conquering a challenging dungeon.

#### The Thieves Den

Locate and claim a lost pirate ship, an ideal base for stealthy characters.

#### Wizard's Tower

Secure a magical stronghold nestled in the frozen mountains, suited for arcane practitioners.

#### Orrery

Restore the Orrery to unlock ancient celestial knowledge within the Mages Guild.

#### Horse Armor Pack

Equip your trusty steed with beautifully designed armor for protection and style.

Name: ELDEN RING
Description:
THE NEW FANTASY ACTION RPG. Rise, Tarnished, and be guided by grace to brandish the power of the Elden Ring and become an Elden Lord in the Lands Between. • A Vast World Full of Excitement A vast world where open fields with a variety of situations and huge dungeons with complex and three-dimensional designs are seamlessly connected. As you explore, the joy of discovering unknown and overwhelming threats await you, leading to a high sense of accomplishment. • Create your Own Character In addition to customizing the appearance of your character, you can freely combine the weapons, armor, and magic that you equip. You can develop your character according to your play style, such as increasing your muscle strength to become a strong warrior, or mastering magic. • An Epic Drama Born from a Myth A multilayered story told in fragments. An epic drama in which the various thoughts of the characters intersect in the Lands Between. • Unique Online Play that Loosely Connects You to Others In addition to multiplayer, where you can directly connect with other players and travel together, the game supports a unique asynchronous online element that allows you to feel the presence of others.

Name: The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition
Description:
The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition presents one of the best RPGs of all time like never before. Step inside the most richly detailed and vibrant game-world ever created. With a powerful combination of freeform gameplay and unprecedented graphics, you can unravel the main quest at your own pace or explore the vast world and find your own challenges. Also included in the Game of the Year edition are Knights of the Nine and the Shivering Isles expansion, adding new and unique quests and content to the already massive world of Oblivion. See why critics called Oblivion the Best Game of 2006. Key features: Live Another Life in Another World Create and play any character you can imagine, from the noble warrior to the sinister assassin to the wizened sorcerer. First Person Melee and Magic An all-new combat and magic system brings first person role-playing to a new level of intensity where you feel every blow. Radiant AI This groundbreaking AI system gives Oblivion's characters full 24/7 schedules and the ability to make their own choices based on the world around them. Non-player characters eat, sleep, and complete goals all on their own. New Lands to Explore In the Shivering Isles expansion, see a world created in Sheogorath's own image, one divided between Mania and Dementia and unlike anything you've experienced in Oblivion.
