Challenging new foes Battle the denizens of Shivering Isles, a land filled with hideous insects, Flesh Atronachs, skeletal Shambles, amphibious Grummites, and many more. Begin a New Faction The Knights of the Nine have long been disbanded. Reclaim their former glory as you traverse the far reaches of Cyrodill across an epic quest line.

## The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt - A Deep Dive into an Epic RPG

*The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt* invites you to embody Geralt of Rivia, a seasoned monster hunter. This narrative-rich, open-world role-playing game (RPG) immerses you in a breathtaking fantasy setting where your decisions carry significant weight. Your primary mission is to find the child of prophecy, traversing a vast world that includes vibrant cities, perilous islands, imposing mountains, and hidden caves.

### Mastering Monster Hunts

Witchers, honed from a young age and gifted with superhuman skills, stand as the main bulwark against monstrous dangers.

*   **Combat Prowess:** Employ a variety of upgradeable weapons, potent potions, and combat magic to overcome foes.
*   **Diverse Prey:** Pursue a wide range of creatures, from mountain dwellers to supernatural threats in urban settings.
*   **Strategic Investments:** Use your earnings to enhance equipment, acquire custom armor, or engage in leisure activities like horse racing, card games, and fistfights.

### Navigating a Complex Moral Landscape

*The Witcher 3* presents an expansive and intricate open world, promising boundless adventure.

*   **Vast Exploration:** Uncover ancient ruins, caves, and shipwrecks. Engage with merchants and artisans in lively towns, and hunt across plains, mountains, and seas.
*   **Compelling Characters:** Interact with treacherous generals, shrewd sorceresses, and corrupt nobility, undertaking dark and dangerous assignments.
*   **Meaningful Choices:** Make decisions that transcend simple good and evil, and face their far-reaching consequences.

### The Child of Prophecy's Fate

Your most critical contract involves locating the child of prophecy, a figure destined to either save or doom the world.

*   **A Foretold Individual:** Amidst a time of turmoil, track this child, foretold by ancient elven prophecies.
*   **Formidable Opponents:** Face fierce rulers, nature spirits, and even otherworldly entities, all vying for control of the world.
*   **Defining Your Destiny:** Shape your future in a world that may question its own existence.

### Next-Generation Immersion

Built for modern systems, the REDengine 3 crafts a detailed and lifelike fantasy realm. Dynamic weather and day/night cycles influence the behavior of both inhabitants and wildlife. The rich tapestry of main and side quests is profoundly shaped by your actions, offering a deeply interactive experience.

Name: Thief™ Gold
Description:
Stalk your prey on the quest for stolen goods with your blackjack, sword, and an assortment of unique arrows. Steal for money and uncover the hidden agendas of your allies and enemies as you play through an unravelling story of deception and revenge. Survive in a world where shadows are your only ally, trust is not an option, and confrontation results in death! Key Features: Pioneering stealth based gameplay brings a new dimension to first person action. Thief™ Gold includes Thief™ The Dark Project (12 huge missions with multiple environments) and the Gold update (3 new campaign missions which deepen the plot and add five new types of enemies) Advanced enemies can see, hear, speak, and sound alarms. Your arsenal includes: blackjack, sword, fire arrows, water arrows, rope arrows and more

Name: Dragon Age: Origins - Ultimate Edition
Description:
Dragon Age: Origins You are a Grey Warden, one of the last of this legendary order of guardians. With the return of mankind's ancient foe and the kingdom engulfed in civil war, you have been chosen by fate to unite the shattered lands and slay the archdemon once and for all. Explore a stunning world, make complex moral choices, and engage in bone-crushing combat against massive and terrifying creatures. Dragon Age: Origins - Awakening Expansion Pack The story of the Grey Wardens continues as you are named their commander. Fight new enemies, learn new skills and spells, and explore an all-new area of the world, Amaranthine. All Nine Content Packs The Stone Prisoner Warden's Keep Return to Ostagar Feastday Gifts The Darkspawn Chronicles Feastday Pranks Leliana's Song The Golems of Amgarrak Witch Hunt Collect new rewards, gain new party members, and more as you delve deeper into the Dragon Age storyline. (Critically acclaimed winner of more than 50 awards including over 30 'Best of 2009' awards.)

Name: DARK SOULS™ II
Description:
We are currently in the process of restoring the online servers for the DARK SOULS series on PC. We plan to restore online service for each game progressively, bringing back servers for DARK SOULS™ II once we complete the necessary work to correct the problem. We will provide additional updates as soon as the restoration schedule is finalized. We want to thank all our players for your patience and understanding as we work to fix this issue. Developed by FROM SOFTWARE, DARK SOULS™ II is the highly anticipated sequel to the gruelling 2011 breakout hit Dark Souls. The unique old-school action RPG experience captivated imaginations of gamers worldwide with incredible challenge and intense emotional reward. DARK SOULS™ II brings the franchise’s renowned obscurity & gripping gameplay innovations to both single and multiplayer experiences. Join the dark journey and experience overwhelming enemy encounters, diabolical hazards, and the unrelenting challenge that only FROM SOFTWARE can deliver. Key Features Go Beyond Death : dare yourself to engage against intense gameplay in a vast world powered by an all new engine that leaps graphics, sound & FX forward like never before A labyrinth of monsters & bosses : immerse yourself into mind-bending environments filled with new twisted monsters and deadly bosses that could only come from the imagination of FROM SOFTWARE Sensory assault : a wide range of threats will prey on human senses & phobias - auditory hallucinations, vertigo, acrophobia, etc Deeper and darker : more intricate customization options provide weapons and armor tailoring to player style Evolved multiplayer : updated multiplayer system enables improved online interaction to bring forward cooperative & competitive play Refined gameplay : DARK SOULS™ II features fluid motion-capture animations, an upgraded combat system, a vastly expanded suite of characters, deeper customization options, new weapons, armor abilities, and a balanced player progression system

### Dragon Age: Origins: Your Epic Journey Begins

In Dragon Age: Origins, you embody a Grey Warden, a member of an ancient order dedicated to defending the land. As a formidable ancient evil re-emerges and the kingdom is torn apart by civil war, destiny has placed a crucial mission upon you: unite the fractured lands and defeat the archdemon.

### A Vast, Living World

Experience BioWare's most ambitious creation yet, offering over 80 hours of gameplay across numerous distinct environments on the verge of collapse. Your playstyle and decisions profoundly influence the epic narrative, ensuring your choices have significant consequences.

### Challenging Moral Choices

Prepare for tough decisions with no clear right or wrong answers. The game forces players to grapple with themes of murder, genocide, betrayal, and the sacrifice of children, eschewing a simple good versus evil system.

### Detailed Character Creation

Craft your hero by designing a character that matches your vision, from their appearance to their personality. Your in-game actions will mold your character's disposition and ethical framework.

### Intense and Gritty Combat

Face off against colossal and terrifying foes, utilizing over 100 spells and abilities. Engage in visceral combat, from dismembering enemies to unleashing devastating magical attacks.

### Significant Expansions and Content

#### Blood Dragon Armor

This armor, created for a famed dragon hunter, was forged during a time when dragons were almost extinct. It became infamous when its wearer was defeated by humans, not by the beasts it was designed to fight. This armor offers superior protection and can also be used in BioWare's Mass Effect 2.

#### The Stone Prisoner

Uncover the mystery of Honnleath, a village afflicted by darkspawn. At its core lies an ancient stone figure—a potent golem preserved in time. Players have the opportunity to liberate Shale, a formidable stone golem, who can then join their party. Undertake a quest to explore Shale's detailed history and unique companion mission. The Stone Prisoner adds new areas, equipment, and extended gameplay, featuring new achievements and deeper insights into the Dragon Age: Origins story.

Embark on an epic journey with Pillars of Eternity, a captivating role-playing game developed by Obsidian Entertainment, renowned for their work on Fallout: New Vegas™ and South Park: The Stick of Truth™. Published by Paradox Interactive, this title invites players to immerse themselves in a world where their decisions profoundly impact their destiny. Pillars of Eternity recaptures the essence of classic RPGs, offering a deep sense of exploration, a thrilling adventure, and the strategic challenge of leading a party of companions through a vibrant fantasy realm.

Venture into monster-infested dungeons, uncover lost treasures, and unravel ancient mysteries. The game encourages players to gather their party, embrace adventure, and delve into a realm brimming with wonder and nostalgia. Obsidian's Pillars of Eternity delivers the excitement of classic RPG experiences with modern depth.

The game offers extensive character customization, allowing players to forge their unique hero. Players can select from a variety of options to craft their ideal adventurer.

*   **Races:** Choose from six distinct races: Human, Aumaua, Dwarf, Elf, Godlike, and Orlan.
*   **Core Skills:** Master five essential skills to navigate any challenge: Stealth, Athletics, Lore, Mechanics, and Survival.
*   **Classes:** Develop your character from eleven diverse classes, including Barbarian, Chanter, Cipher, Druid, Fighter, Monk, Paladin, Priest, Ranger, Rogue, and Wizard.

Your choices matter in Pillars of Eternity. The game features a robust reputation system that allows you to side with various factions. Your actions and decisions will have far-reaching consequences, shaping the narrative and the world around you. Explore a rich and diverse world brought to life by beautiful pre-rendered environments, an engaging story, and memorable characters. This meticulously crafted world invites you to discover its secrets and forge your own legend.

Name: DARK SOULS™ III
Description:
We are currently in the process of restoring the online servers for the DARK SOULS series on PC. We plan to restore online service for each game progressively, bringing back servers for DARK SOULS™ III once we complete the necessary work to correct the problem. We will provide additional updates as soon as the restoration schedule is finalized. We want to thank all our players for your patience and understanding as we work to fix this issue. Get the DARK SOULS™ III Season Pass now and challenge yourself with all the available content! Winner of gamescom award 2015 'Best RPG' and over 35 E3 2015 Awards and Nominations. DARK SOULS™ III continues to push the boundaries with the latest, ambitious chapter in the critically-acclaimed and genre-defining series. As fires fade and the world falls into ruin, journey into a universe filled with more colossal enemies and environments. Players will be immersed into a world of epic atmosphere and darkness through faster gameplay and amplified combat intensity. Fans and newcomers alike will get lost in the game hallmark rewarding gameplay and immersive graphics. Now only embers remain… Prepare yourself once more and Embrace The Darkness!

Name: NORCO
Description:
NORCO is a Southern Gothic point & click narrative adventure that immerses the player in the sinking suburbs and verdant industrial swamps of a distorted South Louisiana. Your brother Blake has gone missing in the aftermath of your mother's death. In the hopes of finding him, you must follow a fugitive security android through the refineries, strip malls, and drainage ditches of suburban New Orleans. Immerse yourself in a surreal and uncanny South Louisiana NORCO’s painterly and cinematic pixel art draws the player into its quotidian sci-fi world of disappearing swamplands, labyrinthine oil refineries, and other landscapes inspired by the titular town of Norco, Louisiana and other parts of Greater New Orleans. Sink into the rich field recordings and sound design by fmAura and a driving, post-industrial electronic score from Gewgawly I. Unravel a mystery in a world haunted by the past and threatened by the future What starts as a straightforward search for your missing brother quickly spirals into a multigenerational mystery. The lines between salvation, memory, technology, and nature bleed together into a uniquely compelling, contemplative narrative rooted in Southern literature, pulp fiction, and point & click adventure games both classic and contemporary. Explore alongside sharply drawn characters with deep roots, rich backstories, and complex motives A chaotic bayou pirate, bar-stool private detective, escaped security android, and your stuffed childhood monkey will all offer assistance in an eroding and uncertain world. Solve puzzles, fight your way past corporate security goons, and infiltrate an influencer cult squatting an abandoned mall on the outskirts of New Orleans.

## Lacuna: A Sci-Fi Noir Adventure

Dive into the atmospheric world of *Lacuna*, a sci-fi noir adventure where your choices have real consequences. This game challenges you to navigate a complex narrative, making difficult decisions that shape your destiny and the fate of the solar system.

### The Save the World Edition

The *Save the World Edition* of *Lacuna* offers more than just the game itself. It includes:

*   **The Game:** Experience the full *Lacuna* adventure.
*   **Atmospheric Soundtrack:** Immerse yourself deeper into the sci-fi noir setting.
*   **Charitable Contribution:** 10% of the revenues from this edition are donated to Go Give One, a WHO initiative providing COVID-19 vaccines and other essential healthcare to those most in need globally.

This edition is ideal for players who wish to further support the developer's work while contributing to a worthy cause.

### Your Role as Neil Conrad

You are Neil Conrad, a CDI agent. A murder investigation thrusts you into a conspiracy that will shake your life and the entire solar system to its core.

*   **Investigate:** Ask questions and gather evidence.
*   **Deduce:** Piece together clues to uncover the truth.
*   **Decide:** Your actions will determine the outcome.

### Consequences and Choices

*Lacuna* features a branching narrative with multiple endings, meaning your choices are permanent. There are no takebacks. While you can rush to the conclusion, be prepared for the repercussions. Success hinges on playing your cards right to survive.

The game presents moral dilemmas with no easy answers:

*   Will you betray a friend to protect your family?
*   Will you risk a loved one for the sake of public safety?
*   Will you maintain peace or expose a devastating truth?

### A Modern Take on Adventure Games

*Lacuna* reimagines the point-and-click adventure genre by shedding common tropes:

*   **No Platformer Movement:** Navigate with WASD or a controller.
*   **Dynamic Conversations:** Experience non-repeating dialogue and meaningful choices.
*   **Streamlined Puzzles:** Avoid inventory management and counter-intuitive challenges.
*   **Uninterrupted Narrative:** The story flows forward, driven by your progress, not by puzzle grinds.
*   **Meaningful Impact:** Your decisions are remembered and influence the game's conclusion.

Name: Her Story
Description:
A Video Game About a Woman Talking to the Police Her Story is the award winning video game from Sam Barlow, creator of Silent Hill: Shattered Memories and Aisle. A crime fiction game with non-linear storytelling, Her Story revolves around a police database full of live action video footage. It stars Viva Seifert, actress and one half of the band Joe Gideon and the Shark. How does it work? Her Story sits you in front of a mothballed desktop computer that’s logged into a police database of video footage. The footage covers seven interviews from 1994 in which a British woman is interviewed about her missing husband. Explore the database by typing search terms, watch the clips where she speaks those words and piece together her story. Unlike anything you've played before, Her Story is an involving and moving experience. A game that asks you to listen.

Name: The Forgotten City
Description:
Travel 2,000 years into the past and relive the final days of a cursed Roman city, where if one person sins, everyone dies. Combat is an option, but violence will only get you so far. Only by questioning an intertwined community of colourful characters, cleverly exploiting the time loop, and making difficult moral choices can you hope to solve this epic mystery. Here, your decisions matter. The fate of the city is in your hands. Explore an open-world ancient Roman city with historically authentic art, architecture, costumes and customs Investigate a gripping, non-linear mystery with multiple endings Become entwined in the lives of richly detailed, deeply interactive characters Grapple with moral dilemmas which have life-and-death consequences Play as whoever you want, by choosing your character’s gender, origin and backstory Solve problems with reason, charm, bribery, intimidation, violence, or by cleverly exploiting the time-loop

Name: Telling Lies
Description:
A Video Game About Private Conversations Telling Lies is the new video game from Sam Barlow, creator of Her Story and Silent Hill: Shattered Memories. An investigative thriller game with non-linear storytelling, Telling Lies revolves around a cache of secretly recorded video conversations. It stars Logan Marshall-Green , Alexandra Shipp , Kerry Bishé and Angela Sarafyan . How does it work? Telling Lies sits you in front of an anonymous laptop loaded with a stolen NSA database full of footage. The footage covers two years in the intimate lives of four people whose stories are linked by a shocking incident. Explore the database by typing search terms, watch the clips where those words are spoken and piece together your story. Unlike anything you've played before, Telling Lies is an intimate and intense experience. A game where you decide the truth.

## Unraveling the Mysteries of Twin Lakes: A Fumble in the Dark

Prepare to delve back into the peculiar and perpetually paranormal world of Twin Lakes, America's 34th most haunted city, with **The Darkside Detective: A Fumble in the Dark**. This chilling point-and-click adventure invites you to join the ever-resourceful Detective Francis McQueen as he tackles six new, spine-tingling cases. Twin Lakes, a city cursed just enough to be a persistent nuisance, requires a dedicated investigator to untangle the macabre mysteries that plague its residents.

### The Cursed City and Its Unlikely Hero

Twin Lakes occupies a unique spot on the curse spectrum. It's not quite a city under siege by demonic forces, but it's certainly more afflicted than a place that simply misplaces its keys or frequently encounters puddles. This moderate level of supernatural affliction necessitates the intervention of The Darkside Detective. Whenever a bump echoes in the night, a shiver runs down your spine, or an inexplicable fishy odor permeates the air, Detective McQueen is on the case. As noted in the game's premise, he's not personally responsible for the fishy smells – it's a figure of speech, of course.

### A New Threat and a Familiar Partnership

Picking up after the events of the original **The Darkside Detective**, this installment sees Detective McQueen facing a new, urgent mission: rescuing his usually-present sidekick, Officer Dooley, from the clutches of the Darkside. Their reunion is crucial, allowing the duo to return to their signature investigative style, tackling the city's strange, often paranormal, and always paradoxical occurrences.

### A Tour of Twin Lakes' Most Peculiar Locales

The game promises a diverse range of investigations, taking players to some of Twin Lakes' most unusual settings. According to promotional materials, players can expect to explore:

*   A vibrant, yet potentially sinister, carnival.
*   The quiet, but perhaps not so peaceful, local retirement home.
*   The boisterous and unpredictable world of an amateur wrestling circuit.
*   Even venturing as far afield as Ireland, showcasing the far-reaching influence of the Darkside.

Through these varied scenarios, McQueen and Dooley will do their utmost to keep the encroaching Darkside at bay. If the premise of this frighteningly funny adventure appeals to you, the developers suggest trying the first title in the series to get a taste of the unique investigative style and dark humor.

Name: Strange Horticulture
Description:
Find and identify new plants, pet your cat, speak to a coven, or join a cult. Use your growing collection to influence the story and unravel Undermere’s dark mysteries. Welcome to Undermere, a quaint town surrounded by hag-infested forests and rugged mountains. You are the Horticulturist, owner of local plant store Strange Horticulture. As a cast of colorful customers come by your shop, you are quickly thrust into an occult mystery stretching back hundreds of years. Explore the lands beyond your store to find new plants, but be careful! The dark woods and lakes are not always friendly to a simple herbalist. You might discover powers beyond your wildest dreams - or lose your mind completely. Use context clues to determine which places to visit, and which to avoid! Using your trusty encyclopedia and clues found on your explorations, you learn more about the strange plants you come across. By identifying each plant, you will be able to use their effects to influence the story -- from hypnotic hallucinogens to powerful poisons.

Name: L.A. Noire
Description:
Using groundbreaking new animation technology, MotionScan, that captures every nuance of an actor's facial performance in astonishing detail, L.A. Noire is a violent crime thriller that blends breathtaking action with true detective work to deliver an unprecedented interactive experience. Search for clues, chase down suspects and interrogate witnesses as you struggle to find the truth in a city where everyone has something to hide. Amid the post-war boom of Hollywood's Golden Age, Cole Phelps is an LAPD detective thrown headfirst into a city drowning in its own success. Corruption is rampant, the drug trade is exploding, and murder rates are at an all-time high. In his fight to climb the ranks and do what's right, Phelps must unravel the truth behind a string of arson attacks, racketeering conspiracies and brutal murders, battling the L.A. underworld and even members of his own department to uncover a secret that could shake the city to its rotten core. This complete edition of L.A. Noire includes the complete original game and all previously released downloadable content including the 'Nicolson Electroplating' Arson case, the 'Reefer Madness' Vice case, 'The Consul's Car' Traffic case, 'The Naked City' Vice case and 'A Slip of the Tongue' Traffic case.

## Step into the Gritty Streets of 1940s Los Angeles with L.A. Noire: The VR Case Files

Experience a **dark and violent crime thriller** like never before in L.A. Noire: The VR Case Files. This immersive virtual reality title plunges you directly into the shoes of Detective Cole Phelps, tasked with solving a series of **brutal crimes, plots, and conspiracies**. These compelling narratives are **inspired by real cases** from 1947 Los Angeles, a period notorious for its corruption and violence.

### Unraveling Mysteries in Virtual Reality

L.A. Noire: The VR Case Files features **seven meticulously rebuilt cases** specifically designed for virtual reality. This enhances the **immersion and realism** of Rockstar Games' atmospheric crime thriller. You'll tackle select cases from the blockbuster original game, spanning investigations across various detective desks, including Traffic, Arson, and Homicide.

### Your Detective Toolkit in VR

As Detective Phelps, you'll engage in a variety of detective activities:

*   **Clue Discovery:** **Search for clues by grabbing, inspecting, and manipulating objects** with your own hands.
*   **Navigating the City:** **Get behind the wheel and drive to your next crime scene**, experiencing the city firsthand.
*   **Pursuing Suspects:** **Engage in chases, fistfights, and shootouts** as you track down those responsible.
*   **Building Your Case:** **Make notes or draw freehand in your detective’s notebook** to meticulously build your evidence.
*   **Interrogation:** **Interrogate witnesses and use your wits to separate truth from lies** in a city where deception is rampant.

### Crucial System Specifications for VR Play

To ensure a smooth and intended gameplay experience, specific hardware configurations are **essential**. Due to current performance considerations with AMD hardware, **only certain combinations of AMD and NVIDIA/Intel hardware are supported**:

*   **AMD Ryzen 7 CPU Users:** A **NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1070 (or above)** graphics card is **required**.
*   **AMD Vega 56 Graphics Card Users:** An **Intel i7 6700 (or above)** CPU is **required**.

**Important Note:** Attempting to use an AMD CPU and GPU together to play the game is **not supported at this time**. L.A. Noire: The VR Case Files **only supports a single graphics card architecture**; NVIDIA SLI and AMD CrossFire features are **not supported**.

### Staying Up-to-Date with Compatibility

System requirements are subject to change due to ongoing programming updates. For the most current compatibility information, please refer to your hardware manufacturer and the official **www.rockstargames.com/support** website. Be aware that some system components, such as mobile chipsets, integrated, and AGP graphics cards, may be incompatible. Specifications not explicitly listed may not be supported by the publisher.

### Additional Requirements for Installation and Play

*   **Rockstar Games Social Club:** Installation and play **requires log-in to the Rockstar Games Social Club** network (age 13+).
*   **Internet Connection:** An internet connection is **required for activation and periodic entitlement verification**.
*   **Software Installations:** You will need to install the following software: Rockstar Games Social Club platform, DirectX 9, DirectX June 2010 Redistributable Package, Chromium, and Microsoft Visual C++ 2012 and 2015 Redistributable Packages. Authentication software that recognizes certain hardware attributes for entitlement, digital rights management, system, and other support purposes is also necessary.
*   **Serial Code Registration:** A **single-use serial code registration via internet is required**. Registration is limited to one Rockstar Games Social Club account (age 13+) per serial code. Only one PC login is allowed per Social Club account at any time. Serial codes are **non-transferable once used**, and Social Club accounts are also non-transferable.

Name: Silicon Dreams  |  cyberpunk interrogation
Description:
Investigate humans and androids in a corporate-controlled dystopian future where the lines between the real and the artificial have blurred to almost nothing. Research your subjects, choose your questions carefully, and probe for the truth, however dreadful it may be. Monitor interviewees’ emotions in real time - joy, sadness, anger, disgust, shock, and fear. Use this data to your advantage, intimidating, cajoling, or even befriending your subjects in order to to uncover more information. Choose a side in the midst of a brewing conflict: lie to your superiors and spare deviant androids, or condemn them to secure your own survival within the corporation. There are no easy answers. Silicon Dreams has multiple endings depending on the choices you make. Each android could live or die by your words.

Portal 2 is a highly anticipated sequel that builds upon the groundbreaking foundation of its predecessor. The original Portal garnered over 70 industry awards and cultivated a dedicated fan base. This innovative title expands on the original's acclaimed gameplay, compelling narrative, and memorable soundtrack.

### Single-Player Adventures

The single-player experience in Portal 2 introduces players to a vibrant new cast of characters. Players will encounter a variety of novel puzzle mechanics and an expanded array of challenging test chambers. According to Valve, the developers, players will venture into previously unexplored sections of the Aperture Science Laboratories. A key element of the single-player campaign is the return of GLaDOS. This complex and sometimes homicidal artificial intelligence served as the player's guide in the first game.

### Cooperative Challenges

Portal 2 also features a robust two-player cooperative mode. This mode offers a completely distinct campaign with its own unique storyline. It boasts specialized test chambers and two new player characters. As reported by numerous gaming outlets, this cooperative element necessitates a fundamental shift in player strategy. It demands not only coordinated actions but also collaborative thinking to overcome obstacles.

### Core Features

Portal 2 offers several key features:

*   **Engaging Single-Player Campaign:** This mode delivers next-generation gameplay and a deeply engaging narrative.
*   **Dedicated Two-Person Co-op:** A unique multiplayer experience featuring its own storyline, characters, and gameplay mechanics.
*   **Advanced Physics Engine:** This allows for the design of a wide spectrum of intriguing challenges. The result is a larger game that is not necessarily more difficult.
*   **Acclaimed Original Soundtrack:** The game features a unique and acclaimed musical score.
*   **Significant Sequel:** The original Portal was recognized as Game of the Year by over 30 publications in 2007, highlighting its significant impact.
*   **Included Editing Tools:** Portal 2 will come with its own set of editing tools. This empowers players to create and share their own content.

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
Description:
With over 6 million units sold and unprecedented critical acclaim from fans and press around the world, Sid Meier's Civilization is recognized as one of the greatest PC game franchises of all-time. Now, Sid Meier and Firaxis Games will take this incredibly fun and addictive game to new heights by adding new ways to play and win, new tools to manage and expand your civilization, all-new easy to use mod capabilities and intense multiplayer modes and options*. Civilization IV will come to life like never before in a beautifully detailed, living 3D world that will elevate the gameplay experience to a whole new level. Civilization IV has already been heralded as one of the top ten games of 2005, and a must-have for gamers around the globe! *Mac version's Online Multiplayer is no longer supported.

Name: System Shock 2
Description:
'Remember, it is my will that guided you here. It is my will that gave you your cybernetic implants, the only beauty in that meat you call a body. If you value that meat... you will do as I tell you.' The cult classic sci-fi horror FPS-RPG has returned. You awake from the cold chill of your cryo-tube to discover cybernetic implants grafted to your flesh and the crew of the starship Von Braun slaughtered. The infected roam the halls, their screams and moans beckoning you to join them as the rogue artificial intelligence known as SHODAN taunts and ridicules your feeble attempt to unravel the horrifying mystery of the derelict starship Von Braun. Your Training Has Prepared You For This. Choose from 3 specialized branches of the military to utilize unique skills, weaponry, and paranormal psionic powers. Upgrade and enhance your skills to improve hacking, weapon proficiency, and psionic abilities. Discover cryptic audio logs, encounter ghostly apparitions and conduct research to give you the advantage in combat and unlock exotic weapons and items. Play with up to three friends in multiplayer co-op (co-op works in Windows only) System Shock™ 2 is a genre defining experience that established innovative game-play mechanics that are a staple of the FPS and RPG genre today. It has gone on to inspire some of the greatest titles of our generation with games including Deus Ex® and Bioshock® Discover how a haunting story, innovative game-play and a terrifying atmosphere has made System Shock™ 2 one of the greatest games of all time. The Mac OS and Linux versions of System Shock 2 use a technology called 'WINE' to function on those operating systems.

Name: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition
Description:
Critically acclaimed Batman: Arkham Asylum returns with a remastered Game of the Year Edition, featuring 4 extra Challenge Maps. The additional Challenge Maps are Crime Alley; Scarecrow Nightmare; Totally Insane and Nocturnal Hunter (both from the Insane Night Map Pack). Utilize the unique FreeFlow™ combat system to chain together unlimited combos seamlessly and battle with huge groups of The Joker’s henchmen in brutal melee brawls Investigate as Batman, the WORLD’S GREATEST DETECTIVE, by solving intricate puzzles with the help of cutting edge forensic tools including x-ray scanning, fingerprint scans, ‘Amido Black’ spray and a pheromone tracker Face off against Gotham’s greatest villains including The Joker, HARLEY QUINN, POISON IVY and KILLER CROC Become the Invisible Predator™ with Batman’s fear takedowns and unique vantage point system to move without being seen and hunt enemies Choose multiple takedown methods, including swooping from the sky and smashing through walls. Explore every inch of Arkham Asylum and roam freely on the infamous island, presented for the first time ever in its gritty and realistic entirety Experience what it’s like to be BATMAN using BATARANGS, explosive gel aerosol, The Batclaw, sonar resonator and the line launcher Unlock more secrets by completing hidden challenges in the world and develop and customize equipment by earning experience points Enjoy complete superhero freedom in the environment with the use of Batman’s grapnel gun to get to any place you can see, jump from any height and glide in any direction

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® V
Description:
The Flagship Turn-Based Strategy Game Returns Become Ruler of the World by establishing and leading a civilization from the dawn of man into the space age: Wage war, conduct diplomacy, discover new technologies, go head-to-head with some of history’s greatest leaders and build the most powerful empire the world has ever known. INVITING PRESENTATION: Jump right in and play at your own pace with an intuitive interface that eases new players into the game. Veterans will appreciate the depth, detail and control that are highlights of the series. BELIEVABLE WORLD: Ultra realistic graphics showcase lush landscapes for you to explore, battle over and claim as your own. COMMUNITY & MULTIPLAYER: Compete with players all over the world or locally in LAN matches, mod* the game in unprecedented ways, and install mods directly from an in-game community hub without ever leaving the game. WIDE SYSTEM COMPATIBILITY: Civilization V operates on many different systems, from high end desktops to many laptops. ALL NEW FEATURES: A new hex-based gameplay grid opens up exciting new combat and build strategies. City States become a new resource in your diplomatic battleground. An improved diplomacy system allows you to negotiate with fully interactive leaders. *Modding SDK available as a free download. Note: The Mac and Linux + SteamOS versions of Sid Meier's Civilization V are available in English, French, Italian, German and Spanish only.

Name: Portal
Description:
Portal™ is a new single player game from Valve. Set in the mysterious Aperture Science Laboratories, Portal has been called one of the most innovative new games on the horizon and will offer gamers hours of unique gameplay. The game is designed to change the way players approach, manipulate, and surmise the possibilities in a given environment; similar to how Half-Life® 2's Gravity Gun innovated new ways to leverage an object in any given situation. Players must solve physical puzzles and challenges by opening portals to maneuvering objects, and themselves, through space.

## Assassin's Creed 2: A Renaissance of Vengeance and Freedom

Assassin's Creed® 2 invites players into the **vibrant yet brutal landscape of Renaissance Italy**, continuing the legacy of the fastest-selling new IP in video game history. This epic narrative centers on **Ezio Auditore da Firenze**, a young Italian noble whose life is irrevocably changed by family, vengeance, and conspiracy.

### The Rise of Ezio Auditore da Firenze

At the heart of Assassin's Creed 2 is Ezio Auditore da Firenze, a **charismatic and free-spirited nobleman**. His journey begins with a devastating betrayal that leads to the loss of his family, propelling him onto a path of **personal growth and the relentless pursuit of justice**. Players will embody Ezio as he transforms from a carefree youth into a **master assassin**, offering a deeply human and compelling protagonist.

### A Rich Historical Tapestry: 15th Century Italy

The game is set against the backdrop of a **fragmented 15th-century Italy**, a period of immense artistic and cultural rebirth, yet also rife with **corruption, greed, and murder**. Powerful city-states like Florence and Venice serve as the sprawling playgrounds for Ezio's quest. This era, known as the Renaissance, provides a **rich and compelling setting** that is as beautiful as it is dangerous.

### Unprecedented Player Freedom and Exploration

Assassin's Creed 2 revolutionized gameplay with its **open-ended world**, granting players unparalleled freedom. This freedom extends to how players approach their objectives:

*   **Mission Choice:** Players can **choose their missions** and tackle them at their own pace and in their preferred order, fostering a truly personalized experience.
*   **Diverse Environments:** The game allows players to **explore iconic cities** and engage in a variety of activities, including swimming and even the exhilarating prospect of **flying**.
*   **Gameplay Experimentation:** A **variety of mechanics** encourages players to experiment and discover their own unique playstyle.

### A Living, Breathing World

The game world of Assassin's Creed 2 is brought to life with a **dynamic crowd system**. Every non-player character (NPC) presents an opportunity for interaction and strategic advantage:

*   **Seamless Blending:** Players can **utilize the crowd for stealth and evasion**, becoming one with the bustling city streets.
*   **Character Interaction:** Engaging with in-game individuals can lead to **potential rewards**, but players must also be aware of the inherent risks involved.

### Mastering the Art of Assassination

Ezio's transformation into a master assassin is marked by the acquisition and mastery of a range of deadly skills. Players will:

*   **Wield New Weapons:** Master an **arsenal of tools** designed for both combat and discreet assassination.
*   **Disarm and Counter:** The ability to **turn enemy weapons against them** adds a strategic layer to combat encounters.
*   **Utilize the Hidden Blade:** The **iconic assassin tool** remains central to Ezio's lethal repertoire, a symbol of his deadly profession.

### Important Note on Online Features

Please be aware that as of November 19th, 2018, **online multiplayer and co-op features for Assassin's Creed 2 are no longer supported and are inaccessible**. This restriction specifically applies to the MAC version of the game.

Sid Meier's Civilization IV®: Beyond the Sword, the second expansion for the acclaimed 2005 PC Game of the Year, significantly deepens the strategic experience by focusing on the eras following the invention of gunpowder. This expansion introduces a wealth of new content designed to challenge and engage players, with a particular emphasis on enhancing late-game play.

Beyond the Sword boasts **11 unique and challenging scenarios** crafted by Firaxis and community members, offering diverse gameplay experiences. The expansion also introduces:

*   **Ten new civilizations**, including Portugal, Babylonians, and the Netherlands, each with unique units and buildings.
*   **Sixteen new leaders**, such as Hammurabi of the Babylonians and Abraham Lincoln for the United States.

Key new features include:

*   **Corporations:** A new game mechanic, similar to religion, allowing players to found and spread corporations globally for distinct benefits.
*   **Espionage:** Accessible earlier, espionage offers new ways to gather intelligence, incite unrest, and protect secrets.
*   **Events:** Players will encounter new random events, like natural disasters, presenting obstacles to overcome.
*   **New Wonders:** Five new wonders, including the Statue of Zeus and Cristo Redentor, offer significant strategic advantages.
*   **Expanded Victory Conditions:** The race to Alpha Centauri is more intricate, and the United Nations becomes available earlier for diplomatic victories.
*   **Advanced Starts:** Players can "buy" components for a custom empire and begin in the later game for a quicker experience of new features.
*   **Advanced AI:** The AI is significantly enhanced, relying more on intelligent play for a more consistent and challenging experience. As one developer noted, "We wanted to ensure the AI felt like a true competitor, not just a set of numbers."

**IL-2 Sturmovik: 1946 - A Comprehensive Anthology of World War II Aerial Combat**

IL-2 Sturmovik: 1946 is an expansive anthology that brings together the entirety of the original IL-2 series. This collection includes the critically acclaimed IL-2 Sturmovik™: Forgotten Battles, the Ace Expansion Pack, Pacific Fighters™, and unique alternate history campaigns set in 1946. What began as a focused flight simulator for a single aircraft has blossomed into a vast collection, featuring 229 flyable aircraft and over 300 aircraft in total.

**Key Enhancements and Content**

The game has been meticulously updated to version 4.12.2, a significant community-driven release. This update introduces several key improvements.

**Widescreen Support**
Experience enhanced visuals with correct Field of View (FOV) settings optimized for modern displays.

**New Content**
The update significantly expands gameplay with a wealth of new aircraft, maps, and scenarios.

**Expansive Additions in IL-2 Sturmovik: 1946**

This collection boasts a substantial number of new additions, enriching the aerial combat experience.

**New Aircraft**
*   32 new flyable fighters and bombers.
*   Four new AI-controlled aircraft.

**New Maps**
Players can explore several expansive new historical maps, including:
*   The Kiev region, offering a detailed depiction of this significant area.
*   A map of Manchuria, focusing on the border region between the USSR, China, and Japanese-occupied Korea.
*   A large bonus Burma map, providing an additional theater of operations.
*   An online Khalkin Gol / Nomonhan map, ideal for multiplayer engagements.

**New Campaigns and Missions**
*   Nine new campaigns have been added, comprising nearly 200 missions.
*   These campaigns are noted for their incredible realism and meticulous attention to detail.
*   They offer detailed career paths for both fighter and bomber pilots across the German, Soviet, and Japanese air forces.
*   Mission objectives are varied, including flying jet bombers over occupied Europe and intercepting American B-29 Superfortresses over Iwo Jima and the Japanese home islands.

**Alternate History Scenarios**
*   Three of the nine new campaigns explore hypothetical battles between the Soviet Union and Germany in 1946, a period when World War II was still ongoing.

**Extensive Paint Schemes**
*   The collection features nearly 1,000 new paint schemes.
*   These historical liveries adorn both new and existing aircraft, accurately representing individual aircraft or squadrons that served during World War II.

**Call of Duty®: Modern Warfare® 2 (2009): A New Era of Action**

Prepare for the most anticipated game of the year! Call of Duty®: Modern Warfare® 2 (2009) is the thrilling sequel to the best-selling first-person action game of all time. This installment plunges players into a world teetering on the brink of collapse, facing a formidable new threat. The narrative picks up immediately after the groundbreaking events of Call of Duty® 4: Modern Warfare®, a title that garnered immense critical acclaim and set new standards for the genre.

### A Musical Masterpiece

Modern Warfare 2 features a groundbreaking musical soundtrack composed by the legendary Hans Zimmer. This Academy Award®, Golden Globe® Award, Grammy® Award, and Tony Award-winning composer brings his signature touch to the game's intense atmosphere, enhancing the player's immersive experience.

### Critical Acclaim of its Predecessor

The original Call of Duty® 4: Modern Warfare® achieved significant recognition. It was recognized as the 'Most Played Online Video Game' in history, according to 2009 Guinness World Records. Furthermore, it earned over 50 Game of the Year awards, including Console Game of the Year and Overall Game of the Year in 2007 from the Academy of Interactive Arts & Sciences®.

### Introducing Special Ops Co-Operative

Modern Warfare 2 introduces an entirely new gameplay mode: Special Ops. This mode supports two-player online co-operative play, offering a distinct experience from the single-player story campaign. Special Ops challenges players with a series of time-trial and objective-based missions. As you progress, you'll unlock new Special Ops missions, each escalating in difficulty. These missions draw from highlights of the single-player campaign, fan favorites from Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare, and entirely new, exclusive content.

### Multiplayer Reinvented

Modern Warfare 2 redefines online multiplayer with a host of new capabilities, customization options, gamestates, and modes.

#### Create-a-Class Evolved

The Create-a-Class system has been significantly enhanced. Players can now equip secondary weapons such as Machine Pistols, Shotguns, Handguns, and Launchers. Defensive options include Riot Shields. Tactical Equipment now features Throwing Knives, Blast Shields, and Tactical Insertions. Perk Upgrades offer enhanced player abilities, and Weapon Customization, known as Bling, allows for dual attachments on weapons.

#### Customizable Killstreaks

Players can unlock and deploy powerful killstreaks such as the AC130, Sentry Gun, Predator Missile, Counter-UAV, and Care Package, offering strategic advantages.

#### Accolades System

A comprehensive Accolades System provides post-match reports to track your performance and progress.

Name: Portal 2
Description:
Portal 2 draws from the award-winning formula of innovative gameplay, story, and music that earned the original Portal over 70 industry accolades and created a cult following. The single-player portion of Portal 2 introduces a cast of dynamic new characters, a host of fresh puzzle elements, and a much larger set of devious test chambers. Players will explore never-before-seen areas of the Aperture Science Labs and be reunited with GLaDOS, the occasionally murderous computer companion who guided them through the original game. The game’s two-player cooperative mode features its own entirely separate campaign with a unique story, test chambers, and two new player characters. This new mode forces players to reconsider everything they thought they knew about portals. Success will require them to not just act cooperatively, but to think cooperatively. Product Features Extensive single player: Featuring next generation gameplay and a wildly-engrossing story. Complete two-person co-op: Multiplayer game featuring its own dedicated story, characters, and gameplay. Advanced physics: Allows for the creation of a whole new range of interesting challenges, producing a much larger but not harder game. Original music. Massive sequel: The original Portal was named 2007's Game of the Year by over 30 publications worldwide. Editing Tools: Portal 2 editing tools will be included.

Name: ELDEN RING
Description:
THE NEW FANTASY ACTION RPG. Rise, Tarnished, and be guided by grace to brandish the power of the Elden Ring and become an Elden Lord in the Lands Between. • A Vast World Full of Excitement A vast world where open fields with a variety of situations and huge dungeons with complex and three-dimensional designs are seamlessly connected. As you explore, the joy of discovering unknown and overwhelming threats await you, leading to a high sense of accomplishment. • Create your Own Character In addition to customizing the appearance of your character, you can freely combine the weapons, armor, and magic that you equip. You can develop your character according to your play style, such as increasing your muscle strength to become a strong warrior, or mastering magic. • An Epic Drama Born from a Myth A multilayered story told in fragments. An epic drama in which the various thoughts of the characters intersect in the Lands Between. • Unique Online Play that Loosely Connects You to Others In addition to multiplayer, where you can directly connect with other players and travel together, the game supports a unique asynchronous online element that allows you to feel the presence of others.

Name: God of War
Description:
Enter the Norse realm His vengeance against the Gods of Olympus years behind him, Kratos now lives as a man in the realm of Norse Gods and monsters. It is in this harsh, unforgiving world that he must fight to survive… and teach his son to do the same. Grasp a second chance Kratos is a father again. As mentor and protector to Atreus, a son determined to earn his respect, he is forced to deal with and control the rage that has long defined him while out in a very dangerous world with his son. Journey to a dark, elemental world of fearsome creatures From the marble and columns of ornate Olympus to the gritty forests, mountains and caves of pre-Viking Norse lore, this is a distinctly new realm with its own pantheon of creatures, monsters and gods. Engage in visceral, physical combat With an over the shoulder camera that brings the player closer to the action than ever before, fights in God of War™ mirror the pantheon of Norse creatures Kratos will face: grand, gritty and grueling. A new main weapon and new abilities retain the defining spirit of the God of War series while presenting a vision of conflict that forges new ground in the genre. PC FEATURES High Fidelity Graphics Striking visuals enhanced on PC. Enjoy true 4K resolution, on supported devices, [MU1] with unlocked framerates for peak performance. Dial in your settings via a wide range of graphical presets and options including higher resolution shadows, improved screen space reflections, the addition of GTAO and SSDO, and much more. NVIDIA® DLSS and Reflex Support Quality meets performance. Harness the AI power of NVIDIA Deep Learning Super Sampling (DLSS) to boost frame rates and generate beautiful, sharp images on select Nvidia GPUs. Utilize NVIDIA Reflex low latency technology allowing you to react quicker and hit harder combos with the responsive gameplay you crave on GeForce GPUs. Controls Customization Play your way. With support for the DUALSHOCK®4 and DUALSENSE® wireless controllers, a wide range of other gamepads, and fully customizable bindings for mouse and keyboard, you have the power to fine-tune every action to match your playstyle. Ultra-wide Support Immerse yourself like never before. Journey through the Norse realms taking in breathtaking vistas in panoramic widescreen. With 21:9 ultra-widescreen support, God of War™ presents a cinema quality experience that further expands the original seamless theatrical vision.

Name: Galactic Civilizations® II: Ultimate Edition
Description:
Get the complete Galactic Civilizations II saga including the acclaimed PC strategy game of the year Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords, the award winning expansion pack Dark Avatar, and the newest expansion pack Twilight of the Arnor! Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords: Galactic Civilizations II is the sequel to 2003's hit turn-based strategy game of the same name. The player takes on the role of the leader of a space-faring civilization and must guide its expansion in a hostile galaxy. Gamers must balance their economic, technological, diplomatic, cultural, and military power to forge alliances, fight wars, and ultimately dominate the galaxy. The game is single-player and allows the player to play randomly generated galactic maps or play through a multi-mission campaign that tells the story of an ancient enemy called the Dread Lords. Galactic Civilizations II: Dark Avatar: The expansion pack for Stardock's award-winning hit strategy game, Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords. This expansion pack not only adds the usual content that expansion packs tend to do such as new opponents, new units and a new campaign. It also greatly expands the game play of Galactic Civilizations II. New features include asteroid belts on the map that can be mined for resources, unique planets that require special technologies to colonize, spies to conduct sabotage and destabilization (or used to protect your worlds from the same), new types of diplomatic treaties, an enhanced artificial intelligence engine, and much more! Galactic Civilizations II: Twilight of the Arnor: The year is 2227 and the fire of war is consuming the galaxy thanks to the manipulations of the evil Dread Lords. But the remaining factions, led by the humans, have a plan to rid the galaxy of the Dread Lords once and for all. Expand the Galactic Civilizations II universe with Terror Stars, unique technology trees per civilization, Map editors, Custom Scenario makers, campaign editors, new types of ships, new planetary improvements, and much more! Key features: Beautiful 3D engine brings planets, stars, asteroids and ship battles to life. Create custom 3D ships piece-by-piece with your Shipyard. Play as any of a dozen unique civilizations or create your own. Multiple paths to victory: Military conquest, cultural domination, political alliance, technological supremacy or ascension. Addictive gameplay: Dynamic galaxies ranging from tiny to gigantic. Superior multi-threaded artificial intelligence enables computer players to provide a challenge without having to cheat. Put your scores online via the Metaverse and compete with players from around the world. Fully moddable design enables players to create unique opponents, graphics and scenarios. Advanced diplomacy enables players to trade, make treaties, alliances and more.

Name: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition
Description:
Critically acclaimed Batman: Arkham Asylum returns with a remastered Game of the Year Edition, featuring 4 extra Challenge Maps. The additional Challenge Maps are Crime Alley; Scarecrow Nightmare; Totally Insane and Nocturnal Hunter (both from the Insane Night Map Pack). Utilize the unique FreeFlow™ combat system to chain together unlimited combos seamlessly and battle with huge groups of The Joker’s henchmen in brutal melee brawls Investigate as Batman, the WORLD’S GREATEST DETECTIVE, by solving intricate puzzles with the help of cutting edge forensic tools including x-ray scanning, fingerprint scans, ‘Amido Black’ spray and a pheromone tracker Face off against Gotham’s greatest villains including The Joker, HARLEY QUINN, POISON IVY and KILLER CROC Become the Invisible Predator™ with Batman’s fear takedowns and unique vantage point system to move without being seen and hunt enemies Choose multiple takedown methods, including swooping from the sky and smashing through walls. Explore every inch of Arkham Asylum and roam freely on the infamous island, presented for the first time ever in its gritty and realistic entirety Experience what it’s like to be BATMAN using BATARANGS, explosive gel aerosol, The Batclaw, sonar resonator and the line launcher Unlock more secrets by completing hidden challenges in the world and develop and customize equipment by earning experience points Enjoy complete superhero freedom in the environment with the use of Batman’s grapnel gun to get to any place you can see, jump from any height and glide in any direction

Name: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition
Description:
Critically acclaimed Batman: Arkham Asylum returns with a remastered Game of the Year Edition, featuring 4 extra Challenge Maps. The additional Challenge Maps are Crime Alley; Scarecrow Nightmare; Totally Insane and Nocturnal Hunter (both from the Insane Night Map Pack). Utilize the unique FreeFlow™ combat system to chain together unlimited combos seamlessly and battle with huge groups of The Joker’s henchmen in brutal melee brawls Investigate as Batman, the WORLD’S GREATEST DETECTIVE, by solving intricate puzzles with the help of cutting edge forensic tools including x-ray scanning, fingerprint scans, ‘Amido Black’ spray and a pheromone tracker Face off against Gotham’s greatest villains including The Joker, HARLEY QUINN, POISON IVY and KILLER CROC Become the Invisible Predator™ with Batman’s fear takedowns and unique vantage point system to move without being seen and hunt enemies Choose multiple takedown methods, including swooping from the sky and smashing through walls. Explore every inch of Arkham Asylum and roam freely on the infamous island, presented for the first time ever in its gritty and realistic entirety Experience what it’s like to be BATMAN using BATARANGS, explosive gel aerosol, The Batclaw, sonar resonator and the line launcher Unlock more secrets by completing hidden challenges in the world and develop and customize equipment by earning experience points Enjoy complete superhero freedom in the environment with the use of Batman’s grapnel gun to get to any place you can see, jump from any height and glide in any direction

Name: Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition
Description:
Batman: Arkham City builds upon the intense, atmospheric foundation of Batman: Arkham Asylum, sending players flying through the expansive Arkham City - five times larger than the game world in Batman: Arkham Asylum - the new maximum security 'home' for all of Gotham City's thugs, gangsters and insane criminal masterminds. Featuring an incredible Rogues Gallery of Gotham City's most dangerous criminals including Catwoman, The Joker, The Riddler, Two-Face, Harley Quinn, The Penguin, Mr. Freeze and many others, the game allows players to genuinely experience what it feels like to be The Dark Knight delivering justice on the streets of Gotham City. Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition includes the following DLC: Catwoman Pack Nightwing Bundle Pack Robin Bundle Pack Harley Quinn’s Revenge Challenge Map Pack Arkham City Skins Pack Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition packages new gameplay content, seven maps, three playable characters, and 12 skins beyond the original retail release: Maps: Wayne Manor, Main Hall, Freight Train, Black Mask, The Joker's Carnival, Iceberg Long, and Batcave Playable Characters: Catwoman, Robin and Nightwing Skins: 1970s Batsuit, Year One Batman, The Dark Knight Returns, Earth One Batman, Batman Beyond Batman, Animated Batman, Sinestro Corps Batman, Long Halloween Catwoman, Animated Catwoman, Animated Robin, Red Robin and Animated Nightwing

Name: Portal
Description:
Portal™ is a new single player game from Valve. Set in the mysterious Aperture Science Laboratories, Portal has been called one of the most innovative new games on the horizon and will offer gamers hours of unique gameplay. The game is designed to change the way players approach, manipulate, and surmise the possibilities in a given environment; similar to how Half-Life® 2's Gravity Gun innovated new ways to leverage an object in any given situation. Players must solve physical puzzles and challenges by opening portals to maneuvering objects, and themselves, through space.

Name: Brothers - A Tale of Two Sons
Description:
Guide two brothers on an epic fairy tale journey from visionary Swedish film director, Josef Fares and top-tier developer Starbreeze Studios. Control both brothers at once as you experience co-op play in single player mode, like never before. Solve puzzles, explore the varied locations and fight boss battles, controlling one brother with each thumbstick. A man, clinging to life. His two sons, desperate to cure their ailing father, are left with but one option. They must set out upon a journey to find and bring back the 'Water of Life' as they come to rely on one another to survive. One must be strong where the other is weak, brave where the other is fearful, they must be... Brothers. This is one journey you will never forget.

## Discover Tyria: Your Guild Wars 2 Adventure Awaits

Guild Wars 2 invites you to explore the rich world of Tyria, focusing on **discovery and exploration**. Your in-game **content guide** offers tailored suggestions, while your **compass** helps you pinpoint points of interest. Embrace the adventure and forge your own path.

### Engaging with Tyria's Dynamic World

Tyria teems with diverse characters and **dynamic events**. Your **involvement is rewarded** through completing **Renown Hearts** and participating in these events. A **new player guide** is available to help newcomers navigate the world.

### Seamless Player Interaction and Progression

Guild Wars 2 encourages **organic player interaction**, allowing you to assist others without formal parties. Whether tackling a **jumping puzzle** or a **world boss**, the game promotes a playstyle free from the need to **grind**. All activities, from reviving allies to gathering resources, contribute to **earning experience points**.

### Character Customization and Progression

As you progress, you can **arm your character with a diverse arsenal of new weapons**, each offering a unique playstyle. Further refine your character by unlocking and equipping **hundreds of skills and traits**.

### Competitive Play and Self-Expression

For competitive players, **structured PvP** offers a level playing field where **all players compete equally**, with access to max-level gear and build options. For those who value aesthetics, **character design** provides a canvas for self-expression. Equipping new gear unlocks its **skins in your wardrobe**, leading to **thousands of possible combinations**. A **massive selection of collectible dyes** allows for further personalization.

### Expanding Your Guild Wars 2 Experience

Upgrading to a **Guild Wars 2 expansion** unlocks exclusive benefits, including:

*   **Log-in rewards**
*   Additional **character and bag slots**
*   **Expanded chat features**

In-game purchases can be made through the **Black Lion Trading Company**, with options to use your Steam Wallet for upgrades.

Expansions and **Living World seasons** introduce unique rewards and new **Masteries** that enhance character abilities. Each expansion also provides access to **nine elite specializations**, offering new weapon choices, skills, and abilities. The **Revenant profession** can be selected at character creation, allowing players to channel legendary figures.

**Living World seasons** continue the game's narrative between expansions and are available for purchase or in Gem Store bundles. Playing these episodes unlocks new explorable zones, rewards, and Masteries.

*   **Heart of Thorns:** Unlock and upgrade your glider.
*   **Path of Fire:** Befriend mounts with powerful movement skills.
*   **End of Dragons:** Learn to fish and pilot a skiff.

**Note:** Living World episodes are accessible at level 80. Relaunching the game may be necessary for upgrades to take effect. Existing Guild Wars 2 accounts are not accessible via Steam.

Name: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim
Description:
EPIC FANTASY REBORN The next chapter in the highly anticipated Elder Scrolls saga arrives from the makers of the 2006 and 2008 Games of the Year, Bethesda Game Studios. Skyrim reimagines and revolutionizes the open-world fantasy epic, bringing to life a complete virtual world open for you to explore any way you choose. LIVE ANOTHER LIFE, IN ANOTHER WORLD Play any type of character you can imagine, and do whatever you want; the legendary freedom of choice, storytelling, and adventure of The Elder Scrolls is realized like never before. ALL NEW GRAPHICS AND GAMEPLAY ENGINE Skyrim’s new game engine brings to life a complete virtual world with rolling clouds, rugged mountains, bustling cities, lush fields, and ancient dungeons. YOU ARE WHAT YOU PLAY Choose from hundreds of weapons, spells, and abilities. The new character system allows you to play any way you want and define yourself through your actions. DRAGON RETURN Battle ancient dragons like you’ve never seen. As Dragonborn, learn their secrets and harness their power for yourself.

The online servers for the PC version of the critically acclaimed DARK SOULS™ series are currently undergoing restoration. Bandai Namco Entertainment is committed to bringing back the online functionality for each game in the series. According to Bandai Namco Entertainment, DARK SOULS™ III is the next title slated for restoration once the necessary technical issues are resolved. The development team is diligently working to correct the problems that have affected the servers. They will share further updates as soon as a definitive restoration schedule is established.

This ongoing effort underscores the dedication to the player community. Bandai Namco Entertainment extends its sincere gratitude to all players for their continued patience and understanding throughout this process. In the meantime, players can enhance their experience with DARK SOULS™ III by acquiring the Season Pass. This pass unlocks all available downloadable content and offers even more challenging adventures.

DARK SOULS™ III, a recipient of the gamescom award for 'Best RPG' in 2015 and honored with over 35 E3 2015 Awards and Nominations, represents the latest and most ambitious installment in the genre-defining series. This chapter plunges players into a world teetering on the brink of collapse, where players can expect:

*   Colossal enemies and vast, unforgiving environments.
*   Faster gameplay and amplified combat intensity for an immersive experience.
*   The game's signature rewarding gameplay and stunning, dark graphics that captivate both long-time fans and newcomers.

As the fires of civilization dwindle and the world succumbs to ruin, players are called upon to embrace the darkness once more. Prepare yourself for an unforgettable journey into a universe where only embers remain.

## Apex Legends™: Master Unique Legends and Strategic Squad Play

**Apex Legends™** is a free-to-play* Hero Shooter where legendary characters, each with powerful and unique abilities, team up to battle for fame and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. It offers a deep-tactical squad play experience with bold innovations in a rugged world.

### Diverse Legends with Unique Abilities

The core of Apex Legends lies in its **ever-growing roster of diverse Legends**. Each character is a distinct figure with their own personalities, strengths, and abilities. While designed to be **easy to pick up**, mastering their unique skill sets is crucial for success. Developers emphasize that "the depth of our Legend abilities is what truly sets Apex apart. Players can spend hundreds of hours and still discover new synergies and strategies."

### Strategic Squad Play for Victory

Success in Apex Legends hinges on **building your crew** and leveraging **strategic squad play**. Choosing Legends that complement each other is vital to forming an unstoppable team. Whether in the Battle Royale mode or the intense Arenas, **thinking fast and coordinating with teammates is paramount**. Discovering new tactics and powerful combinations through effective communication and synergy is key to victory.

### Innovative Combat and an Expanding Universe

Apex Legends features **innovative combat** that demands players **master an expanding assortment of powerful weapons and equipment**. The game constantly evolves with **limited-time modes** and **new content introduced each season**, ensuring fresh challenges.

The **universe is ever-expanding**, with an evolving narrative, dynamically altered maps, and new Legends introduced regularly. This creates a living world where players can **make their mark on the Apex Games** and join an ongoing adventure.

*Please note: This game includes optional in-game purchases of virtual currency for acquiring virtual in-game items, including a random selection.*

## Sea of Stars: A Modern Take on Classic RPGs

Sea of Stars is an upcoming RPG that promises to **reimagine the classic role-playing experience** with a Sabotage Studio touch. The game aims to modernize core RPG elements such as turn-based combat, storytelling, exploration, and environmental interactions, all while delivering a healthy dose of nostalgia and pure, unadulterated fun.

### Innovative Turn-Based Combat

At the heart of Sea of Stars' gameplay is its **innovative turn-based combat system**. Players can increase their damage output and reduce incoming damage by **pressing the action button in sync with character animations**. Beyond timed hits, combat incorporates **multi-character combo attacks**, a **boosting mechanic**, and a strategic **'locks' system**. This system allows players to target enemy weaknesses with different damage types, effectively hindering powerful enemy attacks and spells. The developers have emphasized an **immersive combat experience**, notably by eliminating random encounters, separate battlefields, and the need for grinding.

### Seamless Exploration and World Navigation

Exploration in Sea of Stars is designed to be **fluid and engaging**. The game features a navigation system inspired by platformer expertise, breaking free from traditional grid-based movement. Players can **swim, climb, vault, jump off, and hoist themselves up ledges**, traversing the world seamlessly. This approach to movement ensures a more dynamic and interactive exploration experience.

### A Visually Stunning 2D World

The game boasts a **breathtaking world brought to life by a custom-made render pipeline**. This technology pushes the boundaries of 2D pixel-art games, creating a visually rich and immersive environment.

### Captivating Storytelling and Characters

Sea of Stars will feature **dozens of original characters and compelling story arcs** that guide players on a captivating journey. The narrative is designed to be a blend of epic, silly, and emotional moments, exploring classic RPG themes of adventure and friendship. As expected from a Sabotage production, players can anticipate **unexpected twists and events** throughout their playthrough.

### Engaging Side Activities

For those seeking a change of pace, Sea of Stars offers a variety of **engaging side activities**. Players can enjoy sailing, cooking, fishing, or visiting a tavern to listen to music or play the infamous tabletop game known as 'Wheels'. These systems are meticulously designed to **respect retro classics while offering a smooth and modernized experience**.

One of the developers stated, "We wanted to capture the magic of those beloved RPGs from our childhood, but also inject modern design sensibilities to create something truly special." This sentiment is evident in every aspect of Sea of Stars, from its combat to its exploration and narrative.

## Guilty Gear -Strive-: A New Era of Fighting Game Excellence

**Guilty Gear -Strive-** represents a significant evolution in the fighting game genre, designed to welcome newcomers while preserving the profound depth and creative freedom that seasoned players cherish. This latest installment in the iconic Guilty Gear series delivers an exhilarating experience packed with over-the-top action, unmatched style, and sheer enjoyment, all set within a unique, heavy metal-inspired alternate future.

### The Epic Conclusion to a 20-Year Saga

The narrative of Guilty Gear -Strive- marks the dramatic culmination of a story that has unfolded over two decades. This grand finale brings the long-running saga to its definitive conclusion, featuring a final showdown against "That Man," the mysterious figure whose actions have led to the world's current state of devastation. Players will join familiar heroes like Sol Badguy and his rival Ky Kiske, alongside a starting roster of 15 distinct characters, as they battle for the very fate of the universe.

### A Symphony of Sight and Sound

Prepare for an unparalleled sensory experience, driven by a high-octane soundtrack composed by the legendary Daisuke Ishiwatari, the visionary creator of the Guilty Gear series. As you immerse yourself in the thrashing, powerful tracks, you'll be captivated by the groundbreaking hybrid 2D/3D cell-shaded graphics. Arc System Works has truly pushed the boundaries of visual fidelity, presenting the most stunning and dynamic 3D cell-shaded visuals ever seen in a fighting game. According to Daisuke Ishiwatari, the music is intended to be an inseparable part of the overall experience, stating, "The soundtrack is as important as the gameplay itself."

### Revolutionizing the Fighting Game Formula

Guilty Gear -Strive- introduces innovative gameplay systems, thoughtfully crafted to balance accessibility with strategic depth. New players will find it easier to grasp the core mechanics, while the game mechanics are designed to retain the celebrated depth and strategic freedom that Guilty Gear is known for. A key new mechanic is **Wall-Breaking**, an exciting feature that introduces fresh strategic possibilities, encouraging players to adapt their tactics dynamically during matches. This carefully considered approach ensures that every match offers a unique and deeply engaging experience for all players.

## DARK SOULS™: Prepare to Die™ Edition - An Untold Chapter

The PC version of DARK SOULS™: Prepare to Die™ Edition unveils a new story within Lordran, taking players back to the time of the legendary Knight Artorias. This expansion adds significant content, designed to test even the most skilled players.

### New Content Highlights

This expansion introduces a wealth of new challenges and experiences:

*   **Formidable Bosses:** Face new, powerful foes, including the Black Dragon, the Sanctuary Guardian, and Artorias of the Abyss himself.
*   **Online Arenas:** Test your skills in a dedicated PVP arena with quick matchmaking for 1v1, 2v2, and 4-player battle royale modes.
*   **New Environments:** Explore distinct new areas such as Oolacile Township, Oolacile Sanctuary, Royal Wood, and the Battle of Stoicism, a training ground for online combat.
*   **Fresh Enemies:** Encounter a variety of new threats, from Wooden Scarecrows and Chained Prisoners to Stone Knights.
*   **New Characters:** Meet and interact with new NPCs like Hawkeye Gough and Elizabeth, the sanctuary's keeper.
*   **Acquire New Gear:** Discover and equip powerful new weapons and armor obtained from these new bosses, enemies, and characters.

### Core Dark Souls Experience

Developed by FromSoftware, the creators of Demon’s Souls, Dark Souls is an action role-playing game set in a grim fantasy universe. It retains the tense dungeon crawling, challenging combat, and unique online interactions that define the series. As a spiritual successor, it presents a new, despair-inducing world with a vast, vertically-oriented landscape. Players will navigate treacherous traps, face grotesque enemies, and battle formidable demons and dragons. Success in this unforgiving world is achieved by learning from every death.

The game's online features allow players to witness the spirits of others, learn from their mistakes, and even summon them for cooperative play or invade their worlds for player-versus-player battles. Bonfires act as vital checkpoints, restoring health and magic, but at the cost of respawning all enemies. The game promises extensive gameplay and a punishing difficulty, aiming to be one of the year's most challenging experiences.

### Key Features

*   **Unforgiving Difficulty:** The game is challenging yet rewarding, demanding strategic thinking to overcome seemingly impossible obstacles.
*   **Seamless World Design:** Explore an interconnected dark fantasy world where dungeons and areas flow into one another, emphasizing vertical exploration.
*   **Mastery and Progression:** With around 60 hours of gameplay, the game features nearly 100 unique monsters and deep RPG systems, including diverse weaponry, armor, miracles, and faith. Player success relies on mastering magic, armor, and weapon choices.
*   **Networked Play:** Engage in PVP invasions or team up for cooperative boss encounters.
*   **Flexible Character Building:** Carefully enhance character abilities to shape your unique playstyle.
*   **Player Community:** Observe and empathize with other players' journeys, learn from their failures, and leave messages to assist or deceive them.
*   **The Bonfire:** This symbolic beacon offers a brief respite of warmth and calm, serving as both a recovery point and a checkpoint in the dark world.

Name: Middle-earth™: Shadow of Mordor™
Description:
Note: certain features for the Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor videogame will no longer be available beginning Dec. 31, 2020. Affected Features: • The Nemesis Forge feature will no longer be available. Therefore, players will no longer be able to transfer their in-game Nemeses from Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor to Middle-earth: Shadow of War. • Vendetta missions and Leaderboards will no longer be available. • WBPlay will no longer be available, but the epic runes 'Orc Hunter' and 'Gravewalker' will automatically be awarded to all players. Winner of over 50 “Best of 2014” Awards including Game of the Year, Best Action Game and Most Innovative Game.

## Forge Your Legend in Destiny 2: A Guardian's Guide

Embark on an epic journey through the solar system in Destiny 2, a universe brimming with mystery and responsive first-person shooter combat. As a Guardian, you'll wield powerful elemental abilities and collect unique gear to customize your character's appearance and combat style. Immerse yourself in a cinematic story, tackle challenging cooperative missions, and compete in a variety of player-versus-player (PvP) modes, either solo or with friends. Download Destiny 2 for free and begin writing your legend among the stars.

You are a Guardian, humanity's last line of defense against a solar system besieged by formidable villains. Your mission is to gaze towards the heavens and stand firm against the encroaching darkness. As one player noted, "The weight of the solar system rests on our shoulders, and it's a burden we embrace." Your legend starts now.
