Destiny 2 offers three distinct Guardian classes, each with unique strengths and playstyles:

*   **Titan:** Disciplined and proud, Titans excel in both aggressive offense and steadfast defense, capable of unleashing devastating attacks and providing protective shields.
*   **Warlock:** Warlocks harness arcane secrets to heal allies and obliterate enemies, raining destruction upon the battlefield.
*   **Hunter:** Agile and daring, Hunters are renowned for their quick reflexes and precise aim, striking from the shadows or moving swiftly through enemy ranks.

Destiny 2 thrives on both cooperative and competitive experiences. Engage with the narrative through story missions, quests, and patrols. Assemble a fireteam for quick Strikes or test your mettle in challenging Raids. Compete against other players in high-octane skirmishes, team-based arena battles, and hybrid PvE/PvP competitions, with special events like Iron Banner offering exclusive rewards.

With thousands of weapons and millions of gear combinations, Destiny 2 empowers you to discover new equipment and forge your own distinct personal style. The pursuit of the perfect arsenal is a core element of the game, offering a deep layer of customization and progression.

Name: Skullgirls 2nd Encore
Description:
Skullgirls 2nd Encore is a beautiful, fast-paced, and critically acclaimed 2D fighting game that puts players in control of fierce warriors in an extraordinary Dark Deco world. Each of the 14 wildly original characters features unique gameplay mechanics and plenty of personality. Skullgirls is the perfect fighting game for casual and competitive fighting game fans alike. Includes fully voiced story mode, gorgeous animation, and a soundtrack by Michiru Yamane.

## Blasphemous 2: A New Chapter of Penance

The highly anticipated sequel, Blasphemous 2, continues the harrowing saga of The Penitent One. This new installment picks up directly after the events of the free Wounds of Eventide DLC for the original game. In that expansion, the ominous Heart in the sky signaled the return of The Miracle and prophesied the birth of a new, miraculous child. Now, awakened in an unfamiliar realm and displaced from his final resting place, The Penitent One is once again plunged into the relentless cycle of existence, mortality, and rebirth. His only recourse is to navigate this treacherous new landscape and unearth its long-concealed mysteries.

### Confronting Grotesque Foes

The path forward is fraught with peril, as legions of grotesque adversaries await their final judgment at the hands of The Penitent One. Towering, twisted bosses also lurk within the shadows, poised to send you back to the grave. Overcoming these formidable challenges will demand considerable skill and strategic prowess. Fortunately, Blasphemous 2 provides enhanced opportunities to personalize and augment your abilities. Furthermore, the introduction of several distinct new weapons, to be wielded with unwavering conviction and fierce determination, brings the prospect of victory within reach. Ultimately, one truth remains immutable: Penance Never Ends.

### An Expansive, Non-Linear World

Upon awakening in this strange new land, your journey commences anew amidst a series of captivatingly macabre environments. These landscapes exude a potent Gothic charm, yet are also riddled with unforgiving traps. The manner in which you traverse this labyrinthine world is entirely at your discretion; there are no incorrect paths, only scores to be settled.

### Savage and Satisfying Combat

The Penitent One exhibits no leniency in his pursuit of atonement. A suite of new weaponry introduces novel maneuvers, brutal finishing moves, and expanded combo chains, ensuring that destruction will befall any who dare impede his progress.

### Tailor Your Experience

Blasphemous 2 empowers players with fresh approaches to gameplay. You can customize and enhance your fundamental skill set, complemented by the acquisition of several unique new weapons designed to unleash devastating assaults upon your enemies.

### Epic Boss Encounters

A multitude of monstrous adversaries stand between you and your ultimate objective. These formidable bosses, each possessing unique attack patterns and devastating abilities, will rigorously test your mettle as you strive for triumph amidst the ensuing chaos.

### Delve into a Rich New Realm

An entirely new world beckons, populated by a cast of intriguing new non-player characters. Some will offer assistance, others will solicit your aid, and some will dispatch you on perilous missions to retrieve long-lost artifacts. With an abundance of content to discover, the narratives and lore you encounter will prove instrumental in unraveling the game's myriad secrets, thereby deepening your comprehension of this peculiar new world.

Name: Rock of Ages
Description:
A rock-solid combination of rock-rolling action, deep strategy, and captivating art and music from different ages of history, this is a game of crush or be crushed! Two castles stand opposed; one is yours, the other is your enemy’s. They're a jerk and their castle sucks, so you’re going to try to smash it using an enormous boulder. Even as they build up their defenses, you're ready to roll over them in order to raze that unsightly tower. But beware! There’s a giant boulder headed your way, too. Key Features Brought to you by the insanely creative minds of ACE Team, makers of Zeno Clash! Take control of a giant boulder and crush your enemies! Use an amazing variety of units to defend your tower and knock your enemy off course. Bring your fight to both online and offline multiplayer! 3 different modes: War, Time Trial, and SkeeBoulder. 5 rich, historic periods of art and music create a gaming atmosphere unlike any other. FREE Original Soundtrack included with the game download.

Name: Galactic Bowling
Description:
Galactic Bowling is an exaggerated and stylized bowling game with an intergalactic twist. Players will engage in fast-paced single and multi-player competition while being submerged in a unique new universe filled with over-the-top humor, wild characters, unique levels, and addictive game play. The title is aimed at players of all ages and skill sets. Through accessible and intuitive controls and game-play, Galactic Bowling allows you to jump right into the action. A single-player campaign and online play allow you to work your way up the ranks of the Galactic Bowling League! Whether you have hours to play or only a few minutes, Galactic Bowling is a fast paced and entertaining experience that will leave you wanting more! Full Single-player story campaign including 11 Characters and Environments. 2 Single-player play modes including Regular and Battle Modes. Head to Head Online Multiplayer play Modes. Super Powers, Special Balls, and Whammies. Unlockable Characters, Environments, and Minigames. Unlock all 30 Steam Achievements!

Name: Alley Cat Bowling
Description:
Alley Cat Bowling is a crowd-play game designed around the classic ten pin bowling experience. Twitch streamers share the gameplay with their followers, interacting through chat and video. This is a gaming collision of bowling alleys and bowling balls and social video streaming at its finest, with a growing collection of playable bowling balls and bowling alleys. ****Twitch interactive game and twitch is required to play the game****

Name: VR Mini Bowling 2
Description:
VR Mini Bowling returns in this new and improved installment! VR Mini Bowling 2 brings the addition of Powerups, which completely change the way the game is played in this cross between bowling and mini golf! Please Note: If you already own VR Mini Bowling 1, you can use the 'Mini Bowling Upgrade Bundle' to buy VRMB2 at a lower price. If you do not yet own VRMB1, then I only recommend buying VRMB2 as it contains everything that VRMB1 has, plus more! Key Features: Bowling Ball Powerups (Split Ball, Big Ball, Orbit Ball, Fast Ball) 5 scoring modes 5 courses with 10 unique lanes each (including 3 re-imagined legacy courses) Traditional bowling lanes with realistic physics (spin, oil patterns)! Local Multiplayer 24 different bowling balls to choose from (16 unlockable) Personal best statistics for each lane and scoring mode Customizable Sound Effects Adjustable Throw Force Multiplier Global Leaderboards for each scoring mode on each course Improvements: Automatically pick up the ball by pressing the trigger. You no longer have to reach out and grab it (you still can if you want to though...) Re-imagined environments with improved visuals Simplified lobby for easier navigation and multiplayer selection When playing multiplayer, you can now switch players whenever you want. Each player can play thru all lanes at once, switch every 1 lane, every 3 lanes, etc. Multiplayer scoreboards available on all lanes Standard Mode: The newest game mode! Use powerups to boost your game and try to get the highest score possible! No Powerups Mode: Normal bowling rules apply, and no powerups are available. Try to get the highest score possible! Stroke Play Mode: This mode will put your skills to the test! Use powerups to you help knock down all of the pins in as few throws as possible. Rush Play Mode: Speed is the key in this mode. Knock down all of the pins as quickly as possible! You get unlimited throws in this mode so fire away! Normal Bowling Mode: Feel like changing it up and playing a regular game of bowling? You can! Play with or without Powerups, try Active Spin mode (you change the spin on the ball as it goes down the lane) and even change the oil pattern on the lane!

Name: Bomb Bowling 2
Description:
Bomb Bowling 2 is an indie puzzle game with physics. Knock the pins off the screen using explosions. Keep track of what is happening and then select the moment for the accurate click. The sequel of the Bomb Bowling. 50 levels with new contents. Hone your skills before a new challenges!

## Date Night Bowling: A Romantic Gaming Experience

Seeking a novel way to connect with your partner? Date Night Bowling offers a unique take on a classic activity, merging the thrill of competition with opportunities for genuine romantic interaction. This arcade-style bowling simulation is designed to help you impress your date and foster a deeper bond.

### Crafting Your Ideal Bowling Outing

Date Night Bowling provides a flexible structure for your romantic adventure, allowing you to customize the experience. Within the game, you can:

*   **Curate Your Characters:** Select from a diverse cast of characters, each possessing distinct personalities. These unique traits can ignite delightful chemistry as you play.
*   **Define Your Play Style:** Choose your preferred mode of engagement. Options include a relaxed solo experience, teaming up with an AI for practice, or diving into a local two-player competitive mode.
*   **Fine-Tune the Difficulty:** Personalize the challenge to match your skill levels. Adjust game settings, such as ball weight and lane conditions, to create the perfect gameplay.

### Cultivating Romantic Moments Beyond the Lanes

Date Night Bowling extends beyond the traditional bowling alley to foster a rich, romantic atmosphere. Throughout your shared experience, you are encouraged to:

*   **Express Your Persona:** While bowling prowess is beneficial, truly captivating your date involves more than just athletic skill.
*   **Engage in Playful Diversions:** Savor lighthearted moments such as sharing jokes, engaging in playful banter, and offering comforting gestures that demonstrate your attentiveness.
*   **Win Tokens of Affection:** Test your skills at the claw machine. Winning a sweet toy or a thoughtful gift is a tangible way to impress your date and create a lasting memory, as noted by the game's creators.

### Enchanting Settings and Romantic Successes

The game showcases two distinct bowling alleys, each featuring a captivating late-night ambiance and a mood-enhancing soundtrack. The primary objective is to ensure your partner feels happy and entertained. Successfully navigating these romantic interactions can pave the way for a highly anticipated second date! So, prepare your favorite beverage, slip on your most comfortable footwear, and embark on an unforgettable romantic journey in Date Night Bowling.

Name: Premium Bowling
Description:
Premium Bowling is as close to real bowling as you'll get without picking up a physical bowling ball. Start the game and enjoy ten pin bowling right at home! Play multiplayer competitions, conquer daily and weekly top lists and work your way to the top in player ranking and bowling leagues. Main Features: Play in VR or with monitor The best bowling physics simulation Many gorgeous bowling alleys Many balls and a Ball Editor Daily and weekly tops Continuous week-to-week player ranking Weekly and monthly E-Sports style leagues Teams to play co-op Many oil patterns Oil gets carried and wears out Single player, local multiplayer and online multiplayer support Voice chat Commentator Music player Cross play

## Protoball: A Futuristic Sports Shooter

Protoball is a new sports shooter game set in 2113. It mixes fast-paced first-person and third-person shooting with athletic action. The game is moving to Unreal Engine 5, so its servers are offline for now. The team thanks the community for their help during EA/Alpha testing. This feedback has been vital for the game's upcoming Early Access launch.

### Core Gameplay

In Protoball, players move through arenas using athletic skills. The main goal is to get the Protoball into the opponent's goal.

Key movement skills include:

*   **Agile Movement:** Players can jump, slide, run, grind, and dash smoothly.

### Offense and Defense

The game gives players many tools for strategy.

Offensive and defensive options include:

*   **Ball Handling:** Players can pass, curve shots, use bounce shots, and fake out opponents.
*   **Combat:** Energy shield projectiles can stop opponents or block the Protoball.

### Player Skill and Future Plans

Winning in Protoball needs player skill and creativity. This allows for endless strategy. Besides the main sports mode, Protoball will add other modes like Dodgeball. More modes will be added and rotated over time.

### Customization and Community

Protoball is being built with lots of customization. The team plans to release cosmetic DLC and offer many player personalization choices. They have been adding customizable content since August 2021.

The goal is for Protoball to become a top eSport. It should be fun for both serious and casual players. The team values player input, believing that working together will help the game reach its full potential. Community ideas have already been added, as confirmed by OG Playtesters on Discord. Players can join the Discord server to help with development.

Name: Bolf
Description:
Bolf combines the long game strategy of golf with the pin smashing technique of bowling. Bolf's swing system is easy to get to grips with, but flexible enough to reward practice. Mouse motions are translated to your bolfer's swing, while manual control of your virtual grip allows you to open up a club face or dig in for a little back spin. As you play, you'll earn experience to improve your abilities and cash you can use to customize your bolfer's appearance. Hitting heavy bowling balls hundreds of yards down a fairway can be a surprisingly peaceful way to spend some time! You'll be treated to beautiful scenery and a relaxing atmosphere while you play.

Name: VR SUPER SPORTS
Description:
*This game is a full-body VR experience. Before playing make sure your surroundings are clear of all friends, furniture, children, spouses, cats, dogs, long-lost siblings, and important equipment entrusted to you by your clients. Choose from a variety of sports Bowling：Select from bowling balls that vary in weight, color and control; Bumper option for bowling beginners Homerun Derby：A great stress reliever and work out! Knock the ball out of the park and into the stars! Soccer：Defend your goal from multiple opponents. Beware of the gold ball... Basketball：Using a classic 3-point contest format, rack up your score in the given time limit. Hit the money ball shot for extra points of course! Japanese Archery：Kyudo. An ancient Japanese tradition. Hold your breath for maximum accuracy and aim for the bulls-eye. Clay Shooting：The classic Olympic sport now in VR! Test your shot as you aim for the flying clay pigeons. Easy to play but requires skill to master! Boxing：Defeat 3 different opponents by dodging, throwing body shots, and landing blows to the face! Shake the controllers to get up if you fall ;) Kart: A thrilling sensation of speed; With complete-control you feel as if you are actually on the track; Features Bad at sports? No problem. For all ages and skill levels. Gamers and families alike can get in on the casual fun. Each sport requires a different set of skills and utilizes completely different controls. With the ranking feature, you can compete with players all over the world to achieve the highest score. Realistic experience in each sport Be prepared for a workout!

N++ (NPLUSPLUS) is a thrilling, momentum-based platformer that challenges players to navigate minimalist landscapes, evade deadly robots, and collect gold. This title marks the return of the N series to PC after a 12-year hiatus, with the developers dedicating that time to perfecting the platforming experience. The core gameplay of N++ revolves around mastering momentum to conquer levels and achieve high scores.

In this sci-fi setting, players must outmaneuver a variety of inadvertently homicidal enemy robots. The game features meticulously hand-crafted levels, explicitly *not* procedurally generated, ensuring an intense platforming challenge. Players utilize fluid movement to "solve" each level and reach the exit.

Beyond the extensive and demanding single-player campaign, N++ is packed with features for this final installment in the N series:

*   **Vast Content:** It boasts an impressive 4,340 hand-made levels.
*   **Community Creation:** Players can create custom levels, utilize a Level Editor, and share their creations globally.
*   **Competitive Play:** Leaderboards and replays are available for every level, including user-generated ones.
*   **Multiplayer Options:**
    *   Local Co-op Mode supports up to 4 players.
    *   Local Competitive Mode also supports up to 4 players.
*   **Challenging Modes:**
    *   Hardcore Mode offers an intense single-player challenge for skilled players.
    *   Hidden Secret challenges provide additional, difficult objectives to discover.
*   **Aesthetic Customization:**
    *   Features 63 tracks from top electronic artists.
    *   Offers 119 different color palettes to keep the game visually fresh.

N++ is designed for both short bursts of play and extended engagement, with no discernible skill ceiling, allowing for continuous improvement. The game offers bite-sized gameplay that can provide a lifetime of enjoyment.

Name: Neon White
Description:
Neon White is a lightning fast first-person action game about exterminating demons in Heaven. You are White, an assassin handpicked from Hell to compete with other demon slayers for a chance to live permanently in Heaven. The other assassins seem familiar, though… Features: • You play as Neon White, an assassin plucked from Hell to compete with other demon slayers for a shot at redemption. • Collect “Soul Cards” to attack your foes or discard them to use unique movement abilities. • Compete for the best times by cleverly combining cards to discover massive shortcuts. • Uncover Heaven’s mysteries by getting to know the other assassins… did you know them in a past life?

## Prince of Persia: The Sands of Time - A Legendary Adventure

Step into the **scorched sands of ancient Persia**, where a legend whispered in an ancient tongue speaks of a time steeped in **blood and ruled by deceit**. This is the captivating narrative of Prince of Persia®: The Sands of Time, a game that redefined action-adventure gaming.

### The Prince's Perilous Journey

Drawn by the allure of dark powers from a **magic dagger**, a young Prince inadvertently unleashes a **deadly evil** upon a once-beautiful kingdom. Aided by a **seductive princess** and the **absolute powers of the Sands of Time**, the Prince embarks on a harrowing quest. His mission: to reclaim the Palace's cursed chambers and restore peace to his ravaged land.

### A Technological Marvel

Prince of Persia: The Sands of Time was a **technological masterpiece**, pushing console boundaries. Ubisoft's Montreal Studio achieved a **breakthrough in programming**, setting new standards. This included:

*   **Advanced Physics:** Experience realistic environmental interactions and character movements.
*   **Stunning Lighting:** Immerse yourself in richly detailed environments.
*   **Groundbreaking Graphics:** Witness visuals ahead of their time, bringing ancient Persia to life.
*   **Fluid Animations:** Marvel at the Prince's agile movements.

As one industry observer noted, the game was a "true testament to innovation, **raising the standards of games in all areas of production**."

### An Unmatched Hero and His Mythic Powers

The Prince returns as an **unmatched hero**, wielding powers of mythic proportions. Prepare for:

*   **Gravity-Defying Acrobatics:** Traverse the environment with unparalleled agility.
*   **Ferocious Fighting Skills:** Engage in intense combat with devastating moves.
*   **Time-Bending Abilities:** Master the Sands of Time to **erase the past, behold the future, and freeze the present** in real-time, creating unlimited gameplay variations.

### Exotic Worlds and Sweeping Adventure

Explore a **world never before explored in action-adventure gaming**. Medieval Persia, a land both mythical and deadly, unfolds with a **staggering array of landscapes and kingdoms**. This is a **sweeping adventure of betrayal and triumph**, where the epic legends and deadly creatures of mythic Persia burn to life. The narrative is a suspense-filled tale, featuring more **twists and turns than the labyrinthine Palace itself**.

**Assassin's Creed Brotherhood: Lead the Assassins in Rome**

Step into the boots of Ezio Auditore da Firenze, a legendary Master Assassin, as he embarks on an epic struggle against the formidable Templar Order. Your mission: journey to Rome, the heart of power, greed, and corruption, to strike at the very core of the enemy. This endeavor demands more than just strength; it requires leadership. Ezio must command an entire Brotherhood, rallying them to his cause to defeat the entrenched tyrants.

### Leading the Brotherhood

In Assassin's Creed Brotherhood, players experience Ezio's journey as he assumes the role of a true leader. He must not only hone his own deadly skills but also inspire and direct a growing guild of Assassins. This focus on collective action is central to the game's narrative, as Ezio recruits and trains his own guild. Players can customize their assassins, level them up, and command them to assist in quests.

### A New Era of Multiplayer

For the first time in the series, Assassin's Creed Brotherhood introduces an award-winning multiplayer experience. This mode allows players to select from a diverse cast of unique characters, each possessing their own signature weapons and assassination techniques, and test their skills against players worldwide. This mode features multiple authentic character classes with unique weapons and killing moves, offering endless replayability across richly detailed maps and various game modes.

### Key Features

*   **Become a Legend:** Embark on a new adventure as the legendary Assassin Ezio, with over 15 hours of story-driven single-player gameplay.
*   **Win the Heart of a City:** Invest your hard-earned currency to revitalize the crumbling capital. Rally the citizens to your cause and unlock additional factions and missions.
*   **Utilize Secret Weapons:** Swiftly eliminate your foes with an arsenal of tools, including poison darts, parachutes, double hidden blades, hidden guns, and an advanced flying machine.

### Downloadable Content Expansions

*   **Project Animus Update #1:** Challenges Abstergo recruits to master free-running and refined hunting skills on the Mont Saint-Michel map and in the Advanced Alliance multiplayer mode.
*   **Project Animus Update #2:** The Pienza Map offers an ideal environment for free-running. The Chest Capture mode pits two teams of three players against each other. This update also introduces the Templar Score feature.
*   **The Da Vinci Disappearance:** Following the fall of the Borgias, Leonardo da Vinci is kidnapped. Ezio embarks on a quest to recover him, uncovering new locations and gameplay features. This DLC's multiplayer component is the most significant expansion to date, featuring a new map, new characters, and new game modes.

Name: Dying Light
Description:
From the creators of hit titles Dead Island and Call of Juarez. Winner of over 50 industry awards and nominations. The game whose uncompromising approach to gameplay set new standards for first-person zombie games. Still supported with new content and free community events years after the release. Survive in a city beset by a zombie virus! Discover the hard choice you will have to make on your secret mission. Will loyalty to your superiors prove stronger than the will to save the survivors? The choice is yours… VAST OPEN WORLD Roam the city with unprecedented freedom and bask in its unique atmosphere. Use parkour to scale every building and reach remote areas. CREATIVE COMBAT Engage in gory combat and discover limitless options to confront your enemies. Use the environment paired with various weapon types and abilities to gain an advantage. DAY AND NIGHT CYCLE Experience the dramatic shift in the world, as you change from a hunter to hunted at sundown. Face the coming threat or run away without wasting your time to look behind. 4-PLAYER CO-OP Join forces with other players and raise your chances of survival in an exciting co-op mode. Tackle the story campaign together and take part in regularly scheduled community challenges.

## DEATHLOOP: Breaking the Cycle on Blackreef

DEATHLOOP, a unique first-person shooter from Arkane Lyon, places you on the mysterious island of Blackreef. You play as Colt, one of two rival assassins stuck in an endless time loop. Your main goal: escape this repeating day.

To break free, you must eliminate eight key targets before the day resets. As the game jokes, "If at first you don't succeed... die, die again." Each failure is a chance to learn, try new tactics, gather intel, and find more weapons and powers.

Each new loop lets you improve your strategy. Your knowledge from past cycles helps you adapt your playstyle, whether you prefer sneaking or a direct attack. Within each loop, you'll do several things:

### Uncover Blackreef's Secrets

Explore the island's mysteries to understand its past and the loop itself.

### Gather Vital Intel

Collect information on your targets and the island's layout to plan your assassinations.

### Enhance Your Abilities and Arsenal

Discover and upgrade weapons and supernatural powers to get an advantage.

With special powers and strong weapons, you'll use everything you have for stylish and effective takedowns. Arkane emphasizes that customizing your gear is key to surviving this deadly hunt.

DEATHLOOP features a strong single-player story where Colt hunts his targets to end the loop. An optional multiplayer mode adds another layer. Here, Colt is hunted by his rival, Julianna, who can be played by another person. You can also play as Julianna, invading another player's game to hunt Colt. An AI Julianna also provides a tough challenge.

Arkane is known for creating beautiful, immersive worlds, and DEATHLOOP is a great example. It features a striking retro-future setting inspired by the 1960s. While Blackreef looks amazing, for Colt, it's a decadent prison. Here, death has no real meaning, and the inhabitants' constant parties keep him trapped.

Name: Assassin's Creed 2
Description:
Assassin’s Creed® 2 is the follow-up to the title that became the fastest-selling new IP in video game history. The highly anticipated title features a new hero, Ezio Auditore da Firenze, a young Italian noble, and a new era, the Renaissance. Assassin’s Creed 2 retains the core gameplay experience that made the first opus a resounding success and features new experiences that will surprise and challenge players. Assassin’s Creed 2 is an epic story of family, vengeance and conspiracy set in the pristine, yet brutal, backdrop of a Renaissance Italy. Ezio befriends Leonardo da Vinci, takes on Florence’s most powerful families and ventures throughout the canals of Venice where he learns to become a master assassin. EZIO, A NEW ASSASSIN FOR A NEW ERA Ezio Auditore da Firenze is a young Italian noble who will learn the ways of the assassins after his family was betrayed and he looks to seek vengeance. He is a lady’s man, a free soul with panache yet has a very human side to his personality. Through him, you become a master assassin. RENAISSANCE ITALY Italy in the 15th century was less a country and more a collection of city-states where families with political and economic strength began to take leadership roles in cities like Florence and Venice. This journey through some of the most beautiful cities in the world takes place in a time in history where culture and art were born alongside some of the most chilling stories of corruption, greed and murder. A NEW-FOUND FREEDOM You will be able to perform missions when you want and how you want in this open-ended world that brings back free-running and adds elements such as swimming and even flying to the adventure. The variety in gameplay adds another layer for you to truly play through the game any way you choose. DYNAMIC CROWD Discover a living, breathing world where every character is an opportunity for the player. Blending in with the crowd is easier, working with in-game characters provide ample rewards but can also lead to surprising consequences. BECOME A MASTER ASSASSIN Perfect your skills to become a master assassin where you brandish new weapons, learn to disarm enemies then use their weapons against them, and assassinate enemies using both hidden blades. Please note that as of November 19th, 2018, the online features for this game are no longer supported. The Multiplayer mode / Co-op mode will no longer be accessible. (MAC ONLY)

**Rise of the Tomb Raider™: 20 Year Celebration - An Expanded Adventure**

The "20 Year Celebration" edition of Rise of the Tomb Raider offers a comprehensive expansion, integrating the acclaimed base game with a full Season Pass. This package significantly enhances Lara Croft's latest adventure with a wealth of new content.

The expansion introduces several key additions:

*   **Croft Manor Exploration:** The new "Blood Ties" story allows players to explore Lara's ancestral home and uncover its secrets.
*   **Defend Croft Manor:** Following "Blood Ties," players defend Croft Manor against zombies in "Lara's Nightmare" mode.
*   **Co-Op Endurance Mode:** For the first time, players can team up with a friend in online Co-Op Endurance mode, facing extreme conditions together.
*   **Extreme Survivor Difficulty:** A new "Extreme Survivor" setting challenges players with demanding survival mechanics.
*   **Nostalgic Gear:** An outfit and weapon inspired by Tomb Raider III are included, offering a classic nod.
*   **Classic Lara Skins:** Five classic Lara Croft skins are also featured for customization.

Existing downloadable content is also integrated:

*   **Baba Yaga: The Temple of the Witch:** Explore a new tomb with an ancient terror.
*   **Cold Darkness Awakened:** Combat waves of infected predators.

**Key Features of Rise of the Tomb Raider:**

*   **Lara’s Journey:** Lara uncovers an ancient mystery, pursued by the organization Trinity. Her quest for the Lost City of Kitezh leads her on her first true Tomb Raiding expedition to Siberia.
*   **Woman vs. Wild:** Lara faces both human adversaries and nature. Players hunt animals, craft weapons, and scavenge for resources in richly detailed, hostile environments.
*   **Guerilla Combat:** Utilize the environment for stealthy takedowns or direct assaults. Lara’s gear and weapons can be configured for various playstyles, with on-the-fly crafting and signature tools like bows and a climbing axe.
*   **Return to Tomb Raiding:** The game features elaborate tombs with deadly traps, intricate environmental puzzles, and ancient texts to decipher, revealing hidden crypts and secrets.

## Assassin's Creed 2: A Renaissance of Vengeance

Assassin's Creed® 2, the highly anticipated sequel to the fastest-selling new IP in video game history, plunges players into the vibrant yet brutal world of Renaissance Italy. This epic narrative centers on Ezio Auditore da Firenze, a young Italian noble driven by family, vengeance, and conspiracy.

### Meet Ezio Auditore da Firenze

Ezio is a charismatic and free-spirited nobleman. He transforms into a master assassin after a devastating betrayal of his family. His journey is one of personal growth. Players will guide him to hone his deadly skills and seek retribution.

### The Setting: Renaissance Italy

The 15th century in Italy was a period of burgeoning city-states. Powerful families vied for control. Assassin's Creed 2 captures this era. It showcases the artistic and cultural rebirth alongside tales of corruption and murder. Iconic cities like Florence and Venice are featured.

### Unprecedented Player Freedom

Assassin's Creed 2 introduces a new level of player agency. This is achieved through its open-ended world. Players can tackle missions at their own pace and in their preferred style. The game expands upon signature free-running mechanics. It incorporates new abilities such as swimming and even flight. This offers a truly dynamic gameplay experience.

### A Living, Breathing World

The game's dynamic crowd system creates an immersive environment. Every NPC presents an opportunity. Players can blend seamlessly into crowds. Interacting with in-game characters can yield significant rewards. However, these interactions sometimes have unexpected outcomes.

### Mastering the Art of Assassination

Players will refine their assassin skills through a variety of new mechanics. These include:

*   **Weapon Mastery:** Wielding new armaments and learning to disarm opponents.
*   **Counter-Attacks:** Utilizing enemy weapons against them.
*   **Signature Takedowns:** Executing stealthy assassinations with the iconic hidden blades.

**Note:** As of November 19th, 2018, online features, including Multiplayer and Co-op modes, are no longer supported for this game (MAC ONLY).

Dishonored 2 invites players to reprise their role as a supernatural assassin in a world where mysticism and industry collide. This highly anticipated sequel, lauded by critics as "brilliant" and a "masterpiece," offers a compelling revenge tale. Players can choose to embody either Empress Emily Kaldwin or the royal protector, Corvo Attano, each with their own unique perspectives and emotional responses to the unfolding narrative.

The game's story unfolds 15 years after the defeat of the Lord Regent. An otherworldly usurper has seized Empress Emily Kaldwin’s throne, plunging the Isles into uncertainty. As either Emily or Corvo, players will journey from the familiar streets of Dunwall to Karnaca, a once-vibrant coastal city that holds the key to restoring Emily to power. Armed with the Mark of the Outsider and potent new abilities, players must track down their enemies and reclaim what was lost.

Key features of Dishonored 2 include:

*   **The Assassins:** Both Emily Kaldwin and Corvo Attano are fully voiced characters, bringing distinct personalities and emotional depth to the game. Players can creatively utilize each character's unique powers, gadgets, and weapons to navigate the world, whether through direct combat or stealthy infiltration.
*   **Supernatural Powers:** Advanced bonecharm crafting and new upgrade trees allow for extensive customization of powers. Players can transform into a living shadow, link enemies for shared fates, or mesmerize foes. The game offers near-infinite combinations of combat styles, powers, and weapons to achieve objectives.
*   **Imaginative World:** Dishonored 2 features richly detailed and stylized locales, from the grimy streets of Dunwall to the exotic coasts of Karnaca. The world itself is a character, brimming with story, architecture, and memorable individuals. Signature mission locations, such as the Dust District and a madman's mansion with shifting walls, offer unique challenges.
*   **The Void Engine:** Built on id Tech and customized by Arkane Studios, the new Void Engine enhances rendering technology. It supports advanced art direction and leverages modern hardware to deliver responsive AI, impressive lighting and graphics, dense urban environments, and compelling story presentation.

Name: Spelunky 2
Description:
Spelunky returns in this greatly-expanded sequel to the original roguelike platformer! Meet the next generation of explorers as they find themselves on the Moon, searching for treasure and missing family. Spelunky 2 builds upon the unique, randomized challenges that made the original a classic, offering a huge adventure designed to satisfy players old and new. A Bigger and More Dynamic World, with So Much to See and Do Spelunky 2's world is even denser than the one in the original game, offering many more areas, characters, traps, and items, as well as new ways to interact with them (and for them to interact with each other). The world has expanded in other ways, too, with branching paths and multi-layered levels adding a third dimension to the classic 2d platforming. Animals can also be tamed and ridden. And dynamic liquid physics create new challenges and make the world feel extra reactive and alive. Build a Community, Make Friends Back in Base Camp, characters you unlock will mill about and relax between runs, offering encouragement and advice. As you explore, your camp will expand and develop into a thriving little community to welcome you whenever you need a break from exploring. While there, you can also access shortcuts and practice your moves in safety. The Game is Yours to Explore Spelunky 2 is not just about 'getting good and beating the game' - more than that, it's an endlessly replayable playground to experiment in and find your own way, creating stories against the backdrop of an expansive, deeply-interactive world filled with secrets. The more you play, the more the game becomes yours! Key Features, Summarized: A Bigger World with all new areas, monsters, traps, and items! An Extra Dimension is added by allowing players to access a second layer behind the normal playfield. The second layer might contain treasure rooms, hidden passages, and other special places. Multiple Routes Through the Game will add variety and give players more ways to personalize a run. Find and Ride Mounts (like turkeys!) that have special abilities. Enemies may ride mounts, as well! New NPCs that you can help, hurt, or ignore… to make each run feel even more like a unique story. Variations and Changes to Classic Spelunky Concepts like shops and ghosts that will make veteran players rethink their strategies. Improved Liquid Physics allow water and lava to move and pour realistically, which drastically affects the playfield (and looks cool) Deadly Poison and Curses can be inflicted on players and enemies alike. Build a Permanent Home at Base Camp as you do runs and explore the caves. Improved Lighting and Special Effects are paired with richer visual and audio design. Deeper Mysteries that may require a community effort to unravel. Possibly More Eggplants

Braid is a critically acclaimed puzzle-platformer that invites players to explore a painterly world where the very fabric of time can be manipulated in extraordinary ways. As you journey from a city house through a series of distinct worlds, your primary objective is to solve intricate puzzles to rescue an abducted princess. Each world introduces a unique temporal power, fundamentally altering how time behaves and, consequently, shaping the nature of the challenges you'll face.

The game's innovative approach to time mechanics is central to its design, offering a variety of temporal effects that create its signature puzzles. These include:

*   **Rewinding Time:** The ability to reverse your actions and the game's progression.
*   **Time-Immune Objects:** Certain elements within the game are unaffected by time manipulation.
*   **Time Tied to Space:** Temporal mechanics that are intrinsically linked to the game's environments.
*   **Parallel Realities:** The introduction of alternate timelines or dimensions.
*   **Time Dilation:** The capacity to slow down or speed up time in specific areas.

Braid respects your time and attention, as noted by many reviewers, with no filler content. Every puzzle is designed to reveal something new and engaging about the game's universe.

Key features that enhance the player experience include:

*   **Steam Cloud Support:** Save your game progress to the cloud and seamlessly continue playing on any computer connected to Steam.
*   **Forgiving Yet Challenging Gameplay:** Braid is a 2-D platformer where death and failure are impossible. The challenge lies in the intellectual stimulation of puzzle-solving, rather than demanding precise platforming skills.
*   **Rich Puzzle Environment:** Explore diverse worlds, collect puzzle pieces, and solve challenges by creatively manipulating time through rewinding, creating parallel universes, and utilizing time dilation. The gameplay is designed to feel fresh and encourage novel ways of thinking.
*   **Aesthetic Design:** The game boasts a beautiful painterly art style, complemented by a lush, organic soundtrack that enhances the unique gameplay experience.
*   **Nonlinear Story:** A non-linear narrative weaves through the various worlds, offering real-world metaphors for your temporal manipulations. These manipulations, in turn, serve as projections of real-world themes into playful "what-if" scenarios where consequences can be explored without penalty.
*   **Nonlinear Gameplay:** Players are not forced to solve puzzles in a specific order. If a puzzle proves too difficult, you can simply move on and return to it later.

N++ (NPLUSPLUS) is a thrilling, momentum-based platformer set in a minimalist sci-fi world. The core gameplay challenges players to expertly use momentum to navigate obstacles, evade homicidal robots, and collect gold. This highly anticipated title returns the N series to PC after a 12-year break, during which developers focused on perfecting the platforming experience.

The game emphasizes fluid movement and strategic problem-solving in meticulously hand-crafted levels, which are not procedurally generated. Players must master their agility to "solve" each stage and reach the exit. N++ offers a deep and engaging experience with a lengthy single-player campaign. This final entry in the N series is packed with features for endless replayability and diverse gameplay.

Here's what N++ offers:

*   **Vast Content:**
    *   4,340 hand-made levels.
    *   Hidden secret challenges.
*   **Creative Freedom and Community:**
    *   A Level Editor for crafting custom challenges.
    *   Global Level Sharing to play and share creations worldwide.
*   **Competitive and Cooperative Play:**
    *   Local Co-op Mode for up to 4 players.
    *   Local Competitive Mode for up to 4 players.
*   **Challenging Modes:**
    *   Hardcore Mode, a punishing single-player challenge.
*   **Customization and Presentation:**
    *   119 color palettes for personalization.
    *   A soundtrack featuring 63 tracks from top electronic artists.
*   **Performance Tracking:**
    *   Leaderboards and replays for every level, including player-created ones.

N++ is designed for both quick bursts and extended sessions. Its "no skill ceiling" design allows for continuous improvement, offering bite-sized gameplay that can last a lifetime.

Name: The Making of Karateka
Description:
Prince of Persia creator Jordan Mechner was a college student when he created one of the biggest-selling games of 1984: Karateka. Now, in a new interactive documentary from Digital Eclipse, the story of how a teenager with an Apple II created one of the most groundbreaking, influential games of all time. THE ORIGIN STORY OF A LEGENDARY GAME CREATOR Discover how Karateka was made through an exhaustive archive of design documents, playable prototypes, and all-new video features. Like walking through a museum, you can explore the interactive timelines at your own pace. PLAY THE ACCLAIMED ORIGINALS Enjoy pixel-perfect versions of the original Karateka games and a variety of never-before-seen early prototypes, with rich quality-of-life features like save anywhere, rewind, chapter select, and director's commentary. TWO REMASTERED GAMES Karateka Remastered is an all-new version of the original game featuring cutting-room-floor content, commentary, achievements, and more. Deathbounce: Rebounded is a fast and frantic twin-stick shooter based on Jordan's unpublished prototype. A GROUNDBREAKING MASTERPIECE Discover how Karateka became one of the first games to include cinematic scenes, a moving original soundtrack, rotoscoped animation, and a Hollywood-style love story, influencing the decades of games that followed. THE GOLD MASTER SERIES New from Digital Eclipse (Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Cowabunga Collection, Atari 50: The Anniversary Celebration), the Gold Master Series presents iconic games in an innovative 'interactive documentary' format, putting the shared history of games and their creators into one comprehensive package.

## Grapple Dog: Swing into Action with Pablo!

Get ready for an exhilarating 2D pixel-art platformer experience with **Grapple Dog**! This vibrant game puts you in the paws of Pablo, a heroic dog with an awesome grappling hook, ready to tackle tricky challenges and save the world. Join Pablo and his crew of fearless adventurers as they sail across six colorful worlds, determined to stop the robotic overlord Nul from his destructive plans.

### What Makes Grapple Dog So Exciting?

Grapple Dog is packed with features designed to keep you entertained and engaged:

*   **Exhilarating Action:** Prepare for a whirlwind of jumping, swinging, and gem collecting! You'll also get to experience the joy of driving a little boat, and perhaps the most exciting feature of all – dog petting!
*   **Vast Worlds to Explore:** Embark on a journey across six distinct and colorful worlds. Each world is brimming with 33 meticulously crafted levels, offering plenty of hidden collectibles to discover, secret areas to investigate, spectacular boss battles to conquer, and challenging bonus levels to master.
*   **A Lighthearted Quest:** Join Pablo, the Grapple Dog, on a lighthearted adventure filled with memorable characters. Together with your merry band of adventurers, you'll set sail on a quest to thwart the evil robotic overlord Nul and protect the world from his tyranny.
*   **Play Your Way:** Whether you're a seasoned platformer looking to hone your skills with optional collectibles and a challenging speedrun Time Trial mode, or you prefer to play without restrictions, Grapple Dog has you covered. Utilize the many in-built accessibility options to enjoy the game however you see fit.
*   **Bold and Funky Presentation:** Immerse yourself in a bold, colorful art style brought to life by a pixel art veteran. Grapple Dog truly pops from start to finish, complemented by a funky fresh soundtrack that's sure to get stuck in your head. Experience buttery smooth 60fps gameplay that makes every moment a delight.

Prepare to go, go, Grapple Dog, and embark on an unforgettable adventure!

Name: Celeste
Description:
Help Madeline survive her inner demons on her journey to the top of Celeste Mountain, in this super-tight, hand-crafted platformer from the creators of multiplayer classic TowerFall. A narrative-driven, single-player adventure like mom used to make, with a charming cast of characters and a touching story of self-discovery A massive mountain teeming with 700+ screens of hardcore platforming challenges and devious secrets Brutal B-side chapters to unlock, built for only the bravest mountaineers IGF “Excellence in Audio” finalist, with over 2 hours of original music led by dazzling live piano and catchy synth beats Pie The controls are simple and accessible - simply jump, air-dash, and climb - but with layers of expressive depth to master, where every death is a lesson. Lightning-fast respawns keep you climbing as you uncover the mysteries of the mountain and brave its many perils. This is it, Madeline. Just breathe. You can do this.

Name: Ghost Song
Description:
On the desolate moon of Lorian, a long-dormant Deadsuit awakens from slumber—armed and combat-ready, memory clear of purpose. But something new is stirring… Strike out beneath the surface in search of answers in Ghost Song, an atmospheric 2D adventure of self-discovery, ancient mysteries, and cosmic terror. Explore winding caverns lit only by bioluminescent flora, battle strange and powerful creatures, and acquire new abilities to help you unearth this alien world’s long-buried secrets. Descend deep into the darkness—only then will you learn (or is it remember?) the truth. FEATURES Discover what lies below Explore the twisting alien tunnels and long-abandoned labs of an expansive, beautifully illustrated Metroidvania-inspired 2D world filled with secret chambers and a haunting history. Power up and progress Acquire potent weapons and game-changing new abilities in the depths, unlocking access to new strata of the moon and optional hidden areas. Face challenging foes Combat the fungal aliens and metal husks of Lorian with responsiveness and precision. Level up your power, and customize your suit and blaster with an arsenal of modules. Blast and smash Master the distinctive rhythm of Deadsuit’s core combat. Pummel enemies with your rapid-fire blaster, building up barrel heat that empowers your melee attacks. You are not alone You’re not the only entity trapped in this unfamiliar place. Encounter a cast of voiced characters and discover their own tales of survival, courage, abandonment, and redemption.

### Super Meat Boy: A Grueling Platforming Challenge

Super Meat Boy is a notoriously difficult platformer where players guide a sentient cube of meat on a desperate mission. The goal is to rescue his girlfriend, a character made of bandages, from an evil, tuxedo-clad fetus trapped in a jar. This unusual hero must navigate treacherous environments filled with perilous wall leaps, deadly buzz saws, unstable crumbling caves, and hazardous pools of old needles.

### Embracing Classic Difficulty

The game captures the spirit of classic NES difficulty, drawing comparisons to titles like Mega Man 2, Ghosts 'n Goblins, and the Japanese Super Mario Bros. 2. However, Super Meat Boy refines the experience, focusing on pure, unadulterated twitch reflex platforming. The challenge escalates from demanding to what many describe as "soul crushing." As players advance, Super Meat Boy journeys through unsettling locations, including haunted hospitals, salt factories, and the depths of Hell.

### Extensive Content and Replayability

Beyond its substantial single-player campaign, featuring over 300 levels across more than five distinct chapters, Super Meat Boy offers a wealth of additional content. This includes challenging boss fights, a robust level editor for creating and sharing custom stages, and numerous unlockable secrets like warp zones and hidden characters.

### Deep Gameplay Mechanics and Features

The Story Mode alone contains over 300 levels spread across more than five chapters. A unique Steam exclusive allows players to control the Head Crab, as confirmed by the developers. The game also presents 33 achievements to earn, offering in-game goals. Notably, warp zones act as special areas that can transport players into other games, a unique feature praised by critics. Super Meat Boy boasts over 16 unlockable characters, many originating from popular indie titles such as Minecraft and VVVVVV. The epic boss fights are a significant and memorable aspect of the gameplay. The full level editor and level portal, released in January 2011, greatly enhanced the game's replayability, as noted by players. The narrative, while often humorous, is considered profound, with some critics jokingly suggesting its impact will leave players "crying yourself to sleep for the rest of your life."

Name: INSIDE
Description:
Hunted and alone, a boy finds himself drawn into the center of a dark project. Try Playdead’s award-winning indie adventure game. INSIDE is a dark, narrative-driven platformer combining intense action with challenging puzzles. It has been critically acclaimed for its moody art style, ambient soundtrack and unsettling atmosphere.

## OlliOlli World: Embark on a Rad Skateboarding Adventure

OlliOlli World is a vibrant skateboarding action-platformer that invites players into the unique and colorful world of Radlandia. This game truly emphasizes personality, offering a journey filled with memorable characters and a compelling quest to discover the mystical skate gods in pursuit of the ultimate skateboarding nirvana, known as Gnarvana.

### Explore the Whimsical World of Radlandia

Radlandia itself is a delightful and eccentric place, brimming with a variety of missions and challenges designed to keep players engaged. As you traverse its explorable levels, you'll have ample opportunity to:

*   **Discover new paths:** Each meticulously crafted level presents multiple routes, actively encouraging exploration and enhancing replayability.
*   **Take on side quests:** Engage deeply with the world and its quirky inhabitants through a range of optional objectives that add depth to your journey.
*   **Earn rad rewards:** Successfully completing challenges yields valuable items, cosmetic unlocks, and other desirable rewards.
*   **Master epic tricks:** Opportunities abound to showcase your skateboarding prowess with a vast array of aerial maneuvers and grinds.

Complementing the game's distinctive visual style is a perfectly curated soundtrack featuring a hand-picked compilation of IDM and Electronica tracks, enhancing the overall atmosphere.

### Signature Gameplay and Accessibility for All

OlliOlli World is renowned for its signature "flow state" gameplay, a sensation achieved through incredibly tight controls and highly refined mechanics. This meticulous design ensures a "silky smooth ride" for players of all skill levels.

*   **Welcoming to Newcomers:** The game is thoughtfully designed to be accessible, allowing new players to perform impressive tricks with relative ease, minimizing the frustration often associated with constant failure.
*   **Depth for Veterans:** For those seeking a significant challenge and a deep mastery curve, OlliOlli World offers a profoundly rewarding experience with layers of complexity to uncover.

### Master the Deep Combo System

The game boasts a hugely deep and intricate combo system, featuring over 100 distinct moves that players can master and seamlessly combine. This system allows for immense player expression and strategic gameplay as you strive to achieve the highest possible scores.

### Customize Your Skater to Reflect Your Style

Prove your skills on the ramps and rails to unlock special rewards that allow you to personalize your character's looks, signature tricks, and overall style. Whether you envision yourself skating in flip-flops or sporting a whimsical bumblebee onesie, OlliOlli World wholeheartedly embraces and celebrates your individual expression.

### Challenge the World and Your Friends

*   **Compete in Leagues:** Engage in thrilling competition against players from around the globe in ranked Leagues, testing your skills against the best.
*   **Share and Conquer Levels:** Dare your friends to beat your best tricks on millions of unique, player-created levels, fostering a vibrant community of challenges.

OlliOlli World stands as the third installment in the critically acclaimed OlliOlli series, developed by Roll7, a BAFTA and multi-award-winning independent studio celebrated for its innovative game design.

## Discover Tyria: Your Guild Wars 2 Adventure Awaits

Guild Wars 2's open world is designed for discovery and exploration. Your **Content Guide** offers suggestions for your journeys, while your **compass** points you toward interesting landmarks. Alternatively, simply choose a direction and let adventure find you. Tyria is populated by characters with their own narratives and objectives. You'll be rewarded for assisting them or disrupting their plans by completing **Renown Hearts** and participating in **Dynamic Events**.

### Engaging with the World and Other Players

When you encounter other players in the open world, you can collaborate without needing to form a party. Whether you're lending a hand, investigating a secret **jumping puzzle**, or teaming up against a formidable **world boss**, the game encourages a flexible playstyle. Forget grinding; play the way you want to play! Earning experience points is a natural outcome of your actions, from reviving fallen allies and rescuing soldiers from Risen attacks to gathering resources.

### Character Progression and Customization

As you play, you'll arm your character with a diverse arsenal of new weapons. Each profession wields these weapons differently, and every weapon type offers a unique playstyle. You can further refine and customize your character by unlocking and equipping hundreds of **skills** and **traits**.

### Structured PvP and Fashion

If you prefer immediate competitive action, jump into **structured PvP**. Here, all players compete on an equal footing, with access to max-level gear and build options necessary to make your mark. For those who enjoy self-expression, Guild Wars 2 offers extensive character customization. Equipping new weapons and armor unlocks their **skins** in your wardrobe. Combine these with thousands of possible cosmetic combinations and a vast selection of collectible **dyes** to create a truly unique look.

### Expanding Your Experience with Expansions

Upgrade your free account with a Guild Wars 2 expansion to gain access to valuable benefits. These include:

*   **Log-in rewards**
*   Additional **character and bag slots**
*   Expanded **chat features**
*   And more.

You can purchase expansions and Living World seasons through the in-game **Black Lion Trading Company**, utilizing your Steam Wallet for upgrades. Expansions and Living World seasons introduce unique rewards and new **Masteries** that enhance your character's abilities.

### Key Expansion Features

*   **Guild Wars 2: Heart of Thorns:** Unlock and upgrade your **glider**.
*   **Guild Wars 2: Path of Fire:** Befriend a stable of **mounts** with powerful movement skills.
*   **Guild Wars 2: End of Dragons:** Learn to **fish** and pilot a **skiff**.

Each expansion also grants access to nine **elite specializations**, unlocking new weapon choices, skills, and abilities for your profession. Furthermore, you can select the **Revenant profession** at character creation, allowing you to channel legendary heroes and villains from Tyria's history.

### Living World Seasons

**Living World seasons** continue the Guild Wars 2 narrative between expansions and must be purchased separately via your **Story Journal** or in **Gem Store bundles**. Playing through Living World episodes unlocks new explorable zones, rewards, and Masteries.

*Living World episodes become playable at level 80. Players may need to relaunch the game for the upgrade to take effect.*

**Please note that existing Guild Wars 2 player accounts cannot be accessed via Steam.**

## EVE Online: Your Space Saga Awaits

EVE Online is the premier space MMO, known for its vast, single-shard universe. With over 7,000 solar systems and nearly two decades of player-driven stories, this world lets you shape your own destiny. Experience thrilling PvP and PvE battles, gather resources, explore unknown areas, and master complex industries. As an immortal Capsuleer, you command a fleet of over 350 customizable ships, from nimble Frigates to huge Battleships and Freighters.

### Chart Your Course in New Eden

Will you explore wormhole space alone? Or build a powerful industrial empire, shaping the universe's very elements? Perhaps you'll join other pilots to conquer new frontiers. The choice is yours: who will you become in New Eden?

### Play for Free

Try this huge spaceship MMO at no cost as an Alpha Clone. This gives you access to Frigates, Destroyers, Cruisers, Battlecruisers, and Battleships from all factions. For unlimited ship access and faster training, upgrade to Omega Clone.

### A Single, Unified Universe

EVE Online uses a single shard, meaning all players share the same server, no matter their timezone. Join thousands of pilots in this ultimate space sandbox, where every choice, win, and claimed system adds to New Eden's rich, ongoing history.

### Unmatched Scale of Conflict

EVE Online holds a Guinness World Record for the largest multiplayer video game PvP battle, with 8,825 players in one fight. Join massive spaceship battles from the start, or train your skills to lead these epic fleets.

### Player-Driven Economy

The game's single-shard nature creates an economy of immense scale, with a unified market across thousands of space stations. Trade locally, build new ships and gear, or make smart investments based on player politics.

### Endless Customization

Focus on exploration, combat, wealth, or a mix of everything. Pilot over 350 different ships, each with thousands of unique module options. Turn your ship into a fast attacker or a heavily armored fighter. For the brave, alien tech from Abyssal Deadspace offers even more gear upgrades.

### A Universe That Evolves

With over 17 years of ongoing development and free expansions, EVE Online remains a top space MMO. Dive into a dynamic universe shaped by the shared history and constant activity of millions of players.

## Embark on an Unforgettable Hunt in Monster Hunter: World

Welcome to a vibrant, living ecosystem where you, as a hunter, will track and defeat formidable monsters. Utilize the environment and its diverse inhabitants to gain a strategic advantage. Engage in solo hunts or team up with up to three other players in cooperative play. Gather resources from vanquished foes to craft superior gear, preparing you for even more challenging encounters with colossal beasts.

### The Thrill of the Hunt

In Monster Hunter: World, you'll undertake quests to confront gigantic monsters across a variety of breathtaking locales. Successfully felling these creatures yields valuable materials, essential for forging more potent weapons and resilient armor. This progression system allows you to tackle increasingly dangerous prey, offering the ultimate hunting experience in a world brimming with surprises and excitement.

### A World Alive and Breathing

The New World is a dynamic environment, teeming with diverse wildlife and unique flora. Expeditions into these varied landscapes promise constant discovery and opportunities for strategic engagement.

### Your Hunter's Arsenal

Equip yourself with a comprehensive array of tools and weapons to carve out your place in this untamed land.

#### Mastering Fourteen Weapon Types

Choose from fourteen distinct weapon categories, each boasting its own unique characteristics and attack patterns. Many hunters develop expertise across multiple weapon types, while others dedicate themselves to mastering a single, preferred style.

#### The Indispensable Scoutflies

Monster tracks, such as footprints and gashes, are scattered throughout each locale. Your loyal Scoutflies will memorize a monster's scent, guiding you to other nearby traces. As you collect more evidence, the Scoutflies provide increasingly detailed information, enhancing your tracking capabilities.

#### The Versatile Slinger

The Slinger is a crucial tool for any hunter, allowing you to utilize stones, nuts, and other environmental items. From creating diversions to opening new pathways, the Slinger offers a multitude of tactical applications, enabling innovative hunting strategies.

#### Specialized Tools for the Edge

Equip up to two specialized tools that grant powerful, temporary effects. These items are easily accessible and can be activated during a hunt, providing a critical advantage when needed most.

#### Your Loyal Palico Companion

Palicoes serve as your steadfast companions in the field, offering specialized support in offense, defense, and recovery. Your Palico joins the Fifth Fleet as a valued member of the Commission, integral to your success.

### The Elder Crossing Phenomenon

Once a decade, ancient elder dragons undertake a perilous migration across the sea to the New World, an event known as the Elder Crossing. To unravel the mysteries behind this phenomenon, the Guild has established the Research Commission, dispatching large fleets to investigate. As the Commission's Fifth Fleet pursues the colossal elder dragon Zorah Magdaros, one hunter's journey is about to transcend all expectations.

## Path of Exile: A Deep Dive into Wraeclast's Dark Fantasy

Path of Exile is a free-to-play online Action RPG set in the grim world of Wraeclast. Players take on the role of Exiles, driven by a quest for vengeance. Developed by dedicated gamers, the title is renowned for its intense combat, rewarding loot, and deep character customization. It operates on a strictly ethical free-to-play model, with no pay-to-win elements.

### Forge Your Exile: Seven Distinct Classes

Your journey begins with the crucial choice of one of seven unique classes, each offering a different starting point for your adventure:

*   Duelist
*   Witch
*   Ranger
*   Templar
*   Marauder
*   Shadow
*   Scion

As you select your class, you'll prepare to explore Wraeclast's desolate landscapes, from its forsaken shores to the ancient ruins of Sarn, uncovering its many secrets and shaping your destiny.

### Unrivaled Character Customization: Gems and Builds

Path of Exile offers unparalleled freedom in character development through its sophisticated system of tradable, itemized gems. These gems are the core of your character's power and define their abilities:

*   **Skill Gems:** These form the foundation of your active abilities, dictating what actions your character can perform.
*   **Support Gems:** These gems modify and enhance your active skills, adding layers of complexity and power.
*   **Trigger Gems:** These allow for the automation of skill casting, enabling more dynamic combat sequences.

This intricate system allows for the creation of truly unique character builds, blending raw power, robust defense, and devastating offensive capabilities tailored to your playstyle.

### The Forsaken Masters: Challenges and Progression

The Forsaken Masters introduce challenging missions with evolving variations that adapt as you progress through the game. These missions can appear in any location, including the challenging end-game Maps, ensuring a constant and engaging experience.

### The Heart of Power: Items and Crafting

Items are absolutely fundamental to the Path of Exile experience. Players will discover, collect, and trade a vast array of magic, rare, and unique items, each imbued with potent arcane properties. Many character builds are intricately centered around specific, powerful item combinations.

### Compete and Conquer: PvP and Seasonal Events

Test your skills against other players in thrilling PvP tournaments, engaging seasonal events, and intense Capture the Flag competitions. Participate in Daily Leagues and Race Events, each featuring separate game worlds, unique ladders, and distinct economies, offering ample opportunities to win valuable prizes.

### Your Personal Haven: The Hideout

As you build trust and rapport with the Forsaken Masters, you will unlock your own secret Hideout. This personalized town instance can be expanded and decorated to your exact preferences. The Masters residing within your Hideout offer daily missions and advanced crafting training, further enhancing your progression.

### A Fair Playing Field: Ethical Free-to-Play

Path of Exile is deeply committed to maintaining a fair playing field for all players. No gameplay advantage can be obtained by spending real money, ensuring that skill, strategy, and dedication are the paramount factors in your success.

## Embark on Your Own Star Wars Saga in The Old Republic

STAR WARS™: The Old Republic™ (SWTOR) is a unique massively multiplayer online game that places you at the heart of your own STAR WARS™ saga. Offering a Free-to-Play option, this story-driven experience allows you to embody iconic roles such as a Jedi, Sith, or Bounty Hunter. Explore a galaxy set over three thousand years before the classic films and forge your own path.

## A Rich Narrative Experience

SWTOR is renowned for its deep, interactive storytelling. With six major narrative expansions, players can make meaningful choices that shape their journey down the Light or Dark side of the Force™. The game features cinematic dialogue and full voiceover for all in-game characters, creating a truly immersive personal saga. For over a decade, SWTOR has consistently delivered new content, with the recent Onslaught expansion and regular updates ensuring a continually growing world.

## Diverse Gameplay and Customization

### Unique Stories and Combat Styles

Choose from eight distinct storylines, each offering a unique STAR WARS experience. The Legacy of the Sith expansion introduced Combat Styles, allowing you to separate your Class Story from your gameplay style for unparalleled customization. According to the game's developers, you can now select any Advanced Class within the Tech or Force playstyle. This enables creative character builds, such as a Trooper wielding a Sniper Rifle or a Sith Inquisitor dual-wielding lightsabers.

### Exploration and Multiplayer Encounters

Discover over 20 vibrant planets, including Hoth, Tatooine, and Alderaan, each offering exciting exploration and thrilling adventures. Team up with allies for challenging Flashpoints and Operations against formidable enemy bosses. Alternatively, engage in Player vs. Player combat in Warzones, Arenas, or Galactic Starfighter missions.

### Player Housing and Premium Items

Take a break from adventure with the player housing system, Galactic Strongholds. Personalize your space on planets like Tatooine, Nar Shaddaa, or Alderaan. Access premium items and sought-after commodities through the Cartel Market, which requires in-game currency called Cartel Coins.

## Subscriber Benefits

An optional subscription enhances your SWTOR experience. Benefits include:

*   An increased level cap of 80.
*   Access to recent expansions: Legacy of the Sith, Onslaught, Knights of the Eternal Throne, and Knights of the Fallen Empire.
*   A monthly Cartel Coin Grant.
*   Increased XP gains.

RIFT is a massively multiplayer online role-playing game (MMORPG) that immerses players in the vibrant and ever-changing fantasy world of Telara. As an Ascended, a chosen hero of Telara, your primary mission is to defend your homeland from the relentless incursions of invaders hailing from the elemental Planes. Telara is a realm where conflict can erupt without warning, demanding constant vigilance and a thirst for glory.

RIFT distinguishes itself with a comprehensive character creation system and a vast, boundless universe, offering an expansive gameplay experience. The game is continuously updated with new content and performance enhancements, ensuring a fresh and engaging adventure. Furthermore, RIFT is absolutely FREE TO PLAY, with no hidden costs or deceptive practices.

Players can craft a character and class that perfectly aligns with their preferred playstyle. The journey begins with selecting one of two distinct factions, each offering three unique races. Beyond race and faction, players can delve into dozens of specialized Souls, each boasting hundreds of traits and abilities. This intricate system allows for on-the-fly customization and the freedom to re-specialize your character's build at any time.

The game also caters to players who value both performance and aesthetics:

*   **Fashion and Function:** If you admire the look of a particular armor piece but its stats aren't ideal for your current character build, there's no need to worry. Every armor or costume piece you acquire is permanently saved and can be used as a cosmetic overlay across all your characters. This allows you to showcase your unique fashion sense to all who encounter you.

Telara is a living, breathing world where chaos can manifest at any moment. Whether you find yourself engaged in epic battles against planar invasions or confronting ancient titans alongside a multitude of fellow Ascended, the next thrilling adventure is always within reach. Join forces with other heroes in a variety of adventures, including Instant, Intrepid, and Celestial quests, and explore breathtaking locations that you've only previously imagined. These dynamic adventures will transport you across Telara, enabling you to confront the latest threats menacing the land.

Venture into the shadowy depths of Telara, where malevolent creatures breed, plot, and safeguard ancient treasures. Assemble your allies and embark on challenging expeditions through dozens of dungeons and raids, designed for groups of varying sizes:

*   **Group Content:**
    *   2-player dungeons
    *   5-player dungeons
    *   10-player raids
    *   20-player raids

## Forge Your Legend in Destiny 2

Embark on an epic journey through the solar system in Destiny 2, a free-to-play first-person shooter. Unravel cosmic mysteries, master powerful elemental abilities, and customize your Guardian with unique gear to define your playstyle. Experience a captivating cinematic story, tackle challenging cooperative missions, and engage in diverse player-versus-player (PvP) modes, either solo or with friends. Your legend awaits among the stars.

### Become a Guardian

You are a Guardian, humanity's last line of defense against formidable villains threatening our solar system. Stand against the encroaching darkness and begin your heroic saga.

### Choose Your Class

Destiny 2 offers three distinct Guardian classes, each with unique strengths and abilities:

*   **Titan:** Disciplined and resolute, Titans excel in both aggressive offense and unwavering defense. Wielding hammers, lightning, and powerful shields, they are the bulwark of any team.
*   **Warlock:** Masters of the universe's arcane secrets, Warlocks unleash devastating cosmic power to protect themselves and obliterate foes. They can rain destruction upon the battlefield, clearing hordes of enemies with ease.
*   **Hunter:** Agile and daring, Hunters are renowned for their speed and precision. They can unleash a golden gun, move like the wind, or strike from the shadows, ending conflicts before they truly begin.

### Engage in Multiplayer Mayhem

Destiny 2 offers a rich multiplayer experience, allowing you to team up with or compete against other Guardians.

#### Cooperative Adventures (PvE)

*   **Missions, Quests, and Patrols:** Immerse yourself in the narrative through engaging story missions, side quests, and open-world patrols.
*   **Strikes:** Form a fireteam to tackle challenging, shorter-duration missions that culminate in securing valuable loot.
*   **Raids:** The ultimate cooperative challenge, raids demand extensive teamwork and strategic coordination for countless hours of progression and epic rewards.

#### Competitive Showdowns (PvP)

*   **Various Modes:** Test your skills in fast-paced free-for-all skirmishes, team-based arena battles, and hybrid PvE/PvP competitions.
*   **Limited-Time Events:** Keep an eye on your calendar for special events like Iron Banner, offering unique challenges and exclusive rewards.

### Hunt for Exotic Gear

Discover a vast arsenal of weapons and armor, offering millions of combinations to create your perfect loadout and express your individual style. The pursuit of the ultimate gear is a core element of the Destiny 2 experience.

## Embark on an Epic Journey in FINAL FANTASY XIV Online

Dive into a **vast and dynamic FINAL FANTASY world** where you can forge adventures alongside friends from across the globe. This comprehensive package grants you access to **FINAL FANTASY® XIV: A Realm Reborn** and its critically acclaimed first expansion, **FINAL FANTASY® XIV: HEAVENSWARD**.

### Your Gateway to Eorzea: The Starter Edition

For those new to the realm of Eorzea, the **Starter Edition** is your perfect entry point. It includes two award-winning titles:

*   **FINAL FANTASY XIV: A Realm Reborn:** The foundational experience that sets the stage for your grand adventure.
*   **FINAL FANTASY XIV: Heavensward:** The first major expansion, taking you to new heights and introducing a wealth of content.

Join a community of **over 25 million adventurers worldwide** and prepare for a journey that will transport you to the heavens and beyond!

### Welcome Bonus: A Complimentary Subscription Period

As a special welcome, all newly created service accounts will receive a **30-day free subscription period***. This allows you to immerse yourself fully in the world of Eorzea without immediate commitment.

*   *Please note that the 30-day free play period is a one-time offer per platform on a single service account and is not applicable to platforms where a license has already been registered.*

### Important Information for New Adventurers

**User registration and a service subscription are required to play the game.**

#### Steam Users: A Streamlined Registration Process

For players purchasing FINAL FANTASY XIV Online packages on Steam, please be aware of the following:

*   **Platform Restriction:** Game packages on Steam can only be registered and added to a Square Enix account that has the base game, "FINAL FANTASY XIV Online Starter Edition" (or formerly "FINAL FANTASY XIV: A Realm Reborn"), purchased on Steam.
*   **Accessing Your Registration Codes:** After your purchase, you can easily locate your 20-digit registration codes. Simply right-click on "FINAL FANTASY XIV" within your Steam "Library" and select "View CD key." These codes will remain accessible in this location for future reference.
*   **Redeeming Your Codes:** Your registration codes can be redeemed immediately on the Mog Station. If this is your first time installing and registering FINAL FANTASY XIV Online, you will have the opportunity to redeem your codes during the initial installation process.

### Pricing Adjustments

Please be advised that subscription and optional item prices for Brazil and Russia were adjusted on November 15th, 2017. For detailed information, please visit the following links: [Brazilian Prices](link_to_brazilian_prices) / [Russian Prices](link_to_russian_prices).

**LOGO ILLUSTRATION:** © 2010, 2014, 2016, 2018, 2021 YOSHITAKA AMANO

Name: EverQuest II
Description:
