EverQuest® II is the epitome of massively multiplayer gaming - the ultimate blend of deep features, heritage, and community. Explore an enormous online game where friends come together for adventure and community. Immerse yourself in a living, breathing fantasy world filled with exciting locales, mysterious lore, monsters, gods, and dragons. Vast, beautiful, and dangerous, EverQuest II sets the standard for MMORPG online gaming. EverQuest II is free to play. Your character. Your story. Your adventure. 110 levels of unparalleled gameplay Strong heritage and lore spanning 14 years and 15 expansions A thriving, friendly community with thousands of guilds Thousands of creatures to battle and quests to complete Hundreds of gorgeous, expansive, and dangerous environments to explore Independently leveled tradeskill system with deep quest lines Full support of different play styles from, including Solo, Group, Raid, and PVP Robust housing system with dozens of styles, thousands of items, ratings, and more *Optional content available for purchase.

Name: SMITE®
Description:
Enter the Battleground of the Gods Join 35+ million players in SMITE, the world’s most popular action multiplayer online battle arena. Become a legend of myth, enter the Battleground of the Gods, and play FREE now! Unleash each deity’s unique strategies, legendary weapons, and earth-shattering powers. Rain lightning down upon your foes as Zeus, assassinate from the shadows as Loki, or transform and trick your foes as the Monkey King, Sun Wukong. Which God will you choose? Unlike other MOBAs, SMITE puts you directly onto the battlefield with a third-person action viewpoint. From blind-side ambushes to aimed shots, a new pantheon of strategic possibilities awaits. Never played a battle arena before? Don’t worry. Auto-buy, auto-level, and the deathmatch-like Arena mode let you jump right into divine MOBA action. Aspiring pro? Top the ladders, join a competitive team, and you too could be playing at the SMITE World Championship.

Name: Tetris® Effect: Connected
Description:
Tetris® Effect: Connected is Tetris like you've never seen it, or heard it, or felt it before—an incredibly addictive, unique, and breathtakingly gorgeous reinvention of one of the most popular puzzle games of all time. In all of the 30+ gorgeous single-player stages and 10+ modes, and in both cooperative or competitive online and local multiplayer modes, everything in Tetris® Effect: Connected—music, backgrounds, sounds, special effects—everything, down to the Tetriminos themselves, pulse, dance, shimmer, and explode in perfect sync with how you're playing and the award-winning soundtrack, taking Tetris’s already fiendishly-addictive replayability to new heights. FEATURES Includes the all-new “Zone” mechanic, where players can stop time (and Tetriminos falling) by entering “the Zone” and either get out of a sticky situation that could otherwise lead to “Game Over,” or rack up extra Line Clears for bonus rewards. Tailored for Steam, capable of running at resolutions of 4K or more with an uncapped framerate (with Vsync disabled) and includes ultra-wide monitor support as well as other expanded game and graphical options not found in the console release for both 2D and VR play (including adjustable particle volume and size, texture filtering, and more). 'Connected' co-op mode, where up to three players can literally connect their Tetris playfields together and play as one. 10+ single-player Effect modes with varying twists on the classic Tetris formula, designed to evoke different moods the player might be in (or want to be in -- i.e. chill out with “Relax,” concentrate with “Focus,” enjoy the familiarity/nostalgia of “Classic” modes or try something unique with “Adventurous.”), as well as appeal to varying skill levels. Nostalgic stages based on old-school Tetris games, as well as Classic Score Attack multiplayer mode with the rules and appearance of 8-bit Tetris. Fully featured multiplayer, including cross-platform play with all other platforms, matchmaking for Ranked play, robust options for Friend matches, player progression for unlockable avatars, and more!

Name: Pinball FX3
Description:
Williams™ Pinball classics are now available -- and Fish Tales™ is yours for FREE! Zen is proud to bring these amazing games to players around the world. Enjoy! Pinball FX3 is the biggest, most community focused pinball game ever created. Multiplayer matchups, user generated tournaments and league play create endless opportunity for pinball competition. FREE backwards compatibility! Bring your previous Pinball FX2 purchases with you to Pinball FX3 at no charge! Not so hot with the flippers? Pinball FX3 features new single player modes that will help you become a better player! All tables have received graphics updates including real-time lighting and shadow projection. Zen Studios will continue to support Pinball FX3 with frequent content releases and new features!

Name: Super Hexagon
Description:
Super Hexagon is a minimal action game by Terry Cavanagh, with music by Chipzel. Important facts about Hexagons: Hexagons are third order permutohedrons: The vertices of a hexagon can be formed by permuting the coordinates of the vector (1, 2, 3). The north pole of the planet Saturn has a hexagonal storm cloud pattern with 8,600 mile long sides, larger than the diameter of Earth. Though hexagon may appear to be a difficult word to rhyme, there are actually dozens of words that rhyme with it. For example: Autobahn, decagon, decathlon, electron, Kyrgzstan, Lebanon, leprechaun and marathon.

Name: Counter-Strike
Description:
Play the world's number 1 online action game. Engage in an incredibly realistic brand of terrorist warfare in this wildly popular team-based game. Ally with teammates to complete strategic missions. Take out enemy sites. Rescue hostages. Your role affects your team's success. Your team's success affects your role.

Name: AudioSurf
Description:
Ride your music. Audiosurf is a music-adapting puzzle racer where you use your own music to create your own experience. The shape, the speed, and the mood of each ride is determined by the song you choose. You earn points for clustering together blocks of the same color on the highway, and compete with others on the internet for the high score on your favorite songs. Audiosurf on Steam includes The Orange Box soundtrack, integrated with the game to enable 'Still Alive' surfing and more. In addition, Audiosurf is one of the first titles to leverage Steamworks, offering full support for the Steam Achievements that appear on Steam Community profile pages. Play with any music from your own collection--the game supports MP3s, iTunes M4As, WMAs, CDs and OGGs Valve's The Orange Box Original Soundtrack is included. Online scoreboards for each song you play. Choose your strategy from 14 available characters. Track your progress as Steam Achievements.

Name: Octahedron: Transfixed Edition
Description:
Surf through a pulsating, underground world on platforms pulled from thin air in this challenging psychedelic action platformer that has you defying gravity to a pumping beat. KEY FEATURES: Platforms From Thin Air Spawn platforms at your feet with the press of a button & surf on them until their energy depletes Reach For The Sky Scale colourful summits to a pulse-pounding beat, reach the top & escape the subterranean world of Veetragoul Neon Powered Upgrades Fry enemies with laser beams, crumble walls, and solve puzzles as you strive to upgrade your platform Hand-crafted Delight Collect shards of the Octahedron across 50 hand-crafted levels, unlock new worlds & bonus levels, and earn special medals On A Dime Master tight controls to pull off amazing feats of pixel-perfect platforming, as obstacles & enemies move along with the beat Thumping Tunes Get into the flow of a pumping, atmospheric soundtrack by Chipzel (Super Hexagon), and house & trance producers Andre Sobota and Monomirror

## Russian Subway Dogs: A Guide to Canine Survival in Moscow's Metro

Embark on a unique arcade-simulation adventure with **Russian Subway Dogs**, a game that places you in the paws of a stray dog navigating the vibrant and often perilous Moscow subway system. Inspired by the resilience of real-life subway canines, this title delivers a challenging and engaging experience.

### Core Gameplay and Survival Tactics

Surviving the bustling metro requires sharp instincts and quick reflexes. Players must scavenge for food from unsuspecting commuters while skillfully avoiding a variety of hazards. These include volatile spilled vodka that can have unpredictable effects, rival dogs competing for scarce resources, and even the rare, dangerous subway bear. The fundamental gameplay loop involves running and jumping across platforms, barking to startle commuters into dropping food, and manipulating vodka bottles. As you master the game, you'll discover advanced tactics, such as strategically using vodka explosions or even preparing and consuming rival wildlife.

### Game Modes: Campaign and Endless Challenges

Russian Subway Dogs offers two distinct modes to test your survival prowess.

#### Campaign Mode: A Feline Boss and Bizarre Tasks

Journey through dozens of levels and over 100 unique challenges in Campaign Mode. Your boss, the formidable Proletaricat, and its litter of kittens will assign increasingly peculiar objectives. These can range from completing a level with a strictly vegetarian diet to protecting a bear or preventing pigeons from engaging in cannibalism. Successfully completing these missions will ultimately lead you to a secret station at the end of the line.

#### Endless Mode: Competitive Leaderboard Domination

For those seeking a competitive edge, Endless Mode is the ultimate test. Climb the online leaderboards by achieving the highest scores. This mode features random mini-challenges from the Proletaricat and a dynamic difficulty algorithm that ensures each playthrough is a fresh and unpredictable experience.

### Strategic Depth and Simulated Systems

The game is rich with simulated systems, offering players significant freedom in how they earn points and interact with the environment and its inhabitants. Strategic choices abound: will you risk consuming toxic chocolate for a score boost, or use it to sabotage a rival dog? Will you drink hot sauce for powerful fire barks, or feed it to a pigeon for aerial support in the form of fiery droppings? Your understanding of these systems and your tactical decisions are crucial for filling your stomach and causing maximum mayhem.

### Unlockable Characters and Guest Appearances

Beyond the core canine protagonists, Russian Subway Dogs features a roster of unlockable characters, including special guest appearances from beloved indie games and comics. These include Question Hound from KC Green's *Gunshow*, Fidel from *Fidel Dungeon Rescue*, Nacho & Rad Shiba from *VA-11 HALL-A*, Ratcoon from *Ruin of the Reckless*, Uay Chivo from *Guacamelee!*, Nidhogg from *Nidhogg 2*, and Clawed Kitty, inspired by *They Bleed Pixels*.

### Art Style and Immersive Soundtrack

The game showcases detailed pixel art that beautifully captures the ornate architecture of Moscow's renowned subway stations. The original soundtrack, composed by Peter Chapman (also known as COINS, and recognized for his work on *Guacamelee!* and *LittleBigPlanet Karting*), masterfully blends Slavic and Baltic influences with electronic dance music, creating a truly immersive audio landscape.

Whether you're a devoted dog lover or a feline enthusiast, Russian Subway Dogs offers a simple yet deeply engaging and challenging experience for everyone.

Name: BIT.TRIP Presents... Runner2: Future Legend of Rhythm Alien
Description:
Runner2 is the sequel to the critically acclaimed and IGF award winning BIT.TRIP RUNNER. In the style of the BIT.TRIP series, Runner2 is a rhythm-music platforming game. Players will run through fantastic environments, using brand new moves, to brand new soundtracks as they run, jump, slide, kick, and soar toward the goal of tracking down the Timbletot and thwarting his evil plans to destroy not only our world, but every world there is. Runner2 features 5 exciting worlds, 120 tantalizing levels and 5 death defying BOSS battles! Play as 8 different characters - find secret areas to unlock new and zany costumes!

**Orcs Must Die!**

Prepare for an exhilarating fantasy action-strategy experience where the only good orc is a dead orc! In *Orcs Must Die!*, you step into the formidable boots of a powerful War Mage, armed with an arsenal of devastating weapons, potent spells, and ingenious traps. Your mission is to defend twenty-four unique fortresses against relentless waves of monstrous foes. These aren't just any enemies; you'll face hulking ogres, terrifying hellbats, and, naturally, a vast horde of grotesque orcs.

The game offers a compelling story-driven campaign that will test your strategic prowess across multiple difficulty levels. For the ultimate challenge, brave the brutal "Nightmare Mode" and prove your mettle. How will you dispatch these invaders? Will you strategically roast them in fiery pits of lava, crush them with cleverly placed ceiling traps, or perhaps freeze them solid before shattering them with a swift blow? The choice of weaponry and traps is yours, and the satisfaction of an orc-slaying victory is guaranteed to be immense.

*Orcs Must Die!* boasts a wealth of features designed for endless replayability and strategic depth:

*   **Defend 24 Unique Fortresses:** Each fortress presents a distinct tactical challenge, featuring intricate passages, towering structures, and expansive chambers that require a skilled War Mage to secure.
*   **Master 6 Orc-Slaying Weapons and Spells:** From the precision of a crossbow and the swiftness of a bladestaff to the raw elemental power of magic, you have a diverse set of offensive tools at your disposal.
*   **Deploy 19 Deadly Traps and Fierce Minions:** Strategically place a wide array of traps, including devastating arrow walls, crushing spike traps, whirling blades, and scorching flaming brimstone. You can also summon allies to aid in the annihilation of the orc horde.
*   **Confront 11 Unique Enemies:** Face a variety of formidable adversaries, including the imposing ogres, the agile flying hellbats, and, of course, the ever-present, ugly orc legions.
*   **Embark on a Story-Based Campaign:** Progress through three acts of the campaign, uncovering the mysterious source of the orcs' relentless assaults.
*   **Benefit from Persistent Upgrades:** As you advance, unlock and enhance your traps, making them even more effective against increasingly challenging enemies.
*   **Experience Extensive Replayability:** The "Nightmare Mode" and a rewarding skull ranking system ensure that the game remains engaging and challenging long after your first playthrough.
*   **Compete on the Leaderboard:** Test your skills against friends and players worldwide for the coveted title of the ultimate Orc Killer!

Dr. Fetus' Mean Meat Machine is a hardcore puzzle-platformer that blends classic Super Meat Boy series gameplay with a fresh, Puyo Puyo-inspired format. Players will navigate over 100 meticulously crafted puzzle-levels, featuring inventive traps and hazards, across familiar worlds from Super Meat Boy and Super Meat Boy Forever. Each world culminates in a challenging boss fight designed to test players' skills.

The game's narrative picks up immediately after Super Meat Boy Forever. Dr. Fetus, having closely observed Meat Boy, aims to create the ultimate clone. However, a flawed DNA sample leads to imperfect clones, prompting Dr. Fetus to construct ruthless test chambers to refine them. These chambers gradually sculpt the clones into the desired grotesque yet lovable form, hinting at further sinister plans for the perfect specimens.

Dr. Fetus' Mean Meat Machine offers a feast for the senses with:

*   **Visuals:** Dazzling backgrounds and animations by the original Super Meat Boy & Super Meat Boy Forever artists.
*   **Soundtrack:** An immersive soundtrack by RIDICULON, featuring remixes of Super Meat Boy Forever tracks and new compositions.

Key features include:

*   Over 100 hand-crafted levels with unique and deadly traps.
*   Outrageous boss fights with escalating mechanics.
*   A unique blend of puzzle and action gameplay.
*   The goal of helping Dr. Fetus create the perfect Super Meat Boy clone.
*   Revisiting worlds from Super Meat Boy and Super Meat Boy Forever.
*   An original soundtrack by RIDICULON.
*   Development in cooperation with Team Meat and the original Super Meat Boy artists.
*   30 Achievements to unlock.

Name: Two Point Hospital
Description:
Design and build your own hospital! Build up a hospital from nothing to a masterpiece as you design the most beautiful – or functional – healthcare operation in the whole of Two Point County. Optimise your hospital design to increase patient (and cash) flow, arranging corridors, rooms and waiting areas to your exact specifications. Expand your hospital to multiple buildings as you look to get as many patients through the door as possible. Place decorative and functional items around your hospital to improve its prestige, lower patient boredom, increase happiness and keep those end of year awards flowing in. Cure unusual illnesses Don’t expect Two Point County to be populated with your usual types of patients. In this world, you’ll experience all kinds of unusual illnesses; from Light-headedness to Cubism – each requiring their very own special type of treatment machine. Diagnose illnesses, build the right rooms to handle them, hire the right staff, and then get ready, because curing just one of these illnesses is just the beginning. You can handle a single patient – but can you handle a Pandemic? Once you’ve conquered an illness, research improved cures and machines and turn your hospital into an unstoppable healthcare juggernaut. Improve and expand your hospital horizons! Your first hospital is where it begins, but what next? Once you’ve cured the residents of a small harbour village, can you take on a bigger challenge in a busier hospital? Improve your facilities, upgrade machines, staff and layouts to make more money, more quickly. Train and improve your staff, levelling them up with new skills and abilities to make your hospital even more efficient. Make use of the extensive statistic and information screens to analyse your strengths and weaknesses, and make rapid alterations. Adjust the price of your treatments, keep an eye on your turnover, take out loans and optimise your earnings. You’ll be managing staff with unique personality types and traits, so you’ll need to keep an eye on who’s being efficient – and who is just a pain in the neck. Balance your workforce with your ambitions as you strive to make profit (and hopefully save some people along the way).

Name: Project Hospital
Description:
Become an ace doctor, an aspiring architect and a successful manager at the same time. Design your very own hospital, tweak every detail or choose one of the prebuilt scenarios and just jump to the doctor’s duty. Contract different insurance companies to gain access to patients with interesting medical conditions, perform examinations, laboratory tests and use various equipment to solve the diagnostic puzzles. Hospitalize your patients, perform surgery and more! Use a collection of various objects, materials and colors to make it truly yours or save your time and use one of many different prefabs. From hiring to specializations, from doctors to janitors, make sure everybody is doing a great job and finds satisfaction in their work. Help your doctors and walk them through the most complicated cases or just follow your favorite patients. There are a few different modes in Project Hospital: Tutorial levels will guide your through the basics of treating patients and running hospitals. Sandbox mode offers endless hours of content, building anything from small clinics to huge multi-storey hospitals, starting from scratch or in one of pre-built hospitals or clinics in case you want to jump straight into management. Run you own ambulance service and help handle events and emergencies. The campaign will put you in the shoes of a crisis manager trying to save a few hospitals in critical state. 6 challenge levels will test your skills and let you focus on the intricate details of individual specialized departments. Translations Project Hospital also has Thai translation available via a special version of the game, go to Properties -> BETAS -> choose thai-language-support

## 112 Operator: Manage Global Emergencies

112 Operator puts you in charge of emergency services worldwide. Dispatch units, answer calls, and navigate critical situations arising from weather, traffic, and changing seasons. Respond to escalating events like riots, organized crime, terrorist attacks, cataclysms, and natural disasters to help cities survive.

### Escalating Danger, Global Scale

Building on the success of 911 Operator, this sequel offers unparalleled control. Manage a single neighborhood or coordinate multiple operators in vast metropolises. Full 3D visualization provides an in-depth view of your units' actions. Choose from over 100,000 real-world areas, including districts, municipalities, and tens of thousands of cities.

### Dynamic Environments and Incidents

*   **Dynamic Weather:** Face realistic weather patterns based on historical data.
*   **Day/Night & Seasons:** Experience how the time of day and passing seasons impact incidents.
*   **Traffic Fluctuations:** Navigate the challenges of increasing traffic.
*   **Extreme Conditions:** Prepare for cataclysms and natural disasters, including large wildfires.
*   **Urban Threats:** Confront terrorist attacks and gang wars.

### Critical Calls and Career Progression

Answer calls from individuals in diverse and urgent situations. You might record a murder confession, guide someone through CPR, or deal with a prank caller.

*   **Career Mode:** Select a European city and climb the operator career ladder. Follow supervisor commands and witness the impact of your decisions on those you manage and those who need help. Mistakes can range from reprimands to life-altering consequences.
*   **Special Scenarios & Free Game:** Play unique scenarios in any city or create your own rules in Free Game mode.

### Advanced Command and New Features

Command specialized teams with advanced equipment and vehicles. Decide whether to deploy SWAT, a Search and Rescue helicopter, or riot gear. Utilize the tactical view for a comprehensive overview of on-site actions.

**New Features in 112 Operator:**

*   25x larger, expandable maps of real cities with 3D buildings.
*   An entirely new set of emergency calls and large-scale events.
*   Redesigned campaign mode with objectives, emails, and a story.
*   Day/night, weather, seasons, and traffic now influence duty and incidents.
*   New fire mechanic that can consume entire areas and require numerous units.
*   Region-specific gameplay reflecting country legislation and district characteristics (slums, business, residential, industrial, forest, etc.).
*   On-Site situation visualization for precise and intuitive action display.
*   New team members: doctors, sergeants, dogs, robots, and more.
*   Additional dispatchers to assign to districts for assistance.
*   Redesigned equipment, now organized into complete gear sets.

Name: Big Pharma
Description:
What if you had it in your power to rid the world of disease, to improve the lives of millions, to ease suffering and cure the sick… and earn a tidy profit? As the head of your own Pharmaceutical Conglomerate you have this power resting in your hands. Will you use it for good? Being totally altruistic may not be the best business plan. The uncomfortable truth (is there an ointment for that?) is that some remedies are more profitable than others and illness is good for business. Welcome to the world of Big Pharma! From humble beginnings with a few rusty reconditioned machines, you can progress from knocking out cheap generic treatments for minor ailments, to discovering new active ingredients and hi-tech machines to help refine the next generation of world-changing drugs. But watch out, you’re not alone out there. Rival corporations that want to put you out of business have their own set of competing cures and treatments. Then there’s the dynamically shifting marketplace which means that your fancy cold and flu medicine from last winter might not sell so well now it’s the height of summer. Where did I put my anti-wrinkle sun cream? Big Pharma is part business sim, part logistics puzzle. It’s one thing to work away in the lab perfecting new formulas, but converting the ‘sciency stuff’ into cold hard cash means bringing an engineering and business mind to the problem. Factory space is expensive, and those fancy new agglomerators and centrifuges don’t always slot nicely together. Features: 35 business-busting challenges spread out across 7 unique scenarios Custom game mode Freebuild mode Modding support

Name: Surgeon Simulator
Description:
Malpractice Makes Perfect. Didn’t fancy seven years at medical school? Skip straight to the operating table with Surgeon Simulator; an over-the-top operation sim, stitching together dastardly dark humour with all the seriousness of life-saving surgery. Taking on the role of Nigel Burke, a would-be surgeon with a penchant for non-conventional tools, perform critical procedures on patients including The Heavy from TF2, an alien with a truly one-of-a-kind anatomical structure, and the 45th President of the United States of America - yes, Mr Donald J Trump, himself! Known for its diabolically difficult controls (with each finger separately controlled by a different keyboard button), carry out terrifying transplants in theatre, high-pressure procedures along the corridor, and on-the-move operations in the back of a high-speed ambulance. Steady hands? Yeah, that ain’t gonna help! Updated for 2017, Surgeon Simulator now includes the A&E expansion pack. We’re talking slicker (and often stickier!) graphics, additional procedures, all-new environments, and a (heart) pumping soundtrack. But then again, we had you at Trump… right?

## Weedcraft Inc: Build Your Cannabis Empire

Weedcraft Inc plunges players into the intricate business of growing, breeding, and selling marijuana in America. This simulation game delves into the financial, political, and cultural dynamics surrounding cannabis, offering a detailed look at its societal impact. Success hinges on meticulous resource management, strategic cultivation, and navigating a complex environment.

The game challenges players to master the reefer trade through diverse scenarios and unique characters. Players can choose various paths to success, including:

*   **Political Engagement:** Influence policy by interacting with politicians.
*   **Law Enforcement Relations:** Manage interactions with the police, potentially through payoffs.
*   **Advocacy:** Champion medical marijuana rights.
*   **Legal Maneuvering:** Utilize the legal system to your advantage.

These actions contribute to business expansion and increased corporate profits, allowing players to alter laws, impact society, and change public perception.

Weedcraft Inc offers a rich experience with several core features:

*   **Customizable Sandbox Mode** and **Extensive Scenarios** provide tailored gameplay.
*   **Advanced Grow Room Control** and **Strain Development** allow for optimizing yields and breeding new cannabis strains.
*   **Meaningful Choices** and **Moral Ambiguity** ensure decisions have tangible consequences, whether players choose to play by the rules, break them, or bend them.
*   **Disruptive Tactics** and **Strategic Alliances** enable players to hire/fire employees, disrupt competitors, and foster relationships with rivals.

Press reviews have praised the game's authentic portrayal of the industry. Endgadget described it as "a complicated, frayed mess of legislation, bribery, selfishness, greed, blackmail and just a touch of true human compassion." Destructoid noted the developers aimed for "a more authentic tone, one that is uniquely American," while Gamereactor highlighted the "complex set of challenges that reflect the real-world tribulations of the topic." TweakTown summarized, "From Main Street to Wall Street Weedcraft Inc Helps You Build Your Pot Empire This April."

Name: Hospital Tycoon
Description:
Develop your own hospital drama and manipulate the results to your best advantage! In charge of a rapidly expanding hospital, your job is to cure the patients with your army of doctors and nurses while successfully managing the facilities and taking care of everyone's needs. Run the hospital and you influence the outcome in this funny, highly accessible and involving game featuring character relationships, staff management, hilarious diseases and cures and more. Featuring gameplay that's as personable as you want it, Hospital Tycoon has engaging locations, missions and characters galore! Hospital Tycoon is easy to start, impossible to put down. It's time to start operating!

Name: Hidden Farm Top-Down 3D
Description:
Find the objects that are hidden on the map. The game is a Hidden Object Game. In which you need to find objects with a certain design in beautiful locations, and click on them with the mouse. The game is a 3D level game in which objects and characters are frozen in the picture, you have to find 20 different objects. The system automatically determines which object you need to find at the moment, so the game has a high replay value, you will need to search for different objects each time.

Name: Saving You From Yourself
Description:
A game about gatekeeping. Play as a transgender therapist in this visual novel. Ask your patient questions about her gender identity and see how she responds. Determine if she should receive a letter of support for hormones or if she needs to attend more appointments with you. Between the appointments peek into your patient's life and see how your decisions impact her. This game contains the use of unprescribed hormones, the unlicensed practice of medicine, and gatekeeping. This content is potentially upsetting. Please take care of yourself and do not play if you need uplifting transgender content. Multiple Endings to play through 5 minutes to complete all routes 40 Panels of artwork in the game Each page of the game uses has unique artwork

Name: Pre-Shave
Description:
Pre-Shave is a narrative shaving simulator game. You play as Saam preparing to get ready for a trip. Explore the anxieties of his nervous mind, thwart your excessive body hair with the use of your powerful shaving gear, and don't forget to brush your teeth! Features Wacky physics with unique controls 'Realistic' shaving mechanics Multiple gadgets to groom and clean with Lots of body and facial hair for you to sculpt / personalize Achievements to unlock your true hairy potential NOTE: This is a very short game. If you get stuck try holding the phone up to your face. Originally created for #WineJam 2019

Name: Galactic Civilizations® II: Ultimate Edition
Description:
Get the complete Galactic Civilizations II saga including the acclaimed PC strategy game of the year Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords, the award winning expansion pack Dark Avatar, and the newest expansion pack Twilight of the Arnor! Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords: Galactic Civilizations II is the sequel to 2003's hit turn-based strategy game of the same name. The player takes on the role of the leader of a space-faring civilization and must guide its expansion in a hostile galaxy. Gamers must balance their economic, technological, diplomatic, cultural, and military power to forge alliances, fight wars, and ultimately dominate the galaxy. The game is single-player and allows the player to play randomly generated galactic maps or play through a multi-mission campaign that tells the story of an ancient enemy called the Dread Lords. Galactic Civilizations II: Dark Avatar: The expansion pack for Stardock's award-winning hit strategy game, Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords. This expansion pack not only adds the usual content that expansion packs tend to do such as new opponents, new units and a new campaign. It also greatly expands the game play of Galactic Civilizations II. New features include asteroid belts on the map that can be mined for resources, unique planets that require special technologies to colonize, spies to conduct sabotage and destabilization (or used to protect your worlds from the same), new types of diplomatic treaties, an enhanced artificial intelligence engine, and much more! Galactic Civilizations II: Twilight of the Arnor: The year is 2227 and the fire of war is consuming the galaxy thanks to the manipulations of the evil Dread Lords. But the remaining factions, led by the humans, have a plan to rid the galaxy of the Dread Lords once and for all. Expand the Galactic Civilizations II universe with Terror Stars, unique technology trees per civilization, Map editors, Custom Scenario makers, campaign editors, new types of ships, new planetary improvements, and much more! Key features: Beautiful 3D engine brings planets, stars, asteroids and ship battles to life. Create custom 3D ships piece-by-piece with your Shipyard. Play as any of a dozen unique civilizations or create your own. Multiple paths to victory: Military conquest, cultural domination, political alliance, technological supremacy or ascension. Addictive gameplay: Dynamic galaxies ranging from tiny to gigantic. Superior multi-threaded artificial intelligence enables computer players to provide a challenge without having to cheat. Put your scores online via the Metaverse and compete with players from around the world. Fully moddable design enables players to create unique opponents, graphics and scenarios. Advanced diplomacy enables players to trade, make treaties, alliances and more.

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® V
Description:
The Flagship Turn-Based Strategy Game Returns Become Ruler of the World by establishing and leading a civilization from the dawn of man into the space age: Wage war, conduct diplomacy, discover new technologies, go head-to-head with some of history’s greatest leaders and build the most powerful empire the world has ever known. INVITING PRESENTATION: Jump right in and play at your own pace with an intuitive interface that eases new players into the game. Veterans will appreciate the depth, detail and control that are highlights of the series. BELIEVABLE WORLD: Ultra realistic graphics showcase lush landscapes for you to explore, battle over and claim as your own. COMMUNITY & MULTIPLAYER: Compete with players all over the world or locally in LAN matches, mod* the game in unprecedented ways, and install mods directly from an in-game community hub without ever leaving the game. WIDE SYSTEM COMPATIBILITY: Civilization V operates on many different systems, from high end desktops to many laptops. ALL NEW FEATURES: A new hex-based gameplay grid opens up exciting new combat and build strategies. City States become a new resource in your diplomatic battleground. An improved diplomacy system allows you to negotiate with fully interactive leaders. *Modding SDK available as a free download. Note: The Mac and Linux + SteamOS versions of Sid Meier's Civilization V are available in English, French, Italian, German and Spanish only.

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® V
Description:
The Flagship Turn-Based Strategy Game Returns Become Ruler of the World by establishing and leading a civilization from the dawn of man into the space age: Wage war, conduct diplomacy, discover new technologies, go head-to-head with some of history’s greatest leaders and build the most powerful empire the world has ever known. INVITING PRESENTATION: Jump right in and play at your own pace with an intuitive interface that eases new players into the game. Veterans will appreciate the depth, detail and control that are highlights of the series. BELIEVABLE WORLD: Ultra realistic graphics showcase lush landscapes for you to explore, battle over and claim as your own. COMMUNITY & MULTIPLAYER: Compete with players all over the world or locally in LAN matches, mod* the game in unprecedented ways, and install mods directly from an in-game community hub without ever leaving the game. WIDE SYSTEM COMPATIBILITY: Civilization V operates on many different systems, from high end desktops to many laptops. ALL NEW FEATURES: A new hex-based gameplay grid opens up exciting new combat and build strategies. City States become a new resource in your diplomatic battleground. An improved diplomacy system allows you to negotiate with fully interactive leaders. *Modding SDK available as a free download. Note: The Mac and Linux + SteamOS versions of Sid Meier's Civilization V are available in English, French, Italian, German and Spanish only.

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® III Complete
Description:
Sid Meier's Civilization III: Complete, the latest offering in the Sid Meier's Civilization III franchise, provides gaming fans with Sid Meier's Civilization III, the highly-addictive journey of discovery, combined with the updated and enhanced multiplayer expansion pack Sid Meier's Civilization III: Play the World*, as well as all of the great new civilizations, scenarios, and features from Sid Meier's Civilization III: Conquests! Sid Meier's Civilization III: Complete provides more ways to explore, more strategies to employ, more modes of play, and more ways to win, all in one box! *Online Multiplayer to be suspended as of May 31st 2014, LAN mode still supported

## Total War: SHOGUN 2 - Master the Art of War

In the tumultuous 16th century of Feudal Japan, a nation fractured by endless conflict awaits a new ruler. Ten legendary warlords vie for dominance, their ambitions fueled by conspiracies and the decay of the empire. Only one will emerge victorious, uniting the land and claiming the title of Shogun.

### Assume the Role of a Daimyo

As a Daimyo, the leader of a clan, your objective is to achieve the ultimate goal: reuniting Japan under your supreme command and becoming the Shogun, the undisputed ruler of a pacified nation. This will be accomplished through a combination of military engagements, economic development, and diplomatic maneuvering.

### Core Game Features

Total War: SHOGUN 2 offers a rich and strategic gameplay experience, building upon the series' renowned features:

*   **Enhanced Full 3D Battles:** Engage in breathtaking real-time battles on both land and sea, a hallmark of the Total War series.
*   **Tactical Campaign Map:** The heart and soul of the game, this turn-based map allows for deep strategic planning and kingdom management.
*   **AI Inspired by Sun Tzu:** A brand new AI system draws inspiration from the ancient Chinese military treatise, the "Art of War." This implementation allows for easy-to-understand yet deeply strategic gameplay.

### Conquer, Build, and Scheme

*   **Conquer:** Lead vast armies of samurai and fleets of formidable warships to conquer the islands of Japan in the 16th century.
*   **Build:** Develop your kingdom on the engaging turn-based campaign map. Wield economic, political, and military power to amass wealth, armies, and influence.
*   **Scheme:** Employ tactics inspired by Sun Tzu's "Art of War." Utilize fire and siege tactics, spies, and assassins to adapt to the ever-changing conditions on the battlefield and throughout your kingdom.

### Online Multiplayer

Experience the main campaign in a two-player mode, or join epic online battles with up to 8 players. Lead your online army to glory in special campaigns.

### New Additions in SHOGUN 2

*   **RPG Skills and Experience:** Generals and Agents gain new RPG skills and experience, enhancing their effectiveness.
*   **Multi-Stage Sieges:** Sieges are more dynamic, with scaling walls being just the beginning of the challenge.
*   **Hero Units:** New hero units are introduced to inspire your troops and carve through enemy ranks.
*   **Rotating 3D Campaign Map:** A new rotating 3D campaign map offers a fresh perspective on your strategic endeavors.

## Conquer Feudal Japan in Total War: SHOGUN 2

Total War: SHOGUN 2 plunges you into 16th-century Japan, a land fractured by war and yearning for unity. Ten ambitious warlords vie for control, their schemes fueled by a weakening empire. Only one can rise above the chaos, unite the nation, and claim the title of Shogun.

As a Daimyo, the leader of your chosen clan, your ultimate aim is to **reunite Japan** and become Shogun. This grand objective demands a blend of military might, economic foresight, and clever diplomacy.

### Core Gameplay Pillars

The strategic depth of Total War: SHOGUN 2 rests on several key elements:

*   **Thrilling 3D Battles:** Engage in intense real-time land and sea combat, where tactical acumen and precise execution are paramount.
*   **Strategic Campaign Map:** The turn-based campaign map is your canvas for devising complex strategies, managing your provinces, and making vital decisions.
*   **Sun Tzu-Inspired AI:** A novel AI system, drawing inspiration from Sun Tzu's "Art of War," offers gameplay that is both approachable and profoundly strategic, as noted by Creative Assembly.

### Paths to Victory

To achieve ultimate victory, players must:

*   **Subdue the Islands:** Lead formidable armies and fleets to seize control of Japan's diverse islands.
*   **Cultivate Your Realm:** Meticulously manage and grow your territories on the campaign map, harnessing economic, political, and military strengths.
*   **Embrace Strategic Deception:** Employ tactics echoing Sun Tzu's "Art of War." Utilize agents like spies and assassins, and implement devastating strategies to adapt to changing tides.

### Multiplayer Engagement

Players can also test their mettle in online arenas, with a cooperative mode for two players or competitive clashes supporting up to eight.

### SHOGUN 2 Innovations

SHOGUN 2 introduces several enhancements to enrich the player experience:

*   **RPG Progression:** Generals and Agents gain experience and unlock new RPG skills.
*   **Dynamic Sieges:** Sieges are more complex, with challenges extending beyond initial assaults.
*   **Hero Units:** Powerful new hero units act as formidable leaders on the battlefield.
*   **Interactive Campaign Map:** A redesigned, rotating 3D campaign map offers a fresh visual perspective.

Name: Europa Universalis IV
Description:
Paradox Development Studio is back with the fourth installment of the award-winning Europa Universalis series. This classic grand strategy game gives you control of a nation through four dramatic centuries. Rule your land and dominate the world with unparalleled freedom, depth and historical accuracy. Write a new history of the world and build an empire for the ages. Start before the Renaissance on a map of the world as it was then. Choose from any of hundreds of nations and then rule up to the Age of Revolutions. Or, if you wish, start your game at any date in the span, with historical monarchs and other leaders. Hundreds of dynamic historical events are yours to experience, from merely troubling civil wars to world changing moments like the Protestant Reformation. Discover and settle the New World, or resist European conquest. Control the flow of trade by developing your trade power in key provinces, using ships and governmental policy to bring the wealth of the world to your own ports. Build alliances into iron bonds, cemented by royal marriage or play a flexible hand, keeping your options open. Strike when your enemies are weak, using your armies to grab new land and new potential riches. Your nation’s pace of development will be heavily influenced by the person on the throne. Experience rapid development under a skilled monarch only to see things slow down when a less competent heir takes over. Plan for the future by spending monarch power wisely. Four hundred years of research into new ways of war, administration and trade are available. Unlock new weapons, new buildings and new ship types. Over time, you can embrace national ideas that represent both your historic legacy and your ambitions for the future. From grand voyages of discovery to religious wars to revolutionary governments, the entire history of the early modern world waits for you to rewrite it in Europa Universalis IV.

## Discover Glorantha's Ancient Lore in Six Ages: Ride the Wind

Embark on an epic journey into the rich, mythical world of Glorantha with *Six Ages: Ride the Wind*. This captivating storybook strategy game invites you to lead your clan through a multi-generational saga, offering a fresh perspective on a beloved universe. As a spiritual successor to *King of Dragon Pass*, *Six Ages* transports players thousands of years into the past, revealing a land steeped in ancient gods and potent magic.

### The Divine Realm of Glorantha

Glorantha is a meticulously crafted Bronze Age world where the will of the divine is central to existence. The Sun itself is a living deity, and numerous other gods actively shape the lives of its inhabitants. To truly grasp Glorantha, players must embrace the power of myth, a sentiment echoed by the game's creators.

### Leading Your Clan: The Riders

In *Six Ages*, you will forge and guide your very own clan, known as the Riders. This unique culture reveres deities such as Gamari the Horse Mother and their legendary hero, Hyalor. However, the developers offer a stark reminder: "you would be foolish to forget Raven the Trickster. He has not forgotten you," underscoring the ever-present influence of powerful, often unpredictable, beings.

### Core Gameplay Mechanics

*Six Ages: Ride the Wind* masterfully blends role-playing elements with intricate resource management. Every decision you make carries significant weight, shaping the destiny of your clan for generations to come. Key gameplay features include:

#### Interactive Storytelling

Experience over 400 dynamic story scenes that adapt and evolve based on complex in-game simulations. Your choices directly influence the unfolding narrative.

#### Spirit Diplomacy

Discover, appease, and forge alliances with the spirits that inhabit your territory. Their favor can be crucial for your clan's survival and prosperity.

#### Strategic Challenges

The game offers a range of difficulty settings, including the demanding "Iron Willed" mode for those seeking a truly formidable challenge.

#### Artistic Immersion

Behold Glorantha brought to life through beautiful, hand-painted illustrations that capture the essence of this ancient world.

### A Vast and Living World

The world of *Six Ages* is an expansive landscape, four times larger than that of *King of Dragon Pass*. Within this vast realm, players can seek divine favor, earn the respect of neighboring clans, and conduct raids to acquire vital resources like livestock.

### A Legacy of Glorantha

Glorantha serves as the rich backdrop for numerous acclaimed games, including *King of Dragon Pass*, *HeroQuest*, *RuneQuest*, and *God Wars*. *Six Ages: Ride the Wind* proudly continues this esteemed legacy, inviting you to become a part of its ongoing story. The minimum system requirement for Windows is Windows 10. For further details, consult the game's comprehensive manual.

### Master Galactic Warfare in Sins of a Solar Empire: Trinity

Sins of a Solar Empire: Trinity plunges you into a desperate galactic war. Survival hinges on mastering empire management and commanding vast starship fleets. This unique "RT4X" title blends grand strategy and empire-building with real-time tactical demands.

### Core Gameplay

The Sins of a Solar Empire: Trinity experience features several key elements:

#### Galactic Exploration

Explore a vast, dynamic 3D galaxy. Encounter diverse celestial bodies like planets and asteroid fields. Environmental phenomena such as plasma storms and stars create a rich, interactive setting.

#### Dual Role Management

Embody both an emperor and a fleet commander. An innovative strategic zoom allows fluid transitions. Manage your entire empire, then direct individual ship movements with ease.

#### Strategic Depth

Success demands extensive diplomatic and economic strategies. Forge alliances, establish pacts for valuable bonuses, and facilitate trade. You can even use pirate factions to counter powerful enemies.

### Epic Interstellar Combat

Prepare for battles on an unprecedented scale:

#### Massive Fleet Engagements

Command hundreds of ships in visually stunning combat. Developer statements mention battles with up to 10,000 particles firing, creating a spectacular display.

#### Unparalleled Zoom

The game offers a seamless zoom feature. Transition from viewing a single fighter craft to a full empire overview, spanning billions of kilometers.

### Defensive and Diplomatic Strategies

Protect your dominion and outmaneuver rivals with robust options:

#### Robust Defenses

Fortify worlds with strategically placed starbases. Deploy deadly minefields and research advanced defensive technologies to ward off attackers.

#### Advanced Diplomacy and Espionage

Cultivating strong alliances is crucial for pact bonuses. Hire pirate forces to eliminate opponents. Note that these mercenaries grow in strength and may eventually pose a threat themselves, as observed in gameplay.

## DEFCON: A Cold War Nuclear Strategy Game

Inspired by the 1983 film *Wargames*, **DEFCON** immerses players in the tense atmosphere of the Cold War. This strategic nuclear warfare game delves into the psychological aspects of global annihilation. Game designers explain that the core experience is about making critical decisions under the constant threat of nuclear war.

### Your Role: A Strategic General

In DEFCON, you assume the role of a General, directing operations from a secure underground bunker. Your main goal is to **eliminate the enemy's civilian population** while simultaneously safeguarding your own. Points are awarded or deducted based on how effectively you attack, how completely you achieve your objectives, and the number of your own civilians lost. This scoring system, as noted by players, mirrors the stark realities of nuclear strategy.

### Achieving Victory in a Nuclear Conflict

To win DEFCON, you must **annihilate the enemy's population** and severely limit their ability to retaliate. This is a difficult task. Launching a nuclear strike reveals the locations of your strategic assets – Ground Silos, Submarines, and Bombers – as missiles are deployed. This exposure leaves you **vulnerable to a counter-attack**. This inherent risk compels players to carefully consider the timing and targets of their strikes.

### The Dangers of Shifting Alliances

Within this high-stakes environment, forming quick, tactical alliances is essential. However, these alliances are inherently unstable and can **rapidly dissolve into betrayals**. Players constantly eye each other with suspicion, as trust is a rare commodity. This dynamic, according to player feedback, generates significant uncertainty and forces difficult diplomatic choices.

### The Inevitable Outcome: Armageddon

Ultimately, in a full-scale nuclear Armageddon, **everyone loses**. The true objective is to **lose the least**. This grim reality highlights the game's exploration of the psychological toll and inherent complexities of nuclear warfare. The game's conclusion powerfully emphasizes that in a total nuclear exchange, any semblance of victory becomes meaningless.

**DEFCON** provides an intense gaming experience, challenging players' strategic thinking and psychological resilience.

**EXPLORE THE LATEST GAME FROM INTROVERSION SOFTWARE**

## MX vs. ATV Unleashed: The Ultimate Off-Road Racing Experience on PC

For fans of off-road racing, **MX vs. ATV Unleashed** on PC offers a truly comprehensive and exhilarating experience. Developed by Rainbow Studios, known for their work on the **Motocross Madness** series, this title expertly blends the thrill of motocross with the rugged power of ATVs. This game is designed to deliver an unparalleled off-road adventure right to your computer.

### Design Your Dream Tracks

A significant highlight of **MX vs. ATV Unleashed** is its robust **track editor**. This intuitive tool empowers players to craft their own unique off-road environments from the ground up. Once a track is perfected, it can be shared online, allowing for global competition and a continuous influx of fresh racing challenges. This feature ensures that the game's content remains dynamic and engaging.

### Explore a Vast Off-Road World

The game boasts expansive open-world environments, providing players with miles of diverse terrain to explore and race across. **MX vs. ATV Unleashed** features a wide array of vehicles and specialized race types, including:

*   SuperMoto
*   Short track
*   Hill climb
*   Waypoint races

Beyond traditional racing, players can dive into various freeworld challenges, freestyle competitions, and engaging mini-games, all contributing to a rich and varied gameplay experience.

### Compete and Conquer

The ultimate goal in **MX vs. ATV Unleashed** is to dominate the competition across more than **50 challenging supercross and rugged outdoor tracks**. Motocross bikes and ATVs go head-to-head on the same courses, fostering intense rivalries and demanding skillful maneuvering. The game's extensive variety of tracks and vehicles ensures that every race feels distinct and exciting.

### Key Features:

*   **Track Editor:** Design and share custom off-road courses with a global community.
*   **Diverse Vehicle Roster:** Features new ATV models, a monster truck, and 4x4 golf karts for varied gameplay.
*   **Varied Game Modes:** Includes SuperMoto, Short track, Hill climbs, Waypoint races, and more for endless fun.
*   **New Outdoor Freestyle Mode:** Master over 40 rider stunts in a dedicated freestyle environment.
*   **Six-Player Multiplayer:** Compete against a multitude of off-road vehicles in thrilling online races.
*   **Realistic Physics:** Rainbow's 'Rhythm Racing' engine provides authentic vehicle handling and a true-to-life feel.

According to industry reviews, **MX vs. ATV Unleashed** delivers the most complete off-road experience, placing unparalleled control and excitement directly into the hands of PC players.

Name: Atomic Cyclecar Racing
Description:
Get Ready to Ride in this fast paced love letter to racing games of yore like Extreme-G, Beetle Adventure Racing, and F-Zero! Ride your Cyclecar through 3 different tracks with various paths, and shortcuts in 4 different racing modes! Activate your boost and blast through to the finish line!

## Mastering MX vs. ATV Reflex: Rider, Vehicle, and Terrain Control

**MX vs. ATV Reflex** delivers a unique racing experience by granting players complete control over both their rider and their vehicle. This innovative approach emphasizes strategic mastery of dynamic environments and the execution of daring maneuvers, testing your reflexes to dominate the competition.

The game's groundbreaking dual control system allows for unprecedented precision. Players can independently manage their rider's actions and their vehicle's movements, leading to a more immersive and challenging racing simulation. This includes:

*   **Strategic Rider Lean:** Master tighter turns and achieve greater airtime by strategically leaning your rider into corners.
*   **Vehicle Recovery:** React instantly to maintain control of your vehicle during challenging situations.

The tracks in MX vs. ATV Reflex are designed to be constantly evolving. A real-time deformation engine ensures that the terrain changes with every lap, creating a fresh and unpredictable racing challenge that demands constant adaptation. Players can dig up the track, creating new racing lines and forcing opponents to adapt their strategies. Race across a variety of challenging landscapes, including:

*   Raging rivers
*   Swampy everglades
*   Vast desert dunes

Beyond traditional racing, MX vs. ATV Reflex features an exhilarating freestyle mode. The dual control system is integral to successfully performing a wide range of extreme stunts using intuitive gestures to execute high-flying tricks and impressive freestyle maneuvers. Land stunts flawlessly to maximize your score and achieve victory in MotoX Freestyle events.

Players can select from a diverse range of powerful MX bikes and ATVs, which can also be customized and tuned to optimize performance. The game includes a variety of vehicle types, such as Sport Buggies, Sport Trucks, and UTVs. Experience the intensity of competition with a realistic damage system where vehicle body panels can shatter and break away.

Name: Pure Rock Crawling
Description:
PURE ROCK CRAWLING - Flexible tires, simulated suspension and more ! Pure Rock Crawling is a game build around the concept of making the best tire and the best suspension simulation. The main goal was to create a slow, immersive ride throughout rocky trails, forest hills and flat deserts. That kind of ride is the best way to admire beauty of rock crawling. the Challenge - Pure and Simple The challenge is simple: on trail you will find ten gates composed of two cones, none of which should be touched or tripped. For every gate passed you will be awarded with points, for every cone tripped you will loose them. Be precise and concentrated to gather as much points as you can, but be aware of the ticking clock, so be careful with the throttle ! Too much or too little can doom you. Pure Rock Crawling encourages you to take on this challenge to unlock new maps and customization items.

Name: Last Generation: Survival
Description:
The game takes place in a post-apocalyptic world where robots have taken over the world. After the uprising of robots, due to the mistake of engineers, there were practically no people left. In this dangerous world, any day can be your last. You need to search and create various objects, defend against robots, tools and animals. Explore the terrain, resist enemies, build a shelter, and don't let thirst and hunger stop you from surviving! GAME FEATURES: • Open world • Variety of NPCs • Elements of world exploration • Level system • System of changing day and night • Transport • Various items of equipment • Building • A large number of items • Craft • Mining • Construction system

Name: OVERPASS™
Description:
In OVERPASS™, the scree slopes, steep inclines, tree trunks and bogs present as much of an obstacle to victory as other drivers. At the controls of powerful buggies and quads from major manufacturers, such as Yamaha, Polaris, Arctic Cat and Suzuki, venture off into extreme off-road environments and challenge yourself on the game's highly technical tracks. Cope with vehicle damage, and negotiate the many natural and artificial obstacles in your way to achieve the best time possible. Pure speed is not the name of the game; you'll need to master the realistic terrain physics and unique characteristics of the game's vehicles. Carefully select your UTV or ATV, plot your route intelligently, and manage your acceleration and the various differential and drivetrain options to dominate in local and online competitions. A completely new, extreme off-road experience Over 20 vehicles from top manufacturers, such as Yamaha, Polaris, Arctic Cat and Suzuki Realistic physics gives each vehicle and terrain unique characteristics Over 40 technically demanding tracks across 6 environments with their own specific challenges A full Career Mode: attract sponsors, manage your vehicles and organize your calendar to dominate the season Local and online multiplayer modes, including a split screen mode, to share the experience and to challenge yourself against other players

Name: MX vs ATV Legends
Description:
Race your way to victory on bikes, ATVs and UTVs in MX vs ATV Legends! Featuring massive new open environments, plus a career mode that lets you experience all the risks and rewards of becoming a world-famous professional rider. Become an off-road racing legend in your own right! Your time is now! features: Race in 2-player split-screen and 16-player online mode with squad-based gameplay Compete in the new career mode, where your choices lead to different paths, sponsorship opportunities and special invitational events Experience the brand new Trails mode for high-intensity outdoor racing, with new surprises around every turn, challenging your riding style in new ways Customize your rider and vehicles with the latest parts and gear from the leading manufacturers in off-road racing Ride berms and ruts with higher precision than ever before with the refined physics system.

Name: MX vs ATV All Out
Description:
All Terrain, All Vehicles, All You! MX vs ATV All Out is the complete off-road racing and lifestyle experience! Choose between bikes, ATVs, UTVs, refine your rider style at your private compound and blast across massive open worlds to compete head to head in various game modes! The all new Freestyle mode allows you to win with style and crazy stunts! Or go All Out and show your riding skills in Multiplayer! Features:   2 player split-screen and 16 player online mode Compete in various modes like Supercross, Nationals, Opencross, Waypoint, Tag and more Master insane stunts and test your limits in freestyle mode Turn your private compound into a show room for the all of your customized vehicles Upgrade and tune your vehicles with original performance parts Select your own style from numerous gear companies or choose to compete with one of the many top professional riders from around the world

## Wide Open: A Modern Take on Classic Offroad Racing

**Wide Open** is a game that celebrates the spirit of old-school, top-down offroad racing, aiming to capture the evolution of the genre and bring the thrill of classic arcade racers into the modern era. The developers have focused on creating an experience that reflects advancements in offroad gaming, offering a dynamic and engaging gameplay loop.

### Dynamic Terrain: A New Challenge Every Lap

A standout feature of **Wide Open** is its fully deformable terrain. This means the environment actively changes throughout the race, ensuring no two laps are the same. Players must adapt their strategies on the fly as track conditions evolve.

*   **Real-time Deformation:** Tracks feature unique soil types that react to vehicles. As tires churn the ground, the surface changes, impacting grip and handling.
*   **Diverse Soil Types:** The game includes asphalt, dirt, sand, and mud, each offering a distinct driving experience.

### Extensive Track Selection

**Wide Open** boasts an impressive library of over 64 unique tracks. These tracks are varied in design and challenges, offering a mix of large, fast-paced circuits and tight, technical stadium tracks. Each track features different soil types, contributing to replayability and strategic depth.

### Multiple Vehicles for Every Playstyle

To cater to different player preferences, **Wide Open** offers six distinct vehicles. Each vehicle is engineered with unique handling characteristics, allowing players to select the one that best suits their driving style.

### Relive the Action: The Replay System

The game includes a new replay system that allows players to relive their most triumphant moments and spectacular crashes. With four camera modes available, you can capture the perfect angle to showcase your skills or misfortunes.

*   **Adjustable Camera Options:** Choose from a fully adjustable orbital, top-down camera for a classic view, or a follow camera for a more immersive experience.

### Engaging Single-Player Modes

**Wide Open** provides a robust single-player experience with several race modes:

*   **Race:** Compete against AI opponents in standard races.
*   **Time-trial:** Test your skills against the clock for the fastest lap times.
*   **Freeride:** Explore tracks and practice techniques without pressure.

Players can fully customize race properties, including the number of laps and AI difficulty. The **Race Series** mode offers a progressive challenge with eight distinct series to play through, unlocking new tracks and achievements.

### Multiplayer (Beta) Experience

The multiplayer component is currently in beta, offering two ways to connect with other players:

*   **Official Game Servers:** Connect to official game servers for the most stable and optimized multiplayer experience. These are easily identifiable in the server browser.
*   **Host Your Own Server:** Players can host their own servers and set custom rules for a personalized multiplayer environment.

All race modes and the extensive library of 64+ tracks are available for play in multiplayer.

Name: Smirkers
Description:
This is a happy simple game. Through the transmission of happiness, more faces are full of smiling faces. Game mode: use the mouse to pull the smiley face to make it touch other faces. After many collisions, all faces turn into smiley faces. After winning the game, you can enter the next level. Features of the game: The screen of this game uses a variety of Galaxy effects with a high degree of authenticity. In operation, players only need to control the mouse to put their own tactics into action. On the whole, it's a work that tests the strategy of players. If you like, you can download it and experience it yourself.

Name: Chaos Reborn
Description:
From Julian Gollop, the designer of the original, award-winning XCOM game comes Chaos Reborn - a turn-based wizard combat game with single player Realm Quests and many online options. Between 2 and 6 players can challenge each other to magical duels in a variety of arenas using a spell deck of interesting spells and creatures - including the Gooey Blob, Shadow Wood, and more. There is a monthly league system and several game modes with live or asynchronous battles. You can explore the Realms of Chaos fighting Wizard Lords and Kings, and invite players to join you in co-op battles, or act as an invader in someone else's realm. These Realms can be designed by player Wizard Kings and rated by other players.

Name: Wingspan
Description:
Wingspan - Relaxing Strategy Card Game About Birds for 1 to 5 players. The officially licensed digital adaptation of Wingspan, the winner of the prestigious 2019 Kennerspiel des Jahres board game award. You are bird enthusiasts—researchers, bird watchers, ornithologists, and collectors—seeking to discover and attract the best birds to your network of wildlife preserves. Each bird extends a chain of powerful combinations in one of your habitats. Each habitat focuses on a key aspect of the growth of your preserves. In Wingspan up to 5 players compete to build up their nature preserves in a limited number of turns. Each beautiful bird that you add to your preserve makes you better at laying eggs, drawing cards, or gathering food. Many of the 170 unique birds have powers that echo real life: your hawks will hunt, your pelicans will fish, and your geese will form a flock. Features Relaxing strategy card game where your goal is to discover and attract the best birds. Single player and multiplayer modes for up to five players. Based on award winning, competitive, card-driven, engine-building board game. Hundreds of unique, animated birds with their real life sound recordings. Multiple ways to accumulate points with birds, bonus cards and end-of-round goals.

Embark on a cooperative dungeon-crawling adventure in Demeo, a cross-platform RPG where up to four players unite to combat a dark force threatening the underworld. This game captures the magic of gathering around a tabletop with friends, offering a shared experience of battling evil.

In Demeo, players choose from distinct hero classes, each with unique abilities:

*   **Hunter:** Eagle-eyed and precise.
*   **Sorcerer:** Master of mystical arts.
*   **Assassin:** Deadly and stealthy.
*   **Guardian:** Protective and resilient.
*   **Bard:** Melodic and supportive.
*   **Warlock:** Powerful and ancient.

Choosing your heroes wisely is crucial, as survival depends on teamwork. Once a quest is accepted, players must collaborate to vanquish the unholy force corrupting the world of Gilmerra. Gilmerra is a land of stark contrasts, featuring eight diverse provinces, from serene landscapes to dangerous ancient ruins. This duality is often described as The 5th Earth being an ancient coin with two sides: one light and one dark.

Demeo digitally recreates the tabletop dungeon-crawling experience, fostering table talk, treasure hunts, and turn-based action with high replayability. The developers have a robust content roadmap planned, promising new stories, settings, and villains. To succeed, adventurers need strategy, cunning, and teamwork. Each character's unique approach to magic and monster management is vital for survival. Players construct decks from over 60 unique cards to deal damage, cast spells, and heal their party. As you progress, you'll unlock new cards and abilities, building your hero for glory.

The game's narrative began in the Elven Necropolis, with subsequent adventures exploring realms like the Rat King and Roots of Evil. The latest adventure, Curse of the Serpent Lord, introduces the Ronth Desert and a new playable character, Oana, Warlock of the Ancients. Demeo also features Heroes’ Hangout, a social hub for players to connect, share quest stories, and engage in activities such as meeting new friends, playing mini-games, painting miniatures, learning game tips, listening to music, and customizing avatars. Demeo is available on PC and VR devices, with cross-play multiplayer enabling you to join friends regardless of their platform. The Demeo: PC Edition allows even those without VR headsets to participate.

Name: Demeo: PC Edition
Description:
Adventurers, it’s time to unite! A dark force has taken over the underworld in the RPG dungeon crawler, Demeo, and it’s a world you’re not likely to survive alone. Demeo is a cross-platform cooperative adventure for up to four players that recreates all of the magic and camaraderie of gathering around a tabletop with friends to do battle against the forces of evil. Assume the role of the eagle-eyed hunter, mystical sorcerer, deadly assassin, or protective guardian, melodic bard or powerful warlock. But choose your heroes wisely in this cooperative adventure, for once players have accepted their quest, they must work together to vanquish the unholy force that corrupts everything... or die trying. Gilmerra is a place of contrast, consisting of eight provinces stretching across mountains, forests, caves and oceans. It holds the beauty of a sunset over a meadow where sherp bunnies and brins feed their younglings, or perhaps a wedding taking place in the village of Torp. At the same time, there is also an ugly side. Maybe a reaver drags you down below in a murky river or a vílther attacking you as you explore the ruins of Castle Hollowmark. One might state that Gilmerra is an ancient coin with two sides - one light and one dark. Gathering your best friends for a night of casting spells, rolling dice, and moving miniatures are some of your fondest memories -- and now you can have this same experience with players from anywhere in the world! Demeo recreates all the fun of tabletop dungeon crawling in the digital space by connecting players for table talk, treasure hunts, and plenty of turn-based action with infinite replayability. Demeo has an extensive content map planned to ensure adventurers have a steady supply of new stories, settings, and villains to contend with. It’s dangerous to go alone! Grab your friends and assemble a party, because plumbing the depths of Demeo requires strategy, cunning, and teamwork. Every character has their own unique approach to managing magic and monsters — and they’ll need to work together if they want to survive! Take the mantle of the hunter, sorcerer, assassin, guardian, bard, or warlock, all with their own unique abilities and skills, and use them wisely if you are ever to vanquish the darkness that is Rackarn and Alfaragh. Construct a deck from more than 60 unique cards to deal damage, cast spells, and heal your party as you battle your way through the world of Demeo together. Unlock new cards and abilities for your class as you build your hero for conquest and glory! Our story originated inside the Elven Necropolis — but that was just a mere overture! Following the first Demeo adventure, The Black Sarcophagus, players have already explored the Realm of the Rat King and Roots of Evil — and with our latest adventure Curse of the Serpent Lord, they’ll venture into Ronth Desert for the first time and meet Demeo’s newest playable character Oana, Warlock of the Ancients. Go on an adventure with all your friends, even if they’re questing in VR! Cross-play multiplayer lets you quest alongside players on Meta Quest, Rift, headsets that support Steam VR — as well as your fellow champions. Form a party with your friends, no matter how they prefer to play!

## Welcome to Gloomhaven: A Tactical RPG Adventure

Embark on a perilous journey into the unforgiving lands of Gloomhaven, a world brimming with both the allure of adventure and the promise of ill-gotten gold. As a mercenary leader, your every decision carries weight as you guide your band through treacherous dungeons, dark forests, and eerie caves. Face horrific monsters, reap your rewards, or perish in the attempt. In Gloomhaven, you'll sell your sword to the highest bidder, whether they be city officials or corrupt cultists, for results are paramount, and questions are discouraged.

### The Ultimate Strategy Board Game Adaptation

Gloomhaven is a digital adaptation of the critically acclaimed board game by Isaac Childres, renowned as the highest-rated board game of all time. This unique medieval dark fantasy universe demands strategic planning and clever problem-solving. You can brave this grim world solo or team up with up to three other players in online co-op.

### Mercenary Management and Combat

Assemble a band of 2 to 4 mercenaries, each boasting unique skills and over 1,000 distinct abilities to master. Before venturing into Gloomhaven's dark corners, prepare your deck of ability cards.

*   **Card-Based Combat:** Once inside a dungeon, engage in tactical turn-based combat.
*   **Strategic Card Play:** On each turn, select two cards for every mercenary. You can only use the top half of one card and the bottom half of another, demanding careful planning.
*   **Hex Grid Movement:** Maneuver your mercenaries across the hex grid terrain, utilizing the environment to your advantage.
*   **Resource Management:** Unleash devastating combos and powers, but be mindful of the cost. Ability cards are a scarce resource, as crucial as your life points. Watch out for exhaustion, as every choice carries life-or-death consequences.

### Character Progression and Campaign

Enhance your abilities with enhancements and perks throughout the game. Your mercenaries' power grows with level-ups and new equipment, providing essential advantages for survival. Gear up your band, hunt for powerful artifacts, and secure the favor of the Great Oak, but never let your guard down.

The original Gloomhaven board game's branching campaign features 95 story missions that will test your greed against your morality. Powerful adversaries vie for control of Gloomhaven, while others seek ancient crypts and forgotten relics. Siding with the inhabitants might not always be the most lucrative path, and your chosen route will undoubtedly be paved with difficult decisions.

### The Guildmaster Adventure

Developed in collaboration with the community during early access, the Guildmaster adventure offers over 160 exclusive digital missions. Experience a different side of Gloomhaven with new storylines, quests, maps, and NPCs. Lead your guild of mercenaries through a region plagued by unspeakable horrors, far beyond mere bandits. Select the optimal mercenary combination for each battle and delve into their character stories in this deadly new territory.

Name: Duelyst
Description:
DUELYST is the ultimate collectible tactics game. Head-to-head matches last between five and ten minutes, and focus on thoughtful decision-making and strategic positioning. Players are rewarded with new battle units every monthly season. Assemble your battle deck from over 800 cards across 6 unique Factions and test your mettle against other players online in ranked season ladder and draft mode tournaments. Key Features Infinite Depth : With a tactical battlefield, positioning of your units truly matters. And with over 500 battle units, no battle will ever be the same! Lightning-Fast Matches : Online matches last from five to ten minutes. Get your competitive fix anytime during the day! Competitive : Play against players of equal skill on the monthly Season Ranked Ladder. Or compete in the Gauntlet Draft Mode, where the longer you last, the better the rewards! Classic Pixel Art Aesthetic : Bright and detailed pixel art for all Generals and Cards with full 16-bit spell and effect animations. Immersive Lore : Expansive codex and history spanning 30,000 years to uncover the mysteries of the denizens of Mythron. Jump down the rabbit hole! Competitive head-to-head turn-based battles at its best!

Name: Antihero
Description:
Antihero is a fast-paced digital board game with an (Oliver) Twist. Recruit street urchins, hire thugs, start a gang, upgrade your guild, steal everything... and bribe, blackmail, and assassinate your way to victory. Includes a story-driven campaign, AI skirmishes, and intense online and offline PvP. Underground Street Wars! Play through the story-driven campaign, skirmish against the AI, and jump online in casual and ranked PvP multiplayer. Challenge Your Friends! Invite friends to play asynchronously or increase the pressure in a Live Match. Set up custom “House Rules” and tailor the game to your tastes! Take over the city! Protect what's yours. Infiltrate businesses, sneak into estates, set traps, and steal everything. The city’s riches are yours – if your opponent doesn’t take them first. Sneakery, Stabbery, and Skullduggery! Upgrade your guild, recruit street urchins, hire thugs, start a gang… and bribe, blackmail and assassinate the opposition. There are many paths to the top. Manage a healthy economy. Spend your ill-gotten riches to hire new recruits, upgrade your thieving skills, and acquire deadly weapons. Gold is a thief’s best friend! Rise to the top! See how you rank among all Master Thieves in the in-game leaderboards.

**Dangerous High School Girls in Trouble!™: A Game of Rebellion and Social Satire**

*Dangerous High School Girls in Trouble!™* is a board game that embodies the spirit of Laurel Thatcher Ulrich's famous quote: "well-behaved women seldom make history." This unique game places players in the roles of young women in the 1920s who defy societal norms. Set in a vibrant, quirky American town, the game encourages players to embrace misbehavior as a means of driving social change.

### Challenging the Status Quo

Players lead a bold gang of girls exploring their town and confronting its unwelcoming residents. The core gameplay centers on quick, "naughty" mini-games designed to outwit a culture of intolerance. These engaging challenges include:

*   **Fib:** A game of deception and clever wordplay.
*   **Flirt:** Using charm and wit to influence others.
